en: - You want to call your daddy?

zh: - 嗯 我想告诉他我没事
en: - Yeah, I want to tell him I'm okay.
Lizzy... Be careful of your husband.
I can only lead you to the truth.

zh: 我只能领你找到真相 但不能使你相信它
en: I can't make you believe it.

zh: Elizabeth Keen不是你的妻子 而是你的目标
en: Elizabeth Keen is not your wife, she's your target.

zh: 从咱们见面那天起 你就威胁说要把我丈夫的实情告诉我 我做好准备听你说了
en: You have been threatening to tell me the truth about my husband since the day we met, and I'm ready to listen.

zh: 眼下唯一重要的 就是咱们的直接威胁 即你的丈夫...
en: Right now, the only thing that matters is the immediate threat... Your husband...

zh: 查清楚他的身份和雇主
en: Finding out who he is and who he works for.

zh: 其他都会随之而来的 我保证
en: The rest will come. I promise you.

zh: - 人已上车 正在途中
你已经没事了 很好 休息吧

en: You'll be in America by morning.
We're taking you to Washington, D.C.

zh: 你知道犯人要被送到哪去吗?
en: Do you know where the prisoner was transported to?

zh: 华盛顿 好的 对 我们来处理
en: Uh, Washington. Okay. Yes, we'll take care of it.

zh: Jolene Parker的案子从啥时候开始 从失踪人口案变成谋杀案调查了?
en: Since when did Jolene Parker's case go from missing person to murder investigation?
- And have you seen my keys?

zh: - 警察说他们锁定一个嫌犯了
en: The police say they have a person of interest.

zh: 她有没有可能 就像说的那样 离开镇上搬去了代顿?
en: Isn't it possible that she just left town like she said? Moved to Dayton?

zh: 你天天都会看见这种事...
en: You see this stuff every day...

zh: 你总看见人们受伤 或者被杀...
en: You know, people getting hurt and killed... and...

zh: 我一想到这种事要是发生在你身上 你明白吗...
en: Just the thought of that happening to you, you know...

zh: 答应我 上班的时候一定要加倍小心
en: Just promise me you're as careful as you can be when you're at work.
That's where I saw your keys. Oh.

zh: 我可要迟到大发了 真得惩罚自己一下
en: I'm gonna be so late. I'm gonna give myself a tardy slip.
What would I do without you?

zh: 今天晚上咱们去那个新开的泰国菜餐馆吧
en: Uh, tonight for dinner, let's check out that new thai place.

zh: 我能感觉到 我了解他
en: I can feel it. I know him.

zh: Tom警觉起来了 他表现有点奇怪
en: Tom is on his heels. He's behaving erratically.

zh: 我觉得如果告诉了你 就会影响到你在他身边时的行为
en: I felt if I told you it would inform your behavior with him.

zh: 我发现了尸体 报了警 登记了失踪人口
en: I found her body, called the police, and reported a missing person.

zh: 我相信 他们在调查过程中 一定会找到你和Tom 事实也的确如此
en: I was confident, in the course of their investigation, they would reach out to you and Tom, and they did.

zh: Jolene Parker和Tom无疑是为同一个组织效力...
en: Jolene Parker undoubtedly worked for the same organization as Tom...

zh: 但他们的地位如何 我不知道
en: In what capacity, I have no idea.

zh: 如果他们共同工作 他为什么要杀了她?
en: If they worked together, why would he murder her?

zh: 也许有人命令他这么做
失去了控制 不够理智...
他在为自己争夺一个立足点 而我们 就借机等待 旁观
en: He's scrambling for a foothold, and therein lies our opportunity to wait and to watch.

zh: 但Tom并非我来这里的原因
en: But Tom is not the reason I'm here.

zh: 恐怕有些事情现在正在进行之中
en: I'm afraid there's something quite timely afoot.
The Pavlovich brothers are back in town.

zh: 你说的是在桥上抓走将军女儿的那些人
en: You're talking about the team from the bridge that grabbed the general's daughter.

zh: 在南斯拉夫战争种族清洗时 因参与了Milosevic的卫队而为人所知
en: Cut their teeth on Milosevic's protective detail during the ethnic cleansing of the Yugoslav wars.
We lost six of our men that day.

zh: 据我们所知 Pavlovich兄弟并没有政治目的
en: To the best of our knowledge, the Pavlovich brothers have no political agenda.

zh: 他们的专长是抢劫性犯罪 从绑架勒索到抢出异政分子 他们都干
en: They specialize in snatch-and-grabs ranging from kidnap and ransom to extracting political dissidents.
Reddington says he has a contact.

zh: 是给兄弟两个洗钱的人 他说 他们要去找一个中国科学家 叫李小萍
en: A money launderer sourced by the brothers claims they're coming after a Chinese scientist named Xiaoping Li.
- What do we know about her?

zh: - 18个小时前 我们派了一支秘密小队 把她从云南省的一个秘密劳改所带出来
en: - 18 hours ago, the agency sent an undercover team to extract her from a clandestine labor camp in the Yunnan province.

zh: 专攻病毒和细菌性疾病
en: Specializes in viral and bacterial diseases.

zh: 四个月前 她联系了我们的一个线人 说她愿意透露一个秘密武器项目
en: Four months ago, she signaled to one of our assets that she had a willingness to talk about a secret weapons program.

zh: 一个月后 她因叛国罪入狱
en: A month later, she was jailed for treason.

zh: 一小时后 她就该抵达机场 我们派了人到时陪同她前往中情局总部作个汇报
en: She's scheduled to land at Andrews in an under an hour, and we have a team standing by to escort her to Langley

zh: 我们应该假设 Pavlovich兄弟已经知道了这条路线
en: - for a debriefing. - We got to assume that the Pavlovich brothers already know the route.

zh: 那咱们就更改路线 把她带到这儿来
en: Well, then we'll reroute her. Bring her here.

zh: Echo呼叫Tango 目标已经到达
en: Echo to tango. Uh, asset at drop point.

zh: - 他们说我到这儿以后就安全了
en: They said I'd be safe once I arrived.

zh: - 我们有理由相信你现在正受到威胁
en: We have a credible threat you're being targeted.

zh: 以防万一 我们更改了路线 带她上直升机
en: As a precaution, we've altered our route. Get her up to the chopper.

zh: 我是Donald Ressler FBI 目标呢?
en: Donald Ressler. FBI. Where's the asset?

zh: - 地面转移已经安排好了
撤离计划暴露了 执行后备计划...
en: Evac's been compromised. Moving to beta proto...

zh: Anne Arundel郡警局报告 克罗夫顿两英里外有一架直升机坠落起火
en: Anne Arundel county sheriff's department's reporting a downed aircraft burning two miles outside of Crofton.
There's no witnesses on the ground.

zh: - 我们派人去了 直升机上应该有发现
en: We do have units en route. It's got to be the dump site
- on this chopper. - They knew CIA protocol...

zh: 如果线路暴露了 就会派出空中支援 这些人的大本营不在国内
en: That if the routes were compromised, they'd send in air support. These guys weren't based domestically.

zh: 他们悄悄溜进来 再溜出去
en: They snuck in, and they're gonna sneak out.

zh: 咱们应该和国土安全部合作 发布通缉
en: We should coordinate with homeland, get their faces everywhere.

zh: Malik特工 能告诉我 国家情报局局长为什么要给我打电话吗?
en: Agent Malik, you want to tell me why the director of national intelligence is calling?

zh: 这个案子有什么我不知道的事吗?
en: What don't I know about this case?

zh: 李参加的那个项目 是细菌武器...
en: The program li was working on... It's germ weaponry...

zh: 被世界上几乎所有国家都禁止 叫做白雾项目
en: Banned by nearly every nation on Earth. It's called Whitefog.

zh: 入狱前一天 李小萍发出消息 说她能接触到武器的设计
en: Day before she was jailed, Xiaoping Li sent a message indicating that she had access to the designs.

zh: 如果她能成功拿到 并把那些信息告知我们 那么这就会成为十年来最大的情报叛变
en: If she did, and she shared those with us, that would represent the biggest intelligence coup in a decade.

zh: 所以中国人不能把这件事转变为国际争端
en: That's why the Chinese can't turn this into an international incident.

zh: 那些兄弟们抓走了李小萍
en: The brothers... They took Xiaoping Li.
- Your husband is not in school.

zh: Reddington说他有那些兄弟的线索 他想聊聊
en: Reddington says he has a lead on the brothers. Wants to talk.

zh: NTSB要是对那架坠机的直升机有消息的话 告诉我一声
en: Let me know what NTSB says about that downed aircraft.

zh: 然后短暂地回了一会儿家 又去了Adams Morgan的拉德福德银行
en: Returned home briefly before making a stop at the Radford Bank in Adams Morgan.

zh: 他在这儿坐了快一小时了
en: He's been sitting at that cart for nearly an hour.

zh: - 你知道更不好受的是什么吗?
en: You want to know what's hard?

zh: 在这儿干坐着 而我真正想做的 是亲手把他掐死
en: Sitting here when all I really want to do is get my hands around his throat.

zh: - 咱们不用跟踪他吗? - 跟着呢
Lizzy 等一下 你要干什...
en: Lizzy, wait, wait, wait. What are you do...
The boat... How long for the boat?

zh: 不 不 求你 别这样

en: I was gonna ask you the same question.
I found it in the basement.

zh: 原来在那儿啊 我一直在找呢
en: That's where that was. I've been looking for it.
My father gave it to me.

zh: 用起来也挺好 看着像新的似的

en: Why haven't I seen this before?
Your pot is gonna boil over.

zh: 我以为咱们要去吃泰国菜
en: I thought we were going out for thai.

zh: 嗯 我就是觉得 单独呆在家也挺好的...
en: Yeah, well, I just thought it might be nice, you know, to stay home alone... Just you and me.

zh: 他今天又开始捣乱 因为他妈妈总给他带水果卷 而他糖一吃多就嗨了 所以...
en: He was acting up again 'cause his mom keeps packing these fruit roll-ups, and they give him this satanic sugar high, you know.

zh: 我还去了趟国家档案馆 想给孩子们订参观票
en: Oh, uh, I did stop by the national archives just to maybe book a field trip for the kids.

zh: 我简直能发誓在那儿看见你了
en: I, uh... I could have sworn that I saw you there.
There was a woman there, and she looked just like you.

zh: 不 我倒想呢 我在办公室里闷了一天
en: Ah, no, I wish. I was cooped up in the office all day.

zh: 是吗 我早该想到的
不管她是谁 都不可能有你现在一半的美貌
en: Well, whoever she was, she could not have been half as beautiful as you are right now.
Uh, keep stirring. I'm gonna walk the dog.

zh: 来吧 伙计 快点
en: Come on, bud. Hey, hey, hey.
Come here. Hey, hey, hey. Where you going?
Yes, you're a good boy. Yes, you are.

zh: 我马上回来 走吧 伙计 走
en: - I'll be right back. Come on, bud. - Come on.
Come on. Such a good boy.
You're a good boy. Yes, yes, yes.

zh: - Bantam金融 您需要什么服务?
en: Bantam finance. How may I direct your call?

zh: - 你好 我的账户有点问题
en: Hi. I'm having a problem with my account.

zh: 知更鸟知道了 请求即刻撤离
en: Proceed. Mockingbird knows. Requesting immediate evac.

zh: Lizzy 我理解你今天为什么要去追Tom
en: Lizzy, I understand why you went after Tom today.
The instinct to jump in is...

zh: 但那不会给你带来好的结果
en: But it isn't gonna serve you well here.

zh: 而从情感方面来讲 这种感觉一定就是 难以言喻的背叛和辜负
en: And from the emotional point of view, this must feel like an extraordinary violation and betrayal.

zh: 但对Tom而言 这是工作
en: But for Tom it was business.

zh: 你知道吗 我们那天还做爱了?
en: Do you know we had sex the other night?

zh: 你知不知道那让我觉得多恶心?
en: Do you have any idea how filthy that makes me feel?

zh: 不幸的是 Lizzy 你已经深陷泥潭了
en: Unfortunately, Lizzy, you're chest-deep in filth, and you're gonna have to wade through it

zh: - 你只能跋涉过去 走向对岸
en: - to get to the other side.
- I fell in love with him.

zh: 能跟他有个孩子让我那么激动
en: I was excited to have a child with him.

zh: 我选择了他 让我幸福 给我安全感
en: He was the one person I chose in my life who made me happy, who made me feel safe.

zh: 但我现在是个什么样子?
en: What does that say about me?

zh: 我们曾经有过的一切 都不过是我虚构的想象...
en: Everything that we had was just a figment of my imagination...

zh: 它就摆在我眼前 我却没看见
en: It was right in front of my face, and I didn't see it.

zh: 只有时间 能让你再次找回自己
en: Time is the only thing that will allow you to find yourself again.

zh: 如果你又要让我耐心 我发誓...
en: If you tell me to be patient one more time, I swear to God...

zh: 我会找到他 找到答案 不管有没有你的帮助 我都会这么做
en: I am going to find him, I'm gonna find answers, and I'm going to do it with or without your help.

zh: 这个案子 我需要线索
en: The case. I need a lead.

zh: Lizzy 如果你想找到Pavlovich兄弟现在何处 就得先找到他们曾去过哪里
en: Lizzy, if you want to find where the Pavlovich brothers are, you need to find out where they've been.

zh: Pavlovich兄弟烧掉直升机是想掩盖证据 比如DNA和指纹
en: The Pavlovich brothers burnt that chopper to cover up evidence... DNA, fingerprints.

zh: 那些东西是能确定他们身份的 但直升机呢?
en: Those things might have identified the brothers, but what about the chopper?

zh: 尾翼编号是假的 直升机也被重漆过
en: The tail numbers were falsified, and the chopper was repainted.

zh: 这就是他们的做法 但他们是在哪儿做的?
en: That's what they did, but where did they do it?

zh: 我们可以做更深层的鉴证分析吗?
en: Is there a deeper forensic analysis we can run?

zh: 热传导器中有什么微粒?
en: What particulates were in the heat exchange?
Was there moisture in the compressor?

zh: 每滴燃料都要分析 每颗沙子都要追踪
en: Analyze every drop of fuel. Track every grain of sand.

zh: 我要知道那架飞机去过哪里
en: I want to know where that chopper's been.

zh: 抱歉 伙计 这不是出租车
en: I'm sorry, man. Not for hire.

zh: 你好 Symir 我就开门见山了
en: Hello, Symir. I'll be brief and to the point.

zh: 是在国家档案馆外面上车的
en: Picked him up outside the national archives.

zh: Symir 你应该收下这钱的
en: Ohh, Symir. You should have taken the money.
Your passenger... Where'd you drop him?

zh: 我现在一想起导数 就想起当初会堂的那个导师...
en: I can't even think about derivatives without thinking of that tutor in manor hall...

zh: 她从来不穿内衣 走路老是一跳一跳的
en: Never wore a brassiere; Always a bounce in her step.

zh: 我已经交代了 也合作了
你不用复印我的驾照和信用卡
en: You don't need to copy my driver's license, my credit cards.

zh: 我们只是想保证能知道去哪找你
en: We just want to make sure we know where to reach you,

zh: Geoffrey P. Seevers 万一我们以后有别的问题呢
en: Geoffrey P. Seevers, should we have more questions.
So, tell me about the book.

zh: 我把它拿走 送到别的地方
en: I pick up and drop off.

zh: 我不知道其他人的名字 只是送信的
en: I don't know names. I'm the messenger.

zh: 这种送货的活你干了多少次了?
en: How many times have you done this... these drops?

zh: 把你每一次送货的地方写下来...
en: I need you to write down the location of each drop you've made...

zh: 取货和卸货的地点都要
en: The pickup and the drop location.

zh: 帕格萨斯普林斯公共图书馆?
我原先有个水泵就坏在了帕格萨斯普林斯
en: I had a water pump go out in Pagosa Springs.

zh: 就在狼溪那座破山那儿
en: Bitch of a mountain... Wolf Creek Pass.

zh: 我本以为要在那儿和山民过一辈子了 好在有个大好人在当地修车厂帮我修好了
en: Thought I was gonna end up living out there with the hill people until this Teddy bear of a man fixed me up at the local garage.

zh: 我永远不会忘记他 他叫Tracy Woods
en: I'll never forget him. Tracy Woods.
You don't know Tracy, do you?

zh: 他穿个皮坎肩 留着小胡子...
不知道他是不是还在修水泵
en: I wonder if he's still fixing water pumps.

zh: 总之 这会是永远美好的回忆
en: Anyway, it'll always be a fond memory.

zh: 送走 或者还回去 反正你的上司让你干嘛就干嘛
en: You're gonna deliver it or return it or whatever the people you work for want you to do with it.

zh: 你要记住 咱们这次谈话从来没发生过
en: And as far as you're concerned, we never had this conversation.

zh: 但愿你不着急 这可能要花个几分钟
en: I hope you have nothing pressing. This may take a minute or three.
You sure you don't know him?

zh: 好了 我也不想对气象色谱
或者齿轮润滑油有这么多了解 不过我觉得Reddington先生发现了什么
en: Okay, I never wanted to know this much about gas chromatography or gear lubricants, but I think Mr. Reddington is onto something.

zh: 我们调出了NTSB的实验室报告 直升机引擎里检测到了两种不同的混合物
en: We pulled the lab reports from the NTSB, and the chopper's engine tested positive for two distinct compounds.

zh: 一种是乙烯磷 能够催熟烟草
en: The first is ethephon, which is a ripening agent for tobacco.
- And how does that help us?

zh: 这个地区的烟草产量十分低下
en: Tobacco production's way down in this area.

zh: 从1998年起 联邦政府给农民补贴 让他们不要种烟草
en: In fact, since 1998, the federal government is actually paying farmers not to grow it.
Okay, but there's still plenty of tobacco farms.

zh: 我同意 这就引出了二号化学混合物
en: I agree, which brings us to chemical compound number two.

zh: - 这个是用于甜玉米种植的
en: This one is used to grow sweet corn.

zh: - 我们把这两者交叉对比?
没错 我们要找那种农药厂商 之前供应烟草种植者
en: Exactly. We are looking for a pesticide manufacturer who used to supply tobacco growers but made the transition to corn.

zh: - 而后来转向了玉米种植业 - 找到了多少?
en: And how many of those are there?

zh: 这当中 有11家都不在直升机的燃料允许范围内
en: Of those, 11 are outside of the fuel range of this chopper.

zh: 剩下的这六家 只有一家有足够大的建筑 可以把偷来的直升机藏起来并进行整修
en: Uh, of the other six, uh, only one has a structure large enough to get that stolen helicopter out of view and under construction.

zh: 要我说 那就是他们的据点
en: If I had to bet, I'd say that's their staging site.

zh: 在拐角那边 半个街区
en: It's around the corner, half a block up.

zh: 我看见了七个外部摄像头 这还是能看见的
en: I make seven exterior cameras, and those are the ones they want us to see.

zh: 这个地点也在那张交货单子上?
en: And it's on the list of drop sites I gave you?
How long has Mr. Keen been inside?

zh: 我四个小时前跟踪他过来的
en: I tailed him here four hours ago.
- You want me to call Sabusawa?

zh: - 那最好不过 但他正在厄瓜多尔捞人呢
en: - That would be ideal, but he's working an extraction in Ecuador.

zh: 那你打算怎么把Keen从那土房子里弄出来?
en: Then how do you plan on getting keen out of that concrete box?
- We have a lead on Xiaoping Li.

zh: - 我们认为她被关在Falls Church的哈利法克斯农化所
en: - Tell me. - We think she's being held at Halifax Agro-Chem in Falls Church.
I don't want to talk about Tom with you.

zh: 要如何行动 你有你的观点 我也有我的
en: You have your opinion on how to proceed, and I have mine.

zh: 你别费劲了 我来处理Tom
en: Just don't bother yourself. I'll deal with Tom.

zh: Lizzy 我保证那不会有任何结果 你也绝不会满意
en: Lizzy, I assure you that will yield no answers and little satisfaction.
Well, I'll find out, won't I?

zh: - 我希望能说服你别这么做
en: I wish I could talk you out of this.

zh: 下午好 先生们 我是Raymond Reddington
en: Good afternoon, gentlemen. I'm Raymond Reddington.

zh: 后退 目标已经上路 我们正向车子移动
en: Fall back. Asset en route. We're moving to the cars.
I mean, it looks like some sort of serial number.

zh: 因为我唯一知道的 会把v和g连起来用的单词是avgolemono
en: Because the only word I know that contains the letters "v-g" together is avgolemono.
I don't know what that is.

zh: 鸡汁 蛋黄 柠檬汁混合在一起
en: Chicken stock, egg yolks, and lemon juice.

zh: 重点在于 李小萍也许是给我们留了一条信息
en: The point is, maybe Xiaoping Li left us a message.

zh: 我把这个组合在车辆管理局的注册信息里查一下
en: I'll run the letter combination against the DMV registry
- and see if we can get a hit.
- I can't get ahold of Reddington.

zh: - 你告诉他李小萍被关在哪儿了?
en: - You told him the location where the brothers were holding Xiaoping Li, right?

zh: 你不觉得太凑巧了吗 我们一去 他们就不见了
en: - Mm-hmm. - Don't you find it a hell of a coincidence that we show up there, they're gone, and now we can't get ahold of Reddington?

zh: Red让我们找上Pavlovich兄弟 因为他知道那会使他找到李小萍
en: Red put us on to the Pavlovich brothers because he knew it would lead him straight to Xiaoping Li.

zh: 那女人值好几百万 - 你要去哪?
- 我要去找Reddington 找找答案
en: Where are you going? I'm going to find Reddington, get some answers.
Reddington, I need you to call me, please.
I need some help with the case.

zh: Reddington送来个礼物 祝你开心
我们这两年是在干什么?
en: Two years we spent. On what?

zh: 你在不在乎你对我做了什么...
en: Do you care at all what you've done to me...
What you've done to my life?
What has it done to you?
Who could do such a thing?

zh: 你会以为 找到你 阻止你 就能让我开心
你以为你会在监狱度过余生
en: You'd think I'd be happy you're gonna spend the rest of your life in prison.

zh: 你以为我能从中得到一些满足 但我不会 因为...
en: You'd think I'd get some satisfaction out of that, but I don't because nothing...

zh: 无论什么判决 惩罚 或是复仇 都无法弥补你做下的事情
en: No sentence, no punishment, no revenge, could ever come close to making up for what you've done.
We were going to have a baby to...
You begged me to have a baby!
You, this... Everything was a lie!

zh: 都是谎言! 我的生活是个谎言!
每种感情 每段回忆...
对你的妻子说句话吧 她要死在你面前了
en: Say something to your wife, who's dying in front of you.
It was those brown leather shoes.

zh: 那是我们第三次或第四次约会时
en: It was our third or maybe fourth date.

zh: 你来到我在霍尔斯特德的家 我们订外卖
en: You'd come over to my place on Halstead, and we ordered, uh...

zh: 租电影 但没能看完 因为我们后来...
en: Takeout and rented a movie that we never finished because we ended up...

zh: 而你要早起去工作 我起床时 你已经走了
en: And you had to get up early for work. And by the time I got up, you were gone.

zh: 我记得我衣冠不整地站在鞋架前 想拿我的鞋 然后我看见你在我鞋子的尘土上
en: I remember standing in the closet, half-dressed, reaching for my shoes when I saw that you had drawn this little heart
In the dust on my shoe.

zh: 从那一刻起 我就感觉...
en: And ever since that moment, I just felt...
I knew that I had you.

zh: 我心里有一部分希望你没能爱我...
en: Part of me didn't want it to work...

zh: 你知道吧 就是那个... 裸着大喊"找到了"的人
en: You know, uh, the... the naked guy who shouted "Eureka."

zh: 她为什么要写个数学公式?
en: Why would she write down a mathematical formula?

zh: 也许这是种他们不懂的密码或者语言
en: Maybe it's some kind of a code or a language they don't understand.

zh: 阿基米德原理说 浸在液体中的物体 - 受到浮力作用 而大小...
en: Archimedes' principle indicates that the upward buoyant force which is exerted on a body immersed in fluid,
Um, water displacement. Boats displace water.

zh: 她在告诉我们 他们要怎样送她出国
en: She's trying to tell us how they're getting her out of the country.

zh: 把那几个兄弟和李小萍的照片 送到东海岸的所有港务局
en: Get photos of the brothers and Xiaoping Li to every port authority on the eastern seaboard.
What are you gonna tell him?

zh: 李小萍的案子有进展吗?
en: Where are we on Xiaoping Li?

zh: 他们要用船把她运出国
en: They're trying to ship her out of the country.

zh: 我们在梳理旅客名单 你在哪?
en: We're combing through the manifests now. Where are you?
Waiting on Reddington. He still hasn't shown.

zh: 我告诉你 Keen 他利用了咱们
en: I'm telling you, Keen. He used us.

zh: 你记得他们做了什么 桥上出事那天你也在
en: You remember what they did. You were there that day on the bridge.

zh: 等咱们抓到他们 我希望你也在场
en: When we take them down, I want you to be there.
I will be, just as soon as...
I'm gonna have to call you back.

zh: 李小萍 你带走了她
你利用FBI和Pavlovich兄弟抓到了Tom 然后呢 再抓李小萍?
en: You used the FBI and the Pavlovich brothers to get to Tom and what, get Xiaoping?

zh: 细菌武器对我没有用啊 至于FBI?
en: I have no use for germ warfare. And as for using the FBI?

zh: 要不是因为能双方获益 我最开始就不会加入合作
en: I wouldn't be in this relationship if there wasn't a mutual benefit.

zh: 我试过把她交易过来 但谈判没成
en: I tried to bargain for her life, but negotiations went sideways.

zh: 为了抓到Tom 我只能做这么多了
en: It was all I could do to get Tom.

zh: 如果她被送回中国 她会死的
en: If she gets sent back to the Chinese, - she's gonna die.

zh: - 把你掌握的消息告诉我
我们认为他们要把她安排在货船上 我们不确定
en: We think they're putting her on a cargo ship. We're not sure.

zh: - 我们在查旅客名单 时间表 行船路线
en: We're looking over the manifests, timetables,
- and shipping routes. - She isn't cargo, Lizzy.

zh: 她是走私货 这是场走私行动
en: She's contraband. This is a smuggling operation.

zh: 而任何从切萨皮克走私的人或物 Rolph Cisco都知道
en: And nothing gets smuggled in or out of the chesapeake without Rolph Cisco knowing about it.
Have Donald pay him a visit.
What is his obsession with you?

zh: 你俩真不是爸爸和女儿的关系吗?
en: You guys got, like, a, uh, daddy-daughter thing going on?
Is he gonna make me talk?
Tell us about the Pavlovich brothers.
You don't have it in you.

zh: 放松 放松 我们是好人
en: Easy, easy. We're the good guys. Here.

zh: 对 没错 如果你想要同情 就最好先从诚实开始
en: Yeah, I did. If you're looking for sympathy, you might want to start with honesty.

zh: 至于诚实 举个例子吧 Tom
en: Here's an example of honesty, Tom.
You've been making me pancakes for two years.

zh: 如果你想铐住一个人 就别弄断他的拇指
en: If you're gonna handcuff somebody, don't break their thumb.

zh: 一只铐着手 一只铐上栏杆 快点
en: One on the wrist. One on the banister.
I am not here to hurt you, Liz.

zh: 我的工作从来都不是伤害你
en: My job was never to hurt you.
I'm one of the good guys.

zh: 他不是你想象的那个样子
拿它去拉德福德银行 3929号柜
en: Take it to radford bank. Box number 3929.
He is not who you think he is.
You want me to stop him?

zh: 不 让尾巴们去跟踪就好
en: No, we'll just let the tail follow him.

zh: 白雾是中国政府五年前
en: Whitefog was a black project started
By the Chinese government five years ago.

zh: 能告诉我Keen特工是怎么回事吗?
en: You want to tell me what's going on with Agent Keen?

zh: 别告诉我你不知道 去找Reddington了?
en: And don't tell me you don't know. Was it Reddington?

zh: 我觉得她家里有点麻烦 长官
en: I think she's having troubles at home, sir.

zh: 你一直没让他离开你的视线
en: This whole time, you've never let him out of your sight.
Your people are following him now.
How is this all gonna end?
And then something new will begin.

zh: 你理应获得最好的生活 Lizzy
en: You deserve the best in life, Lizzy.

zh: 我知道这话 从我这个给你带来最糟的事的人 嘴里说出来有点怪
en: I know that sounds odd coming from a man who has brought you some of the worst,

zh: 但这就是Tom必须那么努力的原因...
en: but it's the reason why Tom had to work so hard to be that for you...

zh: 他要善良 体贴 逗你笑 让你爱上他
en: To be kind, to be thoughtful, make you laugh, to make you love him.
A Sun-play of the Ages _ INTOLERANCE

zh: 大卫・沃克・格里菲斯 人类对爱的追求从未停止
en: A drama of Comparisons _ ACT I

zh: 本剧由发生在四个不同 历史阶段的独立故事组成
en: Our play is made up of four separate stories, laid in different periods of history, each with its own set of characters.

zh: 每个故事所表现的都是仇恨、 不宽容与仁爱、宽容的斗争
en: ــــــــــــــــ Each story shows how hatred and intolerance, through all the ages, have battled against love and charity.

zh: 在永无休止地摆动着的摇篮里
en: ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ Out of the cradle endlessly rocking. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 第一个故事 现代的摇篮 在一座西部城市里 有几位雄心勃勃的女士
en: ¶ Our first story...out of the cradle of the present.

zh: 她们组织在一起 "发扬"人道主义
en: ¶ In a western city we find certain ambitious ladies banded together for the "uplift" of humanity.
Even reform movements must be financed.

zh: 如果我们能拉拢到 詹金斯小姐...
en: "If we can only interest Miss Jenkins...

zh: 玛丽・T・詹金斯的工作很悠闲 她是工业寡头的单身妹妹
en: A little affair is being given by Mary T. Jenkins, unmarried sister of the autocratic industrial overlord... ـــــــ

zh: 故事的女主角与父亲住在一起 父亲在詹金斯的工厂打工 每天工资$2.75
en: The girl of our story keeps house for her father who works in a Jenkins mill.

zh: 他们有一处小庭院， 养着四只母鸡，四只鹅 生活得还算快乐和满足
en: With a wage of $2.75 a day, a little garden, four hens, ditto geese, and a fair measure of happiness and contentment.

zh: 一个她不认识的小伙子 和他父亲在同一间工厂工作
en: The Boy, unacquainted with the little Dear One, is employed with his father in the same mill. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 时间将带走青春和欢笑
en: ¶ Age intolerant of youth and laughter.

zh: "未婚妇女促进会"成功 约见了詹金斯小姐寻求资助
en: ¶ "The vestal virgins of Uplift" succeed in reaching Miss Jenkins in their search for funds.

zh: 古老的耶路撒冷 是座富饶美丽的城市
en: The Gospels of Matthew and Luke identify Bethlehem as the birthplace of Jesus.

zh: 在加利利的迦南的房子
en: The house in Cana of Galilee

zh: 法利赛人当中有伪君子
法利赛人代表着有学问的犹太人 后来名誉却毁于伪君子之手
en: Pharisee... A learned Jewish party, the name possibly brought into disrepute later by hypocrites among them.

zh: 法利赛人祈求他们 停止这种行为
en: When these Pharisees pray they demand that all action cease.

zh: 感谢你， 我比其他人都好
en: Oh Lord, I thank thee that I am better than other men.

zh: 另一个过去的时代，公元1572年
巴黎，党同伐异的温床 凯瑟琳・德・梅第奇的时代
她的儿子 法国国王查理九世
en: Paris, a hotbed of intolerance, in the time of Catherine de Medici, and her son Charles IX, King of France.

zh: 查理九世正在接见他的弟弟 法国的大亲王，安茹公爵
en: Charles IX receiving his brother, Monsieur La France, Duc d'Anjou.

zh: 娇气的大亲王是王位继承人， 喜好宠物与娱乐
en: ¶ The heir to the throne, the effeminate Monsieur La France.

zh: 太后凯瑟琳・德・梅第奇是天主教徒 她暗中排挤雨格诺教 雨格诺教是这个时期的新教派
en: Catherine de Medici, queen-mother who covers her political intolerance of the Huguenots... beneath the cloak of the great Catholic Religion.

zh: 伟大的新教领导人 海军上将科利尼
en: The great Protestant leader, the Admiral Coligny, head of the Huguenot party.

zh: 多完美的男人，如果海军上将 科利尼能跟我们合作
en: What a wonderful man, the Admiral Coligny, if he only thought as we do.

zh: 多完美的国王， 如果他能跟我们合作
en: What a wonderful king, if he only thought as we do.

zh: 国王对科利尼的偏爱 引起了反对者的憎恨
en: The King's favor to Coligny increases the hatred of the opposite party.

zh: 瓦卢瓦的玛格丽特 （玛戈王后）
布朗・埃斯，雨格诺教家庭 还有她的情人，普鲁斯普・拉托
en: Brown Eyes, her family of the Huguenot party, and her sweetheart, Prosper Latour.

zh: 布朗・埃斯引起了雇佣兵的注意
en: Brown Eyes attracts the attention of a mercenary soldier.
A diversion of the mill workers.
To every thing there is a season...

zh: 有时使人衰伤，有时使人快乐...
en: a time to mourn and a time to dance......
He hath made everything beautiful in his time. Ecclesiastes iii.

zh: 这位小可爱， 正在享受人生
en: The little Dear One having the time of her life. ـــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــ

zh: 詹金斯收到她哥哥 为发扬人道主义而捐献的支票
en: Miss Jenkins receives a check from her brother for the purposed uplift of humanity. ـــــــــ

zh: 詹金斯研究工人们的习惯
en: Jenkins studies his employes' habits. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 十点了，他们应该休息 明天还要工作
en: Ten o'clock! They should be in bed so they can work tomorrow. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 伯沙撒时期，公元前539年 巴比伦城门外 商人们、农民们、 坐大象来的东印度人、埃及人
en: Outside of Imgur Bel, the great gate of Babylon, in the time of Belshazzar, 539 B.C.

zh: 努米底亚人和 野心勃勃的波斯人 侦察着这座城市
en: Merchants, farmers, East Indians, with trains of elephants, Egyptians, Numidians, and ambitious Persians spying upon the city.

zh: 这位山中少女来自苏萨娜山
en: The Mountain Girl down from the mountains of Suisana.

zh: 唱诗人雷波索德 马尔杜克神殿主祭师的间谍
en: The Rhapsode, a Warrior singer... poet agent of the High Priest of Bel.

zh: 贝尔・马尔杜克神殿的主祭师 巴比伦神殿的最高权威 嫉妒地看着对手 女神伊师塔的雕像
en: The priest of Bel-Marduk, supreme God of Babylon, jealously watches the image of the rival goddess,

zh: 被神圣的方舟运进这座城市
en: Ishtar, enter the city, borne in a sacred ark.

zh: 最爱的 在我后院的土堆中 长有许多小花... 七朵百合
en: Dearest one...in the ash heaps of my backyard there will be small flowers; seven lilies...if thou wilt love me...but a little.

zh: 爱神伊师塔，我向你鞠躬四十九次 请让她喜欢这个吻
en: Ishtar, goddess of love, seven times seven I bow to thee.

zh: 这位双剑士，高大威猛 是伯沙撒的贴身侍卫
en: The two-sword man, Belshazzar's faithful guard, a mighty man of valor.

zh: 不宽容的主祭师 看着对手的神殿落成 知道他失去了无上的权力
en: The jealous priest of Bel sees in the enthronement of Ishtar loss of his religious power.

zh: 巴比伦的大门 从来没有被敌人攻陷过
en: The gate of Imgur Bel which no enemy has ever been able to force.

zh: 伊师塔神殿载歌载舞的少女
en: Hand maidens from Ishtar's Temple of Love and Laughter.

zh: 伯沙撒心爱的王妃 在飘着松香， 用纯金装饰的房间里 在王者的后宫中
en: The Princess Beloved, favorite of Belshazzar, in a room of scented cedar, plated with pure gold, in the hareem of My Lord the Prince.

zh: 伯沙撒送来了一朵爱之花
他已经被她像阳光般 圣洁的美丽所俘虏
en: ¶ Stricken by her pale beauty, as though by white lightning.

zh: 高傲的山中女孩与哥哥之间 有些小问题 他带着问题来到法院
en: The brother of the Mountain Girl, having some slight trouble with his high-spirited sister, takes the matter to the court.

zh: 世上最著名的审判法院
en: The first known court of justice in the world.

zh: 巴比伦的审判通过汉摩拉比法典 保护弱者免受强者欺负
en: Note: ... Babylonian justice according to the code of Hammurabi, protecting the weak from the strong.

zh: 山中女孩的哥哥告诉法官 她已经无药可救了
en: The Mountain Girl's brother tells the Judge that she is incorrigible.

zh: 判决是把她送到婚姻市场上 找个好丈夫
en: The judgment is that she be sent to the marriage market to get a good husband.

zh: 不停摆动的摇篮 时空的联合者 欢乐和悲伤的歌唱者
en: Endlessly rocks the cradle uniter of here and hereafter. Chanter of sorrows and joys.
Order a ten percent cut in all wages.
A great strike follows. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 他们压榨我们的钱 并以改造我们来宣传他们自己
en: They squeeze the money out of us and use it to advertise themselves by reforming us. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 饥饿的人等着代替他们
en: Hungry ones that wait to take their places. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 赶走所有的人 命运的编织机 为小伙子的父亲编织了死亡
en: Clear the property. The Loom of Fate weaves death for the Boy's father.

zh: 等了一段时间后， 大家都离开了
en: The exodus after a time of waiting.

zh: 被迫到别处找工作 大批詹金斯工厂的受害人 涌向附近的大城市
en: Forced to seek employment elsewhere, many victims of the Jenkins' aspirations go to the great city nearby...the Boy among them.

zh: 小可爱和她的父亲也是如此
en: So too, the Dear One...and her father.

zh: 命运引导他们来到相同的地方
en: Fate leads them all to the same district.

zh: 小伙子最终没能找到工作
en: Adversity causes the friendless one to listen to a Musketeer of the Slums.

zh: 婚姻市场 售卖美女所赚的钱
交给普通的妇女作嫁妆 这样所有的人都会找到老公 感觉到幸福
en: ¶ Money paid for beautiful women given to homely ones, as dowers, so that all may have husbands and be happy.

zh: 女人们都经过精心打扮
en: Lips brilliant with juice of henna; eyes lined with kohl.

zh: 根据希罗多德的记载， 被驱逐到街上的女人
en: Note: ... According to Herodotus, women corresponding to our street outcasts, for life the wards of Church and State.

zh: 姑娘们扭动着身躯， 与现代没有多少差别
en: The girl's turn...perhaps not so different from the modern way.

zh: 只要能付得起钱，你就可以 在婚姻市场买到情人
en: One who would give his life if he were able to buy the merchandise held so lightly upon Love's market.

zh: 男人都喜欢 这样温柔的野玫瑰 温柔可爱的美人
en: And man will be happy with this sweet wild rose...this gentle dove.

zh: 不许摸我的裙子， 否则把你的眼睛挖出来
en: But touch my skirt and I'll scratch your eyes out!

zh: 这带刺的"野玫瑰" 说话粗鲁，脾气暴躁
en: The temper and rough language of the "wild rose" prove her to be not without thorns.

zh: 她的价格是三分之一迈纳银
en: With her goes a third of a mina of silver.

zh: 巴比伦没有 比我更温柔可爱的人了
en: You refuse me? There is no gentler dove in all Babylon than I.

zh: 伯沙撒帮助父亲治理国家
en: Belshazzar now ruling for his father.

zh: 众国之王！ 王中之王！

en: Oh, king of kings! Oh, masu!

zh: 这些臭虫不愿买我做妻子! 我非常伤心
en: Oh, scorching sun of the mid-day, these bugs will not buy me for a wife!

zh: 这个印章给你婚姻自由
en: This seal gives you freedom to marry or not to marry...

zh: 是否听命于爱神 由你自己决定
en: to be consecrated to the goddess of love or not as thou choosest.

zh: 雷波索德正在游说 改变了信仰的人
en: The Rhapsode, working in the tenements, to convert backsliders to the true worship of Bel.
Put away thy perfumes, thy garments of Assinnu, the female man.

zh: 你穿着祭师阿师奴的衣服 （指女装打扮的男人）
en: I shall love none but a soldier.

zh: 这位受爱情折磨的山中女孩 发誓要永远效忠伯沙撒
en: The love-smitten Mountain Girl vows eternal allegiance to Belshazzar.

zh: 在爱的神殿里，圣洁的少女 生命之火
en: In the Love Temple. Virgins of the sacred fires of Life.

zh: 他答应为她建一座城市 和她记忆中的 异国城市一样漂亮
en: He promises to build her a city, beautiful as the memory of her own in a foreign land.

zh: 你神秘而迷人的身躯 比生命之谜更伟大
en: The fragrant mystery of your body is greater than the mystery of life.

zh: 国王伯沙撒，巴比伦年轻的国王
en: Belshazzar the king, The very young king, of Babylon...

zh: 还有他心爱的王妃 他最纯洁、最珍贵的宝贝
他众多舞姬中最宠幸的一位
en: Clearest and rarest of all his pearls, The very dearest one of his dancing girls.

zh: 詹金斯罢工迫使 小可爱来到新环境 她的爱和梦想没有改变
en: The Dear One in her new environment forced upon her by the Jenkins strike.

zh: 我要像她一样走路， 也许每个人都会喜欢我
en: I'll walk like her and maybe everybody will like me too.

zh: 就在附近， 再看看这个孤单的人
en: In the same neighborhood, the friendless one again. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 走廊的另一边 贫民窟的组织
en: Across the hall, The Musketeer of the Slums. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 小伙子，现在是这条街上的流氓， 贫民窟组织的成员
en: The Boy, now a barbarian of the streets, a member of The Musketeer's band. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ
Imitating the walk of the girl of the street. ــــــــــــ ــــــــــــ

zh: 小伙子有了新目标，他要隐瞒身份 他们第一次相遇
en: ¶ The Boy's news stand, a blind for his real operations. ¶ Their first meeting. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ
The new walk seems to bring results. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ
Say kid, you're going to be my chicken. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ
Pray to be forgiven! ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 适应不了新的环境， 小可爱的父亲去世了
en: Inability to meet new conditions brings untimely death to The Dear One's father. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ
According to some, Jesus lived in this city until he was 12 years old. Out of the cradle, endlessly rocking...

zh: 在加利利的迦南有一场婚礼
en: There was a marriage in Cana of Galilee.

zh: 仪式依照塞斯、黑斯廷斯、 布朗和蒂索特的描述
en: John ii-1. Note: ... The ceremony according to Sayce, Hastings, Brown and Tissot.

zh: 让新娘品尝新的面包屑
en: The first sop to the bride.
Be ye as harmless as doves.

zh: 多管闲事的人 "这里有太多在吵闹和狂欢的人"
en: Meddlers then as now. "There is too much revelry and pleasure-seeking among the people."

zh: 可怜的新郎新娘感到非常痛苦 因为酒已经喝光了
en: ¶ The poor bride and groom suffer great humiliation. ¶ The wine has given out.

zh: 第一个奇迹 将水变成酒
en: ¶ The first miracle. ¶ The turning of water into wine.

zh: 酒是用来祭祀上帝的， 喝酒是犹太教的传统
en: Note: ... Wine was deemed a fit offering to God; the drinking of it a part of the Jewish religion.

zh: 自古以来，小爱神都用他 细微而非凡的方法行事
en: Now for a time the little love god works his small but mighty way, in other days the same as now.

zh: 布朗・埃斯和她幸福的家人 还不知道厄运正在逼近
en: Brown Eyes and her family happily ignorant of the web intolerance is weaving around them.

zh: 热情让雇佣兵变得大胆
en: The mercenary made bold by passion.

zh: 对小可爱来说， 时间和青春治愈了伤痛
en: For the little Dear One, passing days and youth have healed the wound.
The end of a "Coney Island" day. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 没事做的美好夜晚， 我总是进去看看我的姑娘们
en: Nothing doing on the good night stuff, I always go inside to see my girls. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ
Help me to be a strong-jawed jane. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 我告诉过你， 我答应了房东太太
我也答应了父亲 永远不让男人进这个房间
en: I promised Our Lady and I promised father that no man would ever come in this room.

zh: 这样我就再也不来见你了
en: Just for that I'll never see you again!

zh: 我想，假如我们结婚 我就可以进来了
en: I was thinking...suppose we get married, then I can come in. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 我也这么想，吻我告别 我们就这么定了
en: That's me. Kiss me good night and we'll call it settled. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 詹金斯的巨额捐款 被那些好管闲事的人 以"慈善"的名义瓜分了
en: The enormous sums supplied by Jenkins to be distributed as the meddlers see fit...in "charity"...

zh: 现在这些进步人士成为了 社会上最有势力的团体
en: ـــــــــــــــــ now make the Uplifters the most influential power in the community. ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 玛丽・T・詹金斯基金会办公室
en: Mary T.Jenkins Foundation Fund General Offices
Equally intolerant hypocrites of another age.

zh: 这个法利赛人说 "看那个贪婪的酒鬼" "他是酒馆老板和无赖的朋友"
en: And the Pharisee said: "Behold a man gluttonous, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners." St. Matthew XI-19.

zh: 现在根据摩西律法， 你要受被石头砸死之刑 你还有什么话说？
en: Now Moses in the law commanded us that such should be stoned; but what sayest thou?

zh: "你们之中谁认为自己是没罪的， 就先来用石头砸她吧"
en: He that is without sin among you, let him first cast a stone at her. ــــــــــ ــــــــــ

zh: 女士，你的控诉者在哪里？ 没有人来杀你吗？
en: Neither do I condemn thee; go thou and sin no more.

zh: 我们能在接下来的现代故事里 找到像耶稣这样的例子吗?
en: Now, how shall we find this Christly example followed in our story of today?

zh: 十七人委员会报告说 他们已经整顿了这座城市
en: The Committee of Seventeen report they have cleaned up the city.

zh: 当我们搜查时你亲自来了
en: You yourself were with us when we raided...

zh: 当女人不去吸引男人，她们通常会 试图改变男人，作为另一种选择
en: When women cease to attract men they often turn to Reform as a second choice.

zh: 但是委员会没有报告以下的后果
en: But these results they do not report: ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 人人都自制蒸馏酒 代替低度酒和啤酒
en: ¶ Each one his own distiller. ¶ Instead of mild wines and beers...

zh: 小伙子被小可爱的善良本性打动 决定要跟她一起走上正途
en: The Boy, strongly braced in the Dear One's sweet human faith, sets his steps with hers on the straight road.

zh: 小伙子告诉老板， 他再也用不着这支"大炮"了 他要过新的生活
en: The Boy tells the boss he won't need the 'cannon' any more; he is through with the old life.

zh: 小伙子被栽赃偷盗 加上他的坏名声， 使他被判较长的刑期
en: Stolen goods, planted on The Boy, and his bad reputation intolerate him away for a term.
The broken love nest... The Dear One... ...alone...

zh: 这时在詹金斯的家里， 进步人士在庆祝 他们成功地把这个 充满邪恶的世界纠正过来
en: While at the Jenkins home the Uplifters ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ celebrate their success in righting the world that was all wrong.

zh: 在巴比伦，贝尔的主祭师 企图获得公众的崇敬
en: ¶ In Babylon. ¶ The High Priest of Bel courts public homage.

zh: 贝尔的主祭师 在伊师塔的礼拜仪式上发狂 预言他们将丧失灵魂 巴比伦将倒下
en: The Priest of Bel, frenzied at the worship of Ishtar, prophecies the loss of their souls and the downfall of Babylon.

zh: 一个值得伯沙撒的父亲庆祝的日子
en: Belshazzar's father has a red letter day.

zh: 他挖掘到了建于3200年前的 纳拉姆辛教堂的基砖
en: He excavates a foundation brick of the temple of Naram-Sin, builded 3200 years before.

zh: 巴比伦的劲敌，正在接近这座城市
en: Incidentally he remarks that Cyrus, the Persian, Babylon's mighty foe, is nearing the city.

zh: 哦，伊师塔的鸽子， 在征服居鲁士后 我们就开始为你建造城市
en: We will begin building your city, oh dove of Ishtar, when Cyrus is conquered.

zh: 世界霸主居鲁士 准备向巴比伦发动大规模战争 并私下与贝尔的主祭师结盟 注：
en: Cyrus, world-conqueror, preparing for the titanic struggle with Babylon, in secret league with the priest of Bel.

zh: 位于幼发拉底河与通往的驿道埃及之间
en: Note: ... Situate between the Euphrates and post road to Egypt.

zh: 背信弃义的主祭师 收到了居鲁士的确切消息
en: The treacherous priest of Bel receives assuring news from Cyrus.

zh: 在大帐里， 居鲁士在太阳教神像前
en: In his tent, Cyrus, before the sacred image of the sun.

zh: 居鲁士的规定 米底亚人和波斯人在接受训练
en: ¶ The institution of Cyrus. ¶ The Medes and Persians at exercises.

zh: 规定每个人每天必须要流汗
摇篮不停的摇动， 婴儿的手指满怀希望的被抬起来
en: Out of the cradle...endlessly rocking, Baby fingers hopefully lifted.

zh: 年轻的妻子，现在是一位母亲 期盼着孩子的父亲回来
en: The little wife, now a mother, plans for the day of daddy's return.

zh: 进步人士认为 政府的儿童福利团体是无能的 现在该注意"粗心的"母亲
en: The Uplifters, claiming the regular children's societies are inefficient, now turn to "negligent" mothers.

zh: 孩子―恶劣环境―犯罪的父亲

en: We are afraid you're no fit mother... ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 尽管一些成员反对， 她们还是决定夺取这个孩子
en: Despite the objections of some of the members, they decide to seize the baby. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 友好的邻居拿来一杯啤酒
en: The friendly neighbor, with a glass of beer.
Did you see that? A man visitor!

zh: 我们获授权带走你的孩子
en: We have a warrant to take your baby. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ
Hoping for a sight of her baby.

zh: "也许她们是正确的， 也许孩子终将得到幸福"
en: "Perhaps they are right and baby is happy after all." ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 当然，雇来的保姆 从来不会粗心大意
en: Of course, hired mothers are never negligent. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 一种新的消遣 看别人快乐幸福的孩子
en: A new dissipation...watching the happiness of others. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 在另一个痛苦的日子， 令人难忘的党同伐异
en: In another bitter day, memorable through intolerance.

zh: 凯瑟琳接到报告，法国各地的 雨格诺教徒的态度变得恶劣
en: The threatening attitude of the Huguenots throughout France is reported to Catherine.

zh: "老毒蛇"利用这件事挑起 天主教徒与新教徒的斗争
en: The "old serpent" uses the incident to inflame the minds of the Catholics against the Protestants.

zh: 先生们，想想在尼姆的 米迦勒节大屠杀 我们数以百计的忠实教徒 死在雨格诺教徒手上
en: Remember, gentlemen, the Michelade at Nimes when hundreds of our faith perished at the hands of the Huguenots!

zh: 因此，我们一定要彻底消灭他们
en: And so, our very lives depend upon their extermination.
An eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth...

zh: 居鲁士逼近巴比伦 他手握战争之剑 经绝情之火锻造的 最强大的武器
en: Cyrus moves upon Babylon; in his hand the sword of war, most potent weapon forged in the flames of intolerance.

zh: 伯沙撒亲自上阵 负责巴比伦城的防卫
en: Belshazzar leaving to take charge of the city's defense.

zh: 我的国王，我会把眼泪像珍珠一样 保存在银柜里等着你回来
en: My Lord, like white pearls I shall keep my tears in an ark of silver for your return. I bite my thumb!

zh: 我会用腰带上吊！ 如果你不能回来，我就去死
en: If you return not, I go to the death halls of Allat.

zh: 当王妃在祈祷时 山中女孩去为她的伯沙撒而战
en: While the Princess Beloved prays, the Mountain Girl goes to fight for her Belshazzar.

zh: 巴比伦关闭城门抵御敌人
en: Babylon's gates close against the foe.

zh: 在我的城墙上，我伯沙撒， 抵抗巴比伦的敌人 阿拉托！ 阿拉托！
en: On the walls of my city, I, Belshazzar, defy the enemies of Babylon.

zh: 覆盖着牛皮的巨大的移动围城塔
en: Great moving siege towers covered with ox hide.

zh: 投石器，石弩，攻城锤， 巨型石弓，燃烧油
en: Rock-throwers, catapults, battering rams, mighty crossbows, burning oil.

zh: 教堂里祈祷的和烧香的人们
en: Prayers in the temples and burning of frankincense.

zh: 敬爱的伊师塔，请原谅我们， 尽管我们有许多罪过
en: Ishtar, beloved, though our sins be many, forgive us.

zh: 请你在战争中帮助我们
en: In our behalf seize thou now the burning sword.

zh: 城市各个方向都受到攻击
en: The city assaulted on all sides.

zh: 居鲁士重复着党同伐异的 古老的祷文： 杀杀杀！
en: Cyrus repeats the world-old prayer to kill, kill, kill...

zh: 荣耀归于上帝，永无止境 阿门 巴比伦正在倒下！
en: and to God be the glory, world without end, Amen. Help us, Ishtar! ــــــــــ ــــــــــ

zh: 在远处注视着战场的王妃 被残酷的战争变得疯狂
en: The Princess Beloved, frenzied with war's terrors, watches the battle from afar.

zh: 为他而战！ 伊师塔，为他而战！
en: Fight for him, Ishtar, fight for him!

zh: 黎明带来了新围塔和新的攻击
en: Morning brings fresh assaults and towers.

zh: 英勇的护卫和军队一起 对抗眼前的危机
en: Belshazzar's mighty man of valor and his legion oppose the threatening tide.

zh: 用一种新的火焰武器， 尝试烧毁居鲁士的围塔
en: A new and flaming engine of destruction attempts to burn the towers of Cyrus.

zh: 伯沙撒击退了居鲁士的军队
en: The army of Cyrus repulsed by Belshazzar.

zh: 第一幕完 最后一幕开始前休息5分钟 《党同伐异》 时代荣耀的记录
en: A Sun-play of the Ages _ Intolerance ـــــــــــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــــــــــ A drama of Comparisons _ ACT II.

zh: 第二幕 戏剧性的对比
这些石印记录了 历史上最大的叛逆行为

en: The Cyrus Cylinder is a cuneiform inscription that Cyrus the Great ordered to be made during the conquest of Babylon.

zh: 小伙子回到了小可爱的身边
en: The Boy's return to The Dear One. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ

zh: 在皇宫的大殿里 庆祝巴比伦的胜利
en: ¶ In the great court of the palace, rejoicing over Babylon's victory.

zh: 在巴比伦尼亚贵族面前
en: Before the nobles of Babylon, Belshazzar pours out the colossal hospitality of an ancient time.

zh: 伯沙撒讲述了古代盛宴的盛况
en: Note: ... This hall over a mile in length.

zh: 这座大殿超过了一英里长 可以想象到昔日的辉煌
en: imaged after the splendor of an olden day.

zh: 对伯沙撒和王妃来说 这是最重要的时刻
en: A golden moment for Belshazzar and the Princess Beloved.

zh: 伊师塔，所有的赞美都归你 为了这场伟大的胜利
en: To thee, oh Ishtar, all praise for the victory.
¶ A gateway of the banquet hall.

zh: 山中女孩为参与了 她的英雄的光荣事迹而高兴
en: ¶ The Mountain Girl happy in being even in the fringe of her hero's glory.

zh: 主祭师蔑视这座 他企图向居鲁士出卖的城市
en: The High Priest looks down upon the city he seeks to betray to Cyrus.

zh: 他们现在感谢伊师塔 而不是我主贝尔 明天您的仆人居鲁士， 将为您报仇！
en: They give thanks to Ishtar now, but Oh Lord Bel...tomorrow Cyrus, ـــــــــ ـــــــــ thy servant, shall avenge thee!

zh: 对这卑鄙的计划 一无所知的雷波索德 按主祭师的命令，在城门前 准备战车，前往居鲁士
en: The Rhapsode, unaware of the dastardly purpose, is ordered by the High Priest to have chariots at the great gate for a journey to Cyrus.

zh: 在住宅区，一个率直的人 享用她在巴比伦的最后一餐
en: In the tenement district, a simpler repast ...her last in Babylon.

zh: 巴比伦最显赫的贵族 埃及贝家的桌子
en: At the table of Egibi, Babylonia's greatest noble. Note: ...

zh: 根据巴比伦的风俗 盛宴要持续许多天
en: Following Babylonian custom, the feasting lasts many days.

zh: 用山上的冰雪 冰镇的加料酒
en: Spiced wine, made cool with snow from the mountains.

zh: 雷波索德完成旅程的安排后 回来寻找他的爱情
en: The Rhapsode, having completed his arrangements for the journey, turns to thoughts of love.

zh: 我不知道我们去干什么 但如果我没有很快回来 你可以用这个口令去找我
en: I know not why we go, but if I don't return soon you can use the password to visit me.

zh: 参加阴谋的祭师 离开宴会厅
en: The conspiring priests leave the banquet hall.
Catherine's audience with the King to secure his signature to the order for the massacre of St. Bartholomew. Note: ...

zh: 经过漫长的会议， 国王的思想产生了动摇
en: After a long session, the Intolerants sway the King.

zh: 我们必须消灭他们 或者被他们消灭
上帝已死，既然你们希望这样， 那就杀光他们！
en: By God's death, since you wish it, kill them all! Kill them all!

zh: 杀光他们！ 别让任何人逃脱出来指责我
en: Let not one escape to upbraid me.

zh: 普鲁斯普和布朗订了婚
结婚公告： 明天 圣・巴托洛缪节的早上
普鲁斯普对不寻常的行动 感到迷惑不解
en: Prosper puzzled by the ominous activities.

zh: 在雨格诺教徒的门前 画上毁灭的记号
en: ¶ Upon the doorways of the Huguenots... the chalk of doom.

zh: 普鲁斯普寄宿在城的另一边
在爱的神殿，神圣的舞蹈用以 纪念塔姆兹（伊斯塔的丈夫）的复活
en: ¶ In the Temple of Love. ¶ The sacred dance in memory of the resurrection of Tammuz.

zh: 祭师的亲兵把守着城门 雷波索德带领祭师们前往 居鲁士的营地，执行叛逆行动
en: The gates manned with their own guards, the priests are guided by the Rhapsode on their mission of treason to the camps of Cyrus.
¶ In the interests of her prince...

zh: 由于怀疑可恶的祭师们 去居鲁士的目的 她使用口令跟踪着他们
en: Suspicious of the hated priests' journey to Cyrus, she uses the password and follows them.

zh: 组织的头目找了个适当的时间 来拜访小可爱
en: The Musketeer of the Slums seizes an opportune time to visit the little wife. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 你进去把小孩的地址拿给我
en: You go in and get the address where the kid is. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 你了解我，我能帮你把孩子带回来
en: You know me... I can get your baby for you. ـــــــــــ ـــــــــــ

zh: 刚才看见老板去见你的妻子
en: Just saw the boss go up to see your wife. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 小伙子谋杀案的审理接近尾声
en: Nearing the end of the Boy's trial for murder. ـــــــــ ـــــــــ
Yes, it was once my gun...but I... I...didn't do it.

zh: 这是小伙子的律师的 第一宗案件
en: The maiden case of The Boy's attorney. ــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــ
I mean, it's only circumstantial evidence.

zh: 我是说， 这仅仅是间接证据而已
有罪 普遍正义，以眼还眼 以牙还牙，血债血偿
en: ¶ Universal justice, an eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth, a murder for a murder.

zh: 罗马法院外面， 本丢・彼拉多的判决：
en: Outside the Roman Judgment Hall, after the verdict of Pontius Pilate:
To be hanged by the neck until dead, dead, dead!

zh: 这位和蔼的警官对判决感到震惊
en: The Kindly Officer on the beat learns of the sentence. ـــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــ
The people everywhere are singing your praises.

zh: 在远方的营地， 居鲁士等侯着祭师们
en: In his distant camp, Cyrus awaits the priests.

zh: 山中女孩大胆地跟踪着
小伙子处死刑的前一天
en: The day before the Boy's execution.

zh: 和蔼的警官感到判决有误， 小伙子是被命运作弄 他看到了一线希望， 他要拜访市长
en: Feeling the Boy wrongly convicted by some mischance of fate, the Kindly Heart sees a ray of hope in the visit of the governor to the city.

zh: 试想一下我们每个人 都用同样的方法受死
en: And wondered if each one of us Would end the self-same way, ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 没人能肯定， 在地狱里他的灵魂不会迷失
en: For none can tell to what red Hell His sightless soul may stray. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ
The governor unable to give any hope. ـــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــ

zh: 山中女孩从远处看着 祭师们抵达营地
en: The Mountain Girl from a distance watches the priests' arrival.

zh: 小伙子的最后一个黎明 行刑人员做检测
en: ¶ The Boy's last dawn. ¶ The hangman's test. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 孤注一掷，小可爱 要亲自去求市长
en: Desperate, the little wife herself goes to the governor. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 哦，上帝， 别让他们那样做！
en: Oh God, don't let them do it! ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 圣・巴托洛缪节的早晨 圣・日尔曼教堂的钟声
en: ¶ St. Bartholomew's morn. ¶ The bell of St. Germain.

zh: 圣・巴托洛缪大屠杀开始
en: The beginning of the massacre of St. Bartholomew.

zh: 布朗・埃斯被可怕的声音惊醒
en: For Brown Eyes, a terrible awakening.

zh: 小可爱的恳求 对市长的毫无作用
en: The Dear One's appeal to the Governor fruitless. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ
I did it, I did it!

zh: 他们试图在市长 上火车前赶上他
en: The attempt to overtake the governor before he reaches the train. ــــــــــــــــ ــــــــــــــــ

zh: 她长时间的守候有了回报 她要去警告伯沙撒 巴比伦将受到新的攻击
en: Her long wait rewarded, she goes to warn Belshazzar of the new advance on Babylon.

zh: 八号汽车，飞快地跟着火车
en: No. 8, after the train, leaps with a new impulse. ـــــــــــــــــ ـــــــــــــــــ

zh: 在这即将被毁灭的城市 "我们的婚礼在明天举行"
en: In the doomed city. "Our marriage will be announced tomorrow."

zh: 王妃，明天我就 开始建造你的城市
en: Beloved, I will begin building your city...tomorrow.

zh: 居鲁士席卷而来 他要毁灭巴比伦
en: Cyrus sweeps on to Babylon's destruction.

zh: 梅第奇，那只老猫， 正在屠杀你的家人
en: Medici, the old cat, is scratching out the lives of all your people.

zh: 在布朗・埃斯家里 雇佣兵的机会
en: ¶ At the house of Brown Eyes. ¶ The mercenary's opportunity.

zh: 普鲁斯普，戴着安全印章 去营救他爱的人
en: Prosper, with the badges of safety, goes to rescue his loved ones.

zh: 即便是有通行口令， 普鲁斯普的道路仍充满危险
en: Even with the password, Prosper's way beset with danger.

zh: 居鲁士与他的副官冈比西斯 整合军力
en: Cyrus unites forces with his lieutenant, Gobryas.

zh: 山中女孩的警告 被狂欢者延误了
en: The Mountain Girl's warning delayed by the revelers.

zh: 当伯沙撒还在怀疑的时候 居鲁士的军队已经通过 祭师们打开的城门进城了
en: While Belshazzar doubts, the army of Cyrus enters through the gates left open by the priests.

zh: 最后，侍卫们让伯沙撒相信了
en: Belshazzar at last convinced by his own servants.

zh: 伯沙撒只剩下十二个卫兵 守卫着他的宫殿大门 抵抗居鲁士的大军
en: Belshazzar finds only twelve guards to defend his palace gates against the hordes of Cyrus.

zh: 为了防止伯沙撒被俘虏的耻辱 他们把他送回宝座上
en: To save Belshazzar the disgrace of captivity, they send him back to his throne.

zh: 毁灭来临之际 告别
en: ¶ At the threshold of death. ¶ The farewell.

zh: 来吧！ 能与你的国王 死在一起是莫大的荣耀
en: Honor commands that you go with your king to the death halls of Allat.

zh: 居鲁士万岁！ 王中之王，众国之王！
en: Long live Cyrus, King of Kings and Lord of Lords!

zh: 当党同伐异的怒火 制造了炮火和监狱时
en: When cannon and prison bars wrought in the fires of intolerance...

zh: 完美的爱会带来永久的和平
en: And perfect love shall bring peace forevermore.

zh: 开满鲜花的田野 代替监狱的围墙
en: Instead of prison walls... Bloom flowery fields.

zh: 《卡里加利博士的小屋》 由卡尔·梅育以及汉斯·杰诺维兹 编写的6场戏构成
en: THE CABINET OF DR. CALIGARI A film in six acts written by Carl Mayer and Hans Janowitz.

zh: 摄影： 威利·哈迈斯特
到处都是幽灵，它们就在我们周围
en: "There are spirits... They are all around us...

zh: 它们驱使我远离健康和家庭 远离妻子和孩子
en: They have driven me from hearth and home, from wife and child..."

zh: 我与她的经历比你的经历离奇多了
en: "What she and I have lived through is stranger still than what you have lived through..."
"The little town where I was born..."

zh: 【特号】 霍斯腾沃尔游园集会 各种从未出现过的展示
en: SPECIAL EDITION Fair in Holstenwall ! For the first time!

zh: 走吧, 弗朗西斯，去集会玩玩吧！
en: "Come, Franzis, let's go to the fair!"

zh: 市务秘书今天情绪不佳！
en: The town clerk is in a vile temper today!"

zh: 我想申请能在游园会上展出我的展示品
en: "I wish to apply for a permit to present my spectacle at the fair..."

zh: 给你们看从来没见到过的！
en: Presenting here for the first time.

zh: 那一晚起，开始了一系列神秘犯罪事件
en: That night the first in a series of mysterious crimes took place.

zh: 一件非常尖锐的利器刺入身体一侧 造成了市务秘书的死亡
en: The town clerk has been killed." "Stabbed in the side with a strange pointed instrument."

zh: 给你们看从来没见到过的！ 梦游者，凯撒！
en: Presenting here for the first time..."

zh: 神奇的凯撒，活了23年，睡了23年，日夜不断
en: The miraculous Cesare... twenty-three years old... he has slept for twenty-three years... Continuously... Day and night!

zh: 凯撒将会在你们的眼前，从僵尸复活！
en: Cesare will awaken from his death-like trance. "Step right in!"

zh: 我是卡里加利博，你的主人

en: Dr. Caligari... your master... "Awaken for a moment from your dark night..."

zh: 女士们先生们，梦游者凯撒会回答你们所有问题
en: "Ladies and gentlemen!" Cesare the somnambulist will answer all your questions...

zh: 凯撒知道所有秘密，凯撒既了解过去，又能预见未来

en: Cesare knows the past and sees the future...

zh: 请走上台来，亲自提问吧！
en: Judge for yourselves. Don't hold back... "Ask away!"

zh: 霍斯腾沃尔谋杀案 悬赏1000马克
让她自己来做选择吧 无论她选了谁，我们仍是好朋友
en: "We'll leave the choice up to her..." But whomever she chooses, "we shall remain friends."

zh: 弗朗西斯先生，阿兰先生死了！
en: "Mr. Franzis, Mr. Franzis... Mr. Alan is dead... murdered!"

zh: 没查清楚这发生在我身边的恐怖之事 我绝不会善罢甘休
en: "I won't rest until I get to the bottom of these dreadful deeds."

zh: 我要从警察那获得许可，检查那个梦游者
en: "I will obtain police authorization to examine the somnambulist."

zh: 霍斯腾沃尔的谋杀之谜解开了！
前两次谋杀的凶手在第三次行凶时候被捕！
en: Two-time murderer caught in third attempt!

zh: 对长期不归的父亲的担忧
en: Worried because her father has been away so long...

zh: 我与两宗谋杀案毫无关系 上帝啊，帮帮我
en: "I had nothing to do with the two murders... so help me God..."

zh: 刚才那老女人，没错，我是想杀她 想用类似的凶器刺她身体的一侧
en: "The old woman... It's true... I tried to kill her..."

zh: 我是想要把线索转移到那个神秘凶案的凶手身上
en: by stabbing her in the side with a similar knife... "to throw suspicion on the mysterious murderer."

zh: 我爸爸不在这儿吗，那个医务顾问奥尔森？
他那时正在睡觉， 我观察了他好几小时
en: He was asleep at the time... "I've watched him for hours..."

zh: 囚犯... 绝对... 还被关在牢房里面吗？
en: "Is the prisoner secure in his cell?"

zh: 你有一个叫"卡里加利博士"的病人吗？
en: "Do you have a patient by the name of Caligari?"

zh: 院长先生今天已经回来了 或许你可以亲自去问问他
en: "The director returned earlier today... Perhaps you should speak to him personally..."

zh: 当人们盯着院长在他的别墅里睡觉时
en: While the director, now placed under observation, is sleeping in his villa...

zh: 《梦游者》 乌普萨拉大学文献集 1726年出版
en: SOMNAMBULISM A Collection from Uppsala University. Published in 1726.

zh: 一连几个月，他藉由一系列手法几乎完全一样的谋杀 引起了一个又一个的镇的恐慌
en: For month he sowed panic amongst village folks through a series of foul murders committed under almost identical circumstances.

zh: 梦游者完全屈从于他的意志，还被迫执行他的离奇的计划
en: He had entirely subjugated to his mill a somnambulist named Cesare, whom he did compel to carry out his nefarious schemes.

zh: 终于！ 有一个梦游者今天来精神病院登记入住了！
en: A somnambulist has been brought to the asylum for admission...

zh: 我一生的夙愿终将要实现 现在我可以揭示卡里加利精神病学的秘密了
en: I shall be able to satisfy my life's unwavering wish! Now I shall unravel the psychiatric secrets of this Caligari!

zh: 就是说，一位梦游者是否会被教唆而去谋杀？
en: Whether it is true that a sleepwalker can be led to commit... even murder!

zh: 我一定要知道每件事 我要洞悉他的所有秘密 我要成为卡里加利...
en: "I must know everything... I must penetrate his secrets... I must become Caligari!"

zh: 你一定要成为卡里加利！
我们在外面野地里发现了梦游者
en: "We found the sleepwalker out in the fields..."

zh: 院长先生，扔掉你的面具吧！
从那天起，那个疯子就再也没有离开过他的牢房
en: "... and from that day on, the madman never again left his cell."

zh: 快看，那个就是凯撒 绝对不要让他给你算命，否则你必死无疑
en: "Look! There's Cesare... Never allow him to tell your fortune ...or you're dead..."

zh: 简，我爱你！ 你还是不愿意嫁给我吗？
en: "Jane, I love you... won't you be my wife at last?"

zh: 像我这样的女王... 是无法随心所欲的
en: "We queens are not free to answer the call of our heart..."

zh: 终于，我明白了他的妄想症 他以为我就是那个神秘的卡里加利 现在我也知道如何治疗他了
en: "At last I understand his delusion." He thinks I am that mystic Caligari! "Now I know exactly how to cure him..."

zh: -=THE LAST FANTASY=- 字幕调校: yourtear@TLF
曾有一个垂死的可怜的小传道者
en: Once there was a poor Salvation Army sister at death's door.

zh: 她患上了致命型的肺痨 捱不过一年
en: She was stricken with galloping consumption, and she had only held out for the space of a year.

zh: 当所有的希望幻灭的时候 她回到了母亲的身边
en: When there was no hope left she had gone home to her mother.

zh: 在床脚下，站着一位传道者 她和这位患病的女人一起工作过
en: Waiting at the foot of her bed was another Salvation Army sister who had once worked alongside the sick girl.

zh: "艾迪特修女，现在别想那些不幸 的人了。
en: "Don't fret over those poor souls now, Sister Edit."

zh: 因为只要她身上仍有 一颗生命的火花你就让她呆在 你的身边。
en: My daughter was yours as long as she had a spark of life."

zh: 现在她即将死去 就让她呆在我的身边吧！"
en: "Let me have her to myself now that she is dying."

zh: "玛丽亚修女，你为什么不照我 说的做呢？
en: "Slster Maria, why don't you do as I ask?
"l shall go fetch him at once."

zh: "不可以那样做！ 你绝对不能 让大卫・霍姆来见垂死之人"
en: "You can't be serious, asking David Holm to attend a death bed?"

zh: "不，我没能找到他，但是 格斯塔夫森先生到外面去找他了 我确信，他会尽可能地把他带来的"
en: "l haven't been able to find him, but Gustavsson is looking too." "He will bring him here if that is at all possible."

zh: "我非常抱歉，霍姆夫人！ 我非常抱歉，霍姆夫人！"
如果 她丈夫来了，千万不能发现她在这儿"
en: "lt wouldn't do for her husband to see her should he come."

zh: 那天晚间发生的所有的事情 并不是每晚都会有的。
en: The evening on which these events took place was not an ordinary one.

zh: "在这个地方，我们一定能 知道何时该举杯庆祝元旦！"
en: "Well, we will certainly know when it's time to toast the New Year!"

zh: "但是，这可能是一个令人 毛骨耸然的地方，元旦那天，你 看到这个地方是处于死人堆里的"
en: "lt's a spooky place to await midnight, here among the dead."
"You gentlemen are not afraid of ghosts, I hope?"

zh: "那我想给你们讲一个元旦的故事 当时，我们在等着12点的钟声敲响"
en: "Then I'd like to tell you a story while we wait for the midnight hour."

zh: "我曾有一个朋友，名叫乔治 他是一个非常快乐的家伙！"
en: "l once had a pal called Georges, who was generally a jolly fellow."

zh: "他出身于良好的家庭背景 乌普萨拉大学毕业。 因此，他 比我们其余的人懂得要多一些"
en: "He came of a good family, and had studied hard at Uppsala University, so he knew a bit more than the rest of us."

zh: "但是在除夕，他变得与以往不同了"
en: "But a change would come over him on New Year's Eve."

zh: "记住，这是除夕 今年的最后一天！"
en: "Remember that it's New Year's Eve, the last day of the year!"

zh: "他就是那个在除夕，身上发生了 致命性的事情，被迫驾驶幽灵马车的人！"
en: "Whoever dies on this eve must drive the cart of death."

zh: "那个马车夫不是一个普通的赶车者 他为一个严厉的主人服务 那个人的名字叫死亡"
en: no ordinary driver holds the reigns." "He is in the service of a strict master named Death."

zh: "对于他来说，1天就像地球上的100年 他不得不日以继夜地为 他主人的生意驱车奔波"
en: "For him, a single night is as long as 100 years on Earth." "Night and day he must carry out his master's business."

zh: "无论他去哪里 他都会遇到悲伤与绝望"
en: "Wherever he goes, he is greeted with sorrow and despair."

zh: "他在任何地方都免不了运送重活"
en: "There is no escape He must perform his sorry duty."

zh: "尽管一直是同一辆车，同一匹马 但不总是同一个马车夫"
en: "Although the horse and cart remain the same, the driver will vary."

zh: "现在，你就能明白我为什么非常害怕 除夕夜在我身上会发生致命性的事情了"
en: "Now you know why i'm afraid of something fatal happening on New Year's Eve."

zh: "而且，你们知道吗，先生们，那个 奇怪的乔治据说死在去年的除夕？"
en: "And the odd thing is, you see, that Georges apparently died last New Year's Eve."

zh: "格斯塔夫森先生为什么 没有把大卫・霍姆带来？"
en: "Why hasn't Gustavsson arrived with David Holm?"

zh: 艾迪特修女 即将死去，她坚持要在死去之前见你一面"
en: "Sister Edit is dying and she has asked for you."

zh: "如果艾迪特修女想见你 那你就得立即去见她！"
en: "lf Sister Edit wants to see you, you must go at once!"

zh: 想想你就是那个接替我的人"
en: You are meant to relieve me!"

zh: "如果你抱起我，用你的马车尽快 地把我送到医院，事情会更好的！"
en: "You ought to lift me up ln your cart and take me to the hospital."

zh: "在这辆马车里，没有活人能够旅行 当我来见一个病人时，就已经太晚 而不能叫另一个医生了"
en: "No living soul rides ln this cart." "By the time I arrive it is too late for a doctor."

zh: "你很清楚，现在和你说话 的我，不是活人中的一员"
en: "You know well enough that I am no longer alive."

zh: "但最糟糕的是，你必须面对你在 地球上的期间所犯下的邪恶行为的后果"
en: "But, worst of all, you must face the consequences of the evil you have wrought during your lifetime."

zh: "大卫，你不知道吗，我明白 你的生命这样地结束了是我的错？"
en: "David, do you think i'm unaware that it is my fault you have met such an end?"

zh: "要是你没有遇见我，你就会 和你的妻儿、哥哥一起过着 平静的、正大光明的生活"
en: "lf you hadn't fallen in with me you would have led a good life with your wife, children and brother."

zh: "你因这次醉酒而得到判决，明天 你就刑满释放了。
en: "By tomorrow you will have served your time for drunken behaviour."

zh: 但在那之前，一个 更严厉的惩罚会降临到你的身上！"
en: "But before you leave, a harsher punishment awaits you."

zh: "你弟弟在你待在这里的期间 因酗酒杀了一名男子，现在 他必须要在监狱里呆上许多年！"
en: "Behold, your brother." "While you were here he killed a man while intoxicated, and now a long prison term awaits."

zh: "我们都说，你应当替他服刑 因为是你，而不是别人拉他下的水 并使得他犯了杀人罪！"
en: "But we feel that you ought to serve the sentence instead, since you and you alone led him astray, and made him a killer."

zh: "所有这些还不足以使得你 改邪归正吗，大卫・霍姆？"
en: "Does this not make you turn from your wicked ways, David Holm?"

zh: "哦，对！ 直到如今我才知道给 所爱的人带来灾难是什么样的感觉"
en: "Yes, for only now do I realise how it feels to have brought great misery upon a loved one."

zh: "我也明白他们从头至尾是什么样的人！ 但从现在开始，我要开始新的生活！ 他们永远没有因为我而抱怨的理由！
en: "l know how miserable they felt, but I will turn over a new leaf."

zh: 至少，她 离开不久前的那天还什么事都没有"
en: "She was well enough the other day, when she left."

zh: "我本以为，我来了会 给她带来莫大的快乐！"
en: "And here I was thinking I would come home to her with such joy!"

zh: "要是她问心无愧地离去 我会理解的。
但是她偷偷地离开 没有告诫地让我独守空房 那就是无情的！"
en: I would have understood, but to slink off like that, to let me come home to an empty house, that was heartless!"
"l'll wipe those smiles off your faces."

zh: 我会再次找到她，然后我会让 她知道我现在感到多么地寂寞"
en: "l'll find her, and I'll teach her how it feels when your heart freezes to its very core, like mine has!"

zh: "我不愿让你想起，当你内心的 仇恨与报复的欲望越来越强烈时 你是怎样走遍全国寻找你妻子的！"
en: "l'll refrain from reminding you of your search for your wife, during which your feelings of hatred and revenge waxed stronger."

zh: "现在，我将带你从一年前的这条路走 就是你去年的除夕来到这个镇子走的那条路 你打算给这个镇子带来如此多的不幸"
en: "l will take you to a time a year ago, to last New Year's Eve, when you came here, bringing such misfortune in your wake."

zh: "在镇子里的这个地方，建起了一个 救世军的旅社，旅社是在除夕开的业"
en: "A Salvation Army station had been set up here in town." "And it was ready for use on New Year's Eve."

zh: 你不知道 里面可能含有什么病菌 我们的消毒箱还没有做好"
en: It may be full of germs!" "We don't have the sterilising oven going yet."

zh: "玛丽亚修女，你不明白我能 为上帝派给我们的第一位宾客 做点事情是多么地高兴吗？"
en: "Don't you realise, Maria, how it pleases me to help the first guest God sent us?"

zh: "不，请上床吧，别担心 在如此艰难的一天后你需要休息 让我来处理这件事吧"
en: "Please, go to bed. lt's been a busy day." "Let me attend to this."

zh: "耶稣基督，请给第一个来到 旅社的宾客一个快乐的新年吧！"
en: "Dear Jesus, let our first guest be blessed with a happy year."

zh: 她整晚蜷曲在大衣下面，没有 考虑到她呼吸的病菌和恶臭
en: All night long she bent over the coat, never giving thought to the germs she had inhaled."

zh: 冬夜刺骨的严寒穿透了这间屋子 以至于，当时天冷得使她不能上床
en: "By the time she went to bed the chill of winter had thoroughly penetrated the room."

zh: "你想让那个补衣服的女人过来吗？"
en: "Would you mind fetching the person who did this?"

zh: "多遗憾啊，你本该带走那么多麻烦的 但我习惯于穿像这样的衣服"
en: "lt's a shame you went to all that trouble, Miss, but i'm used to having it like this."

zh: "你离开之前，我也想 邀请你在明年除夕回来！"
en: "Before you leave, I'd like to ask you to visit me next New Year's Eve."

zh: "你知道，今晚我请求耶稣给我们的 第一位宾客一个快乐的新年，我想再次 见到你，看看耶稣是否答复了我的祈祷"
en: "You see, I prayed that our first guest would have a good year." "And I wanted to find out if my prayers were answered."

zh: 我会过来 让你看看他没有听你的 并且你说的根本就是傻话！"
en: "l'll come to show you God didn't give a fig for you or your twaddle."

zh: "而且现在你也必须要在接管我的 职务之前履行你那时做出的诺言！
en: "The time has come to honour that promise before you take over here."

zh: 你给了她疾病，她因此生命垂危 而且现在她正等着你"
en: "From you she contracted the disease that ends her life, and now she awaits your visit."

zh: "你将明白，你所拥有的那件东西是 世界上最珍贵的，而你现在遗失了它！
en: "You have possessed all that is most wonderful, but you have lost it!"

zh: "你不知道我带来的那次灾难 我只有被允许把它改正过来 才能见到我的上帝！"
en: "You do not know what terrible misfortune I have caused." "l cannot approach the Lord before I have put it right."

zh: "我想，我必须告诉你，我 想见到的那个人是我爱的人 你明白我吗？
en: "l must tell you that the person i'm waiting for is the man I love. "Do you understand?

zh: "如果那样能帮到你的话，我 愿意暂缓给你的处刑。 但是我 知道你没有操控那个人的权利"
en: "l would grant you grace if it would avail you, but you have no power over this man."

zh: "你试过那么多次要去改变他 你一直希望和想着，这个男人 身上会有某些好的东西 但是他总是让你失望"
en: "You have tried to make him mend his ways, believing he was good, but your hopes have been dashed time and time again."

zh: "你诱使他离开他的家和他的工作！
en: "You're the one who enticed him away from his home and his work!"

zh: 你使得变成了现在这样的酒鬼！"
en: "You made him the drunkard he is!"

zh: 救世军 星期三晚8点 欢迎大家光临！
"你去那儿被拯救吧 我会过来观看的！"
en: "Run along and be saved, and upon my soul i'll come and watch you!"
"What's the use of making such a fuss?"

zh: "你这样大惊小怪的有什么意义呢？ 我也有痨病，但我直接咳到人们的 脸上。
en: "l'm a consumptive, but I cough into people's faces in the hope of finishing them off."

zh: 因为我希望他们死 他们为什么要比我们过得更好？"
en: "Why should they be better than us?"

zh: "他只是喜欢吓唬你 他不像装出来的样子那么邪恶"
en: "He's merely amusing himself. He's not as wicked as he pretends to be."

zh: "你怎么能对你的同类 怀有如此强烈的仇恨呢？"
en: "How can you be filled with such bitter hatred for your fellow man?"

zh: "你无需再看到它了，因为 几天之后我就离开这个镇子"
en: "You needn't worry about that. I'll be leaving town in a few days."

zh: "我宁愿你留下来，这样我就 可以和你斗得时间更长一些"
en: "l would rather you stayed so I may challenge you again."

zh: "无论它是多么地诱人 我都不能留下来了"
en: "However tempting that maybe, I still can't stay."

zh: "你明白，小妹妹，我游遍了整个 瑞典，寻找一个我必须找到的人"
en: "You see, little missy, i'm on a journey throughout Sweden, in search of a person I must find at all costs."

zh: "等我找到那个人时 我一定会让你知晓的"
en: "You'll know that when I find the person in question"

zh: "我就是大卫・霍姆在找的那个人"
en: "l am the one David Holm is looking for."

zh: "我不能忍受他过得那种生活 我抛弃了他，带走了我的孩子 我是秘密地把他们从他的身边偷走的"
en: "l couldn't endure the life he led." "I deserted him, took my children and crept away in secret."

zh: "我搬到这个镇子上，因为 它离我们上一个家非常的遥远 我从没想过他会想到来这里找我"
en: "l moved to this town for it was so far from our old home, that I never expected him to come looking for me here."

zh: "当然了，我的意思不是让你立刻 做决定。 但是，答应我： 去寻找你 的灵魂，我们过会儿要再谈一次"
en: "l didn't mean that you must make up your mind on the spot, but promise me to listen to your heart, and we can talk again."

zh: "她牺牲了她自己的需求 而对这个世界却一无所求"
en: She had got the better of herself and asked for none of the things that belonged to this world.

zh: 有一个惊喜等着你 那会让你高兴的！"
en: A surprise awaits that will make you happy."

zh: 她想改种在优质土壤中的 那粒种子在荆棘丛中成长起来 或许她本该成功地使它不受到责备 ...
en: She wanted to replant the seed that had fallen among the thorns, and she may well have gained her end had it not been that...

zh: "医生说那是肺痨，她的抵抗力 非常差,因为自从上一个除夕以来 她的身体就没有一天好过"
en: "The doctor says it's pneumonia." "Her resistance is so poor for she has had ill health ever since last New Year's Eve."

zh: "哦，对了，这个大卫・霍姆给 她带来得只有痛苦。
en: "Yes, this David Holm has been her undoing."

zh: 如今她饱受已 证实的他与妻子之间的关系方式 持续的焦虑的折磨 但你不能把这个告诉她"
en: "She worries so about the situation between him and his wife, but she mustn't know the truth."

zh: "至少，你不能在你的内心 找到它，以使孩子们免受感染吗？"
en: "You might at least have the heart to spare the children from infection!"
"lt wasn't as easy to run away this time!"

zh: "噢，但愿我没有把他们一起带过来！
en: "lf only I hadn't brought them together again!"

zh: 如果不是因为我 他的罪孽也不会那样深重了！"
en: "His sin would be of less magnitude if not for me."

zh: 我现在不能死！ 不能死！
你必须允许我看到他被挽救！
en: "l must see him turn over a new leaf!
. Just spare me a few minutes!"

zh: 我从未像今天这样地爱他！"
en: I've never loved him as I do today."
"Captive, ye of loving heart, take leave of thy prison."

zh: 你我二人在这儿无所事事 那些来接她的人很快就会到来了"
en: There ls nothing for us to do here." "Those who are to receive her will arrive shortly."

zh: "你知道，大卫，只要我能发出 一条联系上人们的消息，我就会 给他们送上一个新年的问候"
en: "You know, David, if I could send a message to humankind, "l would like to send them a New Year's greeting."

zh: "我想要求他们把他们的想法凝 结成大概一句祈祷：
en: "l would like them to dwell on a single New Year's prayer."

zh: 上帝，让我 的灵魂在它被收获之前成熟起来"
en: "Lord, please let my soul come to maturity before it is reaped."
Surely no one here is going to die!"

zh: "不，我不能继续了！ 我再也受不了了！"
en: "No, I can't go on. I can't go on!"

zh: "这是一种罪孽，我必须走 而且，我不能把他们留在这里"
en: "l'm sorry, but I must go away, and I cannot leave them behind."

zh: "你绝对不能因为我要去做的 事情而对我生气。
"你将看到我有足够多的钱 大卫，足够我和孩子们用的了"
en: "This will do, David. It will suffice for the children and myself."

zh: "噢，是的，大卫，我能明白 我就站着这里。
我必须为它作证 我不会失职的"
en: "l'm obliged to watch. I do not shirk my duty."

zh: 你千万不能让我承担这个重负！
不要让这些可怜的无辜的小家伙们死去！"
en: "Don't let those poor, innocent creatures die!"
"l have no power over the living."

zh: 我不知道是否要去 祈求上帝或基督！ 谁有权力？
en: "Should I pray to God or to Jesus?

zh: 谁能告诉我 我可以对谁说出我的祈祷呢？"
en: Who can tell me where to direct my plea?"

zh: "噢，我是一个可怜的罪孽深重的人 我祈求生与死的主人！
en: "l'm a poor, miserable sinner, I beseech thee Lord of life and Death!"

zh: 我没有任何权利祈祷 我知道我打破了你所有的戒律"
en: "l'm not worthy, I've broken your every commandment."

zh: "让我进入那无尽的黑暗之中！
让我的一切都随风而逝！
你想对我做什么就做什么吧 哦，生与死的主人 但愿这三个人能得到宽恕！"
en: "Do what you like to me, my Lord, only spare the three of them!"

zh: "大卫！ 现在我能看出 我无需再为你悲伤了！"
en: "David, I see that I no longer need to grieve for you!"

zh: "艾迪特修女死了，我去看过她 我答应她，我要好好地待你和孩子们"
en: "Sister Edit is dead, and I have been at her side."

zh: 玛丽亚修女告诉我说你拒绝她的给予！"
我想弃恶从善 我想做个好人，但是没人愿意相信我 那不是一个哭泣的理由吗？"
en: "No one believes I want to reform."

zh: "你明白，大卫，这是难以置信的 但当你哭时，我相信你了 现在，我相信你"
直到我的 眼泪将我内心所有的悲痛驱散 我才能够幸福"
"上帝，让我的灵魂在 它被收获之前成熟起来！"
en: "Lord, please let my soul come to maturity before it ls reaped."

zh: 配乐： KTL Stephen O'Malley [SunnO)))乐队吉他手] and Peter Rehberg [叫Pita更多人知道]
位于科隆的Piethopraxis录音室内完成制作
en: Audio by KTL (Stephen O'Malley  Peter Rehberg)

zh: 影片《尼伯龍根》在當時沒有留存下一個完整的通用的德國版本
en: Despite having more or less always been in circulation,

zh: 這次是根據不完整的負片進行修復的
en: This photochemical restoration is based on incomplete camera negatives.

zh: 缺失部分則根據不同版本的拷貝進行了移取
en: Missing sections were supplemented by various extant prints of the period along with archival copies.

zh: 本片的色彩則是根據當時的著色工藝 將染料塗在黑白拷貝上的
en: Colouration follows the conventional method of then-contemporary prints, and is based upon original tinting technique:

zh: 中間的德語字幕則是根據現存拷貝...
en: the production of a BW print, with subsequent staining performed in a dye-bath.

zh: 以及負片上的記錄樣本進行了數碼修復
en: The German intertitles were taken from extant prints and flash-titles restored digitally from the negatives.

zh: 在那些被重建的缺失字幕畫面左下角 添加了「茂瑙基金會」的標記： FWMS
en: Missing titles that have been reconstructed are designated by the Murnau-Stiftung logo.

zh: 在製作高清版本的時候，增強了一些地方的圖像穩定 並修復了一些嚴重的畫面壞損
en: For this HD mastering, the image has been corrected in places, and heavy damage to the film has been retouched.

zh: 蒂婭·馮·哈布根據電影《尼伯龍根》 而創作的二十四格畫冊《尼伯龍根》... 由慕尼黑的「三面具出版社」出版 [蒂婭·馮·哈布正是弗裏茨·朗的妻子]
en: Thea von Harbou's script for the film Die Nibelungen, with 24 images from the production, is published by Drei Masken Verlag, Munich.

zh: 【克裏米爾特祭奠齊格弗裏德】
en: How Kriemhild Mourned Siegfried, and How König Etzel (King Attila) Courted Her

zh: 【匈奴國王埃策爾派遣使者呂狄格 前來追求克裏米爾特】
龔特爾國王，來自貝赫拉恩的呂狄格侯爵求見！
en: King Gunther, Margrave Rüdiger von Bechlarn asks for an audience!

zh: 我此行是代表「大地之王」匈奴王而來
en: I come as ambassador to King Attila. He who is called the Lord of the Earth -

zh: 他希望能夠執手令妹克裏米爾特
en: He who seeks the hand of your sister Kriemhild in marriage.

zh: 我恐怕匈奴王自己並不知是在向誰求婚
en: I am afraid King Attila knows not whom he woos.

zh: 以被害人齊格弗裏德之名起誓，害人者仍舊逍遙法外！
en: In the name of Siegfried, who was murdered and whose murderer lives!

zh: 大家要記得齊格弗裏德是什麼死的！
en: Keep in mind how Siegfried died!

zh: 匈奴之王派我前來向女王殿下求婚！
en: Lord Attila sends me, O Queen, to ask for your hand on his behalf!

zh: 呂狄格，看來你們是相當清楚... ...我在自己的家族裏所遭受到的欺辱
en: You seem to know quite well, Rüdiger, that I have been exposed to grievous wrongs in the house of my clan!

zh: 你的那位兄弟齊格弗裏德呢？
把謀害我丈夫的兇手交我處置，國王！
en: Deliver unto me the murderer of my husband, O King!

zh: 他是忠於我，我不能背叛他
en: He has remained loyal to me; so shall I remain loyal to him.

zh: 克裏米爾特，這是我最後給你的答覆！
en: This, Kriemhild, is my final word!

zh: 克裏米爾特夫人！ 呂狄格侯爵想要在晚禱之後跟您們談談！
en: Lady Kriemhild, Margrave Rüdiger, wishes to speak with you after evensong!

zh: 吉倫特，現在是時候讓整個勃艮第加強警戒了！ [吉倫特是克裏米爾特的一個弟弟]
en: Now, Gerenot, is the time to keep close watch over Burgundy!

zh: 呂狄格，跟我講講匈奴王這人吧！
en: Speak to me of Lord Attila, Rüdiger!

zh: 呂狄格，你們現在所要追求的是一個已經死去的女人！
en: You court a dead woman, Rüdiger!

zh: 而謀害她丈夫的兇手現在還在 炫耀著那把從亡者身上掠來的綠光寶劍
en: He who murdered my husband flaunts the greensparkling sword that he stole from the dead man.

zh: 誰要是冒犯到您，匈奴王是一定會幫您報仇的
en: If ever you were done wrong at Attila's court, my lady, - Lord Attila would know how to avenge you!

zh: 侯爵大人，請以您以及匈奴王的名義向我起誓！
en: Lord Margrave, swear this unto me in your and in King Attila's names!

zh: 不用對著十字架，而是要對著你的劍刃發誓！
en: Not on the cross, Lord Margrave, - on the sharp edge of your sword!

zh: 哈根大人把寶藏都偷走啦！
en: Lord Hagen has stolen the Treasure!

zh: 我跟您一言為定，呂狄格侯爵！
en: You have my word, Lord Margrave Rüdiger!

zh: 哈根·特洛涅，財寶到哪裏去了？
en: Hagen Tronje, where is the Treasure?

zh: 那個忠誠的哈根說道： 在某個地方，夫人！
那樣就沒有人能用這些財寶對抗勃艮第王國了！
en: Somewhere, my lady, where no-one might use the gold to forge arms against the kings of Burgundy!

zh: 【克裏米爾特背井離鄉，並被匈奴王接納】
en: How Kriemhild Fled Her Homeland, and How She Was Received by Lord Attila.

zh: 大地啊，你已飲過齊格弗裏德的血
en: You have drunk Siegfried's blood, O Earth!

zh: 總有一天，我會用哈根·特洛涅的血讓你得到灌溉！
en: One day I shall drench you with Hagen Tronje's blood!

zh: 我的女兒啊，難道你不去跟你胞兄龔特爾道別嗎？
en: My daughter, shall you not proffer your hand in farewell to your brother Gunther?

zh: 克裏米爾特夫人，您即將遠行 難道不想跟您的家族修好嗎？
en: You are heading far away, Lady Kriemhild. Don't you want to make peace with your family first?

zh: 難道你一點都不想向您的人民致意嗎，女主人？
en: Don't you even once want to hail your people, my lady?

zh: 當克裏米爾特來到的時候，正值匈奴國春暖花開
en: As Kriemhild approached, springtime blossomed in the land of the Huns.

zh: 那一整兜子的金子是我的！
en: That sack full of gold is mine!

zh: 夫人，匈奴王的弟弟布勞德爾前來迎接您！
en: My lady, King Attila's brother, Blaodel, gives thee welcome!

zh: 呂狄格，從我的帝國疆土中選一塊領土來賜予這位女士！
en: Choose for yourself a kingdom from my lands, Rüdiger, in gratitude for this woman!

zh: 呂狄格侯爵，幫我問一下匈奴王： 他是否已經準備兌現你們諾言！
en: Ask King Attila, Margrave Rüdiger, whether he is prepared to make your oath his own!

zh: 我會讓任何冒犯女王您的人... ...都死上一百遍！
en: any man who insults you or does you wrong shall die a hundredfold death!

zh: 【匈奴王休戰羅馬，克裏米爾特向兄弟們發出邀請】
en: How King Attila Besieged Rome and How Kriemhild Summoned Her Brothers.

zh: 匈奴王發過誓，要把羅馬的教堂變成屬於我們的馬廄呢
en: Lord Attila swore he wanted to turn Rome's churches into stables for our horses!

zh: 為什麼埃策爾國王不再堅持當初的誓約呢？
en: Why does Lord Attila no longer uphold his oath?

zh: 我們現在已經陷入戰亂僵局！ ！
為什麼我們不再一鼓作氣繼續騎行？
en: Why don't we ride further onward?

zh: 為什麼匈奴王的戰馬被拴在帳篷外沒再跑過？
en: Why is Lord Attila's horse tethered to his tent?

zh: 匈奴王曾是偉大的騎手啊！
en: A great horseman was King Attila!

zh: 以前他的眼裏就只有一匹強壯的母馬！
en: A mighty mare for him was the world!

zh: 埃策爾國王總會甩鞭抽打他的世界以及他的母馬！
en: Lord Attila whipped the world - his mare!

zh: 而埃策爾國王現在又在幹什麼呢？
en: What does Lord Attila do now?

zh: 那個白種女人從我們手裏搶走了埃策爾！
en: This white woman has stolen Attila from underneath our noses!

zh: 用她的長髮纏住了偉大騎手匈奴王的手！
en: With her tresses does she bind up the horseman, The great horseman, Lord Attila!

zh: ！ 克裏米爾特她為您生了一個兒子！
en: Kriemhild has borne you a son!
One wish that I might fulfill for you!

zh: 要是你當真想要讓我高興！ 匈奴王，你就邀請我的兄弟們來你的宮殿做客吧！
en: If you would honour me and make me happy, Lord Attila, then summon my brothers as guests to your court!

zh: 布勞德爾，你去沃爾姆斯去邀請 我妻子的皇室弟兄來我皇宮做客
en: To Worms, Blaodel, to request as guests to our court the royal brothers of my wife!

zh: 【克裏米爾特如何迎接她兄弟】
作為呂狄格的客人，你的兄弟們 要在貝赫拉恩逗留將近一個月
en: For more than one moon's time your brothers stayed as guests of Rüdiger in the house of Bechlarn.

zh: 吟遊詩人正在唱誦著一首關於 你弟弟吉賽爾赫與呂狄格的美麗的獨生女迪特琳德之間的愛情歌曲
en: The minstrels sing a new song of the love between your brother Giselher and Rüdiger's only child, the beautiful Dietlind!

zh: 現在我衷心地將貝赫拉恩以及勃艮第兩國結為同盟
en: And so I bind in faith -
Bechlarn and Burgundy: one heart, one life, one death!

zh: 為了向你的兄弟表示心意
匈奴王已派出他最高貴的騎士迪特裏希前去恭祝他們
en: Lord Attila has sent the noblest of his knights - Dietrich von Bern - to greet them.

zh: 再說一次，尼伯龍根，在匈奴王埃策爾來祝賀你們之前 別忘記是誰讓你們能在埃策爾國王面前擁有舉足輕重的地位！
en: Once more, Nibelungen, before Lord Attila comes to greet you:

zh: 大人，我們怎麼會忘記是來拜訪我們的姐姐克裏米爾特的呢？
en: How could we forget, my lord, that we come to visit our sister Kriemhild?

zh: 想要讓我感恩，必先承擔我的傷痛！
en: Whoever wants to win my gratitude shall bear my sorrow in mind!

zh: 在夏至的前一天，尼伯龍根人抵達了匈奴王的宮殿
en: It was the day of the summer solstice, and the Nibelungen arrived at Attila's court.

zh: 埃策爾國王，我現在只想提醒一下你別忘記誓約！
en: King Attila, I now exhort you to your oath!

zh: 殺害齊格弗裏德的兇手現在正在你的手上！
en: Siegfried's murderer is in your hands!

zh: 夫人啊，難道你就永遠忘不了齊格弗裏德嗎？
en: Will you never forget Lord Siegfried, my lady?

zh: 哈根·特洛涅願意為我誓死而戰！
en: Hagen Tronje shall fight me for his life!

zh: 你決不能跟兇手並肩而戰，我的王！
en: You mustn't fight with the murderer, Attila!
You must have the murderer killed!

zh: 你向我發過誓的，匈奴王！
以你孩子的生命發過誓，絕不反悔！
en: On the life of your child: Make good upon your oath!
I hail from a desert land, O Queen.

zh: 對我來說，遠來的客人是神聖而不可欺的！
en: If only one thing is sacred, it is a guest!

zh: 只要哈根·特洛涅對我顯示足夠的尊重 那我就不會去動他！
en: So long as Hagen Tronje regards the peace of my house, he shall be left in peace!

zh: 誰要是想讓我感恩，必先承擔我的傷痛！
en: Whoever wants to win my gratitude shall bear my sorrow in mind!

zh: 誰要是帶給我特洛涅的人頭 我就給他花不完的金子！
en: Whoever brings me the head of Tronje, I shall fill his shield with gold!

zh: 不過我請你們不要傷害我母后的那幾個兒子！
en: But I beseech you: do no harm to the sons of my mother!

zh: 【匈奴人跟尼伯龍根人一起慶祝夏至】
en: How the Huns Celebrated the Summer Solstice with the Nibelungen.

zh: 難道在萊茵流域，你們的沃爾姆斯城的習慣是 全副武裝赴宴的嗎？
en: Is it the fashion at Worms upon the Rhine to sit at table armed from head to foot?

zh: 哈根·特洛涅心裏很清楚他自己為什麼劍不離手！
en: Lord Hagen Tronje knows why he never lays aside his sword!

zh: 我認為，這樣的場合肯定不能讓匈奴王的子嗣缺席的！
en: Methinks that at such a feast the heir to all Attila's crowns mustn't be absent!

zh: 我覺得這孩子的命不會長...
en: Methinks the boy will not live long.

zh: ...估計我們以後沒什麼機會參加他舉辦的什麼宴會了！
en: Scarcely shall we as guests attend any court of his!

zh: 匈奴王，這就是你客人幹出來的好事！
en: The work of your guest, Lord Attila!

zh: 現在起，我跟尼伯龍根人奉陪到底！
en: Now, Nibelungen, you are fair game!

zh: 我希望能你們能確保我跟我的部下離開這個大廳！
en: I demand safe conduct from this hall for myself and my men!

zh: 去告訴克裏米爾特你所看到的！
en: Alert Lady Kriemhild of what it is you see!

zh: 皇宮裏面已經沒有活著的匈奴人了！
en: No Hun survives any longer in Attila's hall!

zh: 皇后，實在難以打敗他們！
匈奴人，一定要為死去人以及你們的王子報仇雪恨啊！
en: Avenge thy dead, Huns, and the royal child!

zh: 交出殺人兇手，你們就能自由！
en: Hand over Siegfried's murderer - and you shall be free!

zh: 等到明天日出時，尼伯龍根人都將喪命！
en: Not one of the Nibelungen will gaze upon this next dawn.

zh: 我的親女兒要跟吉賽爾赫死在一起了！
en: In Giselher does my own child die!

zh: 別捲進這場戰亂，呂狄格！
這個時刻已經到來，呂狄格侯爵！
en: The time is nigh, Lord Rüdiger!

zh: 呂狄格侯爵，我想讓你把殺害齊格弗裏德的兇手交給我！
en: Lord Margrave Rüdiger, I demand from you Siegfried's murderer!

zh: 不要讓我去跟哈根·特洛涅作對！
en: You do not send me against Hagen Tronje,

zh: 皇后，你是在命令我跟你的哥哥開戰！ 因為他會想盡辦法保護哈根的！
en: - you send me against your brothers, my lady, who defend him with their very lives!

zh: 呂狄格，你們是發過誓的！
你是對著劍刃發了重誓的！
en: You've sworn it upon the sharp edge of your sword!

zh: 我已經把自己的親女兒許配給吉賽爾赫！
en: I engaged my only child to Giselher!

zh: 血債就該血來償，呂狄格侯爵！
en: Blood shall follow blood, Lord Rüdiger!

zh: 我的國王，不要逼我去傷害我的女兒！
en: My lord! Do not force me to kill my only child!

zh: 呂狄格爵士站在大門面前！
en: Lord Rüdiger stands before the gate!

zh: 他會幫我們調解戰亂的！
岳父大人，你給我們帶來了什麼？
en: What do you bring us, father?

zh: 國王啊，請不要讓相愛的雙方相互殘殺！
en: My lord, do not allow they who love one another to kill one another!

zh: 他們必須要交出殺害我兒子的兇手，那樣我就放過他們！
en: They must deliver unto me the murderer of my child - and they are free!

zh: 看來你還是不瞭解德國人的想法，埃策爾國王！
en: You know not the German soul, Lord Attila!

zh: 克裏米爾特和我立下的誓言，比你跟我女兒的婚約還要早！
en: The oath I made to Kriemhild is older than the oath between myself and you!

zh: 別逼我違背誓言！ 拿起你們的劍吧！
en: Don't force me to break my oath!

zh: 你們想讓我成為一個無信用的小人嗎？
en: Do you wish me to lose my honour? !

zh: 來跟我打吧，哈根·特洛涅！

en: O sister, what you have wrought!

zh: 把哈根交出來，就放你們走！
en: Deliver Hagen unto me - and you are free!

zh: 克裏米爾特，對你的復仇行動滿意吧？ ！
呂狄格跟他的部下也死了！
en: Rüdiger and his men are dead!

zh: 但是那個殺了你齊格弗裏德的哈根·特洛涅還活著！
en: But Hagen Tronje lives on, who slew your Siegfried!

zh: 皇后讓人用火箭燒大堂！
en: The Queen bids the hall be bombarded with fire arrows!

zh: 克裏米爾特做得對！ 她做得對極了！
en: Lady Kriemhild is right, she is more than right!

zh: 要是能用火逼出那兇手哈根，我絕對會支持她的做法！
en: I myself will stand at her side as the fire flushes the murderer Hagen from his hole!

zh: 我真是要謝謝你，克裏米爾特！
雖然我們從未愛在一起 但我們最終卻會恨在一起！
en: Although we were never united in love, we will, in the end, yet be united in hate!

zh: 不，埃策爾，我的內心對你一如既往的充滿了愛意！
en: Never, King Attila, was my heart so filled with love as now!

zh: 我不想讓勃艮第的國王龔特爾被煙熏死！
en: I don't want King Gunther of Burgundy to die a smoky death!

zh: 我去把我自己的人頭送給她
en: I shall offer Lady Kriemhild my head!

zh: 尼伯龍根的人們，你們願意用哈根·特洛涅的人頭換自己的一條命嗎？
en: Speak, ye Nibelungen, will you buy your lives with Hagen Tronje's head? !

zh: 忠誠還在，人心還在！ 大火面前，沒人動搖，哈根·特洛涅！
en: Loyalty, unbroken by iron, also will not melt in fire, Hagen Tronje!

zh: 福爾克正在準備演奏最終篇章呢！
en: Volker prepares his fiddle for one final song!
I call it a shame and a disgrace,

zh: 克裏米爾特夫人 你沒法用手裏的武器戰勝對手！ 卻用這樣下三濫的手段把他們全部燒死了！
