en: Lady Kriemhild, that you let these heroes whom you could not defeat in battle be annihilated in fiery distress!

zh: 有沒有聽見福爾克爵士正在裏面唱歌？
en: Do you hear? Lord Volker is singing!

zh: 我們現在倍感清涼，綠色的萊茵河啊！
en: O, that we were on the cool, green Rhine!

zh: 克裏米爾特夫人，你簡直不是人！
en: You are no human being, Lady Kriemhild -!

zh: 當齊格弗裏德死的時候，我也死了...
匈奴王，還有一名封臣沒死！
en: One vassal still lives, Lord Attila!

zh: 在一切的不公正得以糾正之前 我還無法還鄉去面對齊格弗裏德
en: I cannot go home to my dead Siegfried before having atoned for every wrong...

zh: 這兒就是劍，哈根大人，那些財寶在哪裏？
en: Here is the sword, Lord Hagen. Where is the Treasure?

zh: 我發過誓，只要我的王還活著 我就永不洩露那個藏寶地點
en: I swore never to betray the location of the Treasure so long as one of my kings still lives!

zh: 現在，克裏米爾特，除了上帝還有我自己 再也沒人知道藏寶地址了
en: Now, Kriemhild, no-one knows anything of the Treasure other than God and myself!

zh: 而上帝也不會告訴你更多的
en: And God is no more discreet than I!

zh: 把她送回到她死去的丈夫齊格弗裏德的身邊！
en: Deliver her home to Siegfried, her dead husband!

zh: 她不該屬於別的任何男人！
en: She belonged to no other man!
Here does the myth have an end.

zh: 本片內容以及字幕僅供學習交流，嚴禁用於商業途徑 中文字幕校譯： yourtear@TLF
老工匠米梅說回故鄉去吧! 齊格蒙德王的兒子齊格弗裏德! 我已經沒什麼能教你了
en: Thus spoke Mime, the artful blacksmith: "Siegfried, son of King Siegmund, ride home to Xanten.

zh: 難道你從沒聽說過在萊因河畔 布盧郡王們統治著的渥努姆斯城嗎？
en: Have you never before heard of the king's castle at Worms on the Rhine and the kings of Burgundy who reign there?

zh: 我一定要去贏得克裏米爾特！
en: I shall go there towing Kriemhild!

zh: 告訴我怎麼去渥努姆斯 要不然別怪我不客氣！
en: Show me the way to Worms or you will lose your life!

zh: 再見了齊格弗裏德，齊格蒙德王之子 你是永遠到不了渥努姆斯的！
en: Farewell, Siegfried, son of king Siegmund. You will never get to Worms!

zh: 這時，年輕人齊格弗裏德聽明白了鳥兒的歌：
en: Young Siegfried understood the bird's song:

zh: 當殺死龍的那個人，用龍血沐浴之後... ...那他就會變成金剛不壞之身！
en: If the dragon slayer would bathe in the dragon's blood, his body would become invincible, forever safe against sword and spear!

zh: 【弗路卡向克裏米爾特謳歌齊格弗裏德】 【齊格弗裏德千辛萬苦趕往渥努姆斯】
en: Now Volker, the bard, sang of Siegfried in front of Kriemhild, and how Siegfried came to Worms.
The violin sounded and Volker sang:

zh: 屠龍勇士齊格蒙德之子進入了尼伯龍根的王國
en: The dragon slayer, the son of Siegmund entered the realm of the Nibelungen.

zh: 他百戰百勝，世上無人能敵
en: He won the fight against the dragon. There is no one on earth like him.

zh: 尼伯龍根族的阿路貝尼說 勇者啊，我把隱身頭巾送給你
en: Thus spoke Alberich, the Nibelung: Spare my life and I will give you the wonder cap.

zh: 它可隱藏一切，請你饒過我吧
en: Whoever wears it becomes unseen or may take whatever form he chooses!

zh: 繞過我吧！ 勇士！ 我會讓你成為世上最富有的王！
en: Spare my life, O hero, and I will make you the richest king on earth!

zh: 尼伯龍根族給北方的支配者冰之巨人鍛造王冠
en: The crown of the King of the Northland, the ruler of the Ice giants is being wrought here by the Nibelungen.

zh: 尼伯龍根族在血的火焰中 做出了絕世好劍巴爾蒙格
en: No sword on earth compares with Balmung. The Nibelungen forged it in fire of blood.

zh: 遺產的繼承者將受到詛咒 當失去遺產後就會變成石頭
en: All is lost. Cursed be the heritage of the heir! Return with me to stone all ye whom from stone were wrought.

zh: 齊格弗裏德成為屠龍者後
en: Siegfried became the dragon slayer The lord of the Nibelungen Treasure.

zh: 又成為尼伯龍根財寶的主人 十二國的國王都要臣服於他
en: Twelve kingdoms subdued the powerful. Twelve kings became his vassals.

zh: 克裏米爾特說: 弗路卡! 把我親手縫製的外套拿去吧!
en: Kriemhild, the daughter of Ute: "Volker, take this cloak, as reward for your song!

zh: 作為給你的歌聲的謝禮!
齊格蒙德之子齊格弗裏德 和12個勇者一起來到城門 求見龔特爾王
en: Siegfried, son of King Sigmund, is outside the castle door with twelve of his knights, and asks for an audience with King Gunther.

zh: 讓屠龍者繞道吧，我的王！ 不要讓他進來！
en: King Gunther, let the dragon slayer go his ways, don't welcome him here!

zh: 在渥努姆斯怎麼能不顧待客之道
en: No one shall say that at Worms one does not know the way kings greet each other!

zh: 齊格蒙德之子齊格弗裏德是來拜訪我的！ 我應該歡迎他！
en: Siegfried, son of King Siegmund, has my welcome!

zh: 我昨晚作了個不祥的夢
en: I dreamt last night an awful dream...

zh: 我現在想起來這夢境了
en: And now this dream comes to my mind!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，我是來向 你的妹妹克裏米爾特求婚的
en: I come, King Gunther, to ask for your sister Kriemhild's hand.

zh: 龔特爾殿下也自己希望得到婚姻 他喜歡上了一個勇敢倔強的烈女
en: King Gunther, too, has marriage plans. He has set his heart on a bold and mighty maiden.

zh: 她的名字叫做布侖希爾德女王
en: Her name is Brunhild and she is Queen of Iceland.

zh: 她的城池火耀北境，無敵於世
en: Ringed by fire, her invincible castle towers in the Northland.

zh: 你提我跟布侖希爾德的事幹嘛！
en: Why must you speak of Brunhild?

zh: 你不知道只有能夠戰勝她的最強勇士 才能贏得她嗎？
en: You know she has set dangerous conditions: Thrice must the suitor best her in feats of strength or die!

zh: 無敵勇士齊格弗裏德來得正好啊
en: Siegfried, the unique hero, has come to Worms at an opportune moment.

zh: 他應該能幫助殿下得到布侖希爾德的
en: He may help us win Brunhild for you!

zh: 我有十二個王者為臣 我過去和將來都不會俯首於人
en: Twelve kings have I for vassals. But vassal am I to no man, now and ever!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，準備迎接新娘吧 勇士齊格弗裏德會為殿下得到布侖希爾德！
en: Prepare for the quest to get your bride, King Gunther. It is Siegfried the mighty hero who will win Brunhild for you.

zh: 【齊格弗裏德如何為龔特爾得到布侖希爾德】
en: How Siegfried won Brunhild for Gunther

zh: 異國的勇士們乘著龍頭大船到達你的海岸了！
en: The dragon ship is carrying foreign heroes to your shores!

zh: 異國人接近火焰之海了
en: The foreigners are nearing the flaming sea.

zh: 當強者來臨，火焰是擋不住他們的
en: If he be strong enough and favored by the gods, the flames will consume themselves and die.

zh: 帶我的裝備來，姑娘們 這是前所未有的戰鬥
en: My maidens, help me put on my armor, this will be a fight I've never fought before!

zh: 歡迎來到這場生死搏鬥，勇士
en: Welcome, hero, for the fight for life or death!

zh: 我過來不是要你死我活，布侖希爾德！
en: Neither life nor death do I desire from you, Brunhild.
It is King Gunther who woos you!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，不用等到夜晚 你折斷的武器就將成為我大廳的裝飾！
en: Before it is evening, King Gunther, your smothered weapons will adorn my hall.

zh: 龔特爾殿下，容我告假，去跟船隊說：
en: Give me leave, King Gunther, to make ready your ship for Bronhild, your royal bride.

zh: 不用等到夜晚，你的新娘布侖希爾德 就會和你一起回國
en: We should set sail for home before sundown!

zh: 我們比試三個回合，龔特爾殿下
en: Let the triple battle begin, King Gunther!

zh: 你要在投石，跳遠，標槍三項都勝過我
en: You have to defeat me three times, king: with the stone, the spring, and the spear.

zh: 拿出勇氣 殿下 我來幫你投石 我會抱著你跳遠
en: Fear not, king! Make you the motions and my strength will win each contest. I'll throw the stone for you and carry you in the jump.

zh: 【布侖希爾德來到渥努姆斯！ 國王娶親！
en: How Brunhild enters Worms and how the kings celebrated their wedding.

zh: 快準備婚禮 國王的船接近了!
en: Start the prepartions for marriage! The king's ship is arriving!
We have reached our destination, my queen!

zh: 你是那個擊敗了我三次的人嗎？
en: Are you really the man who defeated me threefold?

zh: 我是你的囚犯，可我絕不會做你的妻子！
en: I am your captive, but I shall never be your wife!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，請實現你和我的約定
en: Keep your word, King Gunther, as I have kept mine!

zh: 克裏米爾特答應的話 今天就舉行我們各自的婚禮
en: If Kriemhild gives her consent, hero, we shall celebrate a double wedding here today.

zh: 國王把妹妹賜給下臣，這算什麼？
en: Since when is it customary among Burgundians to give the King's daughter in marriage to a vassal?

zh: 齊格弗裏德不是我的下臣 今天起他是我的結盟兄弟
en: Siegfried is no vassal. I love him as though he were my brother. We shall become blood brothers today!

zh: 紅色的鮮血將融為一體
en: Blood is mingling with red blood, the drops fuse inseparably.

zh: 打破結拜兄弟忠誠的人 將卑微地死於路旁
en: Whoever forsakes loyalty to the bloodbrother will perish at the wayside, all honor is lost!

zh: 布侖希爾德雖然輸了，但沒有屈服
en: Brunhild has been defeated, not cowed.

zh: 布盧郡王會因為這個強勢妻子而受人嘲笑嗎？
en: Shall the king of Burgundy be scorned by an obstinate woman?

zh: 半途而廢的事不該讚賞 對與獻出自己妹妹給你的朋友 你會見死不救嗎？
en: Damned be the deed half done! Will you forsake your friend who gave you his own sister?

zh: 隱身頭巾能按你的想法改變相貌 你快變成我，打消布侖希爾德的反抗心
en: The magic cap will change you into what you wish. Take Gunther's form and break Brunhild's iron will.

zh: 布盧郡的榮光正在褪色 我們需要尼伯龍根的財寶
en: O king, Burgundy's glory is waning, we need the Nibelungen treasure.

zh: 齊格弗裏德是你的兄弟 不會拒絕你的要求的 而且克裏米爾特比全世界的黃金更有價值
en: It would be folly to reject what Siegfried offers you as a brother and Kriemhild is worth more than all the gold in the world!
Put away the armlet, Kriemhild, it guards an ugly secret.

zh: 克裏米爾特 尼伯龍根財寶的主人不需要這 有著邪惡秘密的東西
en: The Mistress of the Nibelungen Treasure has no need for it!

zh: 告訴你，我得到那個手鐲的事 但不要告訴別人
en: Listen, Kriemhild, at how I won the armlet - and keep silent!

zh: 尼伯龍根的財寶運到了！
龔特爾殿下,齊格弗裏德和克裏米爾特還要留在渥努姆斯多久？
en: How long, King Gunther, will Siegfried and Kriemhild tarry at the court of Burgundy?

zh: 為了我的母親，他們還會留一陣子！
en: They stay for the sake of my mother.

zh: 布侖希爾德，你覺得自己能替代我妹妹的位置嗎？
en: Would you, Brunhild, be willing to take up the daughter's place for Queen Ute?

zh: 這手鐲關係到你兄長的名譽 千萬不要再讓別人看到它了
en: Your brother's honor is entwined with this armlet. It never should be seen again by human eyes!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，我覺得是時候讓齊格弗裏德 回他自己的家鄉去了
en: It seems to me high time, King Gunther, that you send Siegfried back home to Xanten!

zh: 不行，他自己有決定的自由！
en: Never! He shall leave of his own freewill!

zh: 我去參加彌撒了，乖女兒...
en: I am going to attend mass, my daughter.

zh: 我想要穿上皇后的正式服裝去教堂！
en: I'll go to the cathedral in the regalia of the queen of Burgundy!

zh: 臣子的妻子怎麼能先於 布侖希爾德王后進入大教堂！
en: The wife of a vassal may not precede the Queen of Burgundy!

zh: 你稱我丈夫齊格弗裏德為什麼？
en: How did you dare refer to Siegfried, my husband?

zh: 齊格弗裏德是龔特爾的臣子 他只是我丈夫一個護衛 他的妻子理應順從於我！
en: Siegfried introduced himself to me as Gunther's vassal and servant. He did servant's work for my husband!

zh: 你對他來說不值一提 你是他送給別人的戰利品 竟然還敢藐視他？
en: You, whom he disdained. You, whom he gave away. You dare to belittle Siegfried?

zh: 快給布盧郡王后讓路，狗奴才！
en: Make way for the Queen of Burgundy, vassal woman!

zh: 布盧郡王后，認得這個手鐲嗎？
en: You recognize this armlet, you queen of Burgundy?

zh: 這個手鐲為什麼會在你手上？
en: How came that armlet into your hand?

zh: 隱身披的主人裝成龔特爾王擊敗了你三次 這是我的丈夫齊格弗裏德送給我的
en: The carrier of the magic helmet who, disguised as Gunther, defeated you three times - Siegfried, my husband gave it to me!
King! Speaks your sister the truth?
Your babbling, hero, was worse than murder!

zh: 屠龍勇士齊格弗裏德是不死之身 他不會被你的復仇心所傷的！
en: Siegfried is safe from your wrath. None can slay the dragon slayer!

zh: 可以把劍往當年樹葉遮蓋的地方插下去！
en: Save in one spot, where the linden leaf clung, is he vulnerable as other men!

zh: 龔特爾王，屠龍者就交給我解決吧！
en: King Gunther, let me deal with the dragon slayer!

zh: 我們是歃血為盟的兄弟 難道要因為他的忠誠而殺他？
en: We pledged blood brotherhood. How can I be party to his death?

zh: 把我的手鐲搶走的人，應該娶我為妻 是他奪走了我的貞潔！
en: The one who took the armlet from me made me his wife, took my maidenhood from me!

zh: 告訴全布盧郡的人，我要請他們去打獵 這是狩獵的好季節啊，有一頭游離的狼等著我們去捕殺
en: Tronje, announce to the people of Burgundy that I invite everybody to a royal hunt to kill a mad dog and a ravening.

zh: 【龔特爾對齊格弗裏德背信棄義】
克裏米爾特，難道你能保持沉默嗎？
en: Can you keep a secret Kriemhild?

zh: 我已經打破了一次誓言，現在再也不能那樣了
en: I once broke the oath to be silent and never will do so again!

zh: 狩鹿活動很容易會變成對人的殺戮
en: Well then, the upcoming hunt might easily turn into a chase for men.

zh: 我已得到準備戰鬥的秘令 布盧郡的戰火已經很難避免了
en: A secret message warns me of war against Burgundy!

zh: 放心吧，克裏米爾特 你的丈夫是屠龍者，是不死身！
en: Good for you, Kriemhild, that your husband is the dragon slayer, the invincible!

zh: 那誰又能擔保，萬一在戰鬥時 碰巧被敵人攻擊到 當時樹葉遮蓋的地方呢？
en: Who warrants me that in the heat of battle not a chance blade should pierce where the lime leaf fell?

zh: 如果需要我來保護他 那我就一定要知道那個弱點在哪裏！
en: If you want me to protect him, I have to know the exact spot where the invicible could be hurt!
You are good counsel, you truest of true.

zh: 我會為你在那個位置做上十字記號的
en: I shall mark the spot with a little cross myself!

zh: 我是來道別的，布侖希爾德 我們要去森林狩獵了
en: I come to take leave, Brunhild. We are starting for the hunt in the Odenwald forest.

zh: 龔特爾殿下，不要忘記我們的約定 在報仇前，我會一直不吃不喝
en: Mind my vow, King Gunther, I shall not eat nor drink until my disgrace has been vindicated!

zh: 啊，我的夫君，請不要離開我 我昨晚夢見，你被一隻兇暴的豬撕裂
en: O my dear lord, don't leave me. I dreamt last night a furious boar tore you to pieces!

zh: 啊，我的夫君，請不要離開我 我昨晚還夢見，兩座大山向你坍塌
en: O my dear lord, don't leave me. I dreamt further that two mountains collapsed and buried you!

zh: 今天我要和龔特爾和解 我就沒有別的敵人了
en: Today Gunther and I will reconcile. Who else is my enemy?
Mother, I feel as if blood is draining from my heart!

zh: 在森林的狩獵從清晨一直持續到日落
en: The hunt in the Odenwald forest lasted from morning until sundown.

zh: 我真想用滿滿一捧黃金去換口酒喝呀！
en: A handful of red gold for a cooling draught of white wine!

zh: 運酒的車，車輪壞了 不過我知道有個地方有冰涼的泉水
en: A wheel broke from the wagon loaded with wine. But I know of a cool brook nearby!

zh: 我之前聽他們讚美你身手矯健 本來是想跟你比比，誰能先喝到水的
en: I always heard of you as the fastest runner of all heroes, let's run, you and I, for the first draught!
Gunther, my brother, let's be friends again!

zh: 等你從泉水那邊回來再說吧
en: When you are back from the spring!
How Kriemhild swears revenge to Hagen Tronje

zh: 布侖希爾德，我實現諾言了 齊格弗裏德死了
en: You may break your fast, Brumhild, Siegfried is dead.

zh: 祝福你，龔特爾王，因為女人的謊言 你殺死了自己最忠實的朋友
en: Hail to you King Gunther! For the sake of a woman's lie, you have slain your most loyal friend!

zh: 龔特爾殿下，請你裁決哈根 是他殺了我的丈夫
en: I call to you for justice, King Gunther! Hagen Tronje has slain my husband!

zh: 用忠誠換取忠誠，克裏米爾特！
他的自由就是我們的自由！
我們的胸膛就是他的盾牌！
無論你躲在我們一族的背後 還是躲到世界盡頭的眾神的神壇
en: You might try to hide among my clan, behind the altars of God, or at the end of the world

zh: 我都會報仇的，哈根·特洛涅
en: - You cannot escape my vengeance, Hagen Tronje!

zh: 告訴我哥龔特爾王 布盧郡的女王已死！
en: Announce to King Gunther, my brother, the Queen of Burgundy is dead!

zh: 齊格弗裏德的故事到這裏就結束了
en: Thus ends the tale of Siegfried.

zh: 德国电影档案馆 影视博物馆
en: GERMAN FILM LIBRARY MUSEUM OF FILM AND TV
BATTLESHIP POTEMKIN Film from the series "The Year 1905"

zh: 高斯影业第一制片厂 出品
en: Produced by the 1st studio of GOSKINO

zh: 布里奥克 编剧： N.
S. M. 爱森斯坦 副导演：
主摄影： 埃都尔德. 提斯

en: A. ANTONOV A. LEVSHIN M. GOMOROV M. SHTRAUKH
Administrators A. P. KRYUKOV and A. KOTOSHEV

zh: 革命之火席卷俄罗斯大地
en: The spirit of revolution soared over the Russian land.

zh: 无数颗心中暗潮涌动，群情激昂
en: A tremendous, mysterious process was taking place in countless hearts.

zh: 水手马图申科和瓦库林楚克
我们，波坦金号的水手 必须支持我们的工人兄弟... 站到革命的最前线！
en: We, the sailors of Potemkin, must support the workers, our brothers... and stand among the front lines of the revolution!

zh: 休息的水手们睡得死气沉沉
en: Heavy and gloomy is the sleep of the off duty.

zh: 他把怒火发泄到一个年轻人身上
en: He vents his anger on a young man.

zh: 也到了我们该大声疾呼的时候了
en: The time has come when we too must speak out.
Are we to be the last?
Even a dog wouldn't eat this!

zh: 这块肉都能自个儿爬到海里去了！ (形容虫多)
en: It could crawl overboard on its own!

zh: 只是苍蝇的幼仔，用盐水洗掉就行了！
en: They are dead fly larvae. You can wash them off with brine!

zh: 俄罗斯关在日本的战犯吃得都比我们好！
en: Russian prisoners in Japan are fed better than we are!
It's good meat. End of discussion!

zh: 高级军官基里亚罗夫斯基

en: The sailors refused to eat the borscht.
GIVE US THIS DAY OUR DAILY BREAD

zh: 对罗宋汤感到满意的人... 向前两步走！
en: Whoever is satisfied with the borscht take two steps forward!

zh: 我将在船舷上吊死其他人！
en: I'll hang the rest on the yard!

zh: 马图申科趁着一片混乱 将水手们召集到炮台旁
en: Matyushenko, under the guise of breaking ranks, calls the sailors to the gun turret.

zh: 他们中的大多数人聚集到炮台旁
en: Most of them gathered by the turret.

zh: 他们试图进入上将的指挥舱
en: They try to sneak through the admiral's hatch.

zh: 这条通道不是给你们用的！
en: That way is not for you!
I'll shoot you all like dogs!

zh: 快让这群叛乱分子醒悟吧！

en: To the bottom to feed the worms!

zh: 头破血流的瓦库林楚克 从残暴的基里亚罗夫斯基手下逃脱
en: The bleeding Vakulinchuk flees from the furious Giliarovsky.

zh: 第一个挑动叛乱的人最先被处决
en: And he who was first to sound the cry of rebellion was first to fall at the executioner's hand.

zh: 奥德萨新码头上的一座帐篷是 瓦库林楚克最后的安息处
en: A tent on the new pier in Odessa is the final resting place for Vakulinchuk.

zh: 第三 章 "死者的呼喊"
en: Part three. "THE DEAD MAN CALLS OUT."

zh: 夜晚的大雾苟延残喘到现在...
en: Mist lingered on from the night...

zh: 叛变的消息和清晨的第一缕阳光 一道照进了城市
en: Together with the sun, the news hit the city.

zh: 让我们向那群凶残的吸血鬼复仇！
en: Let's take revenge on the bloodthirsty vampires!

zh: 签名："塔夫里切斯基王子号"战舰全体船员
en: Signed: Crew of the squadron battleship Prince Tavrichesky."

zh: 英勇牺牲的战士永垂不朽！
en: Eternal memory to the fallen fighters!

zh: 让我们化解分歧与敌意团结起来！
en: Let there not be differences or hostility among us!

zh: 敌人必将遭到毁灭性的打击！
en: The enemy must be dealt a decisive blow!

zh: 和全俄罗斯的造反工人们一起
en: Together with the rebelling workers from all of Russia

zh: 岸上的群众密切关注着波坦金号
en: The shore watched Potemkin tensely and attentively.

zh: 在那些值得纪念的日子里 城市与起义的战舰同舟共济
en: In those memorable days, the city lived together with the rebellious battleship.

zh: 无数只小船如同羽翼纯白的鸟群般涌向战舰
en: Like a white-winged flock, boats flew to the battleship.

zh: 战舰以炮火回应奥德萨军方的暴行
en: And then the brutality of the military authorities in Odessa was answered with the battleship's shells.

zh: 争吵的会议持续到傍晚
en: Turbulent meetings went on until evening.

zh: 奥德萨人民在等待解放者！
en: The people of Odessa are waiting for the liberators!

zh: 让部队靠岸，军队会加入你们的
en: Land the troops and the army will join you.

zh: 靠岸是不可能的 上将的舰队正朝我们驶来
en: Landing is not possible. The admiral's squadron is coming our way.

zh: 万众一心，他们决定给舰队以迎头痛击
en: With one heart, they decided to face the squadron.

zh: 舰队在黑暗中悄悄逼近
en: The squadron was sneaking up in the darkness.

zh: 由于激烈发言后咽喉疼痛 他们沉重的呼吸时断时续
en: Sore from constant speech, throats breathe heavily and unevenly.

zh: 发出信号： 加入我们！

en: The enemy is within firing range!

zh: 沙皇将军们的头顶上爆发出 战士们雷鸣般的欢呼
en: Above the heads of the tsar's admirals thundered a brotherly hurrah.

zh: 他们骄傲地挥舞着胜利的红旗 叛舰在舰队中自由穿行，一弹未发
en: And proudly waving the red flag of victory, without a single shot, the rebellious battleship passed through the rows of the squadron.

zh: 演员： 普罗特克特中央工人剧场 黑海舰队官兵
en: Starring Members of the Proletkult Theater Sailors of the Black-Sea Fleet

zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔渔民协会 奥德萨居民
en: The Sevastopol Fishermen's Association Inhabitants of Odessa

zh: 口号来自十月革命期间的里奥. 托洛茨基
en: Motto according to Leo Trotsky, Russia, during the Revolution

zh: 根据恩诺. 帕塔拉斯与安娜. 波恩 联合执导的俄罗斯首映版改编
en: A reconstruction of the Russian premiere version directed by Enno Patalas in cooperation with Anna Bohn

zh: 德国联邦文化基金会 出品
en: An Initiative Project of the German Federal Cultural Foundation

zh: 鸣谢： 德国联邦电影档案馆 柏林，及伦敦英国电影学院
en: Supported by German Federal Film Archive, Berlin and British Film Institute, London

zh: 英文字幕由柏林摩塞罗西公司制作
威斯巴登市，托纳斯影业 电影实验室
红旗上色 杰哈德. 乌尔曼
en: Colorization of the flag Gerhard Ullmann

zh: 去西部吧，年轻人！ 去西部 ——霍勒斯·格里利
en: "GO WEST, YOUNG MAN, GO WEST" Horace Greeley (1811 – 1872)

zh: 有些人一生中四处旅行、广交好友 而有些人——
en: Some people travel through life making friends where ever they go, while others -

zh: 印第安纳州的一个小镇 一位年轻人的社会地位迫使他四处漂泊
en: In a little town in Indiana, the social standing of   a certain young man had kept him continuously on the move.

zh: 这些东西我一共给你1.65美元
en: "I'll give you a dollar sixty five for the whole business."

zh: 这里能应聘的工作我都试遍了 你还有什么好建议吗？
en: "I've tried every place in town for a job, do you suppose there's any use asking you?"

zh: 棕色的眼睛 （在美国俚语里，该词略带歧视）
告诉那个新来的 骑上马去帮帮那些小伙子们
en: "Tell that new hand to get a horse and go help the boys."

zh: 周四我要运送一千头牲畜去卖

en: I can't hold out any longer."

zh: 你挥个红色的东西它们就过来了
en: "Wave something red and they'll come to you."

zh: 你明知我在等更好的出价 却还在现在卖牛 你这是什么意思？
en: "What do you mean by selling cattle now,   when you know I am holding out for a higher price?"

zh: 我会尽一切可能阻止你把牛运出去
en: "You'll not ship cattle out of this country if I can stop it."

zh: 他威胁要阻止我们发货
假如牛送不到屠宰场，我就破产了
en: - And if they don't reach the stockyards, I'm ruined."

zh: 赶她进去 她也要运走
en: "Put her in there, she goes too."

zh: 你买不起她 她能卖两倍的价钱
en: "You can't buy her, she'll bring twice that much."
"Why don't you let him have her."

zh: 小伙子们，确保火车顺利到达
en: "You boys see that the train gets through."

zh: 你要是还想说的话——就给我笑
加州，洛杉矶，联合屠宰场
en: When Empty Return this Car to

zh: ——如果他们到不了屠宰场，我就完蛋了
en: "-- and if they don't reach the stockyards, I'm ruined."

zh: 长官，有一千头牛在街上游荡！
en: "Captain, there's a thousand cattle roaming the streets!"

zh: 有一万头野牛在街上撒野！
en: "There's ten thousand wild cows loose in the street!"

zh: 城里有一百万头大公牛！
叫消防队来帮忙控制这群四处乱窜的牲畜
en: "Call out the Fire Department to help stop the stampede."
"Have you seen anything of my cattle?"

zh: 我拥有的一切东西 你想要什么尽管说
en: "My home and anything I have is yours for the asking."

zh: 一八六一年春天 西方大西洋特快车 全速驰入乔治亚州马利亚塔
en: The Western and Atlantic Flyer speeding into Marrietta, Ga., in the Spring 1861.
There were two loves in his live.
"Yes, dad, and I'm going to be one of the first to enlist."

zh: 西方大西洋铁路火车司机
en: "Engineer on the Western and Atlantic Railroad."

zh: 他当火车司机更有价值
en: He is more valuable to the South as an engineer."

zh: 如果你们输了这场战争 别怪我
en: "If you lose this war don't blame me."

zh: 对南方而言，他是个耻辱
请别撒谎 我不想再跟你说话

en: I don't want you to speak to me again until you are in uniform.

zh: 在恰塔奴加北面的 一个联邦军营理
en: In a Union encampment just North of Chattanooga.

zh: 柴契尔将军 和他的头号间谍，安德森上尉
en: General Thatcher, and his chief spy, Captain Anderson.

zh: 我知道马利亚塔 到恰塔奴加的每寸铁路 加上十个精选人手 我不会失败
en: "I Know every foot of this railroad from Marietta to Chattanooga, and with ten picked men I cannot fail."

zh: 我们将以中立的肯德基州 老百姓加入南方联盟
en: "We will enter the South as civilians coming from the neutral state of Kentucky to join the southern cause."

zh: 那么你劫火车的那天 我要派克将军前往与你见面
en: "Then the day you steal the train I will have General Parker advance to meet you."

zh: 一旦你到达 我会让你知道 父亲受伤有多严重
en: "As soon as I arrive I will let you know how seriously father is wounded."

zh: 大森地，停二十分钟吃晚餐
三个男子偷了我的将军号
何不停下来与他们战斗？
恐怕他们人数比我们多太多
en: "I'm afraid they have us greatly outnumbered."

zh: 驻守恰塔奴加的南军奉令撤退
en: The Southern army facing Chattanooga is ordered to retreat."

zh: 派克将军之胜利的北军前进
en: General Parker's victorious Northern army advancing.

zh: 在敌人土地上，绝望地迷路 无助地寒冷及非常地饥饿
en: In the enemy's country, hopelessly lost, helplessly cold and horribly hungry.

zh: 明早九点，我方补给火车将在 石河桥与派克将军部队会合
en: "At Nine o'clock tomorrow morning our supply trains will meet and unite with General Parker's army at the Rock River bridge."

zh: 而部队在补给火车支援下 将前往突袭叛军的左翼
en: "Then the army, backed by our supply trains, will advance for a surprise attack on the rebels left flank."

zh: 一旦我军火车和部队越过桥 世上没有东西可抵挡我们
en: "Once our trains and troops cross that bridge, nothing on the earth can stop us."

zh: 我们劫车时这女孩在行李车上 因此我想最好扣留她
en: "This girl was in the baggage car when we stole the train, so I thought it best to hold her."

zh: 我们最好留在这儿等待天亮 才明了我们在哪里
en: "We had better stay here until daybreak to see where we are."

zh: 你这么勇敢，只为了救我 冒你生命危险来到敌人地区
en: "It was so brave of you to risk your life, coming into the enemy's country, just to save me."

zh: 经过一夜美好宁静的休息后
en: After a nice, quiet, refreshing night's rest.

zh: 不论怎样我们得返回我方阵地 警告他们即将来临的攻击
en: "We've got to get back to our lines somehow and warn them of this coming attack."

zh: 在他抵达南军阵地之前 我会抓到那个间谍
en: "I will get that spy before he reaches the Southern lines.

zh: 你照计划跟随补给火车走吧
en: You follow with the supply trains as planned."

zh: 我们必须拾捡更多的柴火
桥附近的北方师 要会合补给火车
en: The Northern division nearing the bridge to meet the supply trains.

zh: 那座桥还没烧毁得 足以阻止你们 我手下将涉水过河
en: "That bridge is not burned enough to stop you, and my men will ford the river."

zh: 我必须穿着它通过阵线
en: "I had to wear it to get through the lines."

zh: 本片由德国环球电影公司制作 德美合资的派拉蒙公司荣誉发行
en: This film was produced by Ufa and is distributed courtesy of Parufamet.

zh: 导演 弗里茨·朗 编剧 蒂亚·冯·哈伯
美术 奥托·亨特 埃里希·凯特赫特 卡尔·福尔布雷希特 摄像 卡尔·弗洛德 甘瑟·里陶
en: Production Design: Otto Hunte, Erich Kettelhut, Karl Vollbrecht. At the Camera:

zh: 音乐 戈特福里德·休帕茨 雕塑 沃尔特·舒尔茨
乔·弗莱德森[父]—阿尔弗雷德·阿贝尔
弗雷德[子]—古斯塔夫·佛罗希基
en: Freder, Joh Fredersen's son ― Gustav Fröhlich

zh: 洛宏[发明家]—鲁道夫·凯林罗吉
瘦子—弗利兹·拉斯普 约萨法特—西奥·多罗斯 编号11811—欧文·宾斯旺格
en: The Thin Man ― Fritz Rasp Josaphat ― Theodor Loos 11811 ― Erwin Biswanger

zh: 格罗特[核心机的守卫]—海因里希·乔治
en: Grot, the guardian of the Heart-Machine ― Heinrich George

zh: 玛丽娅—布里吉特·赫尔姆
脑和手的调节者一定是心!
en: Epigraph: THE MEDIATOR BETWEEN HEAD AND HANDS MUST BE THE HEART!

zh: 深藏在 土地之下 深藏在 土地之下
en: Deep beneath the earth lay the

zh: 有一座工人们居住的地下城 土地之下 有一座工人们居住的地下城
对父亲而言 机器齿轮的每一个旋转都意味着金钱 他们赠予了儿子们一座 令人惊叹的永恒的花园
en: Fathers, for whom every revolution of a mechanical wheel meant gold, had bestowed upon their sons the wonder of the Eternal Gardens.

zh: 女士们 今天你们将荣幸与 乔·弗莱德森的儿子 小主人弗雷德一起游戏人间
en: Which of you ladies shall today have the honour of entertaining Master Freder, Joh Fredersen's son?

zh: 看啊 这些都是你的兄弟
就这样 弗雷德 大都会统治者乔·弗莱德森的儿子 去寻找这个女孩
en: But this was what happened to Freder ― the son of Joh Fredersen, the master of Metropolis ― as he sought out the girl:

zh: 去新巴别塔 找我父亲
en: To the new Tower of Babel ― to my father ― !

zh: 约萨法特 为什么我从我儿子 而不是你的口中听到了爆炸的消息
en: Why is it, Josaphat, that I learn of this explosion from my son, and not from you ― !

zh: 弗雷德 你去机器大厅找什么
en: What were you looking for in the Machine-Halls, Freder?

zh: 这些人的孩子都是我的兄弟姐妹 我想仔细看一看他们的面庞
en: I wanted to look into the faces of the people whose little children are my brothers, my sisters...

zh: 父亲 在这座伟大的城市 您就是它的头脑 所有人都仰赖这城市之光
en: Your magnificent city, Father ― and you the brain of this city ― and all of us within the light of this city... ―

zh: 但是父亲 双手建造这座城市的人们却在哪儿
en: ...and where are the people, Father, whose hands built your city ― ?

zh: 他们属于哪里 他们属于哪里
en: Off where they belong off where they belong...?

zh: 如果地下城的工人 有一天起义反对您怎么办
en: And if those in the Depths one day rise against you?

zh: 核心机的领班格罗特 有重要信息向您汇报
en: The chief foreman of the Heart-Machine, Grot, ― with an important message...

zh: 约萨法特 这事你怎么看 为什么是格罗特而不是你来向我汇报
en: How is it, Josaphat, that these plans were brought to me by Grot, rather than by you?

zh: 去银行领取你剩下的工资
en: Apply to the G-Bank for your remaining wages...

zh: 父亲 您知道被您解雇意味着什么吗 它意味着遣送地底 父亲 地底 是去地下城
en: Father, do you know what it means to be dismissed by you? ― It means:

zh: 你知道被乔·弗莱德森这样 解雇意味着什么吗
en: Do you know what it means to be dismissed like that by Joh Fredersen?

zh: 你愿意追随我吗 约萨法特
en: Would you like to come with me, Josaphat?

zh: 回家去等我 约萨法特 今晚我还有很长的路要走
en: Go home, Josaphat, and wait for me... I still have a long way to go tonight...

zh: 我要去地底 到我的兄弟那儿去
en: Into the Depths, ― to my brothers...

zh: 从今天起我希望每时每刻得到 我儿子每一步行动的准确汇报
en: From today on I wish to be kept precisely informed of my son's every move...

zh: 兄弟 机器 必须有人守着机器 会有人守着机器的
我来 会有人守着机器的
en: There will be someone at the machine...

zh: 听我说 我想和你交换我的生活
en: Listen to me... I want to trade my life with you...

zh: 你们两位 都等着我
en: Wait for me ― both of you...

zh: 在大都会中央城区 有一座被世世代代所遗忘的鬼屋
en: In the middle of Metropolis, there stands a strange house that the centuries had overlooked.

zh: 发明家洛宏就住在这里
en: The man who dwelled within was Rotwang, the inventor.

zh: 你的生为我带来欢乐 为全人类带来祝福 却失身于乔·弗莱德森 在生下其子弗雷德后因难产而死 海尔
en: Hel Born to bring me happiness and a benediction to all mankind. Lost to Joh Fredersen.

zh: 洛宏 像你这样聪明的人 应该学会去忘记
en: A mind like yours, Rotwang, should be able to forget...

zh: 一生中我只忘记过一个事实 那就是 海尔是一个女人 而你是一个男人
en: Only one time in life did I forget something: that Hel was a woman ― and you a man...

zh: 让死者安息吧 洛宏 我们都已经失去了她
en: Let the dead lie, Rotwang... She's dead for you as she is for me...

zh: 她没有死 乔·弗莱德森 对我来说她还活着
en: For me she isn't dead, Joh Fredersen ― for me she lives — !

zh: 我为了重新创造海尔而失去了这只手 你觉得不值吗
en: Do you think the loss of a hand is too high a price for recreating Hel ― ? !
Do you wish to see her ― ? !

zh: 就现在 乔·弗莱德森 我虽然失去了一只手 但创造了未来的人类—机器人 这难道不值吗
en: Now, Joh Fredersen ― ? ! Isn't it worth losing a hand to have created the man of the future ― the Machine-Man — ?

zh: 他们可以24小时工作 没有人能够区别机器人和真人
en: 24 more hours of work ― and no man, Joh Fredersen, will be able to differentiate the Machine-Man from a mortal ― !

zh: 这个女人是我的 乔·弗莱德森 只有海尔的儿子是你的
en: The woman is mine, Joh Fredersen! Hel's son was yours!

zh: 你到我这儿来到底有什么事
en: And what brings you my way, Joh Fredersen?

zh: 和平常一样 当所有的专家都让我失望时 我需要倾听你的意见
en: I need your advice ― as usual, when all my experts fail me...

zh: 你能够为我破译这些平面图吗 数月来我们不断 从工人的口袋中发现这些图纸
en: Can you decipher for me these plans that for months have been getting discovered in the pockets of my workers?

zh: 两点整 当我交接班结束 她再次召唤我们
en: ...at two... once my shift ends! She has summoned us again...

zh: 父亲啊 父亲 十小时的工作怎么看不到尽头
en: Father ― ! Father ― ! Will ten hours never come to an end ― ?

zh: 这是一张两千年前地下墓穴的蓝图 深藏在比大都会最底层还要深的地下
en: ― it's a blueprint of the two-thousand-year-old catacombs deep below the lowest levels of your Metropolis...

zh: 我要知道我的工人们 在地下墓穴正在做什么
en: I should like to glean what my workers are doing exactly in those catacombs...

zh: 今天我要向你们讲述 一个建造巴别塔的传说
en: Today I shall tell you the legend of THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE TOWER OF BABEL...
The Legend of THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE TOWER OF BABEL

zh: 让我们建造一座手可摘星辰的高塔吧
en: Come! Let us build a tower whose zenith shall reach unto the stars!

zh: 我们要在塔顶上写着 致伟大的世界和她的造物主 致伟大的人类
en: And at the tower's zenith we shall write: Great is the world and its Maker! And great is Man!

zh: 但这些用双手建造巴别塔的人们却不了解 这一由头脑构建出来的奇妙的梦想
en: But the hands that built the Tower of Babel knew nothing of the dream of which the head that had conceived it had been fantasising.

zh: 巴别塔 赞美的圣歌成为了他人的诅咒
en: The hymns of praise of one man became the curses of others.

zh: 即使说着同样的语言 人们却难以互相理解
en: The same language was spoken, but these men did not understand one another...

zh: 致伟大的世界和她的造物主 致伟大的人类
en: Great is the world and its Maker and great is Man

zh: 脑和手需要一个调节者
en: HEAD and HANDS require a Mediator.

zh: 脑和手的调节者一定是心
en: THE MEDIATOR BETWEEN HEAD AND HANDS MUST BE THE HEART!

zh: 玛丽娅 我们的调节者在哪儿
en: And where is our Mediator, Maria ― ?

zh: 等待他 他一定会到来
en: Wait for him! He will surely come!

zh: 我们会等待 玛丽娅 但我们等不久
en: We will wait, Maria...! But not for much longer ― !

zh: 调节者 请你快点到来
en: Oh Mediator, have you finally come...

zh: 你已经召唤我到你的身边了
en: You summoned me ― here I am!

zh: 洛宏 给机器人设计成这女人的容貌
en: Rotwang, give the Machine-Man the likeness of this woman...

zh: 我要离间这个女人和工人们 我要摧毁工人对她的信仰
en: I shall sow discord between them and her! I shall destroy their belief in this woman ―

zh: 让我单独呆一会 乔·弗莱德森 没有我你也能找到回去的路
en: Leave me alone now, Joh Fredersen... You'll find the way back without me...

zh: 你这傻瓜 你将要失去海尔留给你的最后一件东西了 你的儿子
en: Now you shall also lose the last remaining thing you still had from Hel... your son...

zh: 弗雷德注视着讲坛上的修道士布道 "我明确地向你们告知 启示录上所预言的日子将近了"
en: Freder witnesses a monk at the pulpit who preaches: "Verily, I say unto you: the days of which the Apocalypse speaks draw nigh!"

zh: 修道士手指《圣经》上的文字
en: The monk's hand points to the Bible, in which it is written:

zh: 你将毁灭乔·弗莱德森 他和他的城市和他的儿子
en: You will annihilate Joh Fredersen ― him and his city and his son ― !

zh: 假如你来过 你就不会害怕我 我恳求您 放过我和我的恋人
en: Had you come earlier, you wouldn't have frightened me... I now beg of you: stay away from me and my beloved...!

zh: 穿着你衣服的人现在在哪儿
en: Where is the one whose clothes you are wearing?

zh: 请你叫醒乔治好吗 他现在必须立刻带我去地下城
en: Would you please wake Georgy up? He must lead me to the Workers' City at once...

zh: 编号11811 回到工作岗位去 就好像你从未离开过 明白吗
en: No. 11811, get back to the Machine and forget that you ever left it ― understood?

zh: 我需要一个忠实于我的人 约萨法特 不然 我怎样才能达到我的最终目标
en: I have to have someone who's faithful to me, Josaphat, ― otherwise, how shall I attain the end-goal of my path ― ?

zh: 我现在必须走了 约萨法特 现在 亲自动身 去找乔治指点的领路人
en: I must go on, Josaphat, ― must now, on my own, seek out the person to whom Georgy was supposed to lead me...

zh: 今晚 约萨法特 今晚我就回来
en: Tonight, Josaphat ― tonight when I come back...

zh: 你要求什么价位 才愿意在今晚离开这所宅邸
en: So, what price are you demanding for leaving this residence tonight?

zh: 你似乎仍然没有明白是谁派我过来的
en: You still don't seem to have grasped who sent me here...

zh: 他不希望他的儿子今晚能在这儿找到你
en: This man doesn't want his son to find you still here tonight!

zh: 三小时后我会过来接你
en: In three hours' time I shall be calling for you!

zh: 是时候让机器人拥有你的脸庞了
en: It is time to give the Man-Machine your face!

zh: 我告诉你 她正和你父亲在一起
en: I'm telling you, she is with your father ― !

zh: C·A·洛宏邀请乔·弗莱德森先生 成为今晚的嘉宾
en: "C. A. Rotwang requests Herr Joh Fredersen to be his guest this evening."

zh: 我希望你潜入地下城 毁掉你的原型玛丽娅的所有工作
en: I want you to go to those in the Depths in order to annihilate the work of your prototype!

zh: 我明确地向你们告知 启示录上所预言的日子将近了
en: Verily, I say unto you: the days of which the Apocalypse speaks draw nigh...!
All Seven Deadly Sins, on her behalf ― !

zh: 圣约翰启示录 德国赫勒劳市安凡伦出版
en: The Revelation of St. John Avalun Publishing, Hellerau

zh: 我穿着这件衣服从瘦子那儿逃了出来 这十天 你父亲的走狗 把地下城搅得鸡犬不宁
en: I escaped from the Thin Man wearing this attire... But for ten days your father's bloodhound has been making the Workers' City unsafe...

zh: 现在唯一能让工人们安分守己的 就是向他们承诺的调节者的到来
en: The only thing keeping the workers in check is their expectation for the Mediator promised unto them...

zh: 弗雷德 还有更奇怪的事情
en: Even stranger things have been happening, Freder...

zh: 你生病的那晚 曾经的挚友 因为那个女人 另一个人 也在同一晚
en: On that evening when you fell ill once the best of friends...

zh: 永恒的花园已经被荒废了 但红灯区却夜夜笙歌
en: but night after night in Yoshiwara...

zh: 这个女人 她的脚下堆满了罪恶 她也叫做玛丽娅 这个女人 她的脚下堆满了罪恶 她也叫做玛丽娅
en: And this woman, at whose feet all sins are heaped is also called Maria...

zh: 她和地下城的"圣女"是同一人吗
en: That same woman that those in the Depths regard as a saint ― ? !

zh: 现在许多人涌向死亡之城 朝拜那个被他们视为金子般珍贵的女人
en: Many now go to the City of the Dead, to a woman they have judged to be as true as gold.

zh: 调节者不该错过这一时机
en: The Mediator is not likely to miss that occasion...

zh: 今晚无论发生什么 让工人们随心所欲 这是我的命令
en: Whatever happens tonight: it is my express order to allow the workers to do as they please...

zh: 乔·弗莱德森希望地下城的人们 使用武力 酿成大祸 他就可以名正言顺地以暴制暴
en: Joh Fredersen wants to let those in the Depths use force and do wrong so that he can claim the right to use force against them...

zh: 她会毁了人们对调节者的信念
en: She will destroy their belief in the Mediator!

zh: 过去我一直主张和平 但你们的调节者却仍没有到来
en: You know I've always talked about peace... but your Mediator hasn't come...

zh: 你们等待的时间够久了 时机已经成熟
en: You've waited long enough! Your time has come ― !

zh: 我捉弄了乔·弗莱德森 你的复制品并不服从他的意志 她只从听我一个人
en: ...but I've tricked Joh Fredersen! Your clone does not obey his will ― only mine alone!

zh: 谁是大都会中喂食机器的活生生的饲料
en: Who is the living fodder for the machines for Metropolis ― ? !

zh: 是谁在用自己的骨髓润滑机器的关节
en: Who smears the machine-joints with their own marrow ― ? !

zh: 又是谁在用自己的血肉喂食机器
en: Who feeds the machines with their own flesh ― ? !

zh: 让机器见鬼去 你们这些傻瓜 消灭它们
en: Let the machines starve, you fools ― ! Finish them off ― !

zh: 消灭它们 消灭这些机器
玛丽娅只谈和平 不谈谋杀 你不是玛丽娅
en: Maria talks of peace, not murder ― ! This is not Maria ― !

zh: 干掉他 这条穿着白色丝绸的走狗
en: Do him in, the dog, in his white silken hide ― !

zh: 带上你们的女人 你们的孩子 离开这座地下城 不要落下任何一个人 为机器送终
en: Get your women, your sons, out of the Workers' City! Let no-one stay behind! Death to the machines ― !

zh: "我已经捉弄了乔·弗莱德森两次了 我没有告诉他正是他的儿子 想成为你的兄弟们的调节者 而且他还爱上了你"
en: For I concealed from him that his son wants to be the Mediator of your brothers ― and is in love with you ― !"

zh: 乔·弗莱德森闯进了洛宏的阁楼 他一个猛摔制服了他的老对手 玛丽娅自由了
en: He wrestles with his old rival and overtakes him. Maria is free.

zh: 弗雷德 我们必须穿过地下城
en: We still have to go through the Workers' City.

zh: 男人和女人们 不要让任何一个人错过今天 为机器送终
en: Women and men, let no-one miss out on today ― ! Death to the machines ― !

zh: 没有一个男人 没有一个女人会被落下
en: Not one man ― not one woman has stayed behind ― !

zh: 别管这些机器 让它们自取灭亡
en: Leave the machines ― ! Let them race to their death ― !
You have to open the gates!

zh: 如果核心机毁灭了 机器城区都将夷为平地
en: If the Heart-Machine perishes, nothing in the Machine-District will be left standing ― !

zh: 你们失去了理智吗 如果核心机毁灭了 整个地下城都会化为乌有
en: Have you lost your minds ― ? If the Heart-Machine perishes, the entire Workers' City will be laid to waste ― !

zh: 你们的父亲去哪儿了 你们的母亲呢
en: Where are your fathers, your mothers?

zh: 你想过你的儿子就在工人之中吗
en: Do you have any idea that your son is amongst the workers? !

zh: 去通风井 快 快 水库已经崩溃了 城市要被淹没了
en: To the air shafts ― quickly! Quickly! The reservoirs have burst!

zh: 我们带孩子们去子弟俱乐部
en: We'll take the children to the Sons' Club!
Why are all the lights out?

zh: 我要知道 我的儿子在哪儿
en: I need to know ― ! Where is my son? !

zh: 明天成千上万的人 会在愤怒与绝望中追问你 乔·弗莱德森 我们的儿子在哪
en: Tomorrow thousands will ask in fury and desperation: Joh Fredersen, where is my son ― ? !

zh: 城市被水淹了 通风井被完全淹没了
en: The city is drowned, the shafts are totally flooded ― !

zh: 谁让你们来破坏机器的 没有机器你们也就完了 蠢货
en: Who bade you attack the machines, without which you're finished, you idiots ― ? !

zh: 我们眼睁睁地看着世界走向毁灭
en: We'll be looking on as the world goes to the devil ― !

zh: 去找女巫 这都是她的错 杀了她
en: Find the witch; this is all her fault ― ! Strike her dead ― !

zh: 我要带你回家 海尔
en: Now I'm going to take you home, my Hel ― !

zh: 女巫 女巫 她在那儿 她在那儿
en: the witch ― ! There she is ― ! there she is ― !

zh: 我们的孩子在哪儿 你这个女巫
en: Where are our children, you witch, you ― ? !

zh: 烧死女巫 把她绑在火刑柱上
en: Burn the witch. ― To the stake with her!

zh: 脑和手要结合在一起 但他们没有一颗心同心同力 调节者 请你来为他们指路吧
en: Head and hands want to join together, but they don't have the heart to do it... Oh Mediator, show them the way to one another...

zh: 修复 德国威斯巴登的F·W·穆瑙基金会
en: F. W. Murnau Stiftung, Wiesbaden jointly with Deutsche Kinemathek ―

zh: 与德国电影中心的电影博物馆[柏林馆] 以及阿根廷电影博物馆共同合作
en: Museum für Film und Fernsehen, Berlin in co-operation with Museo del Cine Pablo C. Ducros Hicken, Buenos Aires

zh: 根据戈特福里德·休帕茨的原声带
en: Reconstruction and synchronisation of the original music by Gottfried Huppertz:

zh: 进行音轨的重建与同步

en: Instrumentation of the missing parts of the score:

zh: 乐谱中缺失的管弦乐章节

en: Europäische Filmphilharmonie ― Die Film Philharmonie GmbH

zh: 欧洲电影乐团—电影爱乐乐团有限公司
表演 柏林广播交响乐团
en: Rundfunk-Sinfonieorchester Berlin an ensemble of the Rundfunk Orchester und Chöre GmbH

zh: 隶属广播乐团合唱有限责任公司
尼娜·戈斯拉尔 德国电视台ZDF/ARTE
斯蒂芬·朗 德国广播电台文化台
《日出》 两个人的爱情之歌
en: Sunrise A Song of Two Humans

zh: 这首男人和他妻子的爱情之歌 不属于任何一个地方，但却存在于任何地方
en: This song of the Man and his Wife is of no place and every place:

zh: 或许在任何时候，任何地点 你都可以听到
en: you might hear it anywhere at any time.

zh: 只要有日出和日落的地方... 不管是在喧闹的城市，或者是蓝天下的农场 生活都是一样的：
en: For wherever the sun rises and sets in the city's turmoil or under the open sky on the farm life is much the same:

zh: 有时候痛苦，有时候快乐
夏天来了... 度假的时间
在这些来度假的旅游者当中 有一个城市来的女人
en: Among the vacationists was a Woman of the City.

zh: 她来到这里已经几个礼拜了 一直无所事事地闲逛着...
en: Several weeks had passed since her coming and still she lingered.

zh: "他们以前就像小孩子一样，无忧无虑...
en: "They used to be like children, carefree... always happy and laughing..."

zh: "他们以前就像小孩子一样，无忧无虑...
en: "They used to be like children, carefree...

zh: 现在，他为了那个城市来的女人毁了自己 债主把农场里面值钱的东西都带走
en: "Now he ruins himself for the woman from the city - Money-lenders strip the farm - "

zh: 现在，他为了那个城市来的女人毁了自己 债主把农场里面值钱的东西都带走 ... 他的妻子孤独地坐着
en: "Now he ruins himself for the woman from the city - Money-lenders strip the farm - and his wife sits alone."
come with me to the City."

zh: ... 然后把小船推翻，这样看起来就像是一场意外
en: "...then overturn the boat... it will look like an accident."

zh: ...当船翻之后，这些灯芯草可以救你
en: "...after the boat has capsized, save yourself with these bulrushes."

zh: 灯芯草会让你浮起来 在你上岸之前把它们弄散，不要被人发现 然后告诉大家，她在意外中淹死了
en: "The rushes will hold you up. Scatter them before you reach the shore and tell everyone she drowned by accident."

zh: 我们要到湖对面旅行 可能要过一段时间我才会回来
en: "We're going for a trip across the water.

zh: 上帝付与你们神圣的婚姻关系 这是一种相互之间的信任 她很年轻...
en: "God is giving you, in the holy blonds of matrimony, a trust.

zh: 还未成熟 你要好好的引导她
...保护她，不要让她受到任何伤害
en: "...keep and protect her from all harm."

zh: 修完指甲之后 你会变得更英俊！
en: "You'd look grand with a high polish!"

zh: 有机会你也要来我们家做客
en: And you must come and see us some time."

zh: 她是我今年看过的最美丽的新娘
我们要在月光下航行回家... 另一个蜜月
我不能放弃希望，我知道潮水的方向..
en: I couldn't give up hope. I know the tides... I went around the Point..."

zh: 瞧瞧这马戏场吧，都是空座
一文不名的流浪汉，饿着肚子 正在看马戏班的余兴节目
en: Around the Side Shows hungry and broke.

zh: 明早来，我们试试看你行不行
en: "Be here in the morning, and we'll try you out."

zh: 你和威廉一起给他示范一下
现在你给我瞧仔细了 看你能不能学会
en: "Now then, watch this and see if you can do it."

zh: 表演一下理发店的节目

en: "You see, we couldn't come to terms."

zh: 他能让人发笑可他自己不知道 就让他当道具员接着演下去
en: "He's a sensation, but he doesn't know it." "Keep him on as a property man."

zh: 马戏团红火起来了 不过道具管理员还是一样倒霉 那位姑娘也过着一样的艰难生活
en: The Circus prospered, but not the property man. And the girl led the same hard life.

zh: 让他忙个不停 别让他明白他才是演出成功的关键
en: "Keep him busy and don't let him know he's the hit of the show."

zh: 把药丸吹进马的喉咙里去
en: "Blow this pill down the horse's neck!"

zh: 我告诉你了，狮子很危险
en: "I told you the lions were dangerous!"

zh: 他们让你这么辛苦太可耻了 你才是演出的关键人物
en: "It's a shame the way they make you work --" "And you the hit of the show."

zh: 当然了，所有的观众 所有的掌声都是因为你
en: "Why of course!" "All the crowds, all the applause is just for you."

zh: 你要是打这姑娘，我就不干了
en: "If you strike that girl, I'll quit!"

zh: 还有，我要和我的价值相称的待遇
en: "And what's more I want what I'm worth --"

zh: 我一个星期给你五十美元
en: "I'll give you fifty dollars a week."

zh: 流浪汉的成功 让他和姑娘的生活都好过了不少
en: The success of the Tramp made life easier for the girl and himself.
"Oh, Merna, you must have your fortune told!"

zh: 我算出来你和一个近在眼前 肤色黝黑的英俊男人有姻缘
en: "I see love and marriage with a dark, handsome man who is near you now."

zh: 新来了一位演员，雷克斯 是个穿紧身衣走绳索的人
en: A New Added Attraction, Rex, a tight-rope walker.
"I'll give you Five Dollars for it."

zh: 他是个走绳索的演员 我刚刚才认识他
en: "He's a tight-rope walker." "I've just met him."

zh: 怎么回事，你就没把观众逗笑过
en: "What's the matter?" "You hardly got a laugh!"

zh: 时光流逝，马戏团发生了很多变化 有了新的希望和新的噱头
en: Time brought many changes to the Circus; New Hopes and New Ambitions.

zh: 别管什么绳索了 你还是想办法再变得滑稽起来吧 要不就给我走人
en: "Never mind the rope." "You'd better try and be funny again or you'll go!"

zh: 又一场演出，还是没人笑
en: The next performance- and not a smile.

zh: 我受够了，再给你最后一次机会
en: "I've had enough of this;" "You get one more chance."

zh: 雷克斯，那个走绳索的 到现在还不见人影
en: "Rex, the tight-rope walker, hasn't shown up."

zh: 你来表演走绳索，行不行
en: "You can do the act, can't you?"

zh: 我来演，找他的演出服来
没关系，我给他买保险了
别着急，现在还有个节目正在演
en: "Take your time, there's another act to go on."
"Why, what is the meaning of this?"
"I am taking his place on the rope."

zh: 哦，不会的，我的人生美妙着呢
en: "Oh, no, I have a charmed life."

zh: 你要是帮我，我就给你五美元
en: "I'll give you five dollars if you'll do it."

zh: 你能不能带上我一起走
你现在是在和我妻子说话
你想和我们一起演出吗
en: "Will you go on with the show?"

zh: 本片于1993年经过重新修复
en: This film was renovated in 1993 by

zh: 你划拉了那么多瓶子 你比我女儿还要糟糕
en: You've got so many flacons, you are worse than my daughter.
Wait here until it stops raining.

zh: 让它下吧，这样 你就可以在我这里过夜了
en: Let it rain, you can spend the night in my house.

zh: 快点儿，安德烈，我得工作了
en: Hurry up, Andrea, I must go to work.

zh: 爸爸，你知道我怕陌生人
en: You know that I am afraid of strangers, Father.
Don't be silly, this man is no thief!

zh: 我们村可没 旅馆，你就呆在这儿吧
en: There is no hotel in our village. Stay here.

zh: 一定是暴风雨把电话线弄断了
en: The storm must have cut off the wires.

zh: 我知道你永远不会回来了...
en: I know you shall never come back...
Would you mind if I leave, Father?
Do you want to visit your aunt?

zh: 为什么人总是忘记得那么快？
en: Why do people forget so quickly?

zh: 尽管知道你不会回来了，我还是 对你望眼欲穿，我等你至死方休
en: I yearn for you though I know you will never return. I do not dare to die.

zh: 如果我告诉了爸爸，那会 杀了他的，我很茫然无助！
en: It would kill my father if I told him. I am so helpless!

zh: 虽然，我感觉快油尽灯枯了 但我的内心依旧珍惜这段情
en: I cosset it inside of me, even if I feel that my life has reached its end.

zh: 我不知道为什么给你写信 但我知道你从未从想过我时 我如释重负
en: I do not know why I write this letter, but I feel relief in knowing that you have not thought about me once.

zh: 我可怜的丈夫正在剧院等我
en: My poor husband is waiting for me at the theatre.

zh: 你怎么对他说你去了哪里？
en: What will you tell him about where you were?
You can say whatever you wish!

zh: 我不想站在她的角度来考虑事情
en: I would not like to be in her shoes.

zh: 你办不到，你甚至欺骗 虔诚的人！
en: You're impossible, you would even delude a saint!

zh: 据说他很快就要当外公了！
en: It is said he will soon be a grandfather!

zh: 他们说她把那个在你 家过夜的人捆了起来！
en: They say she tied that man who spent the night at your house.

zh: 没人敢夺走我女儿的贞操！
en: No one will dare touch the chastity of my daughter!

zh: 你的孩子流产了，或许 这样，对你来说更好些
en: Your child was stillborn. Perhaps it is better for you this way.

zh: 那些男人们是怎么这样处理感情啊！
en: How some men handle their love affairs.

zh: 你知道，你住在这有些 时日了，膳宿都要花钱
en: You see, you were here a few days longer and bed and board costs money.

zh: 我给你寄些钱，你一定要想开些
en: I am sending you some money, do not take everything so tragically.
But you wanted to go the other way.
The man who was to come for the blood transfusion is not here.
Do you know how you got injured?
Your wife saved you your life.
Yes, your wife. Don't you remember?
You brought her here in your car.
Could you bring my wife here then?

zh: 很抱歉，但我可以在几周之 后，等我将最后一个卖了时 再把这个钢琴模型送过去
en: I am sorry but I can deliver this piano model only in a few weeks as I have just sold the last one.

zh: 我不能为其他的钢琴而等好几周
en: I can wait a few weeks for the other piano.

zh: 你知道我会来，所以你不在家
en: You were not home, because you knew I would come.

zh: 他是个好人，我希望他 会给你留下深刻的印象
en: He is a fine man. I hope he will make a good impression on you.
...And in the evening In the morning In the morning I ask you to reject my husband's invitation.

zh: 原谅我，我本该亲自拒绝的
en: Forgive me, I should have done that myself.

zh: ...我知道给你带来了什么样的痛苦
en: ...I know what pain I have caused you.

zh: 你可以嘲笑我对你道歉 的任何话语，可我爱你
en: You may laugh at whatever I say to apologise to you. But I love you.

zh: 我爱你，你和你的丈夫 在一起，因此我嫉妒你
en: I love you and I am jealous of you because you love your husband.

zh: 别对我撒谎，他有你的照片！
en: Do not lie to me, he is the man who had your picture!
I do not know him at all!
I will keep an eye on that gentleman!

zh: 你明天必须跟我们一起回来，如果 你和我们在一起，大家会很高兴的
en: You must come with us tomorrow, we will be most pleased if you join us.

zh: 要是你知道多么想念你，那该多好！
en: If you only knew what I think of him!
And what I think of you!

zh: 就 算天使都会忍受不了！
en: Not even an angel could put up with you!

zh: 我那么爱你，因为你不像 其他的男人那样心胸狭窄
en: I love you so much because you are not like other men, you are not jealous.

zh: 我不嫉妒，因为我相信你
en: I am not jealous, because I trust you.

zh: 我把钥匙还给你，你得给别人开门！
en: I will give you back your key, you will need it for someone else.

zh: 你认为过着平平淡淡的生活不幸福吗？
en: Don't you think that leading a simple family life is most fortunate?
Why don't you get married then?
It is quite simple and easy.
Do you want me to lose?

zh: 我们没来得及告诉你，我们要明天出门
en: We did not have time to tell you that we are leaving tomorrow.

zh: 这是夫人的愿望，每 年这时候在南方真好
en: It is my wife's wish. It is so nice in the south at this time of the year.
I hope to see you soon again!
What kind of a comedy is this!

zh: 你为什么不诚实点儿，安德烈？
我从未像今天这样诚实过！
en: I was never more sincere as today!

zh: 我想，这次旅行对你有 好处的，你会平静下来
en: I think our trip will do you good, you will calm down.

zh: 我很冷静，但你妒火烧心 你就像个懦夫一样逃跑了！ ！
en: I am calm, but you are jealous, and you are running away like a coward!
Give this letter to my husband at 5 o'clock.

zh: 你永远不会再见到我了！
en: You shall never see me again!
Will you believe me if I say that no one?

zh: 我发誓，尊夫人不在里面！
en: I swear your wife is not in the room!
The past that shall always be the past.

zh: 中文字幕： 快刀浪子
