zh: -你不能相信我的话吗? -他会骗你吗? - Can't you take my word for it?
en: -Can't you take my word for it?

zh: 我们不是干这个的。 We're not in business for that.
en: We're not in business for that.

zh: 你觉得怎么样? 让我告诉你。 Well, how do you like that?
en: Well, how do you like that?

zh: 人们会问，"那个新来的人是谁?" And the people would say, "who is that fresh man?"
en: And the people would say, "Who is that fresh man?"

zh: 你明白我的意思吗? You see what I mean?

en: You go to a dance at night.

zh: 你走到一个女人面前说:"对不起，我可以和你跳下一个华尔兹吗?" You go to a dance at night.
en: You come up to a woman and say,

zh: 她说，"他太矮了。 啊，可他是哥本哈根人啊。" And she says, "he's too short.
所以如果你穿哥本哈根鞋，你不会错的。 我告诉你。 So if you wear a copenheimer, you can't go wrong.
en: So if you wear a Copenheimer, you can"t go wrong.

zh: 我想在后面系条皮带。 I want a belt in the back.
en: I want a belt in the back.

zh: 放我出去! Let me out of here!
-让他来。 -等一下。 只是一分钟。
- Let him come. - Just a minute.
-等等，等等。 -让他来。 - Wait, wait, wait.
听着，让我们跟你说实话。 Listen, let's be honest with you.
en: Listen, let's be honest with you.

zh: Is that so? How much is it?
好吧，你是个矮个子。 你走两码半。 Well, you're a short man.
You take about two and a half yards.
en: You take about two and a half yards.

zh: 等一下。 我们会达成协议的。 等一下。
Wait a minute. We'll come to terms.
-你愿意出52.5美元吗? ——不,先生。 - Would you go to $52.50?
- No, sir. -你愿意花45美元吗? ——没有。
我告诉你，我们要卖给你一套西装。 I'm telling you, a suit we're going to sell you.
en: I'm telling you, a suit we're going to sell you.

zh: 你不穿战衣是出不去的，你知道的。 You wouldn't get out of here without a suit, that you know.
en: You wouldn't get out of here without a suit, that you know.

zh: 你知道的，不是吗? That you know, don't you?
-你想省10美元? -是的。 - You want to save $10?
走到楼上。 到来。 Walk upstairs.
这就是你要做的。 That's all you've got to do.
en: That's all you've got to do.

zh: 我们是来取悦你的。 我们想照顾你。 We're here to please you.
We want to take care of you.
en: We want to take care of you.

zh: 哦，我来给你量一量。 J" oh, moe take the gentleman's measure j"
en: J Oh, Moe Take the gentleman's measure

zh: 到这里来，我给你量尺寸。 j" come up here and I'll take your measure j"
en: Come up here And I take your measure

zh: 脖子是25。 j" the neck is 25 j" 25在脖子上。
en: The neck is 25 225 in the neck

zh: j "喉结七分半，j " j" seven and a half in the Adam's apple j"
en: I Seven and a half In the Adam's apple I

zh: 肩部是31。 j" the shoulders is 31 j"
在肩膀上的31 j" 31 in the shoulders j" j "可爱的艾德琳" j" sweet Adeline j"
en: I 31 in the shoulders I 1 Sweet Adeline

zh: 你在唱什么? 去那里。 你在唱什么?
Get up there. What are you singing?
-我以为是四重奏。 -谁是四重奏? 四是什么?
en: - I thought it was a quartet.

zh: - I thought it was a quartet. - Who's a quartet?
-把裤子脱了。 ——什么? - Take down the pants.
不,听。 我的意思是把裤子写在书上。
No, listen. I mean take down in the book the pants.
en: I mean take down in the book the pants.

zh: -裤子是61码。 -裤子61岁。 - The pants is 61.
你怎么了? 你从这里开始量你自己的裤子。
What's the matter with you? You're measuring your own pant from here up.
en: You're measuring your own pant from here up.

zh: 你是在告诉我吗? 我是裁缝。 Are you telling me?
我告诉你怎么挤牛奶了吗? 你照我说的做。 Do I tell you how to milk your cows?
en: Do I tell you how to milk your cows?

zh: 你想要两个袖子? 你想要两个袖子? You want two sleeves?
- Yeah, I think... - Give him two sleeves.
两个袖子。 两个袖子。 Two sleeves.
-袖子是19。 -看起来像16岁 - The sleeves is 19.
-我告诉你是19。 -我告诉你是16。 - I'm telling you it's 19.
-你为什么告诉我? -我告诉你是16。 - Why are you telling me?
回来这里。 Come back here.
起来,起来,起来。 Get up.
你以为我是训练有素的狗吗? What do you think, I'm a trained dog?
en: What do you think, I'm a trained dog?

zh: 起来，我给你肝! 起来,起来! Up, I give you liver!
你怎么了? 你觉得我们需要你的生意吗? What's the matter with you?
You think we need your business here?
en: You think we need your business here?

zh: 我想告诉你一件事。 Listen...
get down here. I want to tell you something.
en: I want to tell you something.

zh: 你不能激怒我。 我对你来说太年轻了。 You can't aggravate me.
去别的地方。 Go some other place.
-我不需要你的生意去做吧。 -好吧，我去。 - I don't need your business.
-听着，他开不起玩笑 -开玩笑的这是所有。 - Look, he can't take a joke.
en: - Look, he can't take a joke.

zh: 好的。 你可以明天来这里试穿这套西装。
All right. You can come here tomorrow and you'll try on the suit.
en: You can come here tomorrow and you'll try on the suit.

zh: 不，我是来拿的。 No, I'm coming here to get it.
en: No, I'm coming here to get it.

zh: 你想在一天之内定做一套西装吗? In one day you expect to get a suit made to order?
en: In one day you expect to get a suit made to order?

zh: -你宣传的是24小时服务。 ——紧迫。 紧迫!
紧迫! 我告诉你，是你逼我的。
For pressing! For pressing, I'm telling you.
他想在一天之内... 是什么让您这么着急呢? In one day he wants...
en: In one day he wants— What's your hurry?

zh: what's your hurry? 嗯，我要坐船去波士顿。 Well, I'm going to Boston by boat.
en: Well, I'm going to Boston by boat.

zh: 我有一套西装... ... 等一下。
I've got a suit... wait a minute now.
- Here you are. - How do you like that?
多少钱? How much is it?
-你愿意接受吗? - $19.50. - Will you take it?
-只要能离开这里，我什么都愿意。 -等一下。 - I'll take anything to get out of here.
en: - I'll take anything to get cut of here.

zh: 每件水手服都配一个球棒。 A bat and ball goes with every sailor suit.
en: A bat and ball goes with every sailor suit.

zh: - Another telegram. - Oh, thank you, Mike.
-休斯小姐，你太棒了。 -谢谢你，迈克。 - Miss Hughes, you were marvelous.
为了今晚，我们等了一辈子了，妈。 We've waited all our life for this night, ma.
en: We've waited all our life for this night, Ma.

zh: 哦，是朋友送的! Oh, it's from buddy!
哦,我的上帝! Oh, my god!
哦,不... 别这样歌洛莉亚 Oh, don't...
我该怎么办? What will I do?
我现在该怎么办? What will I do now?
歌洛莉亚果然如愿以偿了 Gee, Gloria sure got her wish.
en: Gee, Gloria sure got her wish.

zh: 她今晚确实很荣耀。 She certainly is glorified tonight.
亲爱的，你看起来很光荣啊。 You look pretty glorified yourself, honey.
en: You lock pretty glorified yourself, honey.

zh: 不是荣耀，而是快乐。 Not glorified, but happy.
-让我们止住眼泪。 -我会尽力的，妈妈。 - Let's stop those tears.
《罗密欧与朱丽叶》 J" Romeo and Juliet j" 两人都深爱着彼此 j" were both in love with love j"
en: I Romeo and Juliet I 2 Were both in love with love

zh: j《安东尼与克利奥帕特拉》 j" Antony and Cleopatra j"
"像手套一样合身。" j" fitted like a glove j" "吉娜薇有罗曼史" j" Guinevere had romance j"
en: I Fined like a glove I 7 Guinevere had romance

zh: 像过去的爱情一样? J" j" like the loves of old? J"
"一定有。" j" there must be j"
有人在等我 j" somebody waiting for me j"
在爱的国度 j" in loveland j"
一定有一只蓝鸟 j" there must be a bluebird j"
我来了，我来了 j" coming my way j"
一只蓝鸟领路 j" a bluebird leading the way j" J " to loveland J " j" to loveland j"
en: J♪ A bluebird leading the way I 2 To Loveland

zh: J"一线希望在哪里?"J" j" where is the silver lining?
en: I Where is the silver lining'?

zh: J"彩虹在哪里闪耀?"J" j" where is the rainbow shining?
en: I Where is the rainbow shining?

zh: J "好运会降临到我身上" j" some good luck coming to me j"
"一定有。" J" there must be j"
有人在等我 j" somebody waiting for me j"
en: Somebody waiting for me Somebody waiting for me

zh: 一只蓝鸟引领我们去爱的地方。 j" a bluebird leading the way to loveland j"
en: I A bluebird leading the way To Loveland

zh: 我们每天逮到的俄国人远超那个数目
en: From the Russians we capture more than that every day.

zh: 打仗归打仗 但是该做的事还是得做
en: War is war and schnapps is schnapps, and business must go on.

zh: 你今天早上没来给我们送信
en: You didn't leave the mail yet this morning.

zh: 哈姆斯托 今天有我们的信件吗？

en: - Oh, there must be something. Here, here you go, young rascal.

zh: 拿去吧 这也是我邮差生涯的句点
en: There. This is the last mail I deliver anyhow.

zh: 明天我就要换穿别的制服了
你也要上战场了吗？ 是的 我已经被征召了

en: - Yes, I was called. I'm a sergeant in the reserves, you know.

zh: 要是战争几个月内不结束 我恐怕也会被征召 但是战争应该快结束了
en: I'll be called myself, if it doesn't end in a few months.
- It will, though. - I'm sure you're right, Mr Meyer.

zh: 好了 亲爱的同学们

en: Now, my beloved class, this is what we must do:

zh: 拿出所有的力量 奋力一击
竭尽所有一切 以求在年底之前赢得战争的胜利
en: Give every ounce of strength... to win victory before the end of the year.

zh: 我其实也很不愿一再地提起这个话题
en: It is with reluctance that I bring this subject up again.

zh: 但孩子们 你们是祖国的命脉
en: You are the life of the fatherland, you boys.
You are the iron men of Germany.

zh: 在祖国召唤你们的时候 你们也会成为英雄为祖国奋勇杀敌
en: You are the gay heroes who will repulse the enemy... when you are called upon to do so.

zh: 虽然我不该鼓吹你们 要你们投笔从戎 挺身而出来捍卫自己的国家
en: It is not for me to suggest that any of you... should stand up and offer to defend his country.

zh: 但我想 你们恐怕早有此打算
en: But I wonder if such a thing is going through your heads.

zh: 我听说某所学校 有整班的男同学一起起立 自愿去登记入伍
en: I know that in one of the schools... the boys have risen up in the classroom... and enlisted in a mass.

zh: 要是同样的事也发生在我们班 我一定会感到非常的骄傲
en: But, of course, if such a thing should happen here... you would not blame me for a feeling of pride.

zh: 但难道你们的父亲真能眼睁睁地 置国难不顾而选择保全自己的儿子吗？
en: Are your fathers so forgetful of their fatherland... that they would let it perish rather than you?

zh: 难道你们的母亲真如此软弱 竟不愿让她们的儿子 去保卫那片孕育他们的土地？
en: Are your mothers so weak that they cannot send a son... to defend the land which gave them birth?

zh: 再说... 军旅生涯的历练对男孩来说 又何尝不是一件好事
en: And after all, is a little experience... such a bad thing for a boy?

zh: 能够穿上祖国的军服是一种至高无上的荣耀 你们为何要逃避？
en: Is the honour of wearing a uniform... something from which we should run?

zh: 如果你们因身着军服而大获小姐们的青睐 岂不是美事一桩？
en: And if our young ladies glory in those who wear it... is that anything to be ashamed of?

zh: 我知道你们并不贪慕英雄的虚名
en: I know you have never desired the adulation of heroes.

zh: 因为为师的总是教导你们要脚踏实地
en: That has not been part of my teaching.

zh: 我们凡事必当尽力而为 但对于应得的荣耀也不必推却
en: We have sought to make ourselves worthy... and let acclaim come when it would.

zh: 无论如何 能够在战争中一马当先 绝对是一种过人的美德
en: But to be foremost in battle... is a virtue not to be despised.

zh: 我相信这会是一场快速及必胜的战争 伤亡的人数也会非常少
en: I believe it will be a quick war... that there will be few losses.
"Dulce et decorum est pro patria mori."

zh: 是何其快乐而又光荣的事"
en: "Sweet and fitting it is to die for the fatherland. "

zh: 你们当中或许有人有着远大的理想和抱负
en: Some of you may have ambitions.

zh: 我猜想 他希望有朝一日 能像哥德和席勒那样名留千古 而我也衷心的祝福他
en: And he is dreaming, I suppose... of following in the footsteps of Goethe and Schiller... and I hope he will.

zh: 但现在祖国在召唤你们
我们的军队需要领袖人才
个人的利益及雄心应该要先弃置一旁 这是为祖国牺牲奉献所表现出的最高情操
en: Personal ambition must be thrown aside... in the one great sacrifice for our country.

zh: 这将是你们年轻生命最闪亮的开始
en: Here is a glorious beginning to your lives.

zh: 荣耀的田野在呼唤各位
en: The field of honour calls you.

zh: 你 克莱普 你为何还在这里？
en: You, Kropp, what has kept you back?

zh: 还有你 幕勒 你知道祖国有多需要你吗？
en: You, Mueller, you know how much you are needed?

zh: 我看到你们都望着你们的领袖
en: Ah, I see you look at your leader.

zh: 而我 也看着你 保罗鲍莫 我想知道你有什么打算
en: And I, too, look to you, Paul Baumer... and I wonder what you are going to do.

zh: - 我准备好了 - 我绝不一人留下
跟我来 我现在就带你们去报名
- 你合群一点好不好 - 来嘛 班恩
我们一定要团结 跟大家一起同进退吧

en: That's what we've got to do. - Let's all stick together.

zh: 队伍排整齐一点 菜鸟
换好制服后就准备去报到 原地解散
en: Get into uniform, ready to report.

zh: 这个地方一定会把我们操到很健壮
en: I bet you a place like this gets you in good condition.

zh: 行军时要走很多路 不练壮点不行
en: You have to be for the long marches.

zh: 我要去参加骑兵队 这样骑马就好了
en: I'm gonna get in the cavalry and ride.

zh: 参加步兵队才有办法上前线作战
en: Infantry's where you see the fighting.

zh: 我只想知道我的配枪在哪？
我们要接受训练好一阵子才会拿到枪
en: That's what I want to know. Oh, you don't get a gun for a long while yet.

zh: 要我负责杀敌 不让我先练练怎么成
en: If I'm gonna bump off the enemy, I gotta have some practise.

zh: 我想要学习怎么使用刺刀
我看你还是跟女生接吻比较在行 慕勒 你等着瞧
en: You won a medal that time, Mueller.

zh: 在一个月内我身上一定会挂满勋章
en: You wait. In about a month I'll be covered with 'em.

zh: 把你的靴子从我脸上移开
en: Say, keep your boots out of my face!

zh: 我是看得起你 才把靴子放在你脸上
en: Why, it's an honour to have those boots in your face.

zh: 这可是全军队里最好的靴子了 我叔叔送我的
en: They're the best pair in the army!

zh: 你看看这进口的上好皮料
en: My uncle gave 'em to me. Just look at that special imported leather.

zh: 除了我脸上 你高兴放哪都行
en: Put 'em anyplace you like, except in my face.

zh: 制服这么难看 叫我怎么出去认识小姐
en: Not even a kitchen maid'll look at me in this!

zh: 是哈姆斯托耶 - 真的耶
en: Well, for the love of-- It's Himmelstoss!
- So it is. - And all dressed up.

zh: 你没想到会再见到我们吧
en: You didn't think you'd see me again so soon, did you?

zh: - 看到我的军阶了吗？ - 看到啦
哈姆斯托 我们真高兴见到你 你叫我什么？
en: - Himmelstoss, we certainly are glad to see you.
- What did you say? - I was going to say--
- Never mind! - What's the matter with you?

zh: 当你跟军官说话时 必须加上"长官"两个字
en: - When you address your superior officer, say "sir"!

zh: 他是打哪弄来这么漂亮的制服的 今天有信吗 哈姆
en: - Where'd he get such a nice uniform?

zh: 亲爱的朋友 干嘛大吼大叫的
en: - Quiet! - My dear fellow, you're shouting.

zh: 别这样嘛 哈姆斯托 我们是老朋友了

en: We know ya. Take off the false whiskers.

zh: 看来你不是在开玩笑 到时候该谁笑还不知道呢
可是3天前 你还是我们的邮差
en: - You'll find out that I mean it. - But only three days ago you were our postman.
Line up! Get in some kind of a line!

zh: 所有的人 立刻给我列队

en: What a pretty sight that is!

zh: 你们这辈子到底排过队没有？
en: Have you never heard of standing in line?

zh: 排个队都排得乱七八糟的
en: You make a fine mess of it.

zh: 看来我得重头教育你们
en: Well, I'll have to teach you.

zh: 我们可以花一整天来练习
en: We'll spend the whole day on it, huh?

zh: 或许你们很蠢 但我已经习惯了
en: You may be stupid, but I'm used to that.
And then there'll be plenty of other things too.

zh: 虽然你们现在只是一团烂泥

en: You're not much to begin with... but I'll do my best.

zh: 看来我们之间有一些误解 但是没关系 我们会纠正它的 对不对？
en: I see that we have come here with a slight misunderstanding... and we'll correct that, too, won't we, huh?

zh: 你们要做的第一件事 就是忘记过去的一切
en: And the first thing to do is to forget everything you ever knew.

zh: 包括你过去所受的教育 明白吗？
也不要想将来会去哪里
en: Forget what you've been and what you think you're going to be.

zh: 你将成为一个军人 那就是你的所有
en: You're going to be soldiers, and that's all!

zh: 我会拔掉你们的奶嘴 人 让你们变成真正的男人
en: I'll take the mother's milk out of you!

zh: 如果不能把你们锻锻炼成士兵 就杀了你们
en: I'll make you hard-boiled! I'll make soldiers out of you or kill you!

zh: 把你的头低下去 鲍莫
分遣小队 停止前进

en: So... we have no spirit, huh?
We are in no mood for recreation.

zh: 很好 我们就继续来操练吧
en: Good! Then we'll go back to work!

zh: 三点整进行检查 解散
那只死猪完全剥夺了我们的休假时间
en: Oh, that swine! That means we get no time off.

zh: 我们至少需要四个小时来准备检查的事
en: It will take four hours to get ready for inspection.

zh: 他脑袋里不晓得装了什么东西 他根本就没有脑袋
en: - I'd like to know what's in his mind.

zh: 我很想把他的头割下来瞧瞧
en: - He hasn't got any! I'm gonna cut him open sometime and find out!

zh: 他的脸皮那么厚 只怕你割不断吧
他已经害我连续四次放那个可怜女孩的鸽子了
en: He won't cut. This is the fourth time he's made me disappoint that poor girl.

zh: 成横队向右 向右转 行进

en: To the right, march! Left, left, left, left.

zh: 分遣小队... 停止前进
干得好 他们明天就要上前线了
en: Excellent work. They're going up front tomorrow.

zh: 我建议今晚让他们休假吧
他破坏了我们最后的休假

en: I'll never forgive him for that.

zh: 可我们的衣服到半夜还未必干得了
en: Hmm! It'll take till midnight to dry our clothes.

zh: 那只死猪要出去快活了
en: There goes the filthy ape now.

zh: 我们在这里忙着洗衣服 他却能出去小酌一杯
en: While we slave over this mud, he goes off to have a few drinks!

zh: 总有一天我要好好赏他一棍 一棍就好
en: Someday I'm going to take one smack at him--just one.

zh: 我也是 此仇不报 誓不为人
en: Me too. That's gonna be my life's work from now on.

zh: 你们那么客气干嘛 我要多打他几棍
en: Why only one? I'm gonna take several.

zh: 我还要在他跌倒时踹他几脚 我跟他的梁子结大了
en: I might even kick him while he's down.
I feel mean. What are you doing?
You're not going to desert, are you?

zh: 你们听着 我有个好主意
保罗 你没事吧 班恩 班恩呢？
快站起来 我们走吧
en: Behn, come on! You fool! Behn!

zh: 看来增援的兵力已经抵达了 是啊 贾登去找个柴火 怎么还不回来
又来了些乳臭未干的菜鸟 看来这里是我们的床位
en: There's some more, fresh from the turnip patch.

zh: 这张是我的 上面写的"韦斯塔司" 别来跟我争地盘
我不知道那是你的床位
en: and this is where I live.

zh: 这里有张空床 保罗
你一提我就觉得饿死了

en: - I was fine until you spoke.

zh: 我也不知道 路标都被炮火打烂了
en: - Where are we anyway? I don't know.

zh: 这附近一定有吃东西的地方
en: The name on the railroad station's been shot off.
There must be something to eat somewhere.
I'll tell you what I'll do.

zh: 很抱歉打扰你 韦斯塔司先生 介绍一下 这是迪特灵
en: Sorry to disturb you, Mr Westhus.
Meet Detering. A better farmer never lived.

zh: - 叫我贾登先生就行了 - 坐啊
我们从早餐之后就没有进食了
我们想请教你们该怎么办
en: You see, we haven't eaten since breakfast.

zh: 肚子饿了当然就该赶紧吃饭罗
en: We thought maybe you could tell us what we ought to do about it. Eat without further delay.

zh: 兄弟 这个小镇最缺的就是食物 我们从昨天就来到这里
en: This is a bad town to bring an appetite to, soldier.

zh: 到现在只能啃稻草充饥
en: We've been here since yesterday morning, living on baled hay and razor blades.

zh: 我们愿意花钱买东西吃 食堂在哪里？
en: We're willing to buy our food.

zh: 这里管伙食的人正在外面搜刮粮食呢
en: Where's the canteen? The only canteen in these regions is out looking for supplies.

zh: - 听说过凯特钦斯基这个名字吗？ - 谁？
凯特钦斯基 他可是个传奇人物
要是这方圆百里之内有食物

en: If there's any food within 25 miles, he'll be the one to get it.

zh: 他们是新来的志愿少爷兵
en: - Volunteers for the future generals' staff.

zh: 总有一天 我要把你们其中一个拿来解剖 看看到底是什么促使你们离开学校来参军
en: Sometime I'm gonna take one of you volunteers apart... and find out what makes you leave school and join the army.

zh: 稍息吧 我们这里不讲究那一套
等等 那可不是你们的邀请函
- 你们可以跟我买东西吃
我不要钱 那对我来说只是废纸
en: - I have some money. No, not money.

zh: 你们有没有香烟 雪茄...
en: That's just pieces of paper. Have you got any cigarettes, cigars...

zh: - 肥皂 白兰地... - 有 有 - 有啊
你们这三个吃软饭的家伙去死吧
en: There ain't enough here for us. I wish you three would get bumped off.
I'm tired of feeding ya for nothing.

zh: 把你们身上的东西都拿出来 - 我好饿

en: - I'd be glad to give you--

zh: 你今晚要出架设铁丝网的勤务
在哪里？ - 过了坟场那一头
en: - You've got the wiring detail tonight.

zh: 你可以顺便教他们几招
谢了 我宁愿自己一个人去
en: You can teach 'em a couple of things. Thanks.

zh: 这些菜鸟的寿命通常都很短
快去吧 卡车在等你们了
en: - These babes get killed off too fast.

zh: 我昨天晚上还饿到睡不着
今晚吃到差点撑死 他们竟然派我们出这种鬼任务 各位英雄 你们大展身手的机会来了
en: Last night I was too hungry to sleep... and tonight, when I get the wrinkles out of my gut, they think up wiring duty.

zh: 东西拿一拿 我们要出发了
en: Come on, get your stuff and let's get out of here.

zh: 这司机是怎么开车的 你随他横冲直撞吧
en: - Is that any way to drive?

zh: 要是你因此把手臂摔断了
en: - Let him drive any way he wants.

zh: 那总比身上被射穿几个大窟窿好
en: You get sent home, don't you? A lot better than havin' a hole in your guts.

zh: 要是你们有人活着回来 我会在早上回来接你们 你那种开车方法我们都死不了
en: If there's any of you left, I'll pick you up in the morning.
Well, if that ride you gave us didn't kill us, nothing will.

zh: 别迟到 我可不想错过早餐
- 你可别让你的少爷兵走丢了 老爹
en: - Huh? - You better wait for your army, Papa.

zh: 快跟上来啊 别走那么慢
孩子们 大家听好了
我们只不过是要去架个铁丝网
en: Listen, children. All we got to do is to string a little wire.

zh: 然后再把它们搬到目的地 沿路上我们可能会遭遇炮火攻击
en: We pick it up at the dump and carry it to where we need it.
Now, you're gonna see some shell fire, and you're gonna be scared, see?

zh: 没关系 别放在心上
谁都有被吓得屁滚尿流的时候
连我也不例外 等我们回去军营以后
en: It's happened to better men than you, and it's happened to me.

zh: 我给你们找些干净的内衣裤
en: When we come back, I'll get you all some nice clean underwear.

zh: 那样的炮火你们不需要担心 那种大炮声音很吓人
en: That kind of shell you don't have to pay much attention to.

zh: 但它们的着陆点通常离前线很远
en: Those big fellas just make a lot of noise and land about five miles behind the line.

zh: 我们要小心的是小型的炮弹
en: The things we've got to watch out for are the light ones.

zh: 那种才真的是防不胜防
en: They don't give you much warning.

zh: 它们发出的声音是"哇... 啊... 噌"
当你听到那声音时要立刻趴下 投向大地的怀抱
en: And when you hear that, down!

zh: 你要把身体紧紧的贴在地上
en: Mother Earth. Press yourselves down upon her.

zh: 反正你们跟着我做就对了 要是看到我趴下 你们也跟着趴
en: Just keep your eyes on me.

zh: 只是动作尽量要比我快点
en: When you see me flop, you flop... only try to beat me to it.

zh: 我示范给你们看怎么做
en: Now listen. I'll show you how it's done.

zh: 把那些布给我包一包 这样声音会比较小一点
en: Give me a couple of those.

zh: 看到那个了没？ 连续炮火攻击
我什么都看不见 天啊
我的眼睛 我看不到了
en: I can't see! God! My eyes!

zh: - 我看不到了 - 是班恩 班恩受伤了
- 你要是去 你也会死
他死了 他已经死了
那你还冒着生命危险把他拖回来

en: - Why did you risk your life bringing' him in?

zh: 不管那人生前是谁 现在都只是一具尸体
en: - My friend. - He's a corpse, no matter who it is.

zh: 以后你们别再做这种蠢事了 把他放到那边去
en: Now, don't any of you ever do that again.

zh: 装备拿好后就出来集合了

en: Get your packs and fall in.
- But where to, for the love of--
And this one is gonna last a long time.

zh: 把你的脏手拿开 - 皇后 - 皇后通吃啊
再看清楚一点 那张是老J
en: - Well, if you think that's a queen, look again.

zh: - 说真的 这些牌长的都一个样
这么吵 我实在玩不下去了
我认为你脆弱的神经经不起这炮声

en: - I suppose your delicate nerves can't stand it.

zh: 奥斯卡又出来了 那个小混球...
别这么浪费 你以后一定会后悔的
要是炮火攻击再持续个两天
en: You may wish you had this back.

zh: 到时候想吃被老鼠咬过的面包 恐怕都没有了
en: About two more days of this... and this rat-bitten end of a piece of bread's gonna taste like a hunk of fruit cake.

zh: 这炮火不会再持续两天吧
我不是跟你说过 这次有的玩了吗？
en: - It wouldn't last two more days, would it? Didn't I tell you this was gonna be a bad one?

zh: 白天还无所谓 可是我已经好几个晚上没睡了
en: I don't mind the days so much.

zh: 再两天就凑成一个星期了 孩子
en: It's keeping up all night-- Ah, two more days makes a week, kid.

zh: 到时候你就可以跟别人说 你见识过大场面 你该不是害怕了吧
en: Then you can say you've been under fire!

zh: 不是 我只是问问而已
en: You're not scared, are you? No. I was just asking.

zh: - 再来玩一盘吧 - 你要玩吗？
免得奥斯卡把它们啃光了
en: You better get your boot back before Oscar eats that!

zh: 没关系 让他睡吧 他只是在做梦

en: Let him sleep. He's dreamin'. Oh, God.

zh: 他本来根本不想来打仗的
en: Can't you see it's Behn? He didn't want to come to war!

zh: 不 不 那不是班恩

en: It isn't Behn. It isn't Behn!

zh: 那个是坎莫瑞 那是我啊
这里的情况已经够糟了

en: It's bad enough in here as it is.

zh: 已经没事了 你只是在做恶梦
你只不过是在做恶梦罢了
敌军的攻击越来越猛烈了
又有两个掩蔽壕的弟兄遭到活埋
en: The men in two more dugouts gone.

zh: 无论如何 我们会尽量在入夜前弄些吃的来
en: However, we'll do our best to get some food up here by evening.

zh: - 你干嘛打他 - 闭嘴 抓住他
en: - What did you do that for?
I couldn't hold out much longer.

zh: 老天啊 是法兰兹 把他抬到那边去
别给他喝水 他被射中了胃部

en: He's been hit in the stomach.
He can't have anything to drink. Get a stretcher.

zh: 你还有哪里受伤了 坎莫瑞？
- 担架来了 长官 - 你抬他的头
- 他伤势严重吗 长官？ - 我不确定
- 告诉其他人他没事 - 是的 长官
en: - Tell the others he's all right.
If we're going to fight, why don't we fight?

zh: 光是坐在这里我们会发疯的
en: You could go crazy staying here.
Let's do something! - Let's go after 'em!

zh: 我们的厨师要还是个男人 就应该送食物过来
en: If that cook of ours had any guts, he'd try to bring something through.

zh: 他离火线可远的呢 恐怕连枪声都听不见
en: He's so far behind the lines he can't hear the shooting!

zh: 凯特回来了 找到什么了吗？
en: - Any luck? - We'll have to split this up among us.
We need butter too. Yes. And dessert.

zh: 对 然后来份甜点 再加上一张柔软的羽毛床
en: And a feather bed to sleep on.

zh: 快点 拿着你们的来福枪
快点 大家动作快点
大家一起上啊 来吧
我们无法守住这个位置
退回你们原本的战线吧
快给我们打菜 快点啊

en: - And hurry up. I've got other things to do.

zh: 我等这一餐已经等了三个星期了
en: I've been waiting for this for three weeks.
Beans, you homely-lookin' son of a frog's leg.

zh: - 你以为呢？ - 我们快饿死了
en: - What do you think I want?

zh: 闭嘴 等人到齐了再说
en: Shut up! I'll feed you when you're all here.

zh: 只有半个连的人在这里
我也希望我能够叫醒他们
en: I wish I could wake 'em up.

zh: 可这个连只剩下八十个人了
其他的人不是在医疗站 就是已经化为黄土的肥料
en: The rest is in dressing stations or pushing' up daisies.

zh: 可是我准备了150人份的伙食
这下我们终于可以吃饱了
来吧 快给我们盛上
en: We'll have enough for once. Come on.

zh: 你是说你煮了150人份的豆子？
烤了150人份的的面包 还有150人份的香肠和150人份的烟草？
en: You mean you've cooked beans for 150... and you've got bread for 150... and sausage for 150, and tobacco for 150?

zh: 是啊 可是这是个错误
他们应该要提早通知我的
en: It's all wrong. I should have been notified.

zh: 我们每个人可以吃两人份的伙食
你们明明只有80人 我不能把150人份的伙食全给你们
en: I can't give 80 men what's meant for 150.

zh: 你这餐是煮给第二连吃的 对吧
en: You drew rations for the 2nd Company, didn't ya?

zh: 那好 我们就是第二连
不行 我不能坏了规矩 - 凯特说的没错
我们能够存活 那代表我们的好运
en: And if only half of us get back, that's our good luck.

zh: - 快点 让我们吃饭吧
你是我所看过最胆小懦弱的伙夫 你现在怕了是吧
en: You're the yellowest baboon that ever drew a cook wagon... and you're scared-- it shows.

zh: 你要是敢在多吠一声 我们就把你宰了分给大家吃
en: All we want to hear out of you is one more little yip... and we'll cut ya up and eat ya raw.

zh: 你们把厨房设得离前线那么远 害我们每次吃到饭的时候 不是很晚就是冷飕飕的
en: Why, you keep your kitchen so far back of the lines... we never get anything to eat until it's cold and we're asleep!

zh: 你这个鼠辈 快给我滚开 不然我们就把你的地方给拆了
en: Now, you low-down rat, get out... or we wreck the joint!

zh: - 快点 快把伙食给大家分一分
稍息 这里是怎么回事？
可他只愿意给我们一半 长官
en: He's cooked for 150, sir, and he only wants to give us half.

zh: - 看起来很好吃的样子 - 是的 长官
把全部伙食给大家分了

en: - Yes, sir. - And bring me a plate too.

zh: - 是的 长官 好吧 全给你们了 大家尽量吃
给他们蜂蜜 他们想要什么就给他们什么
en: Take it all. Take everything. Give 'em honey.

zh: - 没关系 大家都是兄弟嘛
en: - Don't mind me. - Oh, that's all right.

zh: 我还可以多来一点豆子
en: I could do with some more beans.

zh: 你自便吧 那边还有很多
不知道我们什么时候要回前线？ 明天
en: - I wonder, when are we going back to the front?

zh: 这下我没食欲了 要是我们明天要再度出发
en: It's enough to take away a man's appetite.

zh: 我们应该赶紧去探望一下坎莫瑞 - 好主意
en: You know, if they're gonna march us in again tomorrow... we ought to go see how Kemmerick is.
- How far is the dressing station?

zh: - 我们可以顺便把他的东西带给他
en: - About two miles. - We could take his things to him.

zh: 那样的事发生在他身上 实在太不幸了

en: It seemed rotten to think of a thing like that happening to him... a nice fellow like Kemmerick.

zh: 是啊 法国必须为挑起这场战争付出代价
en: Ah, the French certainly deserve to be punished for starting this war.

zh: 每个国家都说是别的国家的错
那战争到底是如何发生的？
en: Well, how do they start a war?

zh: 一个国家要先触怒另一个国家 两个国家怎么可能互相生气呢？
难不成德国的山会对法国的田野生气吗？
en: How could one country offend another? You mean there's a mountain over in Germany gets mad at a field over in France?

zh: 当然不是 笨蛋 我是指两国的人民互相交恶 就这样啊？
en: Well, stupid, one people offends another.

zh: 那我根本不应该在这里 因为我一点都不生气
en: Oh, if that's it, I shouldn't be here at all.

zh: 这跟你这种小人物的情绪无关 那好 我现在就去打包回家吧
en: It don't apply to tramps like you.
Then I can be going home right away.

zh: 我和德皇 对这场战争的看法有志一同 我们谁都不想要打仗
en: Me and the kaiser felt just alike about this war.

zh: 所以我要打包回家了 他可是一直都没离开过他家大门
en: We didn't either of us want any war, so I'm going home.

zh: 但当初一定有人想要发起战争
不 我不想要射杀任何英国人
en: Maybe it was the English. No, I don't want to shoot any Englishmen.

zh: 在上战场以前 我甚至没看过英国人长什么样 我想他们在来这里前
en: I never saw one till I came up here.
And I suppose most of them never saw a German till they came up here.

zh: 不 我很确定他们并不想要和我们打仗 不
en: - No, I'm sure they weren't asked about it.

zh: 但是这场战争 一定对某些人有好处 肯定不是我和德皇
en: Well... it must be doing somebody some good.

zh: 我想或许德皇希望这场战争发生
en: - Not me and the kaiser. - I think maybe the kaiser wanted a war.
You leave us out of this!

zh: 我不觉得 德皇干嘛要打仗 他什么都不缺
但是他以前从来没参与过战争
en: The kaiser's got everything he needs.

zh: 每个成年的皇帝都会想要建立战功
en: Well, he never had a war before. Every full-grown emperor needs one war to make him famous.

zh: 还有将军也是 他们需要战争
还有那样商人 他们可以大捞一笔
en: - Yeah, generals too. They need war. And manufacturers.

zh: 我觉得战争比较像是一种流行病
en: They get rich. I think it's more a kind of fever.

zh: 没有人想要生病 但是大家却又都被感染了 我们不想打仗 英国人也不想打仗
en: Nobody wants it in particular... and then all at once, there it is.

zh: 可是我们却在这里打得不亦乐乎
以后要是有人想要挑起世界大战 我们应该把一大块地圈起来...
en: Whenever there's a big war comin' on...
- you should rope off a big field--

zh: 看谁获胜那个国家就赢了 既然凯特把一切都搞定了
我们就出发去看坎莫瑞吧 看路上会不会发生什么有趣的事
en: Well, now that Kat's settled everything, let's go see Kemmerick.
- Something interesting might happen on the way. - Might cheer him up.

zh: 孩子们 我和德皇希望你们 在明天出发前准时回来报到
en: Boys, me and the kaiser want you back in time to march tomorrow.

zh: 别忘了 - 我们会准时回来的
- 嗨 坎莫瑞 - 你好吗？

en: - How are ya? - How's it going?

zh: 医生有没有用心照顾你？
en: - Are they looking after you all right?

zh: 他们对你好吗？ 法兰兹
我就跟你说 不要戴那么好的表上战场
en: I always told you, nobody should carry as good a watch as that.

zh: 他们在我被麻醉的时候把表偷走了
en: - They took it while I was under ether!

zh: 法兰兹 你的表一定能找回来的
那是因为你的身体大量失血
en: - That's because you lost so much blood.

zh: 只要好好补一补 你很快就会复原的 哦 不
en: -Just eat decently and you'll get well again.

zh: 你得多吃一点 这点很重要
何况这里的伙食看来很不错
en: That's the main thing. It looks good too.
I have such a terrible pain in my foot.

zh: 右脚的每一个脚趾都痛的不得了
en: Every toe on my right foot hurts.

zh: 这怎么可能呢 你的腿明明就已经被...
en: Well, how can your foot hurt when your leg's been--

zh: 我懂 我现在终于知道

en: Why- - Why didn't they tell me?

zh: 我以后再也不能走路了
en: Franz! - Now I can't walk any more!

zh: 你必须心存感激 至少你还活着
en: You must be thankful that you've come off with only that.

zh: 我以前一直想成为森林学者
en: I wanted to be a forester once.

zh: 现在制作义肢的技术非常发达
en: They make artificial legs that are wonderful.

zh: 你可以回家了 多好啊
en: You can go home. Think of that.

zh: 我们帮你把你的私人物品带来了 你看
en: We brought your things for you.
That's a marvellous pair of boots.

zh: 要是你以后用不上这双靴子 可以把它们给我吗？
en: If you're not going to be using these, Franz, why don't you leave 'em with us?

zh: 反正你留着它们也没用 我倒是很需要新鞋
en: What good are they to you?

zh: 我的军靴非常磨脚 害我长了一堆水泡...
en: I can use 'em. My boots give me blister after blister--

zh: 别走 再多陪我一下吧
en: Oh, don't go. Stay just a little while longer.
- We'll be coming soon again, Franz.

zh: - 相信你很快就会好起来的 - 再见
en: - I know you'll be feeling better.

zh: 你想他能撑到用餐结束吗？
en: You think he'll last till after mess?

zh: - 我不认为... - 他快挂了
你们先走吧 我们回头见
en: Boys, you go along. I'll see you later.

zh: 要是他能用的上的东西 我绝不会跟他抢
en: I wouldn't touch a thing of his if he could use it.

zh: 你知道我愿意为他赴汤蹈火
en: I'd go barefoot over barbed wire for him if it'd do him any good.

zh: 我只是不愿那双靴子落入那些医官的手中
en: Only- - Only why should some orderly get those boots?

zh: 我了解 幕勒 在这里我们大家都是一样的
en: I understand, Mueller. We're all alike out here.

zh: 更何况在这真的很难找到双好靴子
麻烦你叫医生过来一下
en: Tell the doctor to come, please.

zh: 医生 隔壁床的病人有事找您
en: Doctor, the man in the next bed would like to see you, sir.

zh: 我能帮他做的我都做了
en: I've done everything I can for him.

zh: 你认为我有机会痊愈吗？
en: Do you think I'll ever get well?

zh: 当然 一旦你从手术中复原后 就没事了
en: - Sure, once you get over the operation.

zh: 法兰兹 千万别胡说
你一定能恢复成你原来的样子
en: Don't talk nonsense. Why, you'll be as good as new.

zh: 他们把比你更严重的病人都治好了
en: They fix up worse things than that.

zh: 或许你能回到家乡农村旁的疗养院去静养 在那里 你可以从窗口
en: Perhaps you'll go to the convalescent home... in Klosterberg among the villagers.

zh: 看到一望无际的田野 还有... 地平线尽头的那两棵大树
en: Then you can look out of the windows, across the fields... to the two trees on the horizon.

zh: 现在正好是玉米成熟的时候 也是一年中最美的季节
en: The loveliest time of the year now when the corn ripens.

zh: 你可以不经任何人的许可 就出去四处走动
en: You can go out without asking anyone.

zh: 如果你高兴 甚至可以弹弹琴
en: You can even play piano if you want to.

zh: 但是法兰兹 你该先睡一下了
en: Oh- - Oh, but, Franz, you must try to sleep now.

zh: 神啊 这位是法兰兹坎莫瑞 他今年才十九岁
en: O God... this is Franz Kemmerick... only 19 years old.

zh: 求你不要让他就这样死去
把我的靴子带回去给慕勒
en: Take my boots home for Mueller.

zh: 不 法兰兹 不要
保罗... 如果你找到了我的表 麻烦把它寄回我家去
en: Paul... you find my watch, send it home.

zh: 医生都到哪里去了？ 医生 快点过来
en: Why isn't there a doctor here?
- Which one is that? - Amputated leg.

zh: 我今天做了十二个截肢手术 他在二十六号床
en: - I've amputated a dozen legs today.

zh: 这个由你负责 我还得赶去手术房
en: - Bed 26, sir. - You see to it. I'm due in the operating room.

zh: 医生从今天早上五点到现在还没停过
en: One operation after another since 5:00 this morning.

zh: 今天已经死了16个人 你的朋友是第17个
en: Sixteen dead today, and yours is the 17th.

zh: 到明天早上大概会累积到20个
en: There'll probably be 20 by the morning.

zh: 他一定是偷了别人的靴子
en: What's your hurry? Hey! I'll bet he stole those boots!

zh: - 我懂了 凯特 - 嗯？
你听好 "等差级数的总和是..."

en: Listen: "The sum of an arithmetic series... is S = A + L x N over 2."
- What do you wanna learn that stuff for?

zh: 如果有天你被一枪打死 那些岂不是白学了
en: One day you'll stop a bullet and it'll all be worthless.

zh: - 可是学习的过程很有趣啊 - 啊哈
en: - I get a lot of fun out of it.

zh: 我以前从不知道死亡是什么感觉
en: I didn't know what it was like to die before.

zh: 然后我从医院走了出来 我感觉... 能活着的感觉真好 所以我越走越快
en: And then-- then I came outside... and it felt-- it felt so good to be alive that I started in to walk fast.

zh: 我开始想到一些很奇怪的事 像是走在田野里的感觉
en: I began to think of the strangest things... like being out in the fields.

zh: 那种感觉好像我的脚 从地上接了电流 流向全身
en: And it felt as if there were... something electric running from the ground up through me.

zh: 我开始用力的跑 我越跑越快
en: And I started. I began to run hard.

zh: 我从很多士兵身旁经过 我听到他们在叫我
en: I passed soldiers and I heard voices calling to me.

zh: 我跑到觉得自己上气不接下气
en: I felt as if I couldn't breathe enough air into me.
I don't mind the war now.

zh: 能穿着这样的靴子上前线真是一种享受
en: Be a pleasure to go to the front in boots like these.
It's a good invention just the same.

zh: 要是把身上的虱子一只只捏死 想想看你能消耗多少热量 你们瞧
en: If you crack each separate louse, think of all the energy you use up.

zh: 烧死它 巡逻的怎么样了？
他们有闲心去摘花采果 路上的情况想必很糟糕
en: - How was patrol? Bad? - Must've been terrible if they had time to gather the harvest.

zh: 我们路过一棵樱桃树时 他突然抓狂了 我好不容易才把他拉走
en: We passed a cherry tree and when he saw it, he went crazy.
I could hardly drag him away. It was... beautiful.

zh: 我在老家有个长满樱桃树的果园
en: I have a big orchard with cherry trees at home.

zh: 当它们开花的时候 从远处看 就像一片云海
en: When they're in full blossom... from the hayloft it looks like one single sheet.

zh: 也许你很快就能休假了 他们或许会让你回去务农
en: - Perhaps you can get leave soon.

zh: 一个女人怎么有办法照顾果园呢
en: - You may even be sent back as a farmer. A woman can't run a farm alone.
No matter how hard she works.

zh: 他昨天接到老婆的来信 他想要回去照顾他的果园
en: Got a letter yesterday from his wife.
He wants to get back to his farm. We'd all like to get back home.

zh: 如果和平突然降临 不知道我们会怎么做？
en: I wonder what we'd do if it were suddenly peacetime again?
Get drunk and look for women!

zh: 我要去找一个幸运的姑娘 一个大腿能套得下这个的女孩 在我找到她之后
en: I'd go looking for a Cinderella... that could wear this for a garter.

zh: 我要跟她翻云覆雨两个礼拜
en: And when I'd found her, nobody'd see me for two weeks.

zh: 我要回到我的煤炭场 然后在下班的时候 跟同事一起去喝啤酒
en: I'll go back to the peat fields... and those pleasant hours in the beer gardens.

zh: 现在看来我以前铺路的工作 也没有那么糟糕
en: And there's worse things than cobbling too.

zh: 你们真讨厌 干嘛提起这个令人感伤的话题
en: I oughta give you a kick in the backside for startin' all this.

zh: 你有什么好感伤的 至少你还有东西在家乡等你
en: It's all right for all you to talk. You've got something to go back to:

zh: 但是我们呢 难不成叫我们回学校去？

en: What have we got to go back to?

zh: 反正你该学的都学会了
en: - Why not? You know everything already?

zh: 在经历了三年的枪林弹雨后 我没有办法再面对那些虚无的大道理
en: A man can't take all that rubbish they teach you seriously... after three years of shells and bombs.

zh: 这样的经历不是说忘就能忘
en: - You can't peel that off easily.
What can happen to us afterwards?

zh: 我告诉你吧 拿我们这一班来看
二十个人里面 三个升了军官

en: Out of 20, three are officers... nine dead...

zh: 慕勒和其他三个受了伤 还有一个被送入精神病院
en: Mueller and three others wounded... and one in the madhouse.

zh: 我们迟早都会死 所以还是别想这么多了
en: We'll all be dead someday, so let's forget it.

zh: 哈姆斯托 原来军队里也有公理和正义
en: - It's Himmelstoss! Himmelstoss? There is justice in the army!

zh: 我说是谁呢 原来我们都在这里
en: Well, well. So, we are all here, huh?

zh: 我们可比你早来好久 哈姆
en: - A bit longer than you, Himmie.
- Since when have we become so familiar?

zh: 见了长官还不立正敬礼 全部给我起来
en: Stand up and click your heels together!
- Take a running jump at yourself!

zh: 麻烦你们哪位帮鲁登道夫将军
拿张舒服点的椅子过来
en: Would somebody get General Ludendorff a nice, comfortable chair?

zh: 我是以高级军官身分跟你们说话 - 你们想闹上军事法庭吗？
en: I command you as your superior officer!
- Do you want to be court-martialled?

zh: 因为敌军大规模的攻击快开始了

en: There's going to be a big attack tonight and I'd just love to get out of it.

zh: 虽然我们这里不时兴敬礼那一套 但是我告诉你怎么着...
en: It isn't customary to ask for salutes here.

zh: 我们很快就要出发去攻击
en: But I'll tell you what we'll do.

zh: 一个之前拿不下来的小镇 很多人因此而死去或受伤
en: We're going to attack a town that we tried to take once before.

zh: 既然这次你要跟我们一起去
en: It was great fun. This time you're going with us.

zh: 如果我们之中有人不幸中弹 在我们临死之前 我们会去找你
en: If any of us stops a bullet, before we die... we're going to come to you, click our heels together and ask stiffly...

zh: "请问哈姆斯托中士 我们可以死了吗？" 你会...
真准时 快开始准备吧 兄弟
en: Right on time. Better get ready, boys.

zh: 我受伤了 我受伤了
不过是擦伤 你这鼠辈
起来 跟着大家向前冲
en: It's just a scratch, you yellow rat! Up!

zh: 你这胆小鬼 苦差事都让别人去做

en: Let the others do it, eh? Get up!
- Get out here! - Command... was forward.

zh: 我想要帮助你 我想要帮助你

en: Stop that! Stop it, stop it.

zh: 我可以忍受其他一切 可是我无法忍受你的呻吟
en: I can bear the rest of it.

zh: 你难道不能死的快一点？ 反正你都要死了
en: Why do you take so long dying?

zh: 你不会死 你的伤口并不深
en: You won't die. Oh, no. You won't die.

zh: 你可以回家了 你不会有事的
en: They're only little wounds. You'll get home.

zh: 你可以比我先回到家里
这样我就不能丢下你逃走
en: You know I can't run away.

zh: 跟你说 我并不想杀你 所以我才这样的照顾你
en: I tell you, I didn't want to kill you.

zh: 要是事情能重来一次 我一定不会拿刺刀刺你
en: If you jumped in here again, I wouldn't do it.

zh: 当你跳进这炕洞里时 你是我的敌人 我很惧怕你
en: When you jumped in here you were my enemy, and I was afraid of you.

zh: 但你跟我一样都是凡人 而我杀了你
en: But you'rejust a man like me, and I killed you.

zh: 原谅我 朋友 请你这样告诉我 说你愿意原谅我
你比我幸运 至少你已经获得了解脱
en: You're better off than I am.

zh: 他们再也不能伤害你了
en: You're through. They can't do any more to you now.

zh: 老天啊 他们为何要这样对我们
en: Oh, God, why did they do this to us?

zh: 你和我 我们都只想活下去
en: We only wanted to live, you and I.

zh: 他们为什么要把我们送到这里来伤害对方？
en: Why should they send us out to fight each other?

zh: 要是我们抛开这些武器和制服 你或许会像凯特和艾柏特那样 变成我的好兄弟
en: If we threw away these rifles and these uniforms... you could be my brother just like Kat and Albert.

zh: 你一定要原谅我 我什么都愿意做
en: You'll have to forgive me, comrade.

zh: 我会写信给你的父母 我会写信...
en: I'll do all I can. I'll write to your parents.

zh: 我保证她将来一定衣食无缺
en: I promise she'll not want for anything.

zh: 我会帮助你的妻子和父母
en: I'll help her and your parents too.

zh: 我只求你原谅我 原谅我
昨天发生了一件很悲惨的事
我知道你的感受 那是你的第一次
en: With my own hands, stabbed him. I know how it is.

zh: 不要担心 医护兵会找到他的
不 他死了 是我亲眼看着他死的
en: The stretcher-bearers will find him. - He's dead.

zh: 我们必须要杀人 你没有任何选择
en: - You couldn't do anything about it. We have to kill.

zh: 我们就是为这个而来的 你看看那边
en: We can't help it. That's what we are here for. Uh-

zh: 你们该看看 那个人在空中蹦得有多高
en: That got him. You should've seen how he leaped in the air.

zh: 那个家伙今天被派来做枪手 他已经射杀了三个人 要是这样继续下去
en: That fellow had to shoot with us for today with three hits.

zh: 他不知道能拿到多少面勋章
en: If he keeps it up, he'll have a decoration for his buttonhole this evening.

zh: 睡吧 别再为这件事烦心了
en: Don't you lose any more sleep over this business.

zh: 或许是因为我跟他相处的时间太久了？ 没错 一定是这样的
en: Maybe it was 'cause I was out there with him so long, huh?
Sure, that's it. After all, war is war.

zh: 连队 停止前进 解散
所有士官和士兵 就地解散
万岁 来吧 让我们离开这儿吧
一 二 三 干杯
快点 给我来杯啤酒
嘿 别插队 快点 再给我一杯啤酒
哦 吼吼 麻烦再来一杯啤酒...
咱们今晚不醉不归 一言为定
en: Here's hoping we get falling-down drunk tonight.

zh: 我都忘了世界上还有这样的女孩存在 我看是没有
en: I'd forgotten there were girls like that.

zh: 你看她那双纤细的小鞋
en: There aren't. Just look at those thin, little shoes.

zh: 她穿那双鞋行军恐怕走不远 保罗 你提行军干嘛
en: She couldn't march many miles in those.

zh: 你对这位小姐太失礼了
在此致上十二万分的歉意
- 你想她今年几岁？ - 大概二十二吧
en: - How old do you think she is?

zh: 不行 这样她就比我们大了

en: No, that'd make her older than us.

zh: 那样的女孩 真是太棒了 你说是不是 艾柏特？
有他在旁边 我们的胜算恐怕不大
en: We wouldn't have much of a chance with him around.

zh: - 我们可以去洗个澡 把衣服洗干净... - 好
en: - We could take a bath, wash our clothes--

zh: 为了她 我甚至愿意去除虱
等等 她离开这里已经很久了
en: and I might even go so far as to get deloused. Wait a minute!
She's a long way from here now. Look at the date.

zh: 无论如何 我还是要敬她一杯
en: - That's true. Well, here's to her anyway.

zh: 我要敬世界上所有女孩一杯
艾柏特 - 我们干脆还是去洗澡吧

en: - we might as well wash up anyway.

zh: 我个人比较喜欢丰满一点的女人 在你加入之前 我们对话的格调还挺高的
现在我们是真的需要去洗澡了
en: This conversation was on a high moral plane up to now.
Now we do need a bath.
- For what? Hm. You wouldn't understand.

zh: 我看我们是浪漫过头了
- 但你想想她美丽的眼睛
en: This romantic business has gone too far.
- Ahh, but think of her beautiful eyes!

zh: - 我们来了 - 我们不会错过任何事

en: - We're not gonna miss a thing! - Go away!

zh: 每个星期都要洗一次澡 是女人
en: They tell me there's some people in this world takes a bath every week!

zh: 小姐们 你们想要游泳吗？ 你们看
小宝贝 你真的好美啊 小姐 吻我吧
哦不 小姐 别走啊 金发小妞 小宝贝
- 别走啊 小姐 我们渴望你
食物 是食物 喔呼
停 河的对岸是禁区 所有人员禁止穿越
赶快回头 不然你们的麻烦可就大了
en: You know you're forbidden to cross. You fellows stay on this side or you'll get yourselves in a lot of trouble.

zh: 她们叫我们晚上再渡河 不见不散 - 好极了
en: - They want us to swing over tonight.

zh: 那个金发小妞对我很有意思
但是我们有四个人 她们却只有三个人
是我让她们改变主意的
en: - But there's four of us and only three of them.
- I was the one that stopped 'em!

zh: 剩下的由你们三个去争
en: That blonde piece of work is mine.

zh: 就这么说定了 别忘了 情场如战场
en: You three fight for what's left. Fight's the word.
All's fair in love and war.

zh: 你到时候就知道了 再见
en: What're you gonna do? You'll find out.
- Bon ami! Bon ami! Vos camarades!

zh: 等等 我替你们开门
而且还非常合身 简直就像是替我订做的

en: - It might've been made for me.

zh: 只有在会见重要人物时才能穿
你坐啊 他们实在是太好心了 还给我们送食物来
今天到底是你生日还是我生日 为什么这么问？
en: Is this your birthday or mine?

zh: 因为你在过去两个小时内 不停的请我喝酒
en: Why? You've been buying me drink after drink for two hours.

zh: 我只是想知道为什么 为什么？
en: What I'm tryin' to figure out is why.
I-It's just that the boys... told me to amuse you for a little while.

zh: 他们说你一定会了解的
是啊 你的确被背叛了 老子赏你一拳
可怜的孩子 我可怜的孩子
名字 你叫什么名字？
噢 我的名字是苏珊
- 保罗 好可爱的名宇
苏珊 我想要告诉你一些事
en: C'est un joli nom. Suzanne, I wish I could tell you something.

zh: - 我希望你能够了解... - 不 不 你不要...
亲爱的 我们以后再也不会相见 我心里很明白
en: - Oh, non, non. I faut pas-- Darling, I'll never see you again.

zh: 就算我们再见面了 恐怕也认不出彼此来

en: And I wouldn't even know you if I did.
And yet, I'll remember you always.

zh: 你跟我们平常所遇见的女士非常不同 不行 你必须试着去遗忘
en: Oh, if you could only know how different this is from the women we soldiers meet.

zh: 都是战争的错 残酷的战争
en: Oh, non, non, I faut tout oublier.

zh: 不 我说的不是战争
en: C'est cette guerre, cette terrible guerre! No, no, no.
Not the war. You. That's what I'm talking about.

zh: 我感觉所有战争所带来的恐惧和痛苦 都从我身上被移除了 就像一个奇迹那样
en: It seems as though all war and terror and grossness... had fallen away from me... like a miracle.

zh: 去叫保罗 我们要走了 保罗
你们看 那是特别为我们准备的棺材
en: Have a look. Nice, new coffins.

zh: 他们真是懂的 如何激励即将上火线的士兵 他们真体贴
en: I must say, that's a very cheerful preparation for this offensive.

zh: 但那些棺材对贾登来说都太短了
en: That's very considerate of them. But I don't see any long enough for our comrade Tjaden.

zh: 我才不跟你们说话 你们这些叛徒
en: Mind you, I'm not speaking to you, you traitors.

zh: 他们别想用棺材来装我
en: - But no coffin's gonna get me.

zh: 要是他们能拿张草席把你裹一裹丢掉
en: You'll be thankful if they slip a waterproof sheet...
- around that Aunt Sally of a carcass of yours.

zh: 是天主教医院 艾柏特
他们说这里的伙食跟照颅都比较好 - 我们真幸运
en: They say you always get good food and good treatment.

zh: 和二十四小时的车程后 我们是该走运了
en: - After that rainy dressing station... and 24 hours on the train, we deserve to have some luck.

zh: 是的 那是我的名宇 在我的头被打破了之后 ..
他们发给我一张证明说...
en: I got a crack in the head and they gave me a certificate stating...

zh: "约瑟夫汗莫卡无法 为自己的行为举止负责"
en: "Josef Hamacher is periodically... not responsible for his actions."

zh: 在那之后 汗莫卡就玩得不亦乐乎
en: And ever since then, Hamacher has been having a grand time.

zh: 我希望你们的伤势不太严重 其他的人总是很快就死了
en: I hope you boys are not too badly wounded.

zh: 我甚至来不及跟他们混熟
en: The others die off so quickly we don't have time to get acquainted.

zh: 你会有时间慢慢了解我们
我很抱歉 亲爱的 你该走了
en: I'm sorry, my dear. It's time to go now.

zh: 如果他们把他的衣服拿走 就代表你们不会再看到他
en: If they take his clothes away, you've seen the last of him.

zh: 你们看 他们要把他送去等死房

en: They're taking him to the dying room.

zh: 他们会把你送走 好把床空出来
en: When you're ready to kick the bucket, they get you out of the way so they can use the bed.

zh: 我们这栋转角的那个房间 就是等死房了 而且就在停尸间旁边
en: In the corner of the building there's a little room... right next to the morgue!

zh: 很方便吧 那可替他们省了不少事
要是他突然痊愈了怎么办？
en: It saves a lot of trouble.

zh: 我看过很多人被送往等死房
却从没看到有人回来过
en: I've seen a lot of'em go in that dying room... but nobody ever comes back.

zh: - 是你在摇铃吗 保罗 - 是的

en: - I think I have a haemorrhage. The bandage is all wet.

zh: 我摇铃摇了好久 可是都没有人前来查看 我想我在流血我
en: I've been ringing forever and nobody comes.

zh: 修女 拿一块消毒纱布和一个冰袋给我
en: - I think I'm bleeding. - Sister, get me a sterile dressing and an ice pack.

zh: - 为什么没有人来叫我？ - 他摇铃摇了好久
这里没有人能起床走路 修女
en: - He's been ringing. Nobody can walk, Sister.

zh: - 修女 情况很糟糕吗？
这是怎么回事？ 你们要干什么？
我们得要重新包扎你的伤口
en: What are you doing? We must rearrange your bandages.
- Where are you taking me? To the bandaging ward.

zh: - 不 我不去 我要留在这里 保罗 保罗
en: - No, no! I'm not going! I'm staying here!

zh: 你只是要去包扎室而已
en: - I'm not going to the dying room!

zh: 那你为什么要拿走我的衣服
en: - We're going to the bandaging ward.

zh: 你在骗我 但是我会回来 我不会死
en: - Why are you taking my clothes? You're lying to me! But I'll come back.

zh: 我会回来的 我不会死
en: I won't die! I'll come back!

zh: 我不会就这样死去 我一定会回来
en: I won't die! I'm not going to die!

zh: 莉柏汀修女 他还好吗？
可怜的孩子 他们必须替他的腿进行截肢
en: Poor boy. They had to amputate his leg.

zh: 哦 他已经... 死了 死了
你好啊 欢迎你回来 艾柏特
- 孩子 你感觉如何？ - 不错
还好 但是我的下半身好痛
en: - All right. But I've got such an awful pain.

zh: 汗莫卡 他们是不是把我的腿锯掉了
当然没有 你本来不就有两条腿嘛
en: Did they cut my leg off? Of course not! How many did you have?

zh: 现在还是一样 一 二
你别跟我闹着玩 老实告诉我
en: One, two! Don't play the fool, Hamacher.

zh: 我没闹你 你看起来很好
en: Tell me truthfully. Of course not.

zh: - 我不要当残废 - 别激动
- 我一有机会我就要自杀

en: - I'll kill myself the first chance I get!

zh: 我说过我会回来的 你们看 我回来了
en: I told you I'd come back. Look, everybody!

zh: 那张不是我的床 这边这张才是
保罗 我真替你高兴
en: - That's not where I'm going. I live over there. Paul, I'm so happy.

zh: 汗莫卡 我从死里逃生了
en: Hamacher, I've come back from the dead!

zh: 这真是不寻常 以前从来没发生过

en: - Albert, get well quickly... so we can go home soon. Never happened before.

zh: - 现在一切都会没事了 - 是的 保罗
en: - Everything will be all right now.
- Yes, Paul. Everything will be all right... now.

zh: - 没有 母亲 我现在在休假
你看我怎么哭了呢 我应该要高兴才对
en: Here I am cryin' instead of being glad.

zh: 安娜 把那瓶黑莓酱拿出来
en: Anna, get down the jar of blackberries.

zh: 你现在还喜欢吃那个吗？
en: You still like them, don't you?

zh: 是的 母亲 而且我好久没吃过了
en: Yes, Mother. I haven't had any for a long time.
We might almost have known you were coming.

zh: 保罗 坐下 在我身旁坐下
母亲 我差点忘了 我带了些小礼物回来给您
en: I almost forgot, Mother. I've got some little presents for you.

zh: 母亲你看 是面包 香肠 还有白米
en: Look, Mother. Bread, sausage and rice.

zh: - 你一定是自己省吃俭用留下来的 - 嗯
我是不是该赶快去告诉父亲 保罗回来了
en: - Hmm-mm. Hadn't I better go and tell Father paul's home?

zh: 麻烦保罗帮我看着炉子上的东西 不 孩子 我起来帮忙吧
en: - Paul could watch the things on the stove.

zh: 保罗 你现在是个军人了
en: - No, I'm getting up. Oh, Paul, you're a soldier now, aren't you?

zh: 不知怎么地 我觉得好像不认识你了
en: But somehow, I don't seem to know you.

zh: 我们还照着以前那样给你留着呢
en: It's in the wardrobe, just where you left it.

zh: 你的衣服都准备好了 - 我还记得是你抓到这只的
en: Your things are ready for you, Paul.
- I remember when you caught that one.
- Yes. And you took it away from me, didn't you?

zh: 士兵们为祖国付出了鲜血和生命 但是我们知道该怎么表扬他们
en: We're behind the lines, but we know how to honour the soldier... who goes on in spite of blood and death.

zh: 诸位 让我们向我儿致敬 - 干杯
年轻人 我很荣幸能认识你
en: I'm glad to know you, young man, I am glad to know you.

zh: 但是我们一定得继续推进
en: Terrible. But we must carry on.

zh: 所幸你们在前线吃的好喝的好
en: After all, you do at least get decent food out there.

zh: 不像这里 食物非常匮乏
但是把最好的物资献给祖国战士
en: Naturally. But the best for our soldiers all the time.

zh: 是我们大家的最高原则
把最好的献给祖国战士
你一定要替我们好好的教训一下那些法国佬
en: - you must give the Frenchies a good licking!

zh: 还有 如果你们想要回家来 我给你看看 你们得先完成什么 才能回家来
en: And, if you boys want to come home, eh... let me show you what you must do before you can come home.
Give us a hand there, men.

zh: 你可以看得出来 这里是圣昆汀
en: Here is St Quentin. You can see for yourself.

zh: 你们快要突破这里了 知道吗？
你们要一鼓作气的歼灭他们
千万不要僵持于永无止境的壕沟战
en: Shove ahead out there and don't stick to that everlasting trench warfare!

zh: 然后再打倒英国佬之后 和平就会降临了
en: Smash through the johnnies! And then you will have peace.

zh: 当你身陷其中时 很多事情并不像大后方的人所看到的那样
en: When you get in it... the war isn't the way it looks back here.
Oh! You don't know anything about it.

zh: 当然 你会比较了解战场上的细节 但是我们讨论的牵涉到大局
en: Of course, you know about the details... but this relates to the whole!

zh: 虽然你为了保卫祖国出生入死
en: Of course, you do your duty and you risk your life.

zh: 但是你也会因此获得最高的荣誉
en: But for that, you receive the highest honour.

zh: 我认为每个参战的人都应该获颁铁十字勋章
en: I said that every man in the war ought to have the lron Cross.

zh: 首先 我们必须从法兰德斯突破敌方的前线
en: First, the enemy lines must be broken through in Flanders.

zh: - 是巴黎吧 我们应该直攻巴黎
en: - On to Paris! Push on to Paris!

zh: 不不 不能从法兰德斯 我告诉你该从那里进攻
en: - Right. No, not in Flanders. I'll tell you just where the break should come.

zh: - 敌军在那里驻扎了很多兵力
en: - Here. - The enemy has too many reserves there.

zh: 我坚持该从法兰德斯进攻
但是他们已经快到圣昆汀了 为何要掉头攻击另外一边
en: - Why should they do that... when they're halfway through St Quentin already?

zh: 因为法兰德斯的地形非常平坦
en: Because Flanders is a flat country!

zh: 没有山丘 没有障碍物

en: From the farms they have gone;

zh: 来自学校 来自工厂
en: from the schools, from the factories.

zh: 他们以英勇及高贵的姿态挺身而出 因为他们了解拯救祖国 是他们所必须肩负的最重要使命
en: They have gone bravely, nobly, ever forward... realizing there is no other duty now but to save the fatherland.

zh: 保罗 你好吗 保罗
教授 很高兴再见到你
你来得正是时候 真是太好了
en: You've come at the right moment, Baumer! Just at the right moment.

zh: 为了应证我的话 我给你们介绍一位身先士卒的学长
en: And as if to prove all I have said, here is one of the first to go.

zh: 他曾经坐在这些椅子上专心听我讲课 他放弃了一切 只为了在战争的头一年从军报国
en: A lad who sat before me on these very benches... who gave up all to serve in the first year of the war;

zh: 多亏了像他这样的铁血男儿 我们祖国才能在战场上屹立不摇
en: one of the iron youth who have made Germany invincible in the field.

zh: 你们看看他 坚毅的体魄 褐色的皮肤 和闪亮的眼睛
en: Look at him-- sturdy and bronze and clear-eyed.

zh: 他这样的战士是你们所有人的好榜样
en: The kind of soldier every one of you should envy.

zh: 孩子 你得跟他们说几句话
en: Oh, lad, you must speak to them.

zh: 你得告诉他们 为祖国牺牲奉献所代表的意义
en: You must tell them what it means to serve your fatherland.

zh: - 不 我没什么好说的 - 别这样 保罗
en: - No, I can't tell them anything.

zh: 就说几句 只要告诉他们
en: - You must, Paul. Just a word.

zh: 祖国的前线有多么需要他们
en: Just tell them how much they're needed out there.

zh: 告诉他们你为何挺身而出 而那对你有什么意义
en: Tell them why you went and what it meant to you.

zh: 如果你记得战场上的任何英雄事迹 或是高贵的情操
en: You can remember some deed of heroism, some touch of nobility.

zh: 我不能告诉你们 你们所不了解的事
en: I can't tell you anything you don't know.

zh: 在战场上 我们住在壕沟里 整天奋战
en: We live in the trenches out there.

zh: 我们试着保全自己的性命
en: We fight. We try not to be killed;

zh: 我上过前线 我知道那里是什么样子
en: I've been there! I know what it's like.

zh: 但是你不应该只谈论那些
en: That's not what one dwells on, Paul.

zh: 我听到你在这里歌颂那些老掉牙的东西 你想要创造更多铁人 更多年轻的民族英雄
en: I heard you in here reciting that same old stuff... making more iron men, more young heroes.

zh: 你还是认为为国捐躯是一件 美丽而又甜美的事 对不对？
en: You still think it's beautiful and sweet to die for your country, don't you?

zh: 我们一直那么相信你的话
en: We used to think you knew.

zh: 直到第一次被敌军炮火袭击 我们才觉醒
en: The first bombardment taught us better.

zh: 为国捐躯是一件既肮脏而又痛苦的事
en: It's dirty and painful to die for your country.

zh: 当为国捐躯的时刻来临时 我宁愿选择活下去
en: When it comes to dying for your country, it's better not to die at all!

zh: 已经有上百万个人为国捐躯了 那又怎么样呢？
en: There are millions out there dying for their countries, and what good is it?

zh: 你要我告诉他们 祖国有多需要他们
en: You asked me to tell them how much they're needed out there.

zh: 他是在告诉你们"去送死吧"
en: He tells you, "Go out and die."

zh: 老实说 这样光耍嘴皮子的差事 也实在太容易了 - 懦夫
en: Oh, but if you'll pardon me, it's easier to say "Go out and die" than it is to do it.

zh: 是因为你没有亲眼目睹过战争的残酷
不 孩子们 别这样
我很抱歉 但是我必须说...
en: - I'm sorry, Baumer, but I must say--
- It's no use talking like this.
You won't know what I mean.

zh: 只是我离开那么久了 从我踏出这个教室的那天起
en: Only, it's been a long while since we enlisted out of this classroom.

zh: 我还以为这个世界会记取教训
en: So long I thought maybe the whole world had learned by this time.

zh: 你们现在竟然想把小孩送上战场 他们绝对活不过一星期
en: Only now they're sending babies, and they won't last a week!
I shouldn't have come on leave.

zh: 在前线 我们只需要担心自己的死活
en: Up at the front you're alive or you're dead, and that's all!

zh: 一切是那么的简单明了 没有谎言
en: You can't fool anybody about that very long.

zh: 在前线 我们也知道不论死活 我们的人生都已经完蛋了
en: Up there we know we're lost and done for whether we're dead or alive.

zh: 我们忍受了三年 已经快要四年了
en: Three years we've had of it-- four years.

zh: 每个白日和黑夜都那么漫长 简直度日如年 我们的身体化为大地
en: Every day a year and every night a century.

zh: 而我们的思绪化为泥土 我们和死亡肩并肩的一起作息
en: Our bodies are earth and our thoughts are clay... and we sleep and eat with death.

zh: 我们完蛋了 是因为在经历战争后 我们不可能再回到从前
en: We're done for because you can't live that way and keep anything inside you!

zh: 我不该休假回来的 我明天就回去
en: I shouldn't have come on leave.

zh: 我还有四天的假 可我一刻都待不下去了
en: I'll go back tomorrow. I've got four days more, but I can't stand it here!

zh: 你这样会感冒的 你赶快回去睡觉吧
等你离开了之后 我有大把的时间

en: There'll be plenty of time to sleep... when you're gone.

zh: 你不能多待几天吗？ 难道明天一定得走？
是的 母亲 休假的日期改变了

en: Are you very much afraid, Paul?
There's something I want to say to you, Paul.

zh: 想叫你多提防那边的女人
en: Just be on your guard against the women out there.

zh: 她们可能不是什么好女人
我们那边没有什么女人
en: Where we are, there aren't any women, Mother.
Be very careful at the front, Paul.

zh: 是的 母亲 我会的

en: I'll pray for you every day.

zh: 如果可以的话 叫上面给你安排一个比较不危险的工作
en: And if you could, get a job that's not quite so dangerous.

zh: 是的 母亲 我会请调到伙房
en: Yes, Mother. I'll try and get in the cookhouse.

zh: 那就这么办 如果别人有话说...
en: - You do it then, and if the others say anything--

zh: 你得赶紧去睡觉 这样你才能在我回家前好起来
en: Now, you must go to bed and you must get well quickly before I come back.

zh: 我放了两条新内裤在你背包里
en: I put two sets of underwear-- new ones-- in your pack.
They'll keep you nice and warm.

zh: 你还是把我当成孩子看待
en: You still think I'm a child.

zh: 为什么我不能像小时候那样趴在你的腿上哭泣呢
en: Why can't I put my head in your lap and cry?

zh: - 这里是第二连吗？ - 是的 长官
- 就只有这些人？ - 是的 长官
昨天出完勤务后就剩这么多
en: We had 150 men, but this is all that came back yesterday.

zh: 但是上面会派增援兵力来 给我们补齐一百五十个人
en: But now they're going to give us enough to make 150 again.

zh: 白忙了一场 我什么都没找到
en: No use. I couldn't find anything.
We'll have to eat the sawdust.

zh: 我不要 我宁愿饿死也不吃木屑
en: Not me! I'll go hungry first. It makes me sick.

zh: 有老友并肩作战这样才像话嘛
en: Now it's gonna be a real war again.

zh: 保罗 你好吗 老保罗
第二连越来越难找了 我问了好久才找到
en: You know, the 2nd Company's getting hard to find.

zh: 我很高兴你找到了我们
en: Nobody seemed to know where you were. I'm glad you found it.

zh: 看来我不能一个人独享美食
en: I guess I don't get much of this.

zh: 我们以前吃木屑里面还有加点料 现在只有纯木屑可吃
en: There used to be some food in the sawdust.

zh: 这不是开玩笑的 吃多了很伤肠胃
en: Now it's all sawdust. No joke, either. Eats ya up inside.

zh: 这看起来不像是以前的第二连
en: This doesn't look much like the old 2nd Company.

zh: 这些乳臭未干的菜鸟全是这副德性
en: The replacements are all like that.

zh: 他们连怎么背背包都不会
en: Not even old enough to carry a pack.

zh: 他们只知道怎么去送死
en: All they know how to do is die.

zh: 不过有些老面孔还是没变
en: I guess... some of the old-timers are here yet.

zh: 他们正在想新方法 好把我也干掉
en: Paul, they're tryin' to invent somethin' to kill me right now.

zh: 他跑出去帮忙 结果...
en: - He went out to get it.
- Is it true about the armistice?

zh: 从后方的情况看起来恐怕不像
en: - Doesn't look that way back there.

zh: 他们想要我们继续打下去？ 他们是这么说的
en: - You mean they want us to go on fighting?
- That's what they say. They're crazy!

zh: 再这样下去 德国人都要死光了
他得了思乡病 你记得那些樱花吗？
en: He got homesick. You remember about the cherry blossoms?

zh: 看来他从那次之后就变了样
en: I guess he never got over that.

zh: 他有天晚上出发 说是要回家帮忙老婆打理果园
en: He started out one night to go home and help his wife with the farm.

zh: 他们在前线附近抓到了他 后来就再也没有他的消息了
en: They got him behind the lines, and we never heard of him since.

zh: 他只是得了严重的思乡病 不过上面的人恐怕不会这么认为
en: He was just homesick, but probably they couldn't see it that way.

zh: 凯特在哪？ 他该不会...
要是凯特死了 战争恐怕也要结束了
en: If he were out, the war would be over.

zh: 你记得他总是说... 敌军要把他留到最后来解决
en: You remember what he always says:
They're savin' him for the last. - Where is he?

zh: 他去找煮汤的材料 他往哪头去了？
en: - He's out lookin' for food, something to make soup with.

zh: 往那头走大约两英里的地方
en: - Which way? - Down the road about two miles that way.

zh: 没有 将军的人马早就把这一带都搜刮干净了
en: - No, the general's staff's been over this country with a rake.

zh: 告诉我 你的老家如何？
en: Tell me, Paul... how was it at home?

zh: 我已经没有办法回家过生活了
en: Ohh... I'm no good for back there any more, Kat.

zh: 我们都一样 我们在战场上待太久了
en: None of us are. We've been in this too long.

zh: 有个男孩叫我懦夫 只因为我跟他们说 为国家效力是假的 只有死亡才是真的
en: The young men thought I was a coward because I told them that... we learn that death is stronger than duty to one's country.

zh: 还有些老头跟我说 "加油 你们要直攻巴黎"
我父亲甚至希望我在他身边时 身上都要穿着制服
en: Push on to Paris." My father even wanted me to wear my uniform around him.

zh: 那里已经不再是我的故乡
en: It's not home back there any more.

zh: 我心里不断想着 "我真希望 赶快回去再和凯特在一起"
en: All I could think of was, "I'd like to get back and see Kat again."

zh: 你现在变成我的唯一了
en: You're all I've got left, Kat.
I'm not much to have left.

zh: 我也很想念你 保罗
至少我们知道前线真正的情况 这里没有谎言
en: At least we know what it's all about out here.
There're no lies here. Push on to Paris?

zh: 你该看看我们敌军的设备
en: You ought to see what they've got on the other side.
They eat white bread over there.

zh: 敌我的战机比例更是悬殊 他们的坦克能将任何东西移为平地
en: They've got dozens of aeroplanes to our one... and tanks that'll go over anything.

zh: 我们的枪枝老旧到常常打伤自己人
en: Guns so worn they drop shells on our own men.

zh: 没有食物 没有弹药 没有军官
en: No food, no ammunition, no officers.

zh: 原来他们在大后方 竟然是这么的痴人说梦
en: So that's the way they talk back there.
I guess we'd better be going.

zh: 我欺骗了我可怜的母亲
en: How I lied to my poor mother.

zh: 我跟她说 这里情况不太糟糕 因为我们有很多的好弟兄
en: I told her it wasn't so bad out here because there was always a lot of us together.
