zh: 要不我也是教授太太了
en: Perhaps I'd be the wife of a professor now...

zh: 而不是身边这个变戏法的
是啊 我就是个变戏法的 怎么了
en: That's right, I am a conjurer!

zh: 现在他又开始 -尽弄些愚蠢的戏法
en: We're in for more of his stupid stunts!

zh: 拉斯教授 我给您表演个小魔术怎么样
en: Would you deny the professor a display of my art?

zh: 如您准许 我会从您的鼻子里拿出几个鸡蛋
en: With your permission... I'll pull a few eggs from under your nose.

zh: 您看 我的手可是空的
en: As you can see... I have nothing... In my hand!

zh: 一个鸡蛋 还不错吧
en: Here, take it, please! There's something to be proud of.

zh: 注意 教授 注意
怎么样 好么 您拿着吧
亲爱的 把小箱子递给我
en: Honey, hand me my small case.

zh: 你已经笨得不可救药了

en: Why did you bring the postcards?

zh: 我们每天晚上都卖这些

en: As long as I've a penny to my name, they will not be sold!

zh: 谁知道呢 那你就留着吧
en: Well, you never know! We'd better keep them.
" You may not see it all at once"
" But whatever it is, it's there "

zh: 一个眼神就能释放许多火花
en: " A little glance exchange " " Can you indulge in "

zh: 要注意啊 小心那些猛兽
en: " But always keep in mind: " " Beware of the predator! "

zh: 没文化的混蛋 你没资格这么说
en: Uneducated pack? You're a fine one to talk!
You need a shave, just look at you!

zh: 看你的样子 谁会向你买卡片
en: Who'd buy a postcard from you?

zh: 你现在可不在学校里了
en: You're not at the college now.

zh: 你说外面那些人没文化
en: And anyway, what's the idea of calling them...
We make a living off them.

zh: 我们靠他们为生 靠他们
en: We make a living off them... We live.

zh: 如果你不喜欢 就走人
en: If you don't like it, go.

zh: 是的 我会走的 会走的 我再也受不了了
en: Yes, I'll go. I'll go. I'll go.

zh: 我宁愿像条狗一样死去
en: I can't stand it anymore! I'd rather die like a dog than lead this life another day.

zh: 快点 还有还有烫发器
教授 你今天怎么样
en: Well, Professor, how are we today?

zh: 来根雪茄 苏门答腊包装的哈瓦那雪茄
en: Care for a cigar? Havana with a Sumatra wrapper?

zh: 我们的经理看来今天兴致很高啊
en: Our manager appears to be in high spirits.

zh: 我有很多原因高兴 你也会高兴的
en: I have every reason to be! You should be pleased too.
You're going to be my top attraction!

zh: 你丈夫就是大明星 给
en: Your husband's a big star. Here...

zh: 一份合同 电报确认的 在哪里呢
en: A contract, confirmed by cable. And where?

zh: -是的 我们要回你的家乡了
en: - Yes! We're returning to your hometown.

zh: 隆重宣传 伊曼努尔·拉斯教授
en: We'll hang large posters: Professor Immanuel Rath!
Never! I'll never go back to that city!
I will not change my mind.
For five years you've lived off this woman.

zh: 现在呢 该你赚点钱的时候了
en: And now... When you finally can earn a few cents...

zh: 教授你去说 我不去
en: Herr Professor says: No, I won't go!
- Leave him alone! - No! - He will go.

zh: 我们明天早上出发 就这么定了
en: We're leaving early tomorrow. That's final.

zh: 不 我绝不回去 绝不

en: You can ask anything of me...
- Don't get all worked up! - No!
Good day, Herr Director! Hello, Herr Director!

zh: -早上好 经理 -终于又见到您啦

en: I never thought I'd ever crawl back into this hole.

zh: -还能回到这个老窝 -窝 我的老窝
我老婆这5年来可一点也没变
en: She has not changed in the last five years, my wife!

zh: 你可一点也没瘦啊 经理
en: You haven't lost any weight, Herr Director!

zh: -为什么要瘦 生意好着呢
en: - Why should I... - Business is good!
Better now, but the last few days...

zh: 我却有点麻烦事 真倒霉
但希望最好10年里都别再见到你了
en: But hopefully not for the next ten years!

zh: 你的小店哪能配得上 我这种水平
en: This dump is good for catching fish, not for my class act.

zh: 就1周 那家伙几乎让我破产
en: One week more, and the guy would have bankrupted me.

zh: 这破地方还能有这些帅哥啊
en: So many handsome guys here in one spot?
Don't pile the bags in a heap.
How should one unpack? It's unbelievable!

zh: 把衣服挂进去 都掉地上了
en: - Take out the costumes. - Everything on the earth! - Nice.
What do you know about love? Do not move!

zh: 女孩们 嘿 女孩们

en: Once on stage and not a...

zh: 这得花我的钱 小姐
en: This costs me money, ladies, it costs me money!
Had I hired a piping oil sardine...
Allow me to introduce myself. Mazeppa.

zh: 汉斯·阿德波特·马兹帕 名字有点长

en: - And, I'm staying on! For you!

zh: 我就是这样的 说做就做
en: That's the kind of guy I am, a man of action!

zh: 您还有大把时间 对吧
请回家吧 票都卖完了 先生们
en: Please, go home quietly. It's sold out.

zh: 一个眼神就能释放许多火花
en: " A little glance exchange can you indulge in "

zh: 今天晚上对你整个职业生涯都至关重要
en: Tonight is crucial... For your whole career.

zh: 如果一切顺利 你就会成为一个成功的男人
en: If all goes well... You'll be a made man.

zh: 伦敦的阿尔罕布拉宫 刷子
-别说了 他会成自大狂的
en: Stop it! It'll go to his head.

zh: 我们还一直窝在"蓝天使"

en: - What can you be, then? - Stop squawking!

zh: 他的假鼻子呢 不是一直在你手里
en: - Nose? The nose! You had it!

zh: 在我手里 在你那儿了
en: I had it? You had it, you mean!
I know exactly how you feel.

zh: 20年前我刚成为明星时我和你一样激动紧张
en: I was just as excited twenty years ago with my first success.
Couldn't you shut up for couple of minutes, yes? Chairs!

zh: 来几把椅子 副市长来了
en: Chairs! Even the mayor is here!

zh: 副市长 我得出去看看
en: The mayor? This I have to see!

zh: 票都卖完了 坐得满满的
en: The house is sold out! Everybody's here!

zh: 大家都来了 你的同事 你的学生 所有人
en: You'll see, your colleagues, your students!

zh: 好多人 别担心 教授
en: Everyone! What a crowd! Don't get nervous, Herr Professor!

zh: 他说得很对 别担心
en: He is quite right! Just stay calm!

zh: 你别紧张 向我学着点
en: Don't let it get to you! Take example from me!

zh: 我只要看见美女 就不会错过
en: Whenever I spy a beautiful dame, I move right in!

zh: 你怎么了 怎么拉长脸
en: What's the matter? Why the long face?

zh: 总是这样 我稍微有点好情绪 你就跟个滑稽演员似的在这儿干坐着
en: Every time I have some fun, you sit there moping.

zh: 这儿怎么了 气氛有点沉重啊
en: What's going on here? Stormy weather?

zh: 在外人面前秀恩爱吗 请允许我自我介绍
en: Happens in the best families! Allow me to introduce myself.

zh: 我叫汉斯·阿德波特·马兹帕
你坐这儿等什么 去做你的杂耍啊
en: What are you waiting for? Go do your slapstick show!
What's up with the old guy?

zh: 亲爱的同事 来点香槟如何
en: Well, Herr colleague... A little strong one, what?

zh: 那个年轻人说得不全对
en: The young one is not quite right.

zh: 天呐 你在这儿做什么
你怎么了 出什么事了么
en: What is it? What's the matter?
What's up with you? Have you gone crazy?
You can't back out on me a minute before showtime!
You don't want to go on?

zh: 我听错了么 你不想演了
en: What do I hear? He won't go on?

zh: 完事了 上台去 快去
en: - Get on stage! - Move it, man!

zh: 我尊敬的女士们先生们 抱歉让你们等了一会儿
en: Ladies and gentlemen... I apologize for the slight delay.

zh: 不过下一个节目会大大补偿你们的等待 现在登场的是
en: The next number will more than make up for it...
A Conjuring Act... Of truly international class.

zh: 作为我们表演的一部分
en: As a special part of our performance...
It is my pleasure to introduce to you... As a very special attraction...

zh: 由于他长期在教育领域取得的杰出成就
en: For his long and remarkable pedagogical achievements...

zh: 在本地高级中学取得的杰出教育成就
en: Pedagogical achievements at the local college.
Out with the professor! Send in the Professor!

zh: 看来 女士们先生们 我无需多讲了
en: I can see, ladies and gentlemen, I need say no more.

zh: 我也不考验你们的耐心了
en: I won't test your patience any longer.

zh: 请欢迎我们可爱的伊曼努尔·拉斯教授
en: Please welcome our beloved... Professor Immanuel Rath!

zh: -小心 别毁了我的整场演出
en: Watch it! Or you'll completely ruin my act! Go!

zh: 女士们先生们 荣我来介绍
en: Ladies and gentlemen... May I introduce...

zh: 奥古斯特 我的助理魔术师
音乐起 尊敬的女士们先生们
如你们所见 我这儿没有任何道具
en: As you can see, I work without props...

zh: 就是两只手 十个手指
en: Just my two hands and my ten fingers.
What you see here, ladies and gentlemen...

zh: 最普通的英国产的大礼帽
没有夹层 没有暗门 没有任何机关
en: There's no double bottom... No secret opening, no trap door.

zh: 这顶礼帽 女士们先生们
en: This top hat, ladies and gentlemen... I shall now place...

zh: 现在我把它戴到奥古斯特的头上
en: On the head of my August...
And will make so bold as to produce...
A live dove... Before your very eyes!

zh: 女士们先生们 我知道你们都在想
en: Ladies and gentlemen... I know you're all thinking...

zh: 我已经把鸽子放到帽子里了
en: The magician has already set the dove in the hat.

zh: 你们错了 看 空的
en: You are quite mistaken. Please! Empty!

zh: 我还有更多证明办法 一把飞刀
en: If I may, here's more proof. A dagger!
Ladies and gentlemen, please, don't be alarmed...

zh: 当您看到我右手的这把左轮手枪
en: By the sight of this revolver in my right hand!

zh: 现在奥古斯特的鸟飞走了
en: And now my August is no bird-brained anymore!
This is an outrage! Call the police!

zh: 魔术师先生 我的鸡蛋也没了
en: Herr Director... I've run out of eggs!
Could you conjure up a few eggs for me?

zh: 当然 先生 我很乐意变一把
en: Of course, Herr Director, with great pleasure.
Ladies and gentlemen... I'll permit myself to produce some eggs...

zh: 请允许我从奥古斯特的鼻子下变出些鸡蛋来
en: From the nose of my August...
I mean, you were a Professor!

zh: 尊敬的女士们先生们 我猜你们以为
en: Ladies and gentlemen, I know you're convinced...

zh: 现在奥古斯特帽子底下就有鸡蛋
en: My August already has the eggs under his top hat. Far from it!

zh: 马上 女士们先生们
en: Where are the eggs? Right away, ladies and gentlemen, right away...

zh: 你怎么不咕咕叫 老家伙 一只真正的小鸡蛋
en: Where's your cock-a-doodle-doo, man? A genuine... Hen's egg.

zh: 下更多的蛋 下更多的蛋
en: Lay more eggs! Lay more eggs! Lay more eggs!

zh: 如果你再不咕咕叫 我就打死你
en: If you don't crow, I'll kill you!

zh: 再来一次 一 二 三
一只蛋 一只真正的小鸡蛋 请看
en: Three! An egg... An authentic, genuine hen's egg!

zh: 咕咕叫 快咕咕叫 咕咕叫

en: Man, if you don't crow this time, I'll kill you!

zh: 我就杀了你 快咕咕叫
你想怎么样 我什么都没干
en: What is it? I haven't done anything yet!
What do you want from me?
Help it out a little bit here!

zh: 我真不明白 你可是个聪明的
en: I don't get it, an educated man like you...

zh: 我们向本市的人民捐赠这座 象征和平与繁荣的纪念碑
en: "To the people of this city we donate this monument; 'Peace and Prosperity'."

zh: 我没事了，你是我永远的朋友
en: "I'm cured. You're my friend for life."

zh: 我们回家去，就会暖和了
en: "We'll go home and get warmed up."

zh: 只是夫人派人去送她的行李，先生
en: "Only that your wife sent for her baggage, sir."

zh: 让他进来，他是我的客人！
我可以再次送你回家吗？
清醒的黎明唤醒一个不同的人
en: The sober dawn awakens a different man.
"Whoever he is, get rid of him !"
"-- and then he brought me home in his car."

zh: 回家吧，我将给你一个很好的舞会
en: "Come on home, I'll give you a swell party."

zh: 她有点发烧，需要仔细观察
en: "She has a fever and needs careful attention."

zh: 决定帮助这女孩，他去工作
en: Determined to help the girl, he found work.

zh: 除非在明天上午以前支付

en: Unless paid by tomorrow morning, we shall take possession.
you're never here when he calls."

zh: 扮演绅士没有百万富翁难，但他在尽力
en: "To play the part of a gentleman without the millionaire was difficult, but he did his best."

zh: 维也纳医生治疗失明者
en: VIENNA DOCTOR HAS CURE FOR BLINDNESS

zh: 在全世界作了数千次流动治疗
en: Thousands journey from all parts of the world.

zh: 外科医生奇迹般的工作使医学界震惊
en: Miraculous Work Of Surgeon Astounds Medical Profession
Then I'll be able to see you."

zh: 不要担心，明早我第一件事就是把房租付了
en: "Now don't worry, I'll pay it the first thing in the morning."

zh: 不会再有机会让你迟到了！
你想搞些来得快的钱吗？
en: "Do you want to make some easy money ?"

zh: 记住，事后我们五五分成 此外你保证不能打伤我
en: "Remember, we split fifty-fifty; and you promise you won't hurt me."
"Be careful, the boss might hear us."

zh: 快离开镇子，警察正在追捕你
en: TELEGRAM EDDIE MASON MAIN STREET ARENA GET OUT OF TOWN THE COPS ARE AFTER YOU
"Do you want to fight for a fifty dollar purse ?"

zh: 胜者将获得全部奖金50美元
这是我幸运的兔子脚(吉祥物)
我们打假拳吧，这样钱来得轻松些，我们五五分
en: "Let's take it easy and we'll split fifty-fifty."

zh: 仍希望为女孩拿到钱，他在城市徘徊
en: Still hoping to get money for the girl, he wandered the city.

zh: 不要为女孩担心，我会照顾她
en: "Now don't worry about the girl, I'll take care of her."
"He has been robbed, search that man !"
"Tell him you gave me that money."

zh: 没有什么，只是我以为他回来了
en: "Nothing, only I thought he had returned."

zh: 我是冯·凯斯滕夫人 请您别起身
en: I'm Miss von Kesten. Don't get up, Your Excellency.
I'll take a seat too. Please.

zh: 我不得不告诉你 校长非常抱歉 她现在身体不适
en: I have to inform you that the headmistress is terribly sorry, but she is indisposed.

zh: 校长很乐意亲自欢迎你的
en: The headmistress would have loved to welcome you herself.
-She is asking to please forgive her.

zh: 请告诉校长 我也感到很遗憾
en: Let the headmistress know that I regret it as well.

zh: 我想来介绍一下我的小侄女
en: I would have loved to introduce our little niece myself.

zh: 玛努薇拉 来行个礼

en: Well, you are pretty big for 14.

zh: 她现在的教育背景怎样？
她原本可以受到很好的教育
en: Her education to date leaves much to be desired.

zh: 我的妹夫当然是个好人
en: My brother-in-law is certainly a good man...

zh: 可你知道军官是怎么个样子
en: But you know what those army officers are like.

zh: 他们不懂教育年轻女孩
en: They have no idea how to educate a young girl.

zh: 不幸的是 我可怜的妹妹去世得太早
en: My poor sister passed too soon.

zh: 好了好了 孩子 流几滴眼泪没什么坏处
en: There, there, now. There's no harm in a few tears.

zh: 只要你在这里感觉舒服一点 一切都会过去的
en: It will pass as soon as you feel more comfortable here.
You're not allowed to go up.

zh: - 下来吧 那是不允许的
我是马尔加·冯·拉索 我负责照顾你
en: My name is Margo von Rasso. I will look after you.

zh: 努力学习 遵守纪律 争取拿个好文凭
en: Work hard and do as you're told, so you bring home a good report card.

zh: 不要让我为你的将来白操心
en: I don't want you to spoil my plans for your future.
Well, then give me a kiss.

zh: - 再见 冯·凯斯滕女士
谢谢您将要为这孩子做的一切
en: And thank you for everything you'll do for this girl.

zh: 主楼梯是专供校长和来宾的
en: The big staircase is only for the headmistress and guests.

zh: 首先 我们去领你的制服
en: Let's first try on your uniform.

zh: 服装部的夫人在等着你呢 就在四楼
en: The wardrobe mistress is expecting you. It's on top, on the fourth floor.

zh: 别的事情我到时候会告诉你的
- 但是你也得为我做点事
en: -But you have to do things for me too.

zh: 早上你得把洗脸水端到我房间来
en: In the morning, you'll bring me water for washing.

zh: 哈 那只是七年级小孩的班
en: That's only the seventh graders, the little ones.
Ana' everyone shouts As loud as he can
When do we get something to eat?

zh: - 我是奥达·冯·奥登斯雷本
我是芭芭拉·冯·贝肯多夫
- 我叫伊尔莎·冯·特赖奇克
你知道你住哪间宿舍吗？
en: Do you know what dorm you're in?

zh: 马尔加说我住冯·伯恩伯格夫人的宿舍
en: -Marga says I'm in Miss von Bernburg's. -Wow!

zh: 因为所有的女孩都对伯恩伯格夫人一见钟情
en: Almost all the girls here have a crush on Miss von Bernburg.
When I finally don't have to listen to that anymore.

zh: "伊尔莎 我多么嫉妒你啊！"
"告诉我 她晚上真的吻你吗？"
en: "Tell me, is it true that she kisses you at night?"

zh: 我已经换了好多位女教师了 真是疯狂
en: I've had lots of governesses. Crazy ones.

zh: 你知道 她可是相当古怪

en: You never know exactly how to take her.

zh: 前一刻她还严肃地盯着你
en: First she throws you a terrible look.

zh: 突然一下 又变得那么和蔼
en: Then, all of a sudden, she is awfully nice.

zh: 她真奇怪 那位伯恩伯格夫人
en: She's almost a bit creepy, that Bernburg.

zh: 伊尔莎 你不应该只称她伯恩伯格
en: Ilse, you're not supposed to just call her Bernburg.

zh: 你还是庆幸我没有叫她"可爱的"吧
en: I'll be glad to call her "The Golden One."

zh: 玛努薇拉 你去哪儿了？
en: Manuela, where are you? Come already.
There you are. Come on in.

zh: 那么你就是124号 来 把衣服脱了
en: So you're No. 124. Come on, get undressed.

zh: - 你要把我衣服放哪儿去？
en: -What are you doing with my clothes?

zh: 要是你表现得好 五个星期后你会有一天外出的机会
en: In five weeks, if you're good, you'll have a day out and get it back.

zh: 到时候你就能取回衣服了 现在到这边来 坐在这张椅子上
en: Now come over here. Come here, sit in this chair.

zh: 噢 拜托 别这样
这是规矩 头发得扎紧
en: It's the rules. The hair must be tight.

zh: 不久你就会忽略的 跟我来 把你的衣服穿上
en: Soon you won't feel them. Now come on. Let's get the dress.

zh: 太长了 我们得用针别住
en: It's too long. We have to pin it up.
But someone has worn this before.

zh: 当然 不然你认为呢？

en: What were you thinking, everyone gets a new outfit?

zh: 太不划算了 冯·凯斯滕夫人说的
en: That's not economical. Miss von Kesten would be mad.
We don't allow that kind of luxury.

zh: 当有学生离开学校 她就会把衣服传给下一个
en: When a girl leaves, her dress is handed down.

zh: 看 这个是什么意思？
v. B." - 伊丽莎白·冯·伯恩伯格
之前穿这件衣服的女孩
en: The girl who wore the dress before...

zh: 一定很喜欢冯·伯恩伯格老师
en: She must have also had a crush on Miss von Bernburg.

zh: 你的头发要弄整洁些 所有东西都别好了 给你
en: Your hair needs to be neater. Everything pinned in. There you go.

zh: 玛努薇拉 我要求绝对服从纪律
你离开宿舍前得向我报告
en: You must notify me before leaving the dormitory.

zh: 在换衣服的时候说话是被严厉禁止的
en: Chatting while changing is strictly forbidden.

zh: 钥匙在那儿 打开看看吧
en: The key is in the lock. Open it up.

zh: 这是不允许的 她们替你保管
en: It's not allowed. They keep it for you.

zh: 玛努薇拉 到这边来
米娅贴了很多亨利·波滕的照片
en: Mia put up pictures of Henny Porten.

zh: 但我收集汉斯·阿尔伯斯的

en: What do you call that again?

zh: 他们都说所有电影明星都有什么来着？
en: What do you call what all the movie stars have?

zh: 巧克力？ 你得交出来
- 噢 马尔加 别这样！
en: -My God, Margo, don't be like that!

zh: 不关你的事 我来负责新来的这个女孩
en: That's none of your business! I'm in charge. She's my new student.
Can I help you with anything?
What kind of book is that?
I took it from my uncle's library for the trip.

zh: - 是的 冯·凯斯滕夫人
分数我可都记在这上面了
en: This is where I enter my good and bad marks.

zh: 要是在你橱柜里发现了被禁的东西 你就会被记过
en: If I ever find something forbidden in your closet, then you get a bad mark.

zh: 如果记过五次以上 四个星期后 你就不能出游
en: And if you have more than five bad marks in four weeks, you won't get your day out.

zh: 你得降低开销 花费太多了
en: We have to spend less money. The expenses are much too high.

zh: 但是 校长 我们尽力了
en: But, Headmistress, we do our best.

zh: 孩子们已经在抱怨肚子饿了
en: The children are already going hungry.

zh: 我们普鲁士人不懂得饥饿
若能如愿 也将成为士兵的母亲！
en: And if God is willing, soon again mothers of soldiers.

zh: 她们需要的是纪律 而不是奢侈生活！
en: What we need is discipline and order, not a life of luxury.

zh: 说的是啊 校长 说的是
en: So very true, Headmistress, so very true.
Poverty is not sin, poverty ennobles.

zh: 它让人高贵 这才是普鲁士精神曾经的真谛
en: This is the true meaning of Prussianism as it once was.

zh: 让别人去填饱肚子吧 他们会后悔的
en: Let the others splurge. They'll regret it.
My favorite food is stuffed roast hare.

zh: 我们的厨子用这么厚一层填料做咖啡蛋糕
en: And afterwards, our cook makes a coffee cake this thick.

zh: 要是有生奶油配的小饼就更好了
en: Chocolate-covered cream cake with with extra cream is much better.

zh: 通过纪律和挨饿 纪律和挨饿...
en: Through discipline and hunger. Hunger and discipline.

zh: 我们才能重返光荣 否则根本不可能！
en: This will make us great again. Or not at all!

zh: 我妈妈来信说他们一直在农场宰肉
en: My mom wrote that they've been slaughtering.

zh: 干嘛不准她给我寄条火腿呢？
en: So why can't send my mom a whole ham?
No one shall be better off than the other.

zh: - 但要是我妈妈寄了一整条火腿呢？
en: -If my mom sends a whole ham?

zh: - 许多家庭的日子再也不好过了

en: But I would share my ham with the others.
I don't want it all for myself.

zh: 为什么把这么多黄油都刮掉？
en: Why are you scraping so much butter off?

zh: 别怪我 五十个女孩只能分半镑黄油了
en: Don't blame me. There's only half a pound for 50 girls.
The girls are as meek as lambs.

zh: 这里一切都是纪律和命令
en: Because of all the order and discipline here.

zh: 是的 我们应该靠饥饿长大
en: Yes, yes, we are supposed to be raised on hunger.

zh: 那是小迈恩哈迪斯 校长
我们来唱《握住我手》的第一节
en: We will now sing the first verse of the hymn.
My wish is not to walk alone
Wherever You will go and stay

zh: 我要你们诚心抱起双手 忏悔你们的罪孽
en: I ask you to raise your heads and hands, to repent your sins.

zh: 承认自己的过错 并祈求圣父的宽恕
en: Acknowledge the errors of your ways, and beg forgiveness of your Father in Heaven.
I have a few further remarks.

zh: 我听说某些纪律没人服从
en: Apparently you have broken several rules.

zh: 有信件没有经过审查就寄出去了
en: I heard that letters are being sent without prior approval.

zh: 里面说了一些对学校的缺乏根据的抱怨
en: Letters that contain unfounded complaints about the school.

zh: 会有人告诉我进一步消息的
en: My staff is required to notify me of such disobedience immediately.

zh: 第一位冒犯的人将受到严厉惩罚
en: The first culprit will be severely punished.

zh: 外出将被取消 同时禁止穿制服
en: Days out will be canceled and wearing uniform forbidden.

zh: 穿过镇上的时候只能穿自己的衣服
en: She will march the streets in her own clothes.

zh: 想象一下她光着身子的样子吧
我可不会送我的孩子去寄宿学校 你会吗？
en: I won't send my children to boarding school. You?
I have to think about it.
Take a look at what Marie can do. Come here, Marie!

zh: 过来 玛利亚 看吧！

en: -You just want to laugh at me.

zh: 深呼吸一口 玛利亚

en: What's all this noise? Hurry up!

zh: 我们在谈论玛努薇拉的母亲 她很久以前就去世了
en: We were talking about Manuela's mom. She died a long time ago.
And she just told me about it.
Come on now. Is that so terrible?

zh: 不要告诉自己说这里很糟糕
en: Don't tell yourself that it's awful here.

zh: 你对这里还很陌生 还不认识其他女孩
en: You haven't gotten used to it yet. You don't know the other girls.

zh: 但你不能总想着自己不开心
en: But you can't tell yourself that you'll be unhappy here.

zh: 你必须告诉自己你会在这里过得很开心
en: You have to tell yourself that you'll be very happy here.

zh: 每晚祈祷上帝 请他帮助你 你能答应我吗？
en: And you have to pray to God every night to ask him for his help.

zh: 瞧啊 你是个多么通情达理的孩子
en: See? You're a pretty reasonable girl.
I'll be back to say good night.

zh: 那 你们都准备好了吗？
en: -So? Are you all ready to sleep?

zh: - 是的 冯·伯恩伯格夫人
看 玛努薇拉 下一个就到我了
嘿 尤茜·布莱切狂爱我 听...
en: Hey, listen. Little Josi Bleicher has a crush on me.

zh: "让我伴随着你 挨着你坐在桌边"
en: "Let me be with you and sit with you at the table.
How long do you want me to wait?

zh: 我对你们这些蠢游戏没兴趣
en: I don't want to know about your silly games.

zh: 扔到篓子里去 一次性记清楚：
en: Throw that away and remember once and for all:

zh: 写纸条是被严令禁止的
- 冯·伯恩伯格夫人真是太好了
en: -That was so nice of Miss von Bernburg.
She's just like that. So nice.

zh: 我尝试着成为孩子们的朋友
en: I want to be a friend to the girls.

zh: 我们得唤起孩子们的雄心
en: We must awaken the children's ambition in spiritual matters.

zh: 说得太对了 冯·艾登斯夫人
- 我们要成为孩子们的家
en: -We must be a home for the children.

zh: 我们是一个机构 不存在亲密关系一说
en: We are a facility. There is no room for affinities.

zh: 纪律才是最重要的东西
德意志的典范必须得到栽培
en: The German classics must be cultivated.

zh: 冯·伯恩伯格夫人 我注意到 你几乎不给她们差评
en: Miss von Bernburg, I have long noticed that you don't give very many bad marks.
I don't need to punish the children.
They listen to me and obey.

zh: 那玛努薇拉·冯·迈恩哈迪斯呢？
嗯... 她表现不太好 但她会改变的
en: Yes, she is having trouble learning.

zh: 我觉得她很有魅力 真的
en: But that will change. I find the child charming. Really.
And she learns very well in my class.

zh: 玛努薇拉像个淑女 她在我这里学习很优秀
en: Manuela is so ladylike. She learns excellently with me.

zh: 她比别的女孩准备功课认真得多
en: She's always well prepared for my lessons too. Better than the rest.

zh: 目前为止 虽然我自己说 我的教学成果一直很不错
en: So far, although I say it myself the results of my teachings have always been good.

zh: 但是请不要越出你的职权范围
en: But please don't try to put yourself above your colleagues.

zh: 但是孩子们必须信任我们
"雅各布和他的岳父拉班到了一片陌生的土地... ...他想和妻子瑞秋、莉以及孩子们回到迦南"
en: "Jacob was in a strange land with his father-in-law, Laban... and wanted to return to Canaan with his wife Rachel and Lea and his children."
Who will tell me his story?

zh: "雅各布抬起目光一看 伊索来了"
en: And Jacob lifted up his eyes and behold, Esau came.

zh: 在他诸多妻子当中 最美的是瑞秋
en: Then he took his many wives.

zh: 她生下了小约瑟夫和本杰明..."
en: And the most beautiful, that was Rachel with the little Joseph and the little Benjamin.
-He put her all the way in back.

zh: 因为他感到恐惧 他之前给了伊索一些红汤
en: Because he was afraid! He had eaten Esau's lentil dish once.
And he didn't know if he was still mad.

zh: 还有他放在前面的那只绵羊
en: Ilse. And the male sheep he put all the way in front.

zh: 伊索走近来 温暖地拥抱他
en: Esau then approached and was so nice and warmly embraced him.
Jacob dared to come forward and was very happy.

zh: 很美的故事 讲得不错 坐下吧
en: That was a beautiful story. Very good. Take your seat.

zh: 看看咱们今天的功课如何了 埃德嘉 第一节
en: How is our work for today? Edelgard, first verse.

zh: "噢 我有一千条舌头和一千张嘴
en: "Oh, that I had a thousand tongues and a thousand mouths.

zh: 那我会用它们来唱出我心深处
en: Then would I use them all to sing from the depths of my heart.

zh: 永恒歌颂上帝为我做的一切"
en: Praises for all eternity of what God has done for me."

zh: 埃德嘉 这可真糟糕
我真的学得很好了 可是在冯·伯恩伯格夫人面前
en: I really learned it well, but in front of Miss von Bernburg,

zh: 玛努薇拉 冯·伯恩伯格夫人想见你
en: Manuela, Miss von Bernburg asked to see you.
What does she want from me?

zh: 我对玛努薇拉感到抱歉
en: I feel sorry for Miss Manuela.

zh: 她晚上经常大哭 枕头总是湿透了
en: She must cry a lot at night. Her pillow is always wet.
Now what? I won't be able to say a word.

zh: 告诉我 你没一件新衣服么？
en: Tell me. Did they not send you with new undergarments?

zh: - 你来这里之前住在什么地方？

en: -My aunt thought it would still do.

zh: 没准咱们能在哪儿找件新衬裙
en: Well, maybe we can find one for you that's still in one piece.

zh: 可能有点长 但咱们可以先拿走它
en: It might be a little too long, but we can take it in, right?

zh: 你真是个情绪化的孩子啊
en: Well, well. You are such an emotional young girl.

zh: 好好哭一场吧 坐下来
en: Have a good cry. Sit down.

zh: 我不知道我为什么会哭
en: I don't even know why I'm crying.

zh: 我只是有时候感觉要哭
en: But I have to cry sometimes.
Or... is there a reason you don't want to share with me?

zh: 我什么都相信您 可是真的很难说
en: I can share everything with you. But it's so hard to say.
I would very much like to know.

zh: 当您对我说晚安后离开
en: When you say good night to me in the evening and then leave.
And you close the door to your room.

zh: 我在黑暗中盯着那扇门
en: Then I just have to stare at the door through the darkness.
And then I have to get up and go over to you.
But I know I'm not allowed to.

zh: 我想到等我再长大些就得离开这学校
en: And when I think that I'll have to leave here when I'm older and you'll stay...

zh: - 每天晚上你也会亲吻其他女孩

en: I just love you so much.

zh: 可您总是那么遥远 我甚至不能到您房间找您谈谈
en: But you're always so far away. I can't come to your room and talk to you.

zh: - 好了 孩子 控制一下自己
别像个小女生似的 做个好同志
en: Forget that you're a little girl and be a good comrade.

zh: 你知道 我不能有例外
en: You know that I can't make any exceptions.

zh: 不然其他女孩会嫉妒的
en: The other girls would get jealous.

zh: 我常常想到你 玛努薇拉
en: I often think of you, Manuela.

zh: - 现在 你不会再哭了吧？
你想象不到 跟你们这些孩子一起过活多么棒
en: You can't imagine how wonderful it is to live for you children.

zh: - 现在赶紧下楼到她们那儿去吧
女孩们 又是个无聊的星期天了！
en: Girls! Another one of those Sundays...
I mustn't give up, says my mom.

zh: 我妈妈也在这里呆过四年
en: My mom was here too for four years.

zh: 她难道忘了这里环境多糟么？
en: Did she forget how awful it is?
-How deep do you think it is?

zh: 你可以用万有引力定律来测试啊
en: You can find out using the law of falling bodies.

zh: 你记下秒数 也就是落地的时间
en: Gosh. You count the seconds it takes for something to fall to the bottom.
And then you add the acceleration due to gravity.

zh: "亲爱的爸爸妈妈 今天又是个可怕的星期天
为什么我们在星期天反而觉得比之前更饿呢？
en: Why are we even hungrier on Sundays than on other days?

zh: 拜托 给我送点吃的吧 爱你们的女儿 伊尔莎"
en: Please send some food. Your loving daughter, Ilse."
If the headmistress finds that letter...

zh: 不会的 我会偷偷送出去
en: She won't, I'll smuggle it out.

zh: 好了 孩子们 又是个美好的周日 不是么？
en: Hello, children. Nice Sunday, isn't it?

zh: 给我看看你缝的袜子 玛丽
en: Marie, let me see your stockings.

zh: 好的 你会得到不错的分数的
en: Very good. I will give you a good mark for it.

zh: 再见 冯·凯斯滕夫人
约翰娜 拜托你偷偷把这封信送出去
en: Johanna, you have to smuggle out my letter.

zh: 别担心 伊尔莎小姐
en: But you know better, Miss Ilse.

zh: - 太谢谢你了 约翰娜！
"为了庆祝我们可敬的校长的生日"
en: EVENT PROGRAM FOR THE BIRTHDAY OF OUR REVERED HEADMISTRESS

zh: 《唐·卡洛斯》弗里德里希·席勒所著悲剧
en: DON CARLOS A TRAGEDY BY FRIEDRICH SCHILLER

zh: 我老早就坠入一场虚妄的梦里"
en: Long was I sunk in a delusive dream.

zh: "我爱过 可现在我终于醒来了"
en: I loved, but now I am at last awake."

zh: 噢 玛努薇拉 你看起来真漂亮！
等着瞧吧 今天我绝对不会忘记我的台词！
en: You'll see. Today I will not forget my lines.

zh: "... 我的放纵造成了多大的冒失啊！"
en: "To what rude boldness my indulgence leads!"

zh: "我们在阿兰胡埃斯欢快的逗留 现在已经结束了 可你的公主殿下退出了 这些欢快的场景不会比从前更快乐"
en: "Our pleasant sojourn in Aranjuez is over now, and yet Your Highness quits these joyous scenes no happier than before."

zh: 埃莉斯 我的胡子呢？
安静 现在到我们的场景了
en: Be quiet. Our scene is up now.

zh: "真的 王子的那封被拦下来的信..." "... 起不到什么作用"
en: "Truly, an intercepted letter from the prince would work with rare effect."

zh: 这封信因为地址错误被退了回来
en: This letter came back because it was insufficiently addressed.

zh: "老天在上 太让我诧异了！
en: "By heaven! I'm all amazement. Compass this.

zh: "我要向你深深鞠躬 多米尼克"
en: And I'll bow down to thee, Dominican!"

zh: "为什么我们在星期天反而觉得比之前更饿呢？"
en: "Why are we even hungrier on Sundays than on other days?"

zh: 撒谎以及偷送信件的人 不能参加演出
en: Children who lie and smuggle letters don't get to be in plays.
Fortunately, the letter did not reach its address.

zh: 你父母这要为你这个不领情的孩子伤透心
en: So your parents are spared the grief they must feel for their ungrateful child.

zh: "日后 卡洛斯离王位更近"
en: "And for the future Carlos stands nearer the throne."

zh: 不对啊 孩子 我告诉你多少次了？
en: No, child. How often do I have to tell you?

zh: 别要只是张嘴 要激烈些！
噢 你走吧 你完全没才啊 孩子
en: Go. You have no talent, child.

zh: 重复一下你经常说的那句话
en: Let me hear the line that you always get stuck on.

zh: 天啊 孩子 "现在有支笔掉下来 你要打个手势..."
en: Goodness, child! "One pen-stroke now, one motion of your hand..."

zh: "现在有支笔掉下来 你要打个手势..."
en: "One pen-stroke now, one motion of your hand..."

zh: 好吧 小埃博利 你来
- "噢 卡洛斯 你对我真残忍啊"
en: -"O Carlos, how cruelly you play with me."

zh: 在这里你得把女性魅力带入演出当中
en: You see, here you demonstrate a woman's power of seduction.

zh: 听我的 她看着他 说
en: I'll show you. She looks at him, right? Now listen.

zh: "噢 卡洛斯 你对我真残忍啊"
en: "O Carlos, how cruelly you play with me."

zh: 对不起打扰了 冯·凯斯滕夫人 可是就要开始了
en: Excuse me, Miss von Atems, but it's about to start.

zh: 我不会把你丢在这里 汉斯
en: I won't leave them, my dear Hans.

zh: 由于内部问题 多明戈的角色台词将由丽泽·冯·齐利兹朗读
en: Due to internal difficulties, the role of Domingo will be read by Liese von Zieritz.

zh: "我们在阿兰胡埃斯欢快的逗留 现在已经结束了..."
en: Our pleasant sojourn in Aranjuez is over now, and yet Your Highness quits these joyous scenes no happier than before.
You got yourself into a fine mess.

zh: 好了 事情没那么坏

en: I don't get to be in the play either, right?

zh: 去洗洗脸 下楼去吧
en: Now wash up and come downstairs.
At length the happy moment's come,
Carlos may touch this all-beloved hand.
I hear a step. What boldness!

zh: "我不起来 我要一直跪在这里"
en: I will not rise. Here will I kneel forever.

zh: "我要陶醉地躺在你的脚边 生长在你脚下这片亲爱的土地上"
en: Here will I lie enchanted at your feet and grow to the dear ground you tread on.

zh: 我的放纵造成了多大的冒失啊！"
en: To what rude boldness my indulgence leads!

zh: "你知道么 就是那女王 你的母亲" "就是你那些大胆的话所对准的人"
en: Know you, it is the queen, your mother, whom you address in such presumptuous strain?
And know that I must die!

zh: "让他们到这儿来吧 把我拖到断头台上！
en: Let them come here, and drag me to the scaffold!

zh: "天堂中像这样的美妙时刻在现实里太奢侈了"
en: A moment spent in paradise like this is not too clearly purchased by a life.
What a fine punch you've brewed!
You know what the headmistress said?

zh: "她的腿真漂亮 真漂亮啊"
冯·伯恩伯格夫人怎么说？
en: What did Miss von Bernburg say?

zh: 很奇怪 她只字未提
en: It was strange. Bernburg didn't say a single thing the whole time.

zh: 可她看着你 你没法想象 她多么死死地盯着你
en: But the way she looked at you, you can't even imagine.

zh: 现在安静一下 孩子们
en: Let's be a little quiet now, girls. A little quiet.
I was overall pretty happy with you.

zh: 玛努薇拉 你太出色了

en: For the next time, just remember:

zh: 多一点批判味道 少带点情绪
en: more declamation, less emotion. Well done.

zh: 玛努薇拉 我想告诉你
en: Manuela, I want to tell you something.

zh: 要是你努力 你能成为一名好演员
en: If you work hard, you could be a very good actress.

zh: 我真为此高兴 玛努薇拉
en: That makes me so glad, Manuela.

zh: 这是给孩子们背诵席勒作品的锻炼机会啊
en: It's a very good exercise for the children to recite Schiller.

zh: 没有什么好得过德意志的经典作品
en: There's nothing better than our German classics.

zh: 孩子们真是幸运 能够被您领导
en: The children are so lucky to be here in your charge, Headmistress.

zh: 我们用最少的资源做最多的事情
en: We do our best with the little we have.

zh: 尊敬的皇后公主殿下 诸位阁下 如此等等
en: Your Majesties, Your Highnesses, Your Excellencies, etc.

zh: 我很高兴 没有我的协助 你们同样成功 赢得了老师和来宾们的热烈掌声
en: I am happy that you managed without my assistance to garner the applause of the staff and their guests.

zh: 你们的头盔、剑和靴子都擦得一尘不染
en: Your helmets, swords and boots were polished to perfection.

zh: 其他的一切也都很顺利
en: And everything else was pretty good too.

zh: 但是还可以再紧点 再紧点 再紧点！
en: It could have just been a bit tighter, tighter, tighter.

zh: 还有 你们的演出很棒
en: But you did a very nice job.

zh: 特别是我们的唐·卡洛斯 干杯 玛努薇拉
en: Especially our Don Carlos. Cheers, Manuela!

zh: 你这家伙 煮的那锅酒可真带劲
en: Oh, you Rhine maiden... The punch you made is quite something.
Girls, I like it very much!
Shall I tell them to be quiet?

zh: 今天让她们痛快痛快吧
en: Today we let them enjoy themselves.

zh: 是啊 让她们放松一下也挺好
en: I think it's good for them to really let their hair down.

zh: - 凯斯滕夫人 你看着她们
不知怎么的 我有些惊喜 席勒的写作有时非常奔放
en: I was actually a little surprised. Schiller is sometimes rather free.

zh: 女孩们 我有话要说
en: Girls! I want to give a speech.

zh: 女孩们 我有话要说 我爱你们所有人
她给了我一件礼物 一条衬裙
en: She gave me a present. An undergarment.

zh: 她打开壁橱 给了我一条衬裙
en: She opened her closet and gave me one of her undergarments.

zh: 我应该穿着它 然后想到她
en: I'm supposed to wear it and think of her.

zh: 不 她事实上没这么说 可她一定能就是这个意思
en: No, she didn't say that, but she didn't have to, I just know.

zh: 我太开心了 现在我敢肯定
en: I'm so happy because I know for sure, she...
I don't care about anything else.

zh: 她就在那儿 她爱我
en: Yes. She is there. She loves me.

zh: 是的 每个人都应该知道这点

en: Long live our beloved Miss von Bernburg!
Long may she live, long, long...

zh: 可怜的玛努薇拉喝成那样 真是糟了
en: How awful that Manuela was so drunk.
Mon Dieu, sometimes you just have to drink.

zh: 要是我来决定 我要立刻把她赶出去
en: If I were in charge, Manuela would have to leave right away.

zh: 那样的人不配留在这里
en: Such a child does not deserve to be at our school.

zh: 说得太对了 这里不是她该呆的地方 她应该呆在...
en: You are right. This is no place for her. She belongs in...

zh: 埃德嘉 你看见玛努薇拉了么？

en: I don't understand what's going on.

zh: 我早就要你小心再小心的
en: I'd advise you to be more careful.

zh: 拜托 这可不是什么好建议
- 我亲爱的 你该不会毁了自己的前途吧？
en: -But, ma chère, you wouldn't jeopardize your prospects, would you?
Because I can't bear for her to suffer injustice!

zh: 我都没法正确思考了 头好疼
en: I can't think straight and... my head really hurts.

zh: 哈尼 我是怎么到那儿去的？
en: Hanoi, how did I get here?
No one is allowed in the hospital ward.

zh: 这学校从来没有出过这种丑事！
en: Since this school opened there hasn't been such a scandal.

zh: 你是这里有史以来最败类的人
en: You're the worst child that has ever been accepted.

zh: 要是你还小几岁 早就被扇巴掌了
en: If you were younger, you'd get spanked.

zh: 真难以置信 你表现得就像个街上的混混
en: It's inconceivable. You were acting like some urchin from the street.
You're bringing shame to the entire school!

zh: - 像你这样的人都该被诅咒
像你这样的人应被禁止进入社会
en: People like you are banned from society.

zh: 稍后会决定怎么惩罚你
en: You'll find out about your punishment later.

zh: 你清楚你对冯·伯恩伯格夫人做了什么吧
en: I'm sure you know that you sinned against Miss von Bernburg.

zh: 公主殿下今天下午要来访问
en: Her Royal Highness is coming this afternoon.

zh: 玛努薇拉必须出席 我们必须全部到齐
en: Manuela must be here. No one can be missing.

zh: 但是她不能跟别人说话
en: But she won't be allowed to talk to the others.

zh: 公主殿下总是很准时的
en: Her Royal Highness is always on time.

zh: 各位 你们听说了吗？
校长说 玛努薇拉该被诅咒
en: Headmistress said that Manuela should be cursed!

zh: - 上帝啊 可怜的玛努薇拉
马尔加 你总是对她很刻薄
en: You're always so mean to her.

zh: 你们听到校长怎么咆哮的么？
en: Did you hear the headmistress yell?

zh: - 有听到玛努薇拉的消息么？
你们怎么都这样盯着我看？
en: Why are you staring at me?

zh: 在公主来之前 我有话跟你们交代
en: I have an announcement before the princess arrives.

zh: 学校发生了一件空前叛逆的事
en: A very sad and unprecedented case of disobedience has occurred.

zh: 校长希望你们免受那个肇事者的害
en: The headmistress wanted to spare you from all contact with the culprit.

zh: 但是由于这次来访 我们破例
en: But due to the royal visit, we have to make an exception.

zh: 玛努薇拉·冯·迈恩哈迪斯会从房里放出来
en: Manuela von Meinhardis will come out of the hospital ward.
The headmistress is counting on your tact!
You are not allowed to associate with her.

zh: 谁要是跟她说话 就会被罚 明白么？
en: Whoever speaks with Manuela will be punished. Understood?

zh: 校长要我告诉你 不要跟玛努薇拉说话
en: The headmistress doesn't want you to speak with Manuela when she comes down.
That's crazy! It's never happened before.

zh: 她出来后我会跟她说话的
en: I'll speak to her when she comes down.
We should really tell the princess.
But the princess is the only one who--

zh: 我要告诉她 我不管了！
en: I'll tell her, even if they kick me out.

zh: 下午好 冯·加施纳夫人 过得怎么样？
en: Good afternoon, Miss Gaerschner, how do you do?

zh: 啊 冯·伯恩伯格夫人 你好么
en: Ah, Miss von Bernburg. How do you do?

zh: 这是我们的新英语老师 伊凡斯小姐
en: This is our new English teacher, Miss Evans, Your Highness.

zh: 我打算上楼去看看她们的见面
en: I'm going upstairs to watch the parade.

zh: 皇室成员看起来总是美得很
en: Royalty is always beautiful to see.
You have to tell her now!

zh: 多可爱的一幕呀 这么多快乐的孩子
en: It is enchanting to see so many happy children.

zh: - 是的 亲爱的 我没忘
亲爱的校长夫人 我想见见小贝肯多夫
en: Dear Headmistress, I'd like to see the young Beckendorf.

zh: 贝肯多夫小姐 你喜欢这里吗
en: You're the young Beckendorf. How do you like it here?

zh: - 是的 她叫什么名字？
- 对了 我要见见叫迈恩哈迪斯的女孩
en: -Yes, I'd like to see the Meinhardis girl.

zh: 我认识你母亲 她是位很虔诚的女性
en: I knew your mother. She was a very pious woman.

zh: 我希望你能像她一样 你看起来很苍白
en: I hope you try to be like her. You look very pale.

zh: 她没生病吧 亲爱的校长？
en: She's not sick, is she, Headmistress?

zh: - 没 绝对没有 殿下
en: -No, no, of course not, Your Highness.

zh: 真迷人 她会成为学校的骄傲
en: Very charming. She will be the pride of the school, I can tell.

zh: 亲爱的校长 我想跟您谈谈幼儿园的事
en: And, Headmistress, I would like to speak to you about the nursery school.
May I ask Her Highness upstairs?

zh: 你这大嘴巴怎么什么都不说
en: First you brag and then you say nothing.

zh: - 要是校长没站在那儿就好了

en: If I didn't have to take the princess in consideration,

zh: 我今天已经把玛努薇拉赶出去了
抱歉 校长 可我看法完全不同
en: Excuse me, Headmistress, but I see things differently.

zh: 我比您对玛努薇拉和其他孩子了解更多
en: I know Manuela and the other girls better than you.

zh: 我和她们走得很近 我爱她们
en: I'm close to the children. I love them.

zh: - 所以把我的衬裙也给了她们？
要是哪个女孩没有足够的衣服穿 我们会写信告诉她母亲
en: If the child doesn't bring enough garments, you write to the mother.

zh: 我早该料到你会公然不顾校长的命令
en: I wouldn't have expected you to break the headmistress's rules like that.

zh: 我不知道 我很担心玛努薇拉！
en: I don't know. I'm so worried about Manuela.
I'm going to tell you something, Edelgard.

zh: 你的朋友不值得你冒这么大风险
en: Your friend doesn't deserve what you're doing for her.

zh: 跟她在一起只会害了你
en: Associating with her only harms you.

zh: 你父母要是知道你和这样一个女孩交朋友 一定会很伤心的
en: Your parents would be very upset if they knew who you chose as a friend.

zh: 我真的无法解释 你还太年轻
en: I can't really explain, you're too young.

zh: 但相信我 有一天你会感谢我的
en: But believe me, you'll thank me one day.

zh: 校长 您称之为罪恶的东西 我称之为爱的精神
en: What you call sin, Headmistress, is what I call the spirit of love.
It takes on a thousand forms.

zh: 这么年轻的女孩们需要有个可以依靠的人
en: At this age especially, young girls need someone to lean on.

zh: 我会找玛努薇拉谈谈 让她摈弃那些兴奋念头
en: But I'll talk to Manuela to rid her of her exalted ideas.

zh: 冯·伯恩伯格夫人 你难道不明白 你和玛努薇拉的关系必须中断么？
en: Miss von Bernburg, don't you see that there can be no more contact between you and her?

zh: 我禁止你再跟玛努薇拉讲话
en: I forbid you to talk even one word with her!

zh: - 亲爱的冯·伯恩伯格夫人

en: Go to my room and wait for me there.

zh: 你看到玛努薇拉脸色多苍白吗？
en: Did you see how pale Manuela was?

zh: 嗯 很恐怖 她行屈膝礼时 我还以为她要晕倒了
en: Yes, terrible. And when she curtsied, I thought she'd fall.

zh: 别这么脆弱 来 坐在这里
en: Don't be so weak. Come sit down.

zh: 现在通情达理点 好么？
你对我做了什么 你也清楚
en: What you did to me, you know too.
We don't have to talk about any of that.
You're supposed to be locked up.

zh: 不是像监狱那样 只是隔离而已
en: Not like prison. Just in the isolation room.

zh: 玛努薇拉 不要觉得不公平 这惩罚够温和了
en: Manuela, don't be unfair. The punishment is fairly mild.
Legally they were supposed to expel you.

zh: 校长一直觉得这样做最好
en: The headmistress thought about it for a long time.

zh: 但是这一回 宽恕占了上风
en: But this once, mercy shall prevail.

zh: 冯·伯恩伯格夫人 我还能见您么？
en: Miss von Bernburg, will I be allowed to visit you?

zh: 可是 您不会抛下我吧？
en: But... But you won't leave me!
It's better for you that way.
I'm supposed to never see you again?
I won't be able to live like that.

zh: 玛努薇拉 你这是说什么话？
en: But, Manuela... what sort of talk is that?

zh: 你不该想那些东西 更别说讲出来了
en: You shouldn't think such things, let alone speak them.

zh: 你必须恢复理智 无论如何你都得被治好
en: You must be brought to your senses. You must be cured, whatever it takes.

zh: 再呆在这里也没什么意义了
en: There's no point in you staying any longer.

zh: 再见 亲爱的冯·伯恩伯格夫人
冯·伯恩伯格夫人 我得跟你谈谈
en: Miss von Bernburg. I have to speak with you.

zh: - 尽管我禁止 但你还是找玛努薇拉说了话
en: -You spoke with Manuela against my orders.

zh: 我想 我维护了您的权威
en: I am sure to have acted in your interest.

zh: 要是玛努薇拉出了什么事
en: Girls, what if Manuela harms herself?

zh: 校长可会相当不痛快了
en: That could be a real problem for the headmistress.

zh: 玛努薇拉跟你们在一起吗？
- 我们必须帮助玛努薇拉！
这反叛精神就是从你这获得的
en: This rebellious spirit comes from you.

zh: 我可不允许有什么革命的想法！
en: I will not permit revolutionary ideas.
Not while I'm in charge here!

zh: 我不会放不下我的岗位 我知道我不能再留在这里
en: I don't care about my job. I know I can't stay.

zh: 我不能站在一旁看着孩子们成为被恐吓的无助的动物
en: I can't stand to watch how you turn these children into scared, helpless creatures.

zh: 你们走这条路 我们走这边
en: You go this way, I'll go the other way.

zh: 天呐 你见到玛努薇拉了吗？
en: Oh, my God. Did you see Manuela?

zh: 我们天堂里的圣父啊 您的名字如此神圣
en: Our Father, who art in heaven... hallowed be thy name.

zh: 您的意志将像再天堂一般抵达人间
en: Thy will be done, on earth as it is in heaven.

zh: 请赐予我们每日的面包 并原谅我们的罪过 正如我们原谅那些侵害我们的人一样
en: Give us this day our daily bread... and forgive us our trespasses, as we forgive those who trespass against us.

zh: 不要将我们带往诱惑 而将我们从魔鬼身边带走
en: Lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil.

zh: 您拥有王国 权力和荣耀 永远如此
en: For thine is the kingdom, the power... and the glory... forever and ever.

zh: - 孩子们都在这儿干什么？
我们必须感谢上帝啊 校长
孩子们避免了一场悲剧 否则我们会后悔一辈子的
en: The girls have prevented a tragedy that we would have had to bear for the rest of our lives.

zh: 回来，我给你布置个任务。 Come back here, I'll give you an assignment.
en: Come back here, I'll give you an assignment.

zh: 这将是你最后一次和收银员面谈！ It'll be your last interview with the cashier!
en: It'll be your last interview with the cashier!

zh: 康罗伊先生。 给我讲讲斯凯勒的故事，好吗？
Mr. Conroy. Give me a crack at that Schuyler story, will you?
en: Give me a crack at that Schuyler story, will you?

zh: 斯图是唯一一个有头脑的人。 Stew's the only man with brains enough for this.
en: Stew's the only man with brains enough for this.

zh: -还没有。 - Scram! Did you find Stew?
-你看了吗？ -我找的第一个地方。 - Did you look in
我的天，那家伙在哪儿？ 去把他挖出来。 For crying out loud, where is that guy?
en: For crying out loud, where is that guy?

zh: 它在那里... ... 为我祈祷，加拉格尔，为我祈祷。
There it is... Pray for me, Gallagher, pray for me.
en: Pray for me, Gallagher, pray for me.

zh: - Hold everything. - Stew, your hands are shaking.
-你又喝酒了。 -别这样。 来吧。
-他们来了。 -老板嗓子越来越哑了。
- Here they come. - The boss is getting hoarse.
第三个。 And the third one.
加拉格尔! 我做到了！ Gallagher!
听着，我不干了。 Look, I quit.
你总是找我的茬。 You're always picking on me.
花了三个小时才把这些小玩意放进洞里... ... 你一分钟就搞砸了。
en: It took three hours to get those little gadgets in those holes and you screw it up in a minute.

zh: and you screw it up in a minute. Look.
这可不像看上去那么简单，对吧？ It's not as easy as it looks, is it?
en: It's not as easy as it look, isn't it?

zh: 难怪你这么疯狂。 No wonder you're batty.
只是为了打破单调吗？ Just to sort of break the monotony?
en: Just to sort of break the monotony?

zh: 和我在一起，你永远可以做生意。 With me, you can always do business.
en: With me, you can always do business.

zh: 你知道在客厅里该做什么吗？ You know what to do in a drawing room?
en: You know what to do in a drawing room?

zh: 是的,是的。 好吧,好吧。
听着，我们有个线索。 Now listen, we've got a tip.
en: Now listen, we've got a tip.

zh: 斯凯勒夫妇终于和那个女合唱团达成了协议。 The Schuylers finally made a deal with that chorus dame.
en: The Schuylers finally made a deal with that chorus dame.

zh: -格洛丽亚·戈登？ -是啊，小歌洛莉亚。
人类收银机。 她看上了斯凯勒的孩子。 The human cash register.
Got her hooks in the Schuyler kid.
en: Got her hooks in the Schuyler kid.

zh: -今年第一次正确。 -现在才四月。 - Right for the first time this year.
en: - Right for the first time this year.

zh: 我足不出办公室就能写那篇报道。 I can write that story without leaving the office.
en: I can write that story without leaving the office.

zh: 让我们被告上诽谤罪的官司。 这也不是第一次了。 And get us into a million
en: And get us into a million-dollar libel suit.

zh: -dollar libel suit. It wouldn't be the first time.
en: It wouldn't be the first time.

zh: -都可以，但你要明白 -好吧。 - Any of them, but get it.
en: - Any of them, but get it.

zh: -给我一张报销单。 -什么费用？ - Give me a voucher for expenses.
en: - Give me a voucher for expenses.

zh: 你所需要的只是去长岛的车费。 All you need is carfare to Long Island.
en: All you need is carfare to Long Island.

zh: 你最好刮个脸，擦个面。 And you better get a shave and a shine.
en: And you better get a shave and a shine.

zh: 你现在要进去可真不容易。 You're gonna have a tough time getting in there as it is.
en: You're gonna have a tough time getting in there as it is.

zh: 我认识那些蓝鼻子。 I know those bluenoses.
他们的祖先拒绝乘坐五月花号... ... 因为他们不想和游客接触。
en: Their ancestors refused to come on the Mayflower because they didn't want to rub elbows with tourists.

zh: 于是他们游了过去。 So they swam over.
但我一直在告诉你这有多难，斯凯勒太太。 But I keep telling you how difficult it is, Mrs. Schuyler.
en: But I keep telling you how difficult it is, Mrs. Schuyler.

zh: 我不知道你为什么这么大惊小怪。 我只发了六张。 I don't know why you're making all this fuss.
en: I don't know why you're making all this fuss.

zh: -我找不到她的电话愚蠢的人! - I couldn't get her on the phone.
en: - I couldn't get her on the phone.

zh: 你应该知道不该写信的，罗密欧。 You should have known better than to write, Romeo.
en: You should have known better than to write, Romeo.

zh: -我很久以前就知道了。 -我应该说你有。 - I found that out a long time ago.
en: - I found that out a long time ago.

zh: 按照你们俩的发展速度... ... 为了保全颜面，我们得离开这个国家。
en: At the rate you two are going we'll have to leave the country to save our faces.

zh: we'll have to leave the country to save our faces. 灿烂的,妈妈! 我们去蒙特卡洛吧。
Splendid, Mother! Let's hop over to Monte Carlo.
en: Let's hop over to Monte Carlo.

zh: -这是个挽回颜面的好地方。 -闭嘴。 - It's a great place to save a face.
en: - It's a great place to save a face.

zh: 女士但我该对记者们说些什么呢？ - What is it, Smythe? - Pardon me, madam...
en: - Pardon me, madam but what am I to say to the newspapermen?

zh: 你不能这么做。 交给我吧。 我知道如何应付记者。
Leave it to me. I know how to handle reporters.
en: I know how to handle reporters.

zh: 那好吧，赶快结束吧。 All right then, get it over with.
en: All right then, get it over with.

zh: 我们决定去见记者。 先叫论坛报的人来。 We've decided to see the reporters.
en: We've decided to see the reporters.

zh: Send the man from The Tribune first.
en: Send the man from The Tribune first.

zh: - Smythe. 一些碳酸氢钠。 强力。
我知道那些新闻贩子会让我心烦的。 I know those newsmongers will upset me.
en: I know those newsmongers will upset me.

zh: 我预料到了，夫人。 碳酸氢盐准备好了。
I anticipated it, madam. The bicarbonate is ready.
嘿，宾格，你会在餐厅找到银器的。 Hey, Bingy, you'll find the silverware in the dining room.
en: Hey, Bingy, you'll find the silverware in the dining room.

zh: 格雷森先生决定要见你。 Mr. Grayson has decided to see you.
en: Mr. Grayson has decided to see you.

zh: 《论坛报》的那位先生先来。 The gentleman from The Tribune first.
en: The gentleman from The Tribune first.

zh: 《论坛报》上没有绅士。 There are no gentlemen on The Tribune.
en: There are no gentlemen on The Tribune.

zh: 我明白，先生。 I understand, sir.
嘿，别紧张，别紧张。 Hey, take it easy, take it easy.
en: Hey, take it easy, take it easy.

zh: 听着，孩子，你在这儿待着没用。 Listen, my boy, no use you hanging around here.
en: Listen, my boy, no use you hanging around here.

zh: 永远不要做最后一版。 Never make the last edition.
把你的故事翻译成英语要花我好几个小时。 It'd take me hours to translate your story into English.
en: It'd take me hours to translate your story into English.

zh: 脱下你的帽子。 你可能会给人留下深刻印象。
Take off your hat. You might make an impression.
嘿，拿定主意，好吗? Hey, make up your mind, will you?
en: Hey, make up your mind, will you?

zh: 难道人群中就没有一句"祝福你"吗？ Ain't there a "bless you" in the crowd?
en: Ain't there a "bless you" in the crowd?

zh: -你是论坛报的人？ -是的。 你好，你好吗？
谢谢，我会的。 Thanks, I will.
-好报纸，论坛报。 -嗯，我应该说。 - Fine newspaper, The Tribune.
-我和你们的总编辑很熟。 -是吗？ - I knew your managing editor well.
en: - I knew your managing editor well.

zh: 耶鲁大学。 我想是21岁。 Yale.
我们是同班同学。 We were classmates.
她感冒了？ She got a cold?
我在报纸上帮他找到了工作。 你知道，我是股东。
en: I got him his job on the paper.

zh: I got him his job on the paper. I'm a stockholder, you know.
是这样吗？ Is that so?
——一个论坛人对另一个论坛人说。 -是的。 - One Tribune man to another.
我没意见。 我不会怨恨你的。
That's all right with me. I won't hold it against you.
en: I won't hold it against you.

zh: -但我是来找你的 -我知道我知道。 - But I'm over here to find out about
en: - But I'm over here to find out about...

zh: I know. 但故事里有b无真相。 But there's no truth in the story whatsoever.
en: But there's no truth in the story whatsoever.

zh: 在这里。 在这里。 Here it is.
所以你看到那个谣言有多愚蠢了吧。 So you see how silly that rumor is.
en: So you see how silly that rumor is.

zh: 都是些胡言乱语。 Why, sure. It's all a lot of hooey.
en: It's all a lot of hooey.

zh: 这就是我想说的，但我想不出来。 That's what I wanted to say, but I couldn't think of it.
en: That's what I wanted to say, but I couldn't think of it.

zh: - Thank you very much. - All right, all right, don't mention it.
en: - All right, all right, don't mention it.

zh: 代我向你们的总编辑问好。 Give my regards to your managing editor.
en: Give my regards to your managing editor.

zh: 我当然会的。 I certainly will.
好了，再见，朋友们。 Well, so long, folks.
-斯迈思，把另一个记者叫来。 - So long. - Smythe, bring in the other reporter.
en: - Smythe, bring in the other reporter.

zh: 我猜你叫斯凯勒吧？ Schuyler's the name, I presume?
是的，谢谢，谢谢。 我叫史密斯，斯图尔特·史密斯。
Yes, thank you, thank you. My name is Smith, Stewart Smith.
en: My name is Smith, Stewart Smith.

zh: 与约翰，乔，商标或商标无关。 No relation to John, Joe, trade or mark.
en: No relation to John, Joe, trade or mark.

zh: 当然，你不可能拥有一切。 Of course, you can't have everything.
en: Of course, you can't have everything.

zh: 你的康拉德真不错，斯凯勒太太。 Nice set of Conrad you have there, Mrs. Schuyler.
en: Nice set of Conrads you have there, Mrs. Schuyler.

zh: 我只是扫了一眼。 I was just glancing through this one.
en: I was just glancing through this one.

zh: 迈克尔撕报纸干什么？ What's Michael tearing the paper about?
en: What's Michael tearing the paper about?

zh: 只是一种习惯。 Just a habit.
斯凯勒先生对这些谣言感到有些不安。 Mr. Schuyler's a bit put out by all these rumors going around.
en: Mr. Schuyler's a bit put out by all these rumors going around.

zh: 什么时候失信的案子成了谣言了？ Since when is a breach -of
en: Since when is a breach-of-promise case a rumor?

zh: -promise case a rumor? 没有任何违反承诺的案件被立案。 No breach
en: No breach-of-promise case has been filed.

zh: -promise case has been filed. -已经庭外和解了。 -我明白了。
en: - It has been settled out of court.

zh: - It has been settled out of court.
- I see. 歌洛莉亚对这两万美元并不满意。 Gloria isn't exactly satisfied with the $20,000.
en: Gloria isn't exactly satisfied with the $20,000.

zh: 德克斯特·格雷森，你跟我说只有一万块！ Dexter Grayson, you told me it was only 10,000!
en: Dexter Grayson, you told me it was only 10,000!

zh: 而你连那混蛋的信都没收到。 And you didn't even get those letters from that jezebel.
en: And you didn't even get those letters from that Jezebel.

zh: 所以你确实给了她一万块？ So you did give her $10,000?
还有信件。 那流言课就不讲了，不是吗？
And there are letters. Well, that takes it out of the rumor class, doesn't it?
en: Well, that takes it out of the rumor class, doesn't it?

zh: 我们什么都不承认。 We admit nothing.
不过，我准备了一份声明。 However, I've a little statement all prepared.
en: However, I've a little statement all prepared.

zh: Good. - I have it right here.
如果你这么做，他会认为这是伪造的。 If you do, he'll think it's counterfeit.
en: If you do, he'll think it's counterfeit.

zh: 我不需要50美元。 事实上，我有50美元。
I don't need $50. As a matter of fact, I've got $50.
en: As a matter of fact, I've got $50.

zh: 《论坛报》的人似乎很满意。 The man from The Tribune seemed satisfied.
en: The man from The Tribune seemed satisfied.

zh: 是的，Bingy会的。 他以前从未见过50美元。 Bingy?
Yeah, Bingy would. He never saw $50 before.
你可以花6比特买下他。 You could have bought him for 6 bits.
en: You could have bought him for 6 bits.

zh: 他看起来很蠢，不是吗？ He looks stupid, doesn't he?
所以你给了她一万块？ So 10 grand was the amount you gave the gal?
en: So 10 grand was the amount you gave the gal?

zh: 你们还有什么要说的吗？ Any other statement you folks would like to make?
en: Any other statement you folks would like to make?

zh: -我们没什么好说的了。 ——等待。 不要太兴奋。
en: - We have nothing more to say.

zh: - We have nothing more to say.
没什么好担心的。 Nothing to worry about.
-一点宣传不会伤害任何人。 -德克斯特，让他马上离开。 - A little publicity never hurt anybody.
en: - A little publicity never hurt anybody.

zh: 我想你最好还是走吧。 -走吧？ - I think you'd better go.
这是一个很棒的故事： That's a great story:
别介意，妈妈。 Don't mind Mother.
-如果你不介意，我也不介意。 ——安妮。 - I don't mind her if you don't.
en: - I don't mind her if you don't.

zh: 我相信你很愿意体面地对待这件事。 I'm sure you're quite willing to be decent about this.
en: I'm sure you're quite willing to be decent about this.

zh: 为什么，斯凯勒小姐，我想要高贵。 Decent? Why, Miss Schuyler, I want to be noble.
en: Why, Miss Schuyler, I want to be noble.

zh: 你不会把这傻东西印出来吧？ You're not going to print this silly thing, are you?
en: You're not going to print this silly thing, are you?

zh: 为什么不呢? No? Why not?
因为我也叫斯凯勒，我什么都没做。 Because my name's Schuyler too, and I haven't done a thing.
en: Because my name's Schuyler too, and I haven't done a thing.

zh: 但我得忍受迈克尔的痛苦，妈妈也一样。 But I'll have to suffer with Michael, and so will Mother.
en: But I'll have to suffer with Michael, and so will Mother.

zh: 母亲已经很痛苦了。 Mother's suffering already.
你知道吗，女士，如果你卖人寿保险... -...我会在60秒内换一份保单。 -谢谢。
en: You know something, lady, if you sold life insurance...

zh: You know something, lady, if you sold life insurance...
en: - ... I'd go for a policy in 60 seconds.

zh: I'd go for a policy in 60 seconds. - Thank you.
我知道你会理解的。 I knew you'd understand.
我可以用一下你的电话吗？ ——当然。 就在那里。
你没事的。 You're all right.
这是个不吉利的数字。 你知道的，不是吗？
That's an unlucky number. You know that, don't you?
你好,亲爱的。 康罗伊在吗？ 把康罗伊交给我。
Is Conroy in? Let me have Conroy.
去洗手间试试，好吗？ He isn't? Try the washroom, will you?
前几天我面试了一个很棒的人。 爱因斯坦。 Say, I interviewed a swell guy the other day.
en: Say, I interviewed a swell guy the other day.

zh: 有点古怪，但很好 不穿吊袜带。 Swell guy. A little eccentric, but a swell
en: A little eccentric, but a swell...

zh: 事实上，我也不知道。 吊袜带有什么用？ Neither do I, as a matter of fact.
en: Neither do I, as a matter of fact.

zh: -? 你好,康罗伊。 我是史密斯。
我在斯凯勒家。 Hello, Conroy.
This is Smith talking. I'm up at the Schuylers.
不，我不喝茶。 No, I'm not having tea.
也就是说，还没有。 That is, not yet.
她漂亮吗？ Is she beautiful?
头儿，她的照片不像她。 Boss, her pictures don't do her justice.
en: Boss, her pictures don't do her justice.

zh: 如果我是那个人，齐格菲尔德，我。 怎么了？ If I were that guy, Ziegfield, I
en: If I were that guy, Ziegfield, I...

zh: 是的，你可以看到她的美丽是从哪里来的。 Yes, you can see where her beauty comes from.
en: Yes, you can see where her beauty comes from.

zh: 从她母亲那里。 From her mother.
等一下。 冷静点。 我马上就会讲到这个。
Keep your shirt on. I'll come to that in a minute.
en: I'll come to that in a minute.

zh: 斯凯勒夫妇承认这个故事是真的。 正确的。 The Schuylers admit the story is true.
en: The Schuylers admit the story is true.

zh: 现在，他们给了女孩1万美元。 Now, they gave the gal 10,000 bucks.
en: Now, they gave the gal 10,000 bucks.

zh: 在我看来，她会得到的。 It looks to me like she's going to get it.
en: It looks to me like she's going to get it.

zh: 对了,老板。 我马上就来。
正确的。 Right, boss. I'll be right over.
不，我想我现在拍不到照片了。 好吧。 No, I don't think I can get any pictures now.
en: No, I don't think I can get any pictures now.

zh: 我这辈子见过一些僵尸。 I've met some rotters in my time.
en: I've met some rotters in my time.

zh: 但你是一个男人的最低级借口... ... 我最不幸遇到的人。
en: But you're the lowest excuse for a man I've ever had the misfortune to meet.

zh: 好吧，如果你这么想... ... 这是你的五分钱。
en: Well, if you feel that way about it here's your nickel for the phone call.

zh: - How are you? - Come right in.
"史密斯先生，你不会发表那篇报道吧？" "Mr. Smith, you wouldn't print that story, would you?"
en: "Mr. Smith, you wouldn't print that story, would you?"

zh: 不，我不会印出来的。 阅读它。 No, I wouldn't print it.
天哪，我希望不是。 今天早上我得去拜访她。
Gosh, I hope not. I've got to call on her this morning.
en: I've got to call on her this morning.

zh: 我得顺便去看看那丫头。 她的伤口需要抚慰。 I must drop in and see the wench.
en: I must drop in and see the wench.

zh: 看在上帝的份上，斯图，你们是不是完全疯了？ For heaven's sake, Stew, are you completely bats?
en: For heaven's sake, Stew, are you completely bats?

zh: 我觉得那个故事太冷酷了。 你不能回去。
en: I thought that story was cold.

zh: I thought that story was cold. You can't go back.
当然，故事很冷，但我不冷。 我的滋滋声。 看。
en: Sure, the story's cold, but I'm not.

zh: Sure, the story's cold, but I'm not.
黎明来临了。 黎明来临了。
Came the dawn. Came the dawn.
随之而来的是爱情。 And with it came love.
加拉格，你得见见她。 她的。 Gallagher, you've got to meet her.
en: Gallagher, you've got to meet her.

zh: - And that. - And those and them.
我看过她的照片。 我觉得她没那么性感。
Well, I've seen her pictures. I don't think she's so hot.
en: I don't think she's so hot.

zh: 你不欣赏她。 照片不像她。 她是高贵的。
You don't appreciate her. Pictures don't do her justice.
她是女王，我了解女王。 She is queenly, and I know queens.
en: She is queenly, and I know queens.

zh: 她有自己的鼻子吗？ 我也知道鼻子。 And has she got herself a nose!
en: And has she got herself a nose!

zh: 我告诉你，她的小鼻子是浆果。 That little schnozzle of hers is the berries, I tell you.
en: That little schnozzle of hers is the berries, I tell you.

zh: 当然，我没有鼻子。 Of course, I haven't got a nose.
en: Of course, I haven't got a nose.

zh: 你是有鼻子，加拉格尔，但那不一样。 Sure, you got a nose, Gallagher, but that's different.
en: Sure, you got a nose, Gallagher, but that's different.

zh: 女人不一样，加拉格尔。 大家知道... ...
比如酿酒厂的马和纯种马。 Women are different, Gallagher. You know...
en: You know like brewery horses and thoroughbreds.

zh: like brewery horses and thoroughbreds. 斯图，我不会对她太苛刻。 我不会叫她啤酒马。
en: Stew, I wouldn't be too hard on her.

zh: Stew, I wouldn't be too hard on her. I wouldn't call her a brewery horse.
en: I wouldn't call her a brewery horse.

zh: 加拉格，她才是真命天子。 Gallagher, she's the real McCoy.
而我们其余的人都是卡车马。 And the rest of us are truck horses.
en: And the rest of us are truck horses.

zh: 又来了，说话像个女人。 There you go, talking like a woman.
en: There you go, talking like a woman.

zh: -你是我的朋友，不是吗？ - Well? - Well, you're my pal, aren't you?
en: - Well, you're my pal, aren't you?

zh: 那就别对我变女人。 Then don't turn female on me.
en: Then don't turn female on me.

zh: 付钱，好吗，加拉格尔？ 有时间我会还给你的。 Pay that check, will you, Gallagher?
en: Pay that check, will you, Gallagher?

zh: I'll give it back to you sometime.
en: I'll give it back to you sometime.

zh: 我和康拉德去追寻我的青春。 I go. I go with Conrad in quest of my youth.
en: I go with Conrad in quest of my youth.

zh: 把那些西红柿煎一下，好吗，加拉格尔？ Fry those tomatoes, will you, Gallagher?
en: Fry those tomatoes, will you, Gallagher?

zh: 好了，好了，吉夫斯。 好了，吉夫斯，这样好吗？
Now, now, Jeeves. Now, Jeeves, was that nice?
这是绅士的风度吗，吉夫斯？ Was that being a gentleman, Jeeves?
en: Was that being a gentleman, Jeeves?

zh: -你的名字是吉夫斯，对吗？ -我叫斯迈思。 - Your name is Jeeves, isn't it?
en: - Your name is Jeeves, isn't it?

zh: 好吧，好吧，好吧。 Smythe? Well, well, well.
世界真小。 穿着制服的兄弟。
What a small world. Brothers under livery.
-史密斯对斯迈思说 -斯凯勒太太不在家

en: - Mrs. Schuyler is not at home.

zh: Schuyler is not at home. 我知道。
我在外面一直等到她出去。 I know. I know.
en: I waited outside until she went out.

zh: I waited outside until she went out. 她是个好女人。 她很好，但我们在一起不太合得来。
She's a nice lady. She's all right, but we don't vibrate well together.
en: She's all right, but we don't vibrate well together.

zh: 没人在家，先生。 No one's at home, sir.
吉夫斯，你觉得这叫无名小卒吗？ Now, Jeeves, would you call this no one?
en: Now, Jeeves, would you call this no one?

zh: 斯凯勒太太下了命令，小姐，如果这个人再来... ...-... 我要报警。
en: Mrs. Schuyler left orders, miss, that if this person came again...

zh: Schuyler left orders, miss, that if this person came again...
- ... I was to call the police.
en: I was to call the police.

zh: 给警察打电话。 号码是Spring 3100。
Telephone the police. The number is Spring 3100.
叫几个警察过来，我们就有橡胶桥了。 Get a couple of cops over, and we'll have a rubber of bridge.
en: Get a couple of cops over, and we'll have a rubber of bridge.

zh: -但我现在，那位女士说你可以走了
- You may go, Smythe. - But I -
en: Now, the lady said you may go.

zh: - Now, the lady said you may go. -你想要什么？ -我告诉你。
- What do you want? - Well, I tell you.
我在这里的时候，手里拿着你的一本书。 When I was here, I had one of your books in my hand.
en: When I was here, I had one of your books in my hand.

zh: 今天早上，我把你的书放在我手里... ... 你手里拿着你的书。
en: This morning, I put your book in my hand and here's your book in your hand.

zh: and here's your book in your hand. -你真体贴。 -是的。
- It was. I recommend you read that.
我对你的文学推荐不感兴趣。 I'm not interested in your literary recommendations.
en: I'm not interested in your literary recommendations.

zh: 也许对你来说太重了。 Perhaps it would be too heavy for you.
en: Perhaps it would be too heavy for you.

zh: 如果你想要更轻松的，带点浪漫的东西... ... 听听这个。
en: If you'd like something lighter, something with a touch of romance just listen to this.

zh: "可爱的宝贝，她想念她的孩子吗？" "Adorable Babykins, does her miss her baby?
en: "Adorable Babykins, does her miss her baby?"

zh: - Bobo is so lonely." - Just a moment.
我不明白那个垃圾桶跟我有什么关系。 I don't see how that trash can possibly concern me.
en: I don't see how that trash can possibly concern me.

zh: 但你不知道波波是谁。 你也不知道Babykins是谁。
en: But you don't know who Bobo is.

zh: But you don't know who Bobo is. And you don't know who Babykins is.
en: And you don't know who Babykins is.

zh: 我不感兴趣。 斯迈思会打开门。
I'm not interested. Smythe will open the door.
斯迈思会开门但波波是你哥哥迈克尔。
Smythe will open - - But Bobo is your brother Michael.
en: But Bobo is your brother Michael.

zh: 当然没人会猜到Babykins是谁。 And of course nobody would ever guess who Babykins is.
en: And of course nobody would ever guess who Babykins is.

zh: 你从哪儿弄来这些信的？ Where did you get those letters?
en: Where did you get those letters?

zh: 我在采访Babykins采访波波的时候偷的。 I stole them when I was interviewing Babykins about Bobo.
en: I stole them when I was interviewing Babykins about Bobo.

zh: 我想你会把它们印出来吧？ I suppose you're going to print them?
en: I suppose you're going to print them?

zh: 再给你一次机会。 No. Give you another guess.
我不需要再猜了。 I don't need another guess.
-很明显。 -很明显吧？ - It's quite obvious.
你会走进图书馆吗？ Will you step into the library?
en: Will you step into the library?

zh: 我要碰碰运气。 Sure. I'll take a chance.
你知道吗，印第安人以前是这样走路的。 You know, the Indians used to walk like this.
en: You know, the Indians used to walk like this.

zh: 除了那个女人总是走在后面。 Except the squaw always walked in the back.
en: Except the squaw always walked in the back.

zh: 你知道为什么吗？ You know why that was?
这是为了防止来自前线的攻击。 That was in case of an attack from the front.
en: That was in case of an attack from the front.

zh: 是的，教皇一直都有弓箭。 Yes, papooses always had bows and arrows.
en: Yes, papooses always had bows and arrows.

zh: 当然，如果她没有结婚，那她就得保护自己的... ... 这个图书馆在哪个国家？
en: Of course, if she wasn't married, then she had to protect her own...

zh: 斯凯勒小姐，乘车回前门怎么样？ Miss Schuyler, how about carfare back to the front door?
en: Miss Schuyler, how about carfare back to the front door?

zh: 姓名的首字母是什么，先生？ What are the initials, Mr...
? 史密斯，斯图尔特·史密斯。 我的朋友都叫我炖肉。
Smith, Stewart Smith. My friends all call me Stew.
en: My friends all call me Stew.

zh: 这也是不公平的，因为我酒量很好。 It's an injustice, too, because I hold my liquor all right.
en: It's an injustice, too, because I hold my liquor all right.

zh: - For what? - For the letters, of course.
你不该这么做，斯凯勒小姐。 You shouldn't do that, Miss Schuyler.
en: You shouldn't do that, Miss Schuyler.

zh: 这对你的律师朋友... ... 来说没什么但你不应该到处想着你可以收买人。
en: That's all right for your lawyer friend but you shouldn't go around thinking you can buy people.

zh: 这是你的信。 There are your letters.
我不知道该怎么感谢你。 I don't know how to thank you.
en: I don't know how to thank you.

en: I can't imagine what made you do such a thing.

A reporter. Of all things, a reporter!
一个让袜子掉下来的野蛮人。 A barbarian, who lets his socks come down.
en: A barbarian, who lets his socks come down.

zh: 我向你保证他不会再做记者了。 I promise you that he won't be a reporter much longer.
en: I promise you that he won't be a reporter much longer.

zh: 一旦我把他带离那个环境... -...还有一个叫加拉格尔的人。 -坐下。
en: Once I get him away from that atmosphere...

zh: Once I get him away from that atmosphere... - ... and a man named Gallagher.
好好喝吧，妈妈。 Drink hearty, Mother.
那么，该怎么办呢？ 他现在在这里。 Well, what's to be done?
似乎没人想做点什么。 Nobody seems to want to do anything.

Why not ask me? Perhaps I can offer a suggestion.
en: Perhaps I can offer a suggestion.

关于什么? 你和安妮的婚姻。
About what? Your marriage to Anne.
哦，我和安妮的婚姻。 Oh, my marriage to Anne.
我们不希望你为此麻烦。 We don't want you to go to any trouble about that.
en: We don't want you to go to any trouble about that.

zh: 我们只是想用你的祝福，仅此而已。 We just want to use your blessings, that's all.
en: We just want to use your blessings, that's all.

zh: 妈妈，你的态度太荒谬了。 Mother, your attitude is perfectly ridiculous.
en: Mother, your attitude is perfectly ridiculous.

It's done now. Stewart and I are married.
恐怕她是对的，斯凯勒太太。 I'm afraid she's right, Mrs. Schuyler.
en: I'm afraid she's right, Mrs. Schuyler.

en: I was in hopes that you would like me.

en: I'm not the burglar that you think I am.

We're married. I think the thing to do is to kiss and make up, Mother.
en: I think the thing to do is to kiss and make up, Mother.

zh: -别叫我妈妈！ -好的，奶奶。 - Stop calling me "Mother"!
这个人不可理喻。 我不能和他说话。 This man's impossible.
格雷森，我们去能思考的地方。 Grayson, let's go Where we can think.
en: Grayson, let's go where we can think.

zh: 你知道你对我做了什么吗？ You see what you've done to me?
en: You see what you've done to me?

zh: 明白了吗？ Got it too?
那一轮谁赢了？ Well, who won that round?
你妈妈赢了。 也就是说，她挨了最后一拳。 Your mother won that round.
That is, she got the last blow in.
en: That is, she got the last blow in.

zh: 我没有他们的感觉。 你不像大家想的那么坏。
en: I don't feel the way they do.

zh: I don't feel the way they do. You're not as bad as everybody thinks.
en: You're not as bad as everybody thinks.

zh: 开始欣赏我了，是吧？ Well, beginning to appreciate me, huh?
en: Well, begin to appreciate me, huh?

zh: -上楼来。 我给你点。 -好的，我马上上来。
- Come upstairs. I'll give you a little
-他没事。 我喜欢他。 -我很高兴。
- He's all right. I like him.
他会弯腰。 He can bend.
过来，宝贝。 Come here, baby.
我有三个小时没见到你了。 你已经忽略我了。 I haven't seen you for three hours.
en: I haven't seen you for three hours.

en: I don't need any new ties.

zh: 当然，这只是在它较弱的时候。 Of course, that's only in its weaker moments.
en: Of course, that's only in its weaker moments.

zh: 等你搬到我家，我会带你去看的。 When you move to my place, I'll show it to you.
en: When you move to my place, I'll show it to you.

zh: 哦，太棒了。 Oh, it's great.
当然，它不能和你的这个体育馆相比。 Of course, it doesn't compare with this coliseum of yours.
en: Of course, it doesn't compare with this coliseum of yours.

zh: 但这很管用，夫人，这很管用。 But 'twill serve, milady, 'twill serve.
你不觉得住在那里很傻吗... ... 当我们有大房子的时候？
en: Don't you think it's silly to think of living there when we have this big house?

en: You mean you'd like to have me live here in your house?

en: We could have the whole left wing?

zh: Would that be room enough for us?
en: Would that be room enough for us?

Oh, darling, of course. There are six rooms and two baths.

zh: 妈妈会让我们住蓝色的房间吗？ 你没有一个红色的房间，是吗？ Mother would give us the blue room?
en: Mother would give us the blue room?

zh: You haven't a red room, have you?
en: You haven't a red room, have you?

en: Well, bless her heart, wouldn't that be nice?

zh: 六个房间，两个浴室和一个蓝色的房间。 Six rooms and two baths and a blue room.
en: Six rooms and two baths and a blue room.

zh: -嗯，但我确定我们不需要它。 -我明白了，我们不需要那个。 - Well, but we won't need it, I'm sure.
en: - Well, but we won't need it, I'm sure.

zh: - I see, we won't need that.
en: - I see, we won't need that.

现在，我们来解决这个问题。 Now, let's get this settled.
-你的鼻子是我见过最可爱的 -算了算了 - You have the cutest nose I've
en: - You have the cutest nose I've...

Not me. Oh, no, not me.
-不便宜。 它很好。 -听着，我们现在别谈这个。
It's nice. - Listen, let's not talk about this now.

zh: -我会照你说的做，但是 -我喜欢你的鼻子 - I'll do anything you ask me to, but

zh: ... I'm not gonna live in your house. You might as well get that straight.

I'll do that for you sometime.

听着，你说他叫什么名字？ Say, listen, what'd you say the name was?

en: - Was I very drunk last night?

en: - What are you doing in here?

她今天早上跟我有约，先生。 She engaged me this morning, sir.

不是为我，只是... ... 如果有人喜欢你。
Not for me, just... ... if anybody liked you.
你是个好人。 但是很抱歉，我今天不需要男仆。
You're a nice fellow. But I'm sorry, I don't need any valets today.
en: But I'm sorry, I don't need any valets today.

zh: 可以说是绅士中的绅士。 A gentleman's gentleman, as it were.

你想告诉我... ... 我需要有人帮我穿上裤子，扣上扣子。

... 但我不需要别人帮我扣上裤子。

Canary, huh? Go on, now. Get that out of here.
是的，先生。 很好，先生。
一只在镀金笼子里的鸟。 把那东西弄出去。 A bird.

我知道你会喜欢的。 I know you're gonna love them.

Well, well, well. Ain't that nice!
你喜欢它们吗？ Do you like them?
上面还有我名字的首字母。 他们是可爱的。 它们是很好的小。

Got my initials on them too. They're cute.

哦，你不会唱歌你不会唱歌你只会坐着，用勺子，勺子 -哦，不，我不会穿吊袜带
en: Oh, you can't carry a tune You can't carry a tune

-当然是真的。 -有钻石吗？ - Of course it's real.
至少让他倒退了6个比特。 Must have set him back at least 6 bits.

en: - I wonder what number he is.

他们看起来很可怕。 Oh, my dear.

快点，离开这里！ Come on, get out of here!

你是说安妮·斯凯勒的丈夫吗？ Oh, you mean Anne Schuyler's husband?

- You know, he looks like one.

en: - You want to see life in the raw?

现在别回头，上面有个非常漂亮的女孩... ...-... 他好像在盯着我们看。

一定是我妻子。 - My mistake.

你好吗，老朋友？ How are you, old pal, huh?
en: How are you, old pal, huh?

zh: 你好，斯图。 Oh, hello, Stew.
我很好。 没什么可抱怨的。 我们的休闲先生怎么样了？
Can't complain. How's our gentleman of leisure?
我在挪威海岸，出不去了。 I'm on the coast of Norway, and I can't get out.
en: I'm on the coast of Norway, and I can't get out.

zh: 你会来带我离开挪威海岸吗？ Will you come get me out of the coast of Norway?
en: Will you come get me out of the coast of Norway?

zh: 哦，你的剧本。 Oh, your play.
是的，"第一幕，第一场。 Yeah, "Act 1, Scene 1.
"挪威海岸"，然后是一大堆空白。 就是这样吗？ Coast of Norway," and then a lot of blanks.
en: Coast of Norway," and then a lot of blanks.

zh: Come on. Oh, don't be silly.
好吧，好吧。 如果你觉得你需要一个监护人... ...
给汉克打电话。 毫无疑问，你会在乔家找到他。
en: If you feel like you need a chaperon call up Hank.

zh: All right, all right. If you feel like you need a chaperon... ...
en: You'll find him at Joe's, no doubt.

zh: 汉克是我理想中的完美保镖。 Yeah, Hank would be my idea of a perfect bodyguard.
en: Yeah, Hank would be my idea of a perfect bodyguard.

zh: 他当然会的。 我就知道你靠得住。
Sure he would. I knew I could depend on you.
en: I knew I could depend on you.

zh: 快点，好吗，加拉格尔？ Snap it up, will you, Gallagher?
en: Snap it up, will you, Gallagher?
Smythe, I'll get this. I'm expecting some friends.

zh: 我在等一些朋友。 Smythe, I'll get this.
很好，先生。 Very good, sir.
嗯,加拉格尔! 进来。 我很高兴见到你。
Come in. I'm glad to see you.
-汉克，你好吗？ -很好，就是有点渴。
- Hank, how are you? - Fine, but kind of thirsty.
进来。 我给你拿杯喝的。
Come in. I'll get you a drink.
-还记得乔吗？ ——确定。 - You remember Joe?
我邀请他和我们一起去。 I invited him along to bend an elbow with us.
en: I invited him along to bend an elbow with us.

zh: -没事的。 把他带进来。 -拜托，乔。
- It's all right. Bring him in.
-你好，乔。 -你好，孩子。 你好吗？
-很高兴见到你。 -等一下。 约翰逊的外面。
介意他进来把鸟嘴蘸一下吗？ Mind if he comes in and dips the beak?
en: Mind if he comes in and dips the beak?

zh: -把他带进来。 人越多越好。 -请进。
来吧。 - Bring him in. The more the merrier.
- Hello, Johnson. - Stew, how are you?
-很高兴见到你。 进来。 -等一下。
我带了两个孩子来。 你不介意——？ I got two of the boys I brought along.
en: I got two of the boys I brought along.

zh: 你带了两个？ 好了，把他们带进来。
You brought two? All right, bring them in.
-有什么区别？ -请进。 - What's the difference?
你好,男孩。 进来。 你好吗？
你好，好孩子！ Hello, sonny boy!
很抱歉没人能来。 I'm sorry nobody could come.
如果不是，甜心。 你为什么不带你的家人一起来？
If it isn't Sweetheart. Why didn't you bring your family with you?
en: Why didn't you bring your family with you?

zh: 其余的报纸只能刊登晨报。 他们一会儿就下来。 The rest had to get out the morning edition.
en: The rest had to get out the morning edition.

zh: 你确定他们会来吗？ 没有他们会很寂寞的。
You sure they're coming? It'll be lonesome without them.
斯迈思，带他们进去，给他们喝一杯。 Smythe, take them in and give them a drink.
en: Smythe, take them in and give them a drink.

zh: 看看幕后的人想要什么。 And find out what the boys in the backroom want.
en: And find out what the boys in the backroom want.

zh: 我说，斯迈思，别瞒着我们。 我们愿意帮助你。 I say there, Smythe, don't be holding out on us.
en: I say there, Smythe, don't be holding out on us.

zh: 还没完呢，先生们！ 我说，事情还没有结束。 它还没有完成。
It isn't done, gentlemen! It isn't done, I say.
加拉格尔，你绝对没有冒险，对吧？ Well, Gallagher, you certainly took no chances, did you?
en: Well, Gallagher, you certainly took no chances, did you?

zh: 对不起，斯图。 我问了汉克，剩下的都是汉克做的。
I asked Hank and - - Well, Hank did the rest.
汉克带来的？ 没关系。 Hank brought them?
我们给他们喝一杯，然后把他们扔出去。 这是怎么回事? We'll give them a drink and throw them out.
en: We'll give them a drink and throw them out.

zh: 天哪——他旁边站着一只绿色的大象吗？ Holy -
- Is there a green elephant standing beside him?
en: Is there a green elephant standing beside him?

zh: -不，这只是小宾格·贝克。 -肚子 - No, this is just little Bingy Baker.
en: - No, this is just little Bingy Baker.

zh: 大酋长宾格来到白人的帐篷里交朋友。 Big Chief Bingy come to white man's tepee to make friends.
en: Big Chief Bingy come to white man's tepee to make friends.

zh: 大酋长非常抱歉。 Big Chief very sorry.
表示歉意... ... 会弯下腰让白人踢大酋长...
en: Show how sorry will bend over and let white man kick Big Chief where sun never shines.

zh: 打扰一下，加拉格尔。 我不会错过这个的 Excuse me, Gallagher.
I wouldn't miss this for the --
en: I wouldn't miss this for the...

zh: 火水，好的。 Firewater, all right.
好吧，斯图，这些都已经解决了。 Well, Stew, that's all thrashed out.
en: Well, Stew, that's all thrashed out.

zh: 天哪，我真高兴你没那么疼。 By golly, I'm certainly glad you're not really sore.
en: By golly, I'm certainly glad you're not really sore.

zh: 你知道我们的把戏。 毕竟，新闻就是新闻。
You know our racket. After all, news is news.
当然，没关系。 这是一个很棒的故事。 我真希望是我写的。
That was a great story. I wish I'd written it.
我给了她机会，不是吗？ 那个毛茸茸的胸部的故事。 Well, I gave her the breaks, didn't I?
en: Well, I gave her the breaks, didn't I?

zh: 你把它举到下巴了，我明白了。 You raised it up to the chin, I see.
en: You raised it up to the chin, I see.

zh: 到另一个房间去喝一杯吧。 Go on in the other room and get yourself a drink.
en: Go on in the other room and get yourself a drink.

zh: 斯迈思，给他们一杯酒，把他们赶出去。 Smythe! Smythe, give them one drink, throw them out.
en: Smythe, give them one drink, throw them out.

zh: - Yes, sir. - We're gonna give him one.
你知道我该怎么做吗？ 我真该揍你那可笑的鼻子。
en: You know what I should do?

zh: You know what I should do? I should sock you in that funny nose.
en: I should sock you in that funny nose.

zh: -是的，我很乐意。 -你肯定会喜欢的。 - Yes, and I'd love it.
你做了多少？ How far have you gotten?
到目前为止，我们只能离开挪威海岸。 Just been able to get off of that Norway coast so far.
en: Just been able to get off of that Norway coast so far.

zh: 第一幕，第一场。 老马德里的一条街。" "Act 1, Scene 1.
我还没讲完一些内容吗？ 我好像参加了库克之旅。 Haven't I covered some territory?
Seems like I've been on a Cook's tour.
en: Seems like I've been on a cook's tour.

zh: 斯图，你去过老马德里吗？ Stew, have you ever been to Old Madrid?
en: Stew, have you ever been to Old Madrid?

zh: 我都没去过新马德里。 No. I've never even been to new Madrid.
en: I've never even been to new Madrid.

zh: 那你打算怎么写呢？ Then how do you expect to write about it?
en: Then how do you expect to write about it?

zh: 我想我会发挥我的想象力。 I'll draw on my imagination, I suppose.
en: I'll draw on my imagination, I suppose.

zh: 康拉德利用了他的想象力吗？ Did Conrad draw on his imagination?
en: Did Conrad draw on his imagination?

zh: -你对康拉德了解多少？ -什么都没有。 - What do you know about Conrad?
en: - What do you know about Conrad?

zh: 他不就是你一直嚷嚷的那个人吗？ Isn't he the one you're always yelling about?
en: Isn't he the one you're always yelling about?

zh: 天哪，你看起来真可爱。 Gosh, you look cute.
他不是只写他知道的事吗？ Isn't he the one who writes only about things he knows?
en: Isn't he the one who writes only about things he knows?

zh: 他写这篇文章之前不是出过海吗？ Didn't he go to sea before he wrote about it?
en: Didn't he go to sea before he wrote about it?

zh: 然后你写一些你知道的事情。 Then you write about something you know.
en: Then you write about something you know.

zh: 写一下你和安妮。 穷小子娶了富家女。 Write about yourself and Anne.
The poor boy who marries a rich girl.
en: The poor boy who marries a rich girl.

zh: 现在，有一个很好的主题。 Now, there's a swell theme.
这主意不错，加拉格尔。 Gee, that's an idea there, Gallagher.
en: Gee, that's an idea there, Gallagher.

zh: 这是一个想法。 现在我想知道了。 That's an idea there.
哦,当然。 她会成为一个美丽的女主角。
Oh, sure. She'd make a beautiful heroine.
这是她妈妈。 And there's her mother.
还有他们的律师朋友。 他会成为一个大反派。 And that lawyer friend of theirs.
en: And that lawyer friend of theirs.

zh: -还有你。 -我能是什么？ - And there's you.
我不知道。 你可以有所成就。
I don't know. You could be something.
来吧，走开。 我们有个主意。 让我们把这个集合起来。
We got an idea. Let's get this set.
这是个好主意。 这是个好主意。 It's a great idea.
Great idea for a play. 把...
给我支烟，好吗？ Just get... Get me a cigarette, will you?
en: Get me a cigarette, will you?

zh: 我们不要失去这个。 只是... Let's don't lose this.
- Here you are. - All right, thanks.
现在，我们来看看。 Now, let's see.
我该怎么开始呢？ How will I start?
嘿，伙计，你打算怎么开始？ Hey, pal, how would you start?
en: Hey, pal, how would you start?

zh: 斯迈思，你是个奴隶。 Smythe, you're a slave.
国王和管家有什么区别？ What's the difference between a king and a butler?
en: What's the difference between a king and a butler?

zh: 喂，你不能进来。 这是私人聚会！ Say, you can't come in here.
en: Say, you can't come in here.

zh: 我哈佛的老同学。 哇! !
My old classmate from Harvard. Whoopee!
哈佛大学,98年。 你好,妈妈!
-我知道谁是罪魁祸首。 -德克斯特。 - And I know who's the cause of it all.
en: - And I know who's the cause of it all.

zh: -这些人是谁？ -我的朋友。 - Who are these people?
非常文学 -文学的人。 -他喝醉了。
斯迈思，你一直在喝酒。 Smythe, you've been drinking.
史密斯先生在哪里？ Where is Mr. Smith?
我的天哪，我不知道。 Well, for crying out loud, I don't know.
en: Well, for crying out loud, I don't know.

zh: 我不在乎。 And I don't care.
加拉格尔，如果我们能拍出精彩的一幕...
en: Now, Gallagher, if I could only get a great scene...

zh: ... 就好了一个非常感人的场景。 Now, Gallagher, if we could only get a great scene...
en: Now, Gallagher, if I could only get a great scene a tremendously emotional scene.

zh: 一些让公众震惊的事情... ... 在第二幕中把幕拉下来。
en: Something to ring the hearts out of the public to bring the curtain down in the second act.

zh: 你能从帽子里掏出一个吗？ Could you dig one out of your hat?
en: Could you dig one out of your hat?

zh: 恐怕我今晚没办法了。 No. Afraid I'm all out of tricks tonight.
en: Afraid I'm all out of tricks tonight.

zh: 我们把他们带到那个男孩穿着他的白色裤子的地方... ... 去参加粉红茶会，太太进来了。
en: We got them up to where the boy's wearing his white Spats and going to pink teas, and the Frau enters.

zh: and going to pink teas, and the frau enters. How's that?
-很好。 -现在，如果我们能到我们
- Very good. - Now, if we could just get where we --
en: - Now, if we could just get where we...

zh: -什么意思？ 什么是什么意思？ - What does this mean?
我们有剧本了，安妮。 我们有剧本了！ And we got a play, Anne.
en: And we got a play, Anne.

zh: 大部分是加拉格尔的。 大部分都是她干的。 Most of it's Gallagher's.
她的脑子总是那样乱转。 Her brain just snaps like that all the time.
en: Her brain just snaps like that all the time.

zh: 我对她大脑崩溃的方式不感兴趣。 I'm not interested in the way her brain snaps.
en: I'm not interested in the way her brain snaps.

zh: -我想我该走了，斯图 -我觉得你应该这么做，加拉格小姐。
en: - I think I better go, Stew.

zh: - I think I better go, Stew. - I think you should, Miss Gallagher.
en: - I think you should, Miss Gallagher.

zh: 等等，加拉格尔。 你有什么想法，安妮？ Wait a minute, Gallagher.
我的想法是，我希望这些人马上离开。 The idea is, I want these people to leave immediately.
en: The idea is, I want these people to leave immediately.

zh: 你是不是有点不讲道理了？ Wait. Aren't you being a little unreasonable?
en: Aren't you being a little unreasonable?

zh: 不合理吗? 你知道楼下是什么样子吗？
Unreasonable? Have you any idea what the place looks like downstairs?
en: Have you any idea what the place looks like downstairs?

zh: 你想让我把这房子变成廉价酒吧吗？ Do you expect me to let this house turn into a cheap barroom?
en: Do you expect me to let this house turn into a cheap barroom?

zh: 不要太兴奋。 没有理由这么做。
Don't get excited. There's no reason for that.
也许孩子们喝多了。 Perhaps the boys have had too much to drink.
en: Perhaps the boys have had too much to drink.

zh: 我很抱歉。 我下去把它们扔出去。
I'm sorry. I'll go down and throw them out.
en: I'll go down and throw them out.

zh: 你没有理由采取这种态度。 That's no reason for you to take this attitude.
en: That's no reason for you to take this attitude.

zh: 毕竟，我有权利邀请... ... 我邀请了几个朋友来我家，不是吗？
en: After all, I have a right to invite a few of my friends to my house, haven't I?

zh: 哦，我懂你了。 没关系的。 没关系的。
我不怪你。 Oh, I get you.
It's all right. It's all right.
有那么一刻我都忘了自己。 I kind of forgot myself for a moment there.
en: I kind of forgot myself for a moment there.

zh: 这就是我所说的"让我知道"对吧，安妮？ That's what I call "getting me told," isn't it, Anne?
en: That's what I call "getting me told," isn't it, Anne?

zh: 我想我去年就在这里寄宿了。 我告诉你。 I suppose I've been boarding out this last year.
en: I suppose I've been boarding out this last year.

zh: 我不喜欢你的寄宿公寓，女士。 I don't like your boarding house, lady.
en: I don't like your boarding house, lady.

zh: 如果你不介意的话，我要搬出去了。 And if it's all the same to you, I'm moving out.
en: And if it's all the same to you, I'm moving out.

zh: 这是我早就应该做的事... ... 只是我没有足够的理智去做这件事。
en: It's something I should have done long ago only I didn't have sense enough to do it.

zh: 不，我得留下来，努力做点成功的事... ... 我很清楚从一开始就是失败的。
en: No, I have to stick around and try to make a success of something that I knew darn well was a failure from the very beginning.

zh: that I knew darn well was a failure from the very beginning. But no more.
-你不能就这样走出去。 - No more!
So that's that. - You can't walk out of here like this.
en: - You can't walk out of here like this.

zh: 我不能? 谁能阻止我？
我想看到有人阻止我。 I can't?
Who's gonna stop me? I'd like to see somebody stop me.
en: I'd like to see somebody stop me.

zh: 你以为我会一直待在这里... ... 就为了看看这座陵墓？
en: You think I'm gonna stick around this joint just to look at this mausoleum?

zh: just to look at this mausoleum? Not on your life.
你别想把我做成衬衫。 You're gonna make no stuffed shirt out of me.
en: You're gonna make no stuffed shirt out of me.

zh: 你觉得怎么样？ What do you think of that?
en: What do you think of that?

zh: 这是怎么回事？ 这个女人是谁？ What's going on here?
——圣女贞德。 这关你什么事？
-天哪，这人疯了！ - Joan of Arc.
What's it to you? - Heavens, the man's insane!
我肯定是疯了！ 但我有个好消息要告诉你。
Sure I'm insane! But I got some good news for you.
en: But I got some good news for you.

zh: 白玉兰要离开你的香草味了。 This magnolia is leaving your sweet -smelling vanilla joint.
