en: This magnolia is leaving your sweet-smelling vanilla joint.

zh: 这就是所谓的"告诉婆婆"。 And that's what's known as "telling the mother -in
en: And that's what's known as "telling the mother-in-law."

zh: 自从我来到这里，你就一直看着我。 You've done nothing but watch me ever since I've been here.
en: You've done nothing but watch me ever since I've been here.

zh: 像对待暴徒一样对待我。 像老鹰一样盯着我。 不信任我。
Treated me like a thug. Watched me like a hawk.
每次我离开家，她都会数银器。 Every time I leave the house, she counts the silverware.
en: Every time I leave the house, she counts the silverware.

zh: -太荒谬了。 ——好! 好吧，我不怪她！
- Fine! Fine, I don't blame her!
我知道我不是我的朋友。 I know I'm out of my own crowd.
en: I know I'm out of my own crowd.

zh: 我应该更有见识的。 从现在起我就待在我家后院了。
Should have had better sense. I'll stay in my own back yard from now on.
en: I'll stay in my own back yard from now on.

zh: -你表现得像个孩子。 -好吧，我是个孩子。 好吧!
- You're acting like a child. - All right, I'm a child.
你想怎样就怎样。 但我要回我自己的公寓... ...
en: Have it any way you want.

zh: 我应该住的地方但不行，我得听你的，搬过来！ Have it any way you want.
en: But I'm going back to my own apartment where I should have lived.

zh: But I'm going back to my own apartment... ... where I should have lived.
en: But no, I gotta listen to you and move here!

zh: 如果你想和我住，没关系。 If you wanna live with me, that's okay.
en: If you wanna live with me, that's okay.

zh: 但是外面的牌子会写着"Mr. Stew Smith"... ...
en: But the sign outside will say "Mr. Stew Smith" and you'll have to be Mrs. Stew Smith, or there's nothing doing.

zh: 不再是安妮·斯凯勒的丈夫了。 No more Anne Schuyler's husband.
这里还有一些新闻要告诉你。 Here's some more news for you.
en: Here's some more news for you.

zh: 你可以拿红房间，绿房间... ... 你的左翼和右翼——你知道怎么对付他们！
en: You can take your red room, your green room your left wing and right wing...

zh: - - You know what to do with them!
en: You know what to do with them!

zh: -拜托，加拉格尔。 -哦，斯图尔特！ - Come on, Gallagher.
对不起，你能给我一毛钱买杯咖啡吗？ Pardon me, could you spare a dime for a cup of coffee?
en: Pardon me, could you spare a dime for a cup of coffee?

zh: 你想当吊袜带骑士吗？ Coffee? How'd you like to be the knight of the garter?
en: How'd you like to be the knight of the garter?

zh: -不，只喝咖啡。 -没事的。 等一下。
- No, just coffee. - It's all right.
招待这位先生，加拉格尔。 Entertain the gentleman, Gallagher.
你来了，伙计。 有了这些，你可以吃上几个月。
There you are, my man. With those, you can eat for a couple months.
en: With those, you can eat for a couple months.

zh: 袜子怎么样？ How about the socks?
我不会太担心的。 她会从你的角度看问题的。 I wouldn't worry too much about it.
en: I wouldn't worry too much about it.

zh: 我不担心她。 I'm not worrying about her.
我担心的是第二幕的幕布，仅此而已。 I'm worrying about that second -act curtain, that's all.
en: I'm worrying about that second-act curtain, that's all.

zh: 你真是个一流的笨蛋。 You're just a first -class Chump.
你刚刚上演了一场精彩的戏。 You just staged a scene that plays like a million.
en: You just staged a scene that plays like a million.

zh: 第二幕的独立宣言？ That declaration of independence for the second -act curtain?
en: That declaration of independence for the second-act curtain?

zh: 这是个主意，加拉格尔。 这是个好主意。 It's an idea, Gallagher.
嘿,加拉格尔。 加拉格尔。 Hey, Gallagher.
-我的早餐怎么样？ - Yeah? - How about my breakfast?
我怎么能饿着肚子拉下窗帘？ How do I bring a curtain down on an empty stomach?
en: How do I bring a curtain down on an empty stomach?

zh: -马上就好。 -没关系。 - It'll be ready soon.
如果你不能给我准备好早餐，不能按时到这儿来... ...-... 然后再找一份工作。
en: If you can't get my breakfast ready and get here on time...

zh: 别抱歉，去拿早餐，就这样。 Don't be sorry, just get the breakfast, that's all.
en: Don't be sorry, just get the breakfast, that's all.

zh: -神圣的跳跃剑鱼！ -我想你知道我为什么来吧？
- Holy jumping swordfish! - I suppose you know why I came?
en: - I suppose you know why I came?

zh: 我不知道，除非有些银器不见了。 I've no idea, unless some of the silverware's missing.
en: I've no idea, unless some of the silverware's missing.

zh: 别傻了，史密斯。 No. Don't be absurd, Smith.
我可以进来吗？ May I come in?
我可以坐下吗？ May I sit down?
-我不吃华夫饼。 -你不知道？ - I don't eat waffles.
安妮叫我来见你是为了离婚的事。 Anne asked me to come see you about the divorce.
en: Anne asked me to come see you about the divorce.

zh: ... 安排财务结算。 - She did?
en: - She wants me to arrange the financial settlement.

zh: 听着，格雷森，我银行里有106.75美元。 Listen, Grayson, I've got $106.75 in the bank.
en: Listen, Grayson, I've got $106.75 in the bank.

zh: 安妮可以吃这个。 但她得快点，我花得太快了。
Anne can have that. But she's gotta hurry, I'm spending it awful fast.
en: But she's gotta hurry, I'm spending it awful fast.

zh: 你不明白。 安妮对你没有任何期望。
You don't understand. Anne doesn't expect anything from you.
en: Anne doesn't expect anything from you.

zh: 我们想知道你有多想——等一下！ 你是说她想付我赡养费吗？
en: We would like to know how much you would want to...

zh: We would like to know how much you would want to
- - Wait a minute! Do I get from you that she wants to pay me alimony?
en: Do I get from you that she wants to pay me alimony?

zh: 这么说太粗鲁了 -还记得第20次吗？ 完美。
你刚刚成功了。 在你失去知觉之前... ...-...
把这个放进你的蛋蛋里。 ——原谅? You've just made it.
Before you go unconscious... - ... get this through your nut.
"无意识"。 当你什么都不知道。 你的自然状态。
"Unconscious." When you don't know anything. Your natural state.
有些人的自尊是用钱买不到的。 There are some people you can't buy their self -respect.
en: There are some people you can't buy their self-respect.

zh: -我就是那种人。 -我们只是想 -别想我来想。
- Don't think. I'll do the thinking.
现在，站起来！ 现在轮到第20次了。
Now, stand up! And now for that 20th crack.
斯凯勒的律师。 Schuyler's lawyer.
他想要什么？ What did he want?
他给你的建议是什么？ What was the idea he gave you?
en: What was the idea he gave you?

zh: 好主意，加拉格尔。 这是如何? Swell idea, Gallagher.
第三幕的开头这样怎么样？ How's that for the beginning of the third act, huh?
en: How's that for the beginning of the third act, huh?

zh: 从现在开始，这出戏就轻松多了。 Well, from now on, the play will be easy.
en: Well, from now on, the play will be easy.

zh: 你要做的就是把他妻子带回来。 All you have to do is bring the wife back.
en: All you have to do is bring the wife back.

zh: 让她说对不起，你就玩完了。 Have her say she's sorry, and then your play's over.
en: Have her say she's sorry, and then your play's over.

zh: 怎么了？ 你觉得我会让他回到他妻子身边吗？
What's the matter? You think I'll let him go back to his wife?
en: You think I'll let him go back to his wife?

zh: 绝对不行。 他去找另一个女孩了。
Not on your life. He's got to go to the other girl.
en: He's got to go to the other girl.

zh: 别的什么女孩？ What other girl?
当然是奥勃良的小女孩了。 你在故事里说的那个。 Little O'Brien girl, of course.
The one you suggested in the story.
en: The one you suggested in the story.

zh: 但这太荒谬了，斯图。 你不能突然做出那样的改变。
But that's ridiculous, Stew. You can't make a sudden change like that.
en: You can't make a sudden change like that.

zh: 你要怎么做，告诉我怎么写剧本吗？ What you gonna do, tell me how to write a play?
en: What you gonna do, tell me how to write a play?

zh: 这没什么突然的。 There's nothing sudden about that.
他一直爱着那个女孩。 He's always loved the girl.
没关系。 我们可以解决这个问题。
他会去找她，然后来，我带你去。
That's all right. We can fix that.
He'll go to her and - - Here, I'll show you.
他会去找奥布莱恩家的小姑娘，他会说——他会说些好听的话——一些你能写的东西。
en: He'll go to the little O'Brien gal, and he'll say...

zh: 他会说："亲爱的，我很抱歉。 我这一辈子都是个傻瓜。 He'll say, "Darling, I'm sorry.
I've been a fool all my life.
en: I've been a fool all my life."

zh: 我一直爱着你。 我没有意识到这一点。
I've always loved you. I didn't have sense enough to see it.
en: I didn't have sense enough to see it.

zh: 她会看着他，然后说"是啊" She'll look at him and then she'll say, "Yeah."
en: She'll look at him and then she'll say, "Yeah."

zh: 然后他们会拥抱，或者类似的。 And then they'll embrace, or something like that.
en: And then they'll embrace, or something like that.

zh: 然后他会吻她什么的。 Then he'll kiss her or something.
en: Then he'll kiss her or something.

zh: 怎么了，加拉格尔？ 发生了什么事? What's the matter, Gallagher?
自由是男人們特有的幸福
en: Liberty is the happy man's due

zh: 卻有些並未犯下大罪的人
en: Who no worse crimes have done

zh: 我們要訴說一個悲慘的故事
en: It's the sad story we tell
Another day in hard labor spent

zh: 日子就這樣一天天過去
en: Like all the other yesterdays went
With just one horizon in sight

zh: 從早到晚被關在鐵窗內

en: My old friend, life is great
When you're free to be yourself
Fresh air is good for the health
Everywhere, if you take a chance,

zh: 很快我們就會成為兩個自由的人了！
en: So here's to us two and liberty!

zh: 我能看見了，是他，真的是他
en: Look there we can see It's he, it's really he.

zh: 讓我們快沿著這條走，就是他
en: Let us follow rapidly This way, it's he
The finish line's in sight Pedal with all your might

zh: 就要到家了，好，現在看到了
en: We're almost home, all right The finish line's now in sight
Here he comes, yes it's he
Like a glove. Excuse me, sir.
I'll let you have it... for 8 francs.
Thank you, it's really kind of you!

zh: 你在找留聲機嗎？ 進去看看吧，買不買隨你
en: Looking for a phonograph? Our latest model's inside. It doesn't cost anything to look.

zh: 因為工作意謂著獲得自由

en: There are moments when we ponder
The love we have yet to know

zh: 愛人也還沒有敞開心扉
en: The lover who is yet to show
Though silently we hope him yonder
Will I meet this lover some day?

zh: 什麼時候？ 會是在哪
en: At what time, in what way?

zh: 從早前的約會開始我就愛上了你
en: I've loved you since an early date

zh: 雖然你的名字對我來說還是個謎，但我仍然愛你
en: I've loved you, though your name is a mystery
It's you I call, it's you I await

zh: 我對我們的愛充滿希望和癡情
en: Love thrives on hope And a touch of folly

zh: 只為了再見你到你 再續前緣
en: All it takes is one look for joy to start

zh: 快來吧，只有你能為我解．優
快來吧，我已經被你迷住了
快來吧，我愛你，你也會愛上我
en: Come, let me love you and you will love me
Let me read deep in your eyes
You don't know who I am.
That will do. That will do!

zh: 我不許你纏著我外甥女
en: I forbid you to address my niece.

zh: 我們會給你們一份有用的工作
en: We will give you a job of worth
State your name and date of birth

zh: 我們將給你們一份有用的工作
en: We will give you a job of worth
Don't know what you want, do you?
Get in line with the others.
- Let go. Get going, since you want to leave!
- Let me... - I'll get chewed out.

zh: 來吧，孩子，你得對我好點
en: Come now, child, you have to be nice to me.
I don't get it. They all jumped on me.

zh: 我沒辦法裝上我的零件...

en: So I ran after the belt... What's your version?

zh: 他擋住了我，我沒辦法做事
en: He got in my way. I couldn't work. What about you?

zh: 你說呢？ 他們三個圍住我

en: Not at all. He started it.
- I don't know. - You don't know?

zh: 你好，老夥計你好，老朋友
en: - Hello, old man. - Hello, my good man.
You don't want them finding out. - Enough!

zh: 這傢伙一定有什麼事想告訴我
en: This fellow must have something to tell me.
This is quite amusing. Come with me.
I'm in a hurry. I've got to go.
There's one more thing we need to know.
What are you doing standing here?
Run along. Run along, you two.
And you? Will you run along!
- To return a hankie. - Want to start a scandal?

zh: 我數三下，再跑我就打碎你的腦袋
en: If you don't stop by the count of 3, I'll blow your brains out.

zh: 你弄傷自己了，你想幹什麼？
en: You hurt yourself. What did you expect?
Let this be the last of you.
So here's to us two and liberty!

zh: 我們的朋友看上去真是輝煌

en: How does Louis look to you?
Do you mean it? This is an outrage.

zh: 對不起，路易斯還沒回來
en: I'm so sorry, Louis isn't home yet.

zh: 親愛的夫人，我們可以等他
en: But, dear Madam, we can wait.

zh: 你別責備他，他工作太辛苦了
en: You must forgive him. He works so hard.
So here's to us two and liberty!
You sit there staring into space.
Like a wound is my desire
I am so sad I shall expire
I didn't get any cake. I didn't have any cake.

zh: 我沒要蛋糕，一點都沒要
en: Nothing at all. I'm so sorry, believe me.
Good help is hard to find.

zh: 不會留下污漬的，不過是糖和奶油罷了
en: It won't stain. It's only sugar and milk.
I'm so sorry for what happened.
It's all set then. See you tomorrow.
Say, my suit looks good on you.
As if it were made for you. Almost.
If I wanted to catch you...
Just take it and get off my back!

zh: 現在我們倆真的自由了
en: So here's to us two and liberty!

zh: 你不認識一個朋友了嗎？
en: Don't you recognize a friend? Coming out of there?
A friend? Shall I awaken the master?
What are you standing there for?

zh: 我們明天要舉行新廠房落成典禮
en: We inaugurate our new plant tomorrow.

zh: 在第一個月內 它會生產出這樣的2000台機器
en: In the first month, it will turn out daily 2000 models like this one.
In the second month, 3000... What is it?
Will you get off my back?
Now get out and stay away from the plant.
I want to stay at the plant.
You can't. It's the one place I can't have you.
Why do you want to stay?
A girl who works at the plant.
- I'm right here, sir. - Not you, him! Step up.
Is this your niece? Yes, sir.
This gentleman wishes to marry her.
Listen. I just wanted to tell you...
Would you like to get married?
A friend of mine would like to marry you. Oh, no, sir.

zh: 噢，不，先生 可你親口對我說起過的
en: Only the other day, you said so.

zh: 請願諒，先生，她可能覺得有些突然
en: Please excuse her, sir. She's feeling a bit intimidated.

zh: 會有辦法的 我指望你了
en: - It'll work out. - I count on you.

zh: 我相信你會改變主意的，小姐
en: I'm sure you'll change your mind, miss.
It'll work out. I can't understand you.

zh: 我真不明白，一生中難得的機會！
別擔心，她一切都會答應的
en: Have no fear, she'll agree to everything.

zh: 放心，會搞定的 謝謝
en: - Relax. It'll all work out. - Thanks.
I'll tell you later. Isn't that so?

zh: 又見面了 當然，先生
我的外甥女急著想見到你
en: My niece can't wait to meet you.

zh: 可以的話晚上請來我家
en: If you'd care to come tonight...

zh: 明天是個吉日，我要為新工廠剪綵
en: Tomorrow's the great day. I inaugurate my new plant.
And I celebrate my engagement, I hope.

zh: 我們說出去，你一切都完了
en: If we blab, you lose everything.

zh: 除非拿出來與我們分享
en: That's what you're gonna share with us.

zh: 我們收到一份入室盜竊報告
en: We received a report on a housebreaking.

zh: 不過是朋友的一個玩笑
en: But it's a practical joke played by my friends.
But I was tied hand and foot!
- What are you doing here? - Papers!
He took us for a ride.
We can't stay here! Isn't there a combination? Things look bad.
- They'll blow the whistle on me.
We have to get ready to run.
You idiot! Shut the door, quick!

zh: 沒什麼？ 有個男子溜進了工廠
en: It's nothing, sir, but a man's slipped into the plant.
A man? We're looking for him.

zh: 我們正在搜查 我沒看見

en: But be my guest, have a good look.
I just saw a guy with it!
Is that all you have to say?

zh: 你不開口他們會抓走我們
en: If you don't speak up, they'll arrest us.

zh: 但你很快也會來跟我們一起
en: But you'll be joining us soon.

zh: 在我們的新工廠 大家沒有更多別的任務，只要管好機器
en: In our new plant, men will have no other task other than supervising the machines.

zh: 更多的工作讓機器去做
en: The machines will do all the work.

zh: 由它們來製造出我們的留聲機
「組織和發展」是我們的座右銘
en: "Organization and progress," that is our motto.

zh: 正是靠著這一點我們才有了先前的成功
en: This explains the success of our earlier factories.

zh: 新的事業同樣有賴放此 這一切都將在你們眼
en: It will be the same under our new enterprise, which will now start up before your very eyes.

zh: 一切進步，都是科技的產物
en: All hail Progress, child of Science

zh: 每一次擴張都使我們向未來邁進
en: Which extends its hand to the future

zh: 火炬散發出金色的光芒
它不斷開掘出人類的智慧
en: It guides its sister, Human Intelligence,

zh: 這位慈善家，偉大的公民... 這個無賴！
你們要逮捕他就快點動手
en: If you want to arrest him again, you'd better hurry.
He's been tipped off. He'll make a run for it.

zh: 在這歷史性的時刻，我們展望未來 並一起來回顧這段光輝的歷程
en: This historic moment, when the fiery gaze of the future looks back on the dazzling flame of the present.

zh: 先生們，在工廠的開工典禮上 我有一種成就感
en: Gentlemen, the opening of this factory is my crowning achievement.
I have nothing more to do among you. I am leaving you.

zh: 我將要離開你們 這個工廠作為送給大家的禮物 送給那些曾經與我共事的人
en: I hereby make a gift of my factories to all whose who have worked with me.

zh: 從現在開始，機器將為他們生產
en: The machines will now work for them.
Destiny beckons me to other paths.

zh: 一位偉大的詩人曾經寫過
en: As a great poet once wrote:
"Let us raise our souls and our hearts

zh: 這些話代表了我的心聲 今天，我希望...
en: These words come to mind on this day when I wish...

zh: 我們要昂首宣佈 人類將來的命運 注定是大有希望的
en: We can lift our heads high and declare that the future destiny of mankind seems to bear great promise.
We will soon taste the fruit...

zh: 當身邊所有的事情開始運作
en: When all things around us operate
Friends, let us enjoy our idleness
Beneath sunny skies what a sweet fate

zh: 我們懶洋洋的放歌水上
en: To laze about and sing like this

zh: 陶醉在無比的幸福之中
en: Let's indulge in this infinite elation

zh: 幸福從甜蜜的一吻開始
en: It takes one kiss for it to start

zh: 我的生命因此而精彩紛呈
他優雅的舉止打動你的心
en: In the gentle beating of your heart

zh: 你們一定從沒想過結婚
en: You must never think of marrying

zh: 因為你們誕生在旅途上
en: When you were born to live on the road
While awaiting the wisdom age may bring

zh: 把愛當成一段單純的插曲
en: Think of love as a mere episode
My old friend, the Earth is round
There are women wherever you go
When we finally run out of ground
That's the time to take it slow
Everywhere, if you take a chance
So here's to us two and liberty!
- Driver, stop! - What troubles you in there? Why do you want to stop?

zh: 那边的人快死了不能在这儿停
en: The man up there, he is bleeding to death. Can't stop.
And just as guilty as a soldier would be, who deserted his post under fire.
Now, in making an example of you, I...

zh: 对不起，外面有些伤员，我...
en: I beg your pardon, sir. I have some wounded outside.
I am looking for the... Oh, yes, yes, yes. You want the Italian unit.
We're the English here, you see. Yes, Number 207. They're in the other wing.
Moved in today. Yes, out that way, straight ahead.
I think they're going to send her back home.
That's a dirty shame. - She'll be disgraced.
- It's regulations. At least they might let her have her baby here.

zh: 现在回去，所有人都知道了
en: If they send her back now, all her friends will know.
- And her family. - She's only herself to blame.
This is war, Fergy, and she loved him.

zh: 有必要所有人都在这儿吗？ 回自己位置上去
en: Well, is it necessary for us all to be here at one time?

zh: 一小时内，收拾好行李，离开这儿
en: Get back to your posts. You will be packed and ready to leave within the hour.

zh: 我帮你收拾好吗？ 好，如果你愿意

en: I guess so. If you want to. Why, of course I want to.

zh: 在这儿她是个真正的人
en: - I beg your pardon? I say, she's the only human being in the whole lot of us.

zh: 巴特利先生，她只不过... 怜悯了一个犯错的人
en: I'm sorry Miss Barkley appears to sympathise with one who has disgraced the uniform we all wear.

zh: 你这萨克逊人，不会亲吻

en: Did you bring me some good cases, baby?
Did you have trouble finding us? - No.
- Is there going to be an offensive? - There's not... Were you under fire?
Madonna, but I worried about you!

zh: 这儿新来了护士，有一个十分漂亮
en: Yes, I can see how much you've been worrying. Seven operations today, baby.
And one of them was beautiful. I took the heart out.

zh: 你再没见过那么好的人
en: It lay in my hand and it beat like this.
It was lovely! Soon, Rinaldi will be the best surgeon in all the corps.
And some day, in all of Italy. - Why not in all the world?

zh: 你会喜欢她的 我需要女人吗？
en: You will like it here, baby.

zh: 漂亮的英国女护士我说女人
en: What sort of a town is this? Any girls? Many beautiful English nurses.
- Girls, too, a house full of them. Another Villa Rossa? Some of them have never been to the front before.
But the nurses are much nicer. The most beautiful is Miss Barkley. I am in love with her.
- Have you any money? - Yes. - Lend me 50 lire.
- What for? I want to make on Miss Barkley the impression of a man of sufficient wealth.
You are my great and good friend and financial protector.
And you're an ass. And now we will eat and drink, and I will take you to meet Miss Barkley.

zh: 给她留个好印象 不
en: But you must make for me a good impression upon her.

zh: 即使你只杨找一个护士

en: And you can have a nurse, too. There is another one named Miss Ferguson.
She is also very, very nice. - No. - "No"?

zh: 我们先吃饭，喝酒 然后再去见她们
en: First, we will eat and drink, and then we'll go and see the girls who have never been to the front before.
You know what an American is?

zh: 她不知道 我是美国人

en: - Well, I'm an American. - Then what are you doing here?
Then what were you doing in Italy?
- Neither do I. - Oh, you've had too much wine.
It takes the enamel off your teeth and leaves it on the roof of your mouth.
This, my dear, is called an arch.

zh: 孤形是建筑中最古老的形式
en: The arch, my dear, is perhaps the oldest of architectural devices.
The very word will tell you how inextricably the two are one.
In a word, my dear, architecture is the most ancient of the arts.

zh: 正如你是最古老的珍宝
en: Just as yours is the most ancient of the professions.
You'd better put your shoe on, or you'll get cold feet.
If you please, I'd like to go now.
The air raid seems to be over.
Catherine! - Catherine! - Here I am, Fergy.

zh: 我没走远 大家以为你...

en: Who's that man? Oh, I don't know. Some lunatic.
What if we take the mountains to the north?
Behind them are more mountains, and behind those, more yet.
And we take them all only if the Austrians stop fighting. One side must stop.

zh: 永远进行下去像长河一样
en: - Stop? It will go on forever. - Like him.
The Priest wants the Austrians to win the war. - No, no, no. It is not true.

zh: 我们必须打仗，必须进攻
en: - But you don't want us to attack. If we must have war, I suppose we have to attack.

zh: 这是必须的你喜欢打仗
en: Oh, but so many die that way. But what is death to a Christian.
- Oh, you are back safe. - Hello, Father. - I am so glad.
- The Priest prayed for you, Frederico. - Every time you go out he does the same.

zh: 巴克莉小姐她们都在这儿
en: You nearly missed the party. But it is very dull. But Miss Barkley is here, and her friend Miss Ferguson.
The one you will like. Come.

zh: 巴克莉小姐，这是我的战友亨利
en: Miss Barkley, permit me to present to you my friend and war brother, Lieutenant Henry.
He has just returned back from the front.
- How do you do? - How do you do?
Now he begins again, that fellow. Quick, let us go into the garden.
Now, you stay here. I will find something for us to drink.
- Which do you like? - All of them.
Then you shall have all of them.
- Nice out here. - Hmm, isn't it?
We seem fated to bump into each other in the dark.
I'm sorry about that. I mistook you for someone else.
- I had been drinking. - I gathered that, too.
- No. - You're an American, aren't you?
- Yes. Well, then what are you doing in the Italian army?
It's not really the army, it's only the ambulance.
Why did you do it? I don't know.

zh: 我只想离开英国，换个地方
en: Why did you? Oh, I joined up in England.
Yes, do bring her out, Captain Rinaldi.
Because I'm here with you. Women prefer him, as a rule.
- Who? - The boy you're engaged to. - He's dead.
He was killed in the Somme. Were you engaged long? Eight years.
I didn't know what the war was like then.
If I had it to do over again, I'd marry him, or anything.
Something picturesque. This is a picturesque front.
Not France. He didn't have a sabre cut.
What are you thinking about now?
About how nice it is. And you're nice, too.
I'm sorry. Did I hurt you?
It's all right. I'm dreadfully sorry.
Really. I... I just couldn't bear the nurses'-evening-off aspect of it.
It's quite all right. I don't mind at all.
Poor man. You see, I've been leading a funny sort of life.
You don't have to talk a lot of nonsense, I said I'm sorry.
You're sweet. - No, I'm not. - Yes, you're a dear.

zh: 若你现在吻我，我会很开心
en: I'd be very glad to have you kiss me now, if you don't mind.

zh: 见到凯瑟琳小姐了吗？ 凯瑟琳？
她不是与你一同出去的吗？

en: - Didn't she go out there with you?
- No, no, no. - But just a little while ago...

zh: 我看到他与上尉一起出了院子
en: I thought I saw her go out to the garden gate with the Lieutenant Henry.
She went out with an officer?

zh: 若你不信，可以去问守卫
en: Alone? Well, perhaps I was mistaken, you know, it is quite dark out there.
No. No, I am sure I was mistaken.

zh: 希望我丈夫会那么对我
en: Hmm, it's nice. I suppose that has to be enough for people who are living as we live.
Back home, I'd have courted you and sent you flowers.

zh: 我闪在这儿已一个多小时了
en: Out here, you crowd it all into one hour.
Isn't that the way it's got to be, out here?

zh: 听着，明早我又要重返前线
en: Look... Tomorrow morning I've got to go up to the front again.

zh: 你就永远见不到我了 我们何时才能相见？
en: And if a shell got me and you never saw me again, then we'd both be sorry that we've been so formal and waited.
Besides, what's there so fine in putting it off, dragging it out,
Thanks for the lovely concert. - I...
- I hope you are not worried about Miss Barkley.
It's not like her to disappear this way.
Well, perhaps she felt ill and went home alone.
Perhaps. Good night. Come, girls, come.

zh: 算了我本不想会这样的
en: It doesn't matter. If it had to happen, I'd rather it were like this.
I couldn't know. In a church or out under the stars.
And tonight, who cares, and tomorrow, who knows.
What did you say your name was?
If you knew how I was back home, you'd see the funny side of it.

zh: 老天，我们已把战争批得一无是处
en: Oh! We blame everything on the war, but that's rot.

zh: 女人们会在广场集中 那又怎样？
en: The lady sat in the public square and mourned her lost innocence.
Did you have a nice, uh, time, baby?
You made progress with her, eh?
We're friends. If that's what you mean.
I mean, uh... Was she nice to you, practically speaking?
- I am a man of extreme delicacy, - but was she...
If you wanna be a friend of mine, shut up.
I am your best friend and your war brother. Then shut up.
Miss Barkley prefers you to me. That is very clear.

zh: 可是我可以想像她与以前一样可爱
en: But Miss Ferguson is very nice, too.
A lot of geese, that's what you are!
Silly geese! Stuffed with bunk about woman's part in the war.

zh: 只能鼓励男人去打仗 或者丰献自己
en: We must bring solace to the men who fight, sacrifice ourselves, give ourselves.
If you'd known him for a long time, or been in love with him...
But you only met him tonight.
How long must you know a man before you can love him?
Are you pretending to be in love with that man?
I think I am, Fergy. I must be.
You're just another conquest to him.
One in a hundred. You'll probably never see him again.

zh: 他会回来 会来找我 我想会的
en: He said if he'd met me back home, he'd have courted me, sent me flowers...
I suppose I won't ever see him again.

zh: 我要见巴克利小姐去吧
en: - I wanna see Miss Barkley. - She's on duty.
Wait, you can't go in there.
Hey, why have you come back in here for?
The Tenente, he knows what he's doing.
Going to ever get started here? We got plenty of time. Oh, the...

zh: 我想你搞错了，在这儿干什么？
en: I thought you started. What are you doing here?
Hi. You're all right, aren't you?

zh: 我不希望不在时令你伤心
en: I'm going to be away for a while, and I didn't want you to think that I'd just gone away.
What I mean is, I'd hate to have you feel that...
That it wasn't important to me. About... About us.
Uh, I don't exactly know how to say it.
You've said it very nicely, dear, thank you.
No. Only a few days. There's gonna be a show above...
Nothing much, I guess. A show? You'll be careful, won't you?
I won't get hit. Hold this.

zh: 这个可以为你带来幸运

en: They say a Saint Anthony is very useful to guard you from harm.
I'll take good care of him.
I wish I could kiss you.
He is my friend and a good soldier.

zh: 我不希望他为一名女人分心
en: I do not like to see him lose his head over a woman.

zh: 你真那么认为？ 会的
那么送他回基地吧，上校
en: I think not. Couldn't we send her back to the base, Major?
Oh, if you could send her away, it would simplify everything.
Could perhaps send her to Milan. Excellent, my dear Major!
Magnificent! No wonder the English are first in diplomacy.
Er, what did you say her name was?
We won't get anything else to eat once the attack starts.
This is all they've given me.
No, we'll all eat together. Come on, sit down to it.
- Thank you. - Here, you cut this.
Wash it down with wine, Tenente.

zh: 当然，又是我们受攻击了
再不进攻，战争就结束了
en: If nobody would attack, the war would be over.
- Sounded like a Skoda to me.
My leg. Hold my neck, Tenente.
Lacerations of the scalp and possible fracture of the skull.
Multiple superficial wounds of the left and right thigh, left and right knee, and right foot.
Profound wounds of right knee and foot incurred in line of duty.
- Come on, lift him up a little more. - All right. Carefully!
Rinaldi. What are you doing here?
The Major gave me permission to come.
No one shall hurt you, baby.
I won't let them. No butcher is going to touch my war brother.
Only Rinaldi can take you and never hurt you.

zh: 我很高兴能再见到你，可是...
en: You must forgive me, baby, for talking so much, but I am...

zh: 你却受伤了 怎样了？
en: I'm very moved to see you badly wounded.
How did it happen? I will see you are decorated for bravery.

zh: 我们会非常小心处理的
en: Perhaps we can get you the medaglia d'argento, but surely the bronze one.
Did you carry somebody on your back?
Surely there was something heroic. Tell me what you did.
I was blown up eating cheese.

zh: 别担心，我会帮你办妥一切
en: Don't worry, baby. I will fix you so that you are as good as new. You will see.
Every day, I learn to do things smoother, quicker.
Soon, very soon, you will be walking again.
I brought a present for you.

zh: 我带了一支白兰地，很好的
en: You will find it under your blanket, next to your heart. It is a bottle of brandy, baby.
Very good brandy. The infantry captured it from the Austrians on San Gabriele.
I have another surprise for you.
Where do you think you will go from here?

zh: 他不会再留在那种医院里
en: To the Italian hospital where they have the male nurses with the beards? No.

zh: 我会为她办好手续 英国人就是这样
en: I will arrange everything with my friend, the British Major.
You will go to Milan. To the beautiful Miss Barkley.

zh: 没有人会不为此动心的
en: Think of Rinaldi, left all alone with the war. No one to make fun of.
While you are in Milan with the beautiful Miss Barkley.
Making love in Milan to the chaste Miss Barkley.

zh: 可否把你的身份证证明给我
en: May I have your medical papers, please?
They're in my coat. In the buttoned-down pocket.
Take him up those stairs, down the corridor.
His room is the one at the end.
You show them, Giulio. Who are you?

zh: 我是这儿的院工跟我来
en: I am the porter, Signor Tenente. Come, follow me.
Now, Signor Tenente, we must lift you off the bed.
- All right. But keep my legs straight. - Si, Signor Tenente.

zh: 来点白兰地吧 老天
en: - Get me some brandy. - No, it's not allowed, Signor Tenente.
Wasn't I wounded, fighting for the glory of Italy?
- You'll find some money in my pocket. - As you wish.
I believe that's why you got wounded. - Where is she? - You ought to be still.

zh: 我的任务是给你量体温

en: I must take your temperature. Does she know I'm here?
- You're lovely. Oh, my poor darling. It's your leg, isn't it?
- You're the loveliest thing I ever saw. - Oh...
I have to go now, darling, I can't stay.
- But we have to be awfully careful. - You've got to come back.
I will, when I can. - Tonight? - I'll try.

zh: 在这种高温下你还活着
en: It's a miracle you're not delirious with such a fever.
- Stay quiet, please. It's not what you think.
I have brought you a few little things.
And this is mosquito netting, and this is a bottle of vermouth. You like vermouth, huh?
- Thank you, Father. It's very good of you to come.
Oh, but I mustn't stay long. They warned me not to tire you.
I am tired, but I have no right to be.
- No. But I hate the war.
- I don't enjoy it. - But you do not mind it. You do not see it.
Oh, you must forgive me. I know you are wounded.
That was an accident. Still, even wounded, you do not see it. I can tell.
I do not see it myself, but I feel it a little.

zh: 你的病人一早就好清醒
en: It's still early. You are sure? With the operation in the morning, he should rest.
He has such a lovely temperature. It is always normal. I'm very proud of his temperature.
Maybe all our children will have fine temperatures, too.
Our children will probably have beastly temperatures.
Don't mind us, Father. We're in love.
I know. I could see it in your faces.
This, too, is the war. Without the war, you would have married in God's grace.
I hadn't thought about it like that, but... Yes, I suppose so.

zh: 他怎么了？ 你去看看
我祝福你们 我想通了
en: Of course you realise, Father, that army regulations prevent us from marrying?
Poor Cat. Such a crazy marriage.

zh: 我想他会为这奋斗 我可以感受到

en: It was a foolish notion, perhaps.

zh: 可能这会促成你们两个
en: I have not the right to say you are married. Yet, it has made me happy to do this.
For now, from my heart, I can say I bless you in His name.
Goodbye and be happy, both of you.
- Give my regards to the mess.

zh: 希望下次来时，你已痊愈
en: - I will. And get well soon.
I will come again the next time I am in Milan. - Goodbye, my dear. - Goodbye.
Your operation's in the morning. It's our wedding night. Oh, darling.
You'll have to take your oil.
Castor oil? No. You'll take it from me.
I want what you want. There isn't any "me" any more, just what you want.
Don't I make a lovely wife? Such a lovely wife.
No wonder my heart beats. I'm mad about you.

zh: 这即是那个操作手 我以前认识你 是吗？
en: That's the opera I made my debut in at La Scala.

zh: 多少？ 我都花过5个说谎

en: - That's a lie! Yes, they did. I threw six benches myself.
Oh, now he is offended. He'll get over it.
You don't care whom you hurt. Now, don't you get mad, too.
Catherine and I were thinking of asking you to our wedding.
- You'll never get married. - We will! No, you won't.
- Oh, we never fight. - You've time yet.

zh: 我们不会打战了那你会死
en: We won't fight ever. You'll die, then.
Fight or die. That's what people do.
Maybe you'll be all right, you two.
Watch out you don't get her in trouble.
- I won't get her into trouble.
- You better not. Or I'll kill you.
What is the matter with her?
She doesn't like me, that's all.
Oh, no. She just likes me more.
Are you on night duty tonight?
Yes, but you won't care. You'll go right off to sleep.

zh: 亲爱的，你以前爱过几个？

en: Darling, how many other girls have you ever loved?

zh: 有多少个... 该怎么说？

en: How do you say it... Loved?

zh: 那就对了，我不想你说谎
en: - Of course. - Oh, that's right. You just keep right on lying, that's what I want you to do.
I have never been with anyone.

zh: 他们长什么样？ 我已不记得了
你已是我的人了，这是事实
en: I don't know anything about it. You're just mine.
That's true. You've never belonged to anyone else.
I don't care if you have, though.

zh: 不管以前你与多少人好过
en: I'm not afraid of them. Only, don't tell me about them.
You never told them you loved them, did you?

zh: 亲爱的，我太爱你了 那么吻我吧
en: - Oh, darling, I do love you.
- Then, kiss me. - Right here on the street? - Yes.
What is this, if I may ask? What was in it?
That's the best kind. It comes in those bear-shaped bottles from Russia.
And I've been pitying you for being wounded.

zh: 我真的在你身上浪费时间
en: Pity is something that is wasted on you.
- Thank you. - If you're so anxious not to go back to the front,
I should think you'd try something more intelligent.
And I also say that I'll see your convalescent leave is cancelled.
You'll go back to the front tomorrow night.
Have I time for a drink before the train leaves? - For the front?
- Yes. - About 20 minutes, Signor Capitano. - Right.
It's a fine room, a lovely room.
It's all right. The red plush is just the thing.
Those mirrors are very attractive, too.
People who go in for vice seem to have very good taste about it.
Hmm, you're a grand girl. Oh, darling.

zh: 我希望我们可长久在一起
en: I wish we could do something really simple.
Everything we do seems so innocent and right.
I am a simple girl. Nobody but you ever realised it.

zh: 没有人会意识到这一点 你真是个疯狂女孩
en: At first, I thought you were a crazy girl.
I was a little crazy at first.

zh: 不过我不能在乎何时走
en: It makes up at Turin. But it stays in the station here until time to leave.

zh: 我该何时回来 自己也说不上
en: "But at my back, I always hear Time's winged chariot hurrying near"
It's by Marvell. Oh, it's about a girl who wouldn't live with a man.
I like it. I'm afraid of the rain.

zh: 我一见到雨，就会想到有人会死
en: I'm afraid of the rain because sometimes I see me dead in it.
No! And sometimes I see you dead in it.
- Oh, now, darling, don't say that.
No, please, I don't want you...
All right, darling. How often will you write?
As often as I can. Do they read your letters?
They can't read English enough to hurt anything.
Well, I'll make them very confusing.
But not too confusing. Oh, I should have got you a going-away gift.
A whistle to make you feel better in the dark.
Or a sword. I'm sure we could get a used sword very cheap.
Swords aren't very useful at the front.
Oh, I see, they get in the way of your legs when you're running.
They might be useful at mess, though.
I'm afraid I have to start, darling.
I hate to leave our fine house.
We never stay settled very long in a home, do we?

zh: 我会为你安排一个好家
en: I'll have a fine home for you when you come back.
Maybe this time, you'll be hurt just a little in the foot.
- Or the lobe of the ear. - Oh, no, no, no. I want your ears just the way they are.
Your feet have been hurt already.

zh: 我想要张去瑞士的车票
en: I want a ticket to Switzerland, please.
- To where, signora, to what town?
- The nearest one to Italy. That would be Brissago, signora.
- Then give me a ticket to Brissago. - All right. Oh...

zh: 我还以为你不来了怎么回事？
en: Oh, Fergy, I was afraid you wouldn't come. Would you mind telling me what this is all about?
- So I gathered by this, but where? - I'm going away.
To Switzerland, to have a baby.

zh: 我要养小孩 你有麻烦了吗？

en: I knew he'd get you in trouble.
Oh, now, it wasn't his fault, really, Fergy. What's he going to do about it?
You didn't tell him? What would be the good? It would only worry him.
He'd have to go anyway. Aren't you going to tell him?

zh: 还没有，我等他从那儿回来
en: Well, not yet. I may write him from Switzerland.
What's the hurry? Why tonight? I couldn't go back to that hospital.
I couldn't stand it. Not with him gone. But you'll be all alone in Switzerland.
Don't worry, Fergy, I'll be all right.
You're not afraid of anything, are you?

zh: 那我还是快回医院去吧
en: Only of going back to that hospital.
"I've always told you I was a crazy girl.
"I couldn't bear Milan with you away.
"So I've chucked the war and come to live in this little Swiss town
"as near as possible to the Italian border and you.
"And, darling, it's an adorable place and we'll be very happy here. "I've taken a suite...

zh: 为你准备了最好的饭店

en: "And I'm fairly wallowing in luxury. "The bed is Empire and fit for an empress.
"There's a maroon velvet carpet, ankle-deep, "and a bathroom... Oh, darling, the bathroom!
"It's of black marble with silver fittings.
"I've just dined in state at my sitting-room window,
"from which there is a divine view of the lake shimmering in moonlight."

zh: 那种地方会好到哪儿去？
en: It's not really a nice place at all.

zh: 不过我们住哪儿无关紧要

en: But it doesn't matter where I live, because I don't really live at all when I'm not with you.
Oh, darling... What I really wanna tell you is that...
That I shall lie awake in the dark and cry, because you're not here.
- Why? - Time to go. - Go where?
But I told you before, to the Villa Rossa.
- Not me. But you must. It will be a fine party.
And, besides, I said you would go. I can't. I've got to write a letter.
Every day, more letters. You might as well be married. That's my business.

zh: 宝贝，你得回到我们这一边
en: Oh, baby. How you ever come back to me?
Serious like a shopkeeper with a liver.

zh: 没人会阻止你 拿开怎么...
en: Where is my war brother who used to get drunk with me and go to the Villa Rossa every night?
Isn't she just a girl? Keep her out of this.
Sacred subject. Believe me, baby, sacred subjects are not good for soldiers.
Why don't you be like me? All fire and smoke.

zh: 我才不怕死 怎么样？

en: Of course I am drunk! You come with me and you will be drunk, too. Come on, baby.
Oh, I am sorry. Now you must come.
There is no more ink. Get your hands off me and get out!

zh: 你就立刻离开这儿 这是你的问题了
en: Tomorrow I will get you drunk and I will take out your liver and I will put you in a good Italian liver and make a man of you again.

zh: 你是这儿的主管吗？ 怎么？

en: - The mail just came, Signor Capitano. - You censor it.

zh: 不过你先得看一下好吧
en: - Signor capitano... The officers' mail, too?

zh: 还要再加一点吗？ 不
en: Aren't you gonna open them, Signor Capitano?

zh: 我不希望他为女人而这样

en: I do not like to see him lose his head over a woman. Yes, Signor capitano.
And today my letters came back. Every one I'd ever written to her.
Came back? Just marked "Return to sender.
Person unknown." Well, that's very strange.
She never got one. - Well, that's why she never wrote you.
- No. She'd have written me anyway.
Something's happened to her. - Have you tried to...
- I can't get any information at all.
- I've got to go and find her myself. - How can you? I'm going to Milan.
I'll find her. But aren't all leaves of absence forbidden since that battle in the north began?
- I don't care, I'm going. - You'll be caught. - You mustn't do this, Frederico.
- Yes, I must. That's what I wanted to tell you, Padre.

zh: 战争对我们意味着什么？
en: What does this war mean to me any more?
What does anything mean, but finding her?
- But Frederico, consider the... - I can depend on you, Padre?

zh: 说再见，即可 你什么意思？
en: Say goodbye to Rinaldi and the others for me.
- When are you leaving? - Now. While they are at dinner.
And by morning, when they miss me, I'll be halfway to Milan.
If they ask me, what will I say? I... Anything you like.
May the Lord bless and preserve you.
What are you carabinieri doing in the yards?
- Looking for stragglers. - What do you do with them?
Send them back to fight invaders. Every foot of Italian soil must be regained.
Suppose they don't want to go back?
Where's Catherine? - What are you doing back here?
- Where is she? I've got to see her. - You can't.
Where? - And you'd better get out.
- If you don't get out of here, I'll scream and bring the whole hospital down on you.
Tell me. - No! - Tell me where she is!
- What do you mean? - I said you'd get her into trouble.
I hate you. Hate, you understand? I won't tell you anything.
Shh! I hope they catch you.

zh: 看你对她都做了些什么？

en: Pay you back for what you've done to her. Making her have a baby.
- I warned you, but you didn't care.
Not about her. - Now she's had to go away.
Oh, for pity's sake, tell me! Fergy! No, no!
No! - We're coming, too! - Be careful, girls.

zh: 我得老实说，弄点衣服来
en: Where is he? And get me some clothes.
I can't go around in this uniform. As long as I don't get mixed up in it myself.

zh: 我可以在报上登个启事
en: You won't. I just want you to get some things, and put an advertisement in the newspaper for me.

zh: 我可想不出什么好办法
en: I really oughtn't to, if I had any sense.
I know I shall have awful gas pains in the morning as a result of this.
"Catherine, where are you? "I am free at last.

zh: 在斯翠沙饭店等我，法兰德
en: "Meet me at the Palace Hotel, Stresa." Signed "Frederic."
The Major made an obituary speech in your memory and the Priest,

zh: 不过你太天真了要点什么？
en: - he wanted to say mass for your soul.
- But what... Vermouth. One for you?
Uh, two vermouth. You see, we all thought you were dead.

zh: 也不希望以前的事再次发生
en: It never occurred to us that you might have be shell-shocked, wandered away, lost your memory.

zh: 你总是忘不了从胶 这是好事
en: I saw your advertisement in the paper.

zh: 不过幸运之神不一定会在你这边
en: But as soon as we knew, we arranged everything.
Rinaldi will work on you one of his miraculous cures.
You will go back a hero. I'm not going back. They will decorate you for bravery.
They will even promote you. No. I'm through with the war.

zh: 好了，你看看在战时干了什么
en: Get that straight. But you cannot do that!
You cannot just stop and say, "I'm through with the war." - They will not let you do that. - Two vermouth.
Can I speak to you a moment, sir?
- It's all right, Harry, he's my friend. - But I, uh...
He keeps telling me that it's dangerous for me to stay here any longer.
He spoke of notifying the carabinieri.

zh: 谁知道对方明天会不会来？
en: - When will they come? - Tonight, tomorrow, who knows?
But soon. My boat is still ready, sir.
If they arrest you, no one can save you.
- I know that. - They will shoot you.

zh: 我不解决这事就不回去
en: Look... Get this through your head, I'm not going back!

zh: 我会一直在这儿等 等她回来
en: I've got to wait here until I can find Catherine.
And how do you expect to do that?
I've got some people looking for her.

zh: 这种事... 她已经有我的孩子了
en: - If that is more important than...
- She's going to have a baby. My baby.
And that means everything to you. Yes, it would.

zh: 我得找到她 可能她已不在这儿
en: It means that I've got to find her and get her out of Italy.
- Perhaps she's no longer in Italy. - What makes you say that?
Will you do one for me, too?
Isn't there any mail for me, yet?
Today there are letters. - Many letters. - Many?
Well, that was worth waiting for...
It is up the lake and across.
- I'll make it. At the frontier, there will be sentries.
- I know. - And you will have to watch out - for patrol boats.
- I will. - If it blows too hard, you... - I won't drown.
There must be a Villa Rossa in Pordenone.

zh: 为了一个女人，我们还是朋友
en: Always the same girls until they become like old friends.
Like war comrades. Take it, baby, please.
Please. You're a good egg, Rinin.
No, I am not a good egg.
But if I had understood how you felt about her...

zh: 医生，现在怎么办？ 我也拿不定主意
en: - Shall I get a new cylinder, Doctor?
- It is a new cylinder. Oh, I wanted so to have this baby and not make any trouble.
She is losing strength fast, Doctor.
There's no use. I'll have to operate.
I'm not going to die now.
I got past the place where I was going to die.
Of course you are not going to die.
- It's a caesarean. - We're lucky to be on time.

zh: 她不会有事吧？ 你是她丈夫？ 是的
en: Is she going to be all right?
- Are you the husband? - Yes. She kept calling for you all night.
It would have been better if you'd been here.
I'm sorry. Is she in danger?
- She's very weak. - You don't suppose I could see her now? - Later, later.

zh: 她不会有事吧？ 希望不会

en: The baby? A boy, but he was dead before she ever came in here.
Oh... But she'll be all right?
That's not in my hands any longer.
Better go across the street and get yourself some breakfast.
You look as if you need it. It will be some time before she can see you.

zh: 你有孩子吗？ 长什么样？

en: What was it like? I beg your pardon? What did you say?
Nothing. Some coffee, please, and a brioche.
Italy has won! Thank God it's over.

zh: 这可又要等上一段时间
en: This is the beginning of the end. But it will be a long time before they can rebuild what's been destroyed.

zh: 我们看到地上满是零部件
en: "In the early morning hours of November 4th,

zh: 这是杜乐乐将军的命令
en: "the armistice conditions laid down by the General Badoglio."
Oh, God, please don't let her die.
You took the baby... That was all right. But don't let her die.
Please, dear God, don't let her die.
Her husband's out there. Might as well let him in.
You won't tell him, will you?
Tell him what? That I'm going to die.
I have to know. Not long.
Could I... Could I have my bag, first?
He never liked me to be pale.
- I'm fine. Did you worry about me?
I came as soon as I found where you were.
Poor darling. Let me look at you.
Ah... Tut-tut. You're wet and tired.
You're going to be all right, Catherine.
Do you want me to do anything, Cat?

zh: 只希望你长久留在这儿

en: Tell me you haven't stopped loving me.
I like to hear you say it, though. I'll never stop loving you.
Never? Not even if I died?

zh: 你会按我的要求去做吗？ 我会的
en: You'd never do our things with any other girl, or say the same things, would you?
Never. I want you to have other girls, though.
We'll take a little house in the mountains.
We always planned a house of our own, remember? I'll get you a fine house.

zh: 我很高兴战争已结束了
en: We'll live in it until the war is over.

zh: 而我们又可以再次团聚
en: Then you'll go back to America and be a splendid architect.
We'll be married all over again.
In a church. In a church.

zh: 亲爱的，我不想死 别让我死

en: I don't wanna die. - Don't let me die. - Cat!
Take me in your arms, hold me tight. - Don't let me go. - Catherine.
It's dark out there, and lonely. I don't wanna leave you any more.
I've been alone so much. You... You can't die.
You're a fine girl. A brave girl. Yes.

zh: 我勇敢吗？ 你一直很勇敢

en: Whatever happens, do not be afraid.
Not since we met. Not since we met.
- Never parted. - In life and in death.
In life and in death, we'll never be parted. You do believe that, don't you, Cat?

zh: 我幫你轉到客房服務部.
en: I can connect you with room service.

zh: 我是森福, 大飯店行李房領班.
en: This is Senf, the head porter, Grand Hotel.

zh: 孩子是不是快生出來了?

en: I've got to talk very quickly.

zh: 你知道在我手術之前 我簽的協議嗎?
en: You know that will I made before I had my operation?
I want you to tear it up.

zh: 我來柏林找了個很有名的專家, 讓他看看我的老毛病, 你知道嗎?
en: I came to Berlin to see a great specialist about that old trouble of mine, you know?

zh: 真不幸, 他說我來日不多了.
en: It's pretty bad, and he says I haven't long to live.

zh: 聽著, 他說我活不了幾天了!
en: I say, he says I won't live much longer!

zh: 不, 像這樣的事也不好說.
en: No, it isn't nice to be told things like that.

zh: 瘟疫, 煩惱, 一下子你要死了.
en: You plague, bother, and save, and all of a sudden you're dead.

zh: 我想好好享受一下生活.
en: I want to get something out of life.

zh: 我不會回弗裏德斯多夫 (德國城市)了.
en: I'm never going back to Friedersdorf.
I'm staying here at the Grand Hotel.
It's the most expensive hotel in Berlin.

zh: 所有的名流都會住在這兒.
en: All the best people stay here.

zh: 就是我們的大老闆, 普萊辛格, 也住在這兒.
en: Even our big boss, Preysing, is staying here.

zh: 我要找時間跟他談談 我對他的真實的看法.
en: I'm going to tell him someday just exactly what I think of him.

zh: 請接我在弗裏德斯多夫的家.
en: I want my home in Friedersdorf, please.

zh: 工廠有什麼消息沒有, 親愛的?
en: What news have you from the factory, dear?

zh: 您好, 爸爸, 是你嗎?
和薩克遜尼亞公司的會議安排在 明天上午, 爸爸.
en: The conference with the Saxonia company is set for tomorrow morning, Papa.

zh: 如果合併計劃沒有通過, 我們就會有麻煩了, 爸爸.
en: If the merger does not go through, we are in very bad shape, Papa.

zh: 所有事都依賴於曼徹斯特那邊的消息.
en: Everything depends upon news from Manchester.

zh: 要是和曼徹斯特棉花公司的定單 沒有拿下來的話, ... 我們的處境會很糟, 爸爸.
en: If the deal with the Manchester Cotton Company does not go through... we're facing a very bad situation, Papa.

zh: 我是蘇珊蒂, 格魯辛斯卡婭 夫人的女僕.

en: She will not go to the rehearsal.

zh: 她昨天一晚上也沒有睡.
en: She did not sleep all night.

zh: 有些事情一直在折磨她.
en: There is something preying on her mind.

zh: 我給她吃了片藥, 佛羅拿(安眠藥之類的).
en: I gave her a tablet, a Veronal.

zh: 聽著, 我需要錢, 要不我在這個飯店裏住不下去了.
en: Look here, I need money, or I can't stay at this hotel much longer.

zh: 我已經做好準備工作了.
我知道她住在哪個房間.
en: I know the exact position of her room.

zh: 我和她的芭蕾導師, 皮門諾夫, 也交上了朋友.
en: I've made friends with her ballet master, Pimenov.

zh: 我拿走了我所有的積蓄, 所有的一切... 我要好好的享受一下.
en: I've taken all my savings, everything... and I'm going to enjoy spending it.

zh: 這裏貴的要命, 海因裏希.
但是確實真的太美妙了.
那還不如把我關進監獄算了.
我會把合併的事辦妥的.
en: I will make this merger go through.

zh: 我不需要什麼建議, 非常感謝.
en: I don't need advice, thanks very much.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人不需要用車.
en: Mme. Grusinskaya will not want her car.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人不用車.
en: Mme. Grusinskaya's car is not to be brought.

zh: - 阿多爾弗斯對你很生氣.
en: - Adolphus is very vexed with you.

zh: 你今天早上沒有帶它出去遛達.
en: You didn't take him for his walk this morning.

zh: 這就是為什麼 他們這些小狗不喜歡在大飯店裏.
en: That's why they don't like little dogs in big hotels.

zh: - 我想讓你帶它出去好好轉轉..
en: - I want you to take him for a good walk.
- Don't bring him back till he's exhausted.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人要用車.
en: Mme. Grusinskaya's car is to be brought.

zh: 能幫我把這個交給格魯辛斯卡婭夫人嗎?
en: Will you send this to Mme. Grusinskaya?

zh: - 晚上好, 皮門諾夫先生.
事實上, 男爵, 今晚我們有點擔心.
en: To tell the truth, Baron, tonight we're a little bit nervous.
Were you at the theater last night?

zh: 只要有格魯辛斯卡婭的舞蹈, 我都會去的.
en: I'm always there when Grusinskaya dances.
- Last night was not so good.
- Sorry to have kept you waiting.

zh: 我是在等 曼徹斯特那邊的消息.
en: I've been waiting for news from Manchester.

zh: 除非和薩克遜尼亞公司合併, 否則你會撐不下去的.
en: You can't hold out unless you merge with the Saxonia company.

zh: - 可只有當你的公司和曼徹斯特人 ... 有聯繫時, 薩克遜尼亞公司 才會答應合併.
en: - The Saxonia company will never sign... unless your firm is tied up with the Manchester people.

zh: 他們並不是一定要合併.
但是我在曼徹斯特也有代理.
en: But I have my agent in Manchester.
I'm expecting a telegram any minute.

zh: 你必須得給他們一個好印象.
en: You have to create a good impression.

zh: 不要向薩克遜尼亞公司的人 提起曼徹斯特.
en: Don't even mention Manchester to the Saxonia crowd.

zh: 不, 我不能那麼做, 茲諾威特茲博士.
en: No, I cannot do that, Dr. Zinnowitz.

zh: 我一直都是在相互信任的基礎上做生意.
en: I'm used to making my deals on a solid basis.

zh: 我是一個誠實的商人, 一個好丈夫和一個好父親.
en: I'm an honest businessman, a good husband and a father.

zh: 否則我會活著很不開心的.
en: I could not live happily otherwise.

zh: 我們去別的地方商量一下.
en: We'll go someplace and talk it over.

zh: 叫她去普萊辛格先生的房間. 166號房.
en: Send her to Mr. Preysing's room. 166.

zh: 好的, 茲諾威特茲博士.
他好像一直在等什麼東西 ... 但是一直都沒有來.
en: He always seems to be waiting for something... but it never happens.
Yes, I was in the war.

zh: - 你再也沒有做過, 是不是?
en: - You're not beginning that again, are you?

zh: 請先處理一下我的事吧.
en: Please pay some attention to me.

zh: 我們會為你留著這些房間的.
五間臥室, 兩間起居室.
- 有多少人參加你們的聚會?
- 先生, 請你等一會兒.
en: - Sir, kindly wait one moment, please.
- You wish to have the rooms held?
Really, I won't wait any longer.

zh: 我已經等了很長時間了.
en: I've been here a very long time.

zh: 聽著, 我等了三天, 才給我一個房間.
en: Look here, I waited three days before I got a room at all.

zh: 我最後好不容易才等到的, 可這是什麼房間啊?
en: When I finally got one, what kind of a room was it?

zh: - 一個很不錯的房間, 而且也不貴.
en: - A very nice room, and inexpensive.

zh: - 我沒有讓你給我一個便宜的房間.
en: - I didn't ask you for a cheap room.

zh: 我來這兒登記的時候, 我說過要一個便宜的房間嗎?
en: When I came here to live, did I ask you for a cheap room?

zh: - 你能不能等一會兒, 先生 --
en: - If you wait one moment, sir...

zh: 我來這兒要住兩個星期, 或許三個星期.
en: I came to live here for two weeks, maybe three.

zh: 你們要多少我都能付得起.
en: I can pay whatever you want.

zh: 我認為這絕對是要投訴的.
en: I think it's a perfectly fair complaint.

zh: 我大老遠的過來, 就是想住在大飯店.
en: I came here from a great distance to live at the Grand Hotel.

zh: 我要一個房間, 一個大房間.
en: I want a room, a big room.

zh: 給我的房間要和你們給 普萊辛格總經理的一模一樣.
en: The same kind of room you'd give General Director Preysing.

zh: 我和普萊辛格先生一樣.
en: I'm as good as Mr. Preysing.

zh: 我付得起普萊辛格先生 住的房間的錢.
en: I can pay for a room the same as Mr. Preysing.

zh: 難道你們就把我 安排在拐角的小房間裏? 那裏整天都是水管的砰砰聲.
en: Would you stick him way off in a corner in a little room... where the water pipes go "pop" all day?

zh: 我住在哪兒都沒有關係.
en: It doesn't matter where I stay.

zh: 安排克林格蘭先生住到176號房.
那是我們這裏最豪華的房間.
en: It's one of our most expensive rooms.

zh: 一個大房間, 最好的位置, 還帶一個酒吧間.
en: A large room on the front, and with a bar.

zh: - 一個私人的酒吧間, 我一個人專用的.
en: - With a private bar, exclusively mine.

zh: - 不, 請不要, 先生.
en: - No, I beg of you, sir.

zh: 我叫克林格蘭, 從弗裏德斯多夫來的.
en: Permit me. My name is Kringelein, from Friedersdorf.

zh: 請允許我介紹奧特姆斯萊格醫生.
en: Permit me to present Dr. Otternschlag.

zh: 當一個人的領子要是 長出來一英吋, 我就會知道他在得病.
en: When a man's collar is an inch too big for him, I know he's ill.

zh: 我現在得去換下衣服了.
en: I must go and dress now.
- I hope to see you at the theater.
- Is this gentleman a baron, too?

zh: - 克林格蘭先生請在這裏簽個名, 好嗎?
en: - Will Mr. Kringelein kindly sign here?

zh: - 我告訴過你不要進到大廳裏來.
en: - I told you not to come into the lobby.

zh: 難道我沒告訴過你嗎? 不要一面抽煙一面跟我說話.
en: Haven't I told you not talk to me with a cigarette in your mouth?

zh: 這邊走, 克林格蘭先生.
- 你到樓上166號房, 好嗎?

en: She said, "On the other side of the fence."

zh: 男爵, 你無可救要了.
劇院, 飯店, 火車.
火車, 飯店, 劇院.
- 她要醒了, 會給我打電話的.
en: - She'll be waking up and calling for me.

zh: 那麻煩你請在外面等一會兒.
en: Then you will please wait outside, please.

zh: 嗯, 我所有的一切, 包括棺材本, 我都帶過來了.
en: Listen, the burial fund and everything. I've got it right here.

zh: 我要盡可能過的舒服, 過的開心.
en: I'm going to have a good time while I can.

zh: 這是我的座右銘, 克林格蘭:
人生苦短, 及時行樂.
en: a short life and a gay one.

zh: 人生苦短, 男爵, 還有及時行樂.
en: A short life, Baron, and a gay one.

zh: 對我這樣的人, 真是太對了.
en: That's very true in my case.

zh: 噢, 你不認為我與你是不相關的... 但是如果你買些新衣服, ... 可能你會更開心一些.
en: You know, I know you won't think I'm impertinent... but perhaps you might have a little better time... if you bought some new clothes.

zh: 可以說是, 開始你的新生.
en: Started out fresh, so to speak.

zh: 哦, 男爵, 我想我沒有時間做這件事了.
en: Well, Baron, I didn't think there was time for that.

zh: 但是我還是很感謝你關心我的事兒.
en: But it's very kind of you to take an interest.

zh: - 你的房間準備好了, 先生.
再見到男爵, 我還可以和他說話嗎?
en: I may speak to the Baron anytime I see him?

zh: 我是說, 當你和你的朋友在一起的時候?
en: I mean, when you're with your smart friends?

zh: - 我沒有朋友, 克林格蘭.
我想知道, 如果有人從這兒落到那個搬運工身上 ... 那個搬運工會怎麼樣?
en: I've often wondered what would happen to that porter... if somebody jumped on him from here.
Why don't you try it and find out?

zh: 他一定是一個很棒的傢伙.
en: He must be an awful nice fellow.

zh: 我的那個胖的像球似的鄰居, 名叫...
en: That fat, bulbous neighbor of mine, Mister....

zh: - 難道你不是在彈什麼嗎?
- 是的, 我是一個女速記員.
有機會的話, 希望你能為我記些什麼, 好嗎?
en: I don't suppose you'd take some dictation from me sometime, would you?

zh: - 過會兒, 一起喝茶, 好嗎?
我一天只吃一頓飯, 我可不想把它弄糟了.
en: I only have one meal a day, and I'd rather hate to spoil it.

zh: . 但是為什麼一天只吃一頓哪?
en: But why one meal a day?

zh: 但是我一直認為 小速記員花不了多少錢.
en: But I always thought little stenographers made little pennies.

zh: 你以前見過穿著考究外衣的速記員嗎?
en: Did you ever see a stenographer with a decent frock on?
I see what you mean. Poor kid.
- I wish I were free tonight.

zh: 不, 該死, 我沒空兒.
在那個有趣的黃廳, 他們在那兒跳舞.
en: In the funny yellow room where they dance.

zh: 我想知道男爵是否能想起他的承諾? 一個我可以隨時跟他說話的承諾.
en: I wonder if I could remind the Baron of his promise... that I might speak to him at any time?

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 你在皇家套房裏待的舒服嗎?
en: Mr. Kringelein, how are you making out in the royal suite?

zh: - 太美妙了, 多謝男爵.
- 那麼這不會是男爵夫人吧?
- 我看上去像男爵夫人嗎?
en: - Do I look like a baroness?

zh: - 你這麼迷人, 無論是什麼身份都像.
en: - You're attractive enough to be anything.

zh: - 弗蘭牡小姐, 這是克林格蘭先生.
en: - Miss Flaemm, this is Mr. Kringelein.

zh: 不知男爵能否賞臉到我豪華的房間看看?
en: I wonder if the Baron would take the trouble to come to my beautiful room?

zh: 我要了些魚子醬和香檳.
en: I've ordered some caviar and champagne.
It's very expensive, but that doesn't matter.

zh: 或許弗蘭牡小姐也會來.
en: Perhaps Miss Flaemm would join us.

zh: 魚子醬, 可能你喜歡, 但我覺得它的味道就像鯡魚.
en: Have caviar, if you like, but it tastes like herring to me.
It does, as a matter of fact.

zh: 我相信我豪華的房間 ... 會吸引你的藝術靈感.
en: I'm sure my beautiful room... will appeal to your artistic sense.

zh: 室內是真正的天鵝絨裝修.
我是從事紡織貿易的, 我明白.
en: I'm in the textile trade, and I know.

zh: 我想你一定非常樂意去看看我的浴室?
en: I wonder if you'd like to see my bathroom?

zh: 整天都提供流水, 有熱的, 有冷的.
en: It has hot and cold running water all day.

zh: 我能在任何我願意的時候洗澡.
en: I can have a bath anytime that I like.

zh: 再見, 克林格蘭先生.
- 出什麼事了, 克林格蘭先生?
多少年了, 我一直在他的工廠裏當牛做馬.
en: I've slaved in that man's factory for years and years.

zh: 把他燒成灰, 我都認識.
en: I know him through and through.

zh: 你能不能屈尊到我的房間來?
en: Won't you join me in my room?

zh: 但是我要過一會兒再去打擾你.
en: I'll join you a little later.

zh: 你認識我們在樓下遇到的那位先生嗎? 就是臉上這樣的.
en: You know the gentleman we met downstairs, with the face?

zh: - 他是個快樂的老紈褲了, 是不是?
en: - He's a gay old blade, isn't he?

zh: 先生們, 夫人正在睡覺.
不好, 我一直醒著, 在想事情.

en: It is time for the performance.

zh: 在我一生中從來沒有這麼累過.
en: I've never been so tired in my life.

zh: 即使是佛羅拿, 也不能幫我入睡.
en: Not even the Veronal can help me to sleep.

zh: 所有一切都是冷的, 一切都結束了.
珍珠, 如果它們要是碎了...
en: The pearls, if they were to break....

zh: 他們只會聚在一起, 帶給我壞運氣.
en: They hold together and bring me bad luck.

zh: 我想它們應該是同一個年輕人送的.
en: I think they are perhaps from the same young man.
He is at the end of the corridor.

zh: 高大, 走起路來像個軍人.
en: Tall. He walks like a soldier.

zh: 夫人一定也注意到了, 很多次了他和我們一起坐電梯.
en: Madame must have noticed how often he rides in the elevator with us.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人不需要她的車.
en: Mme. Grusinskaya will not require her car.
She'll not be going to the theater.
She still has her stage fright.

zh: 是有其它的事兒. - 什麼?

en: - Last night there was no applause.

zh: 那個劇院, 一半是空的.
只是給那麼少的人跳舞.
舞蹈結束了, 我一直等著, 聽著... 但是沒有掌聲. 什麼也沒有.
en: I finished, I waited, I listened... but the applause did not come.

zh: 一切都結束了, 皮門諾夫.
演出前一個小時, 你還穿著睡衣.
en: In negligée an hour before the performance.

zh: 你不打算用車了, 是怎麼回事?
en: What's this, you're canceling your car?

zh: 難道你不知道時間嗎? 還是我們都有毛病了?
en: Do you know the time, or are we all mad?

zh: 難道我們沒有各自的義務嗎?

en: - Is this the time, or I am blind?

zh: 夫人, 你想解除合約?
你竟選擇這麼一個可笑的時間 開這種玩笑.
en: Madame has chosen a funny time for such a funny joke.

zh: 今晚6點鐘, 劇院門口就已經排起了長隊.
en: Tonight there is a line in front of the theater since 6:00.

zh: 現在劇院裏已經塞的滿滿的.
en: The house is jammed to the roof.

zh: - 難道慕艾爾黑穆會騙你?
你再看看, 來的都是什麼樣的觀眾:
法國大使, 美國的百萬富翁, 熱特斯齊王子 --
en: the French ambassador, American millionaires, Princess Retski...

zh: 以後, 我再也不安排芭蕾舞了.
en: After this, no more ballets for me.
If the house is empty again....

zh: 當她畫好妝, 音樂一想起, 她就會沒事的..
en: When she gets her paint on, hears the music, she'll be fine.

zh: 你為什麼還拿著珍珠項鏈?
en: Why did you bring the pearls?
I said I won't wear them.

zh: 我想我最終還是不能和你們在一起了.
en: I don't think I'll be able to join you fellows after all.

zh: 我要是有時間, 我會趕過去的.
en: I'll be there if I'm up for it.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人的車.

en: I'll send them up at once.

zh: 阿多爾弗斯, 我有些 很重要的事要和你商量.
en: Adolphus, I have something very serious to discuss with you.

zh: 當你在街上碰到不是德國種的雌狗 ... 你一定要學會克制.
en: When you meet lady dogs on the street that are not dachshunds... you must exercise some self-control.

zh: 那個舞蹈演員已經去劇院了.
en: The dancer's gone to the theater.
- What are you going to do?
- The pearls are in her room.

zh: 其它人越來越懷疑你的能力.
我和阿姆斯特丹方面通了電話.
en: I had Amsterdam on the phone.

zh: 你太紳士了, 這是個問題.
en: You're too much of a gentleman, that's the trouble.

zh: 我說過今晚我就會拿到珍珠, 對不對?
en: I told you I'd get those pearls tonight, didn't I?
Have you got the skeleton key?

zh: 就一個原因: 外面有個迷人的 樓層服務小姐, 她能看見發生的任何事.
en: One reason: there's a perfectly charming floor clerk outside who sees everything.

zh: 她會知道是我進夫人的房間.
en: She'd see me enter her room.
- I can take care of her.

zh: 在你動手的時候, 用有氯仿(麻醉劑)的手帕把她迷倒.
en: Chloroform on a handkerchief while you're on the job.

zh: 首先, 那會讓她頭痛的非常厲害.
en: Poor kid. In the first place, it would give her a rotten headache.
I had it in the war.

zh: 此外呢, 她相當的漂亮.

en: - She has a very nice line...
- You're no good for this business.

zh: - 在你看來, 像是玩笑.
en: - To you it's just a joke.

zh: 做好準備, 晚上坐火車去 阿姆斯特丹.
en: Be ready to leave on the night train for Amsterdam.

zh: 這人真討厭, 阿多爾弗斯.
en: There is a nasty man, Adolphus.

zh: "雙方要達成共識, 這次合併是 ...
en: "Both parties have fully agreed that this merger can only result...

zh: 茲諾威特茲是怎麼稱呼你的?
en: What did you say Zinnowitz called you?

zh: 我是想問, 和你在走廊聊天的先生是誰?
en: I mean, who were the gentlemen you were talking to in the corridor?

zh: - 你認識很多名流, 是不是?
en: - You know a lot of gentlemen, don't you?
I'm busy now looking for a job.
I'd love to be in the movies.

zh: 你是個與眾不同的速記員.
你長的這麼漂亮, 做什麼工作都合適.
en: You're pretty enough to do other things.

zh: 我有一副很好的畫像, 我擺了很多姿勢.
en: You see, I have a rather nice figure, and I pose a lot.

zh: 藝術研究, 你明白嗎?
"此外, 順利合併棉花公司...
en: "Moreover, the possibility of the successful accommodation...
"should throw a great weight into the balance...."

zh: 你的手曬黑了, 是不是?
en: Your hands are sunburned, aren't they?

zh: - 是的, 滑雪的時候曬的.
上個月, 我的一個朋友 帶我去瑞士滑雪.
en: A friend of mine took me to Switzerland last month.
That must have been very nice.

zh: 我還去過一次佛羅倫薩.
en: I went to Florence once, too.

zh: 別誤會, 弗蘭牡小姐.
我已經結婚了, 我的女兒也成年了 ...
en: I'm a married man and have grown-up daughters...

zh: "和曼徹斯特的生意完全破裂了." 很糟糕嗎?
en: "Deal with Manchester definitely off." Is that something terrible?
It doesn't mean that at all.
- Do you want to go on?

zh: 你早上過來, ... 在開會前, 我們還要繼續記錄.
en: You come back in the morning... and we will go on with the dictation before the conference.

zh: 如果你發現明早不需要我了 ...
en: If you find out you won't need me in the morning...

zh: 我希望你能通知我 ... 因為像你這樣在城裏進進出出的人, 經常是不可靠的.
en: I wish you'd please let me know... because men like you who come in and out of town are often unreliable.

zh: 畢竟, 如果我明天不工作 ...
en: After all, if I don't work tomorrow....

zh: 現在, 我要去170號房, 夫人.
每個人都說, "回來." 他們卻在房間裏不出去.
en: Everyone says, "Come back." They won't get out of their rooms.

zh: 她這麼做是會被起訴的, 這是毀約.
en: This trick is going to cost Madame a suit for breach of contract.

zh: 她以為她在哪兒, 還在俄國?
en: Where does she think she is, Russia?

zh: 我想我得取消去維也納演出的合約了.
en: I suppose I can cancel the Vienna contract.
I just want to be alone.

zh: 夫人, 你會一直都一個人的了.
en: You're going to be very much alone, my dear Madame.

zh: 皮門諾夫先生, 芭蕾導師.
他們根本就沒有想念我.
en: They didn't miss me at all.

zh: 我過去總說, 當這一天來了, 我會不再跳舞了.
en: I always said I'd leave off when the time came.

zh: 而且誰會擔心, 誰會管 一個不再跳舞的... 格魯辛斯卡婭?
en: And who would trouble about a Grusinskaya... who dances no more?

zh: 這就是最終的結果: 死亡.
en: That's what it comes to at last: to die.

zh: 一個碰巧躲在你房間裏的人.
en: Someone who happened to be hiding in your room.

zh: 你去劇院的時候, 我經常來這兒.
en: I often come here when you're at the theater.

zh: 只是想靜靜地一個人待在你房間, 呼吸你呼吸過的空氣.
en: Just to be alone in your room, to breathe the air you breathe.

zh: 你不用求救. 相信我.
en: There's no need to call for help.
Permit me. I couldn't help hearing.

zh: 我知道你剛才想做什麼事.
en: I couldn't help knowing what you were about to do just now.

zh: 我本來可以悄悄的從窗戶出去, 沒人知道, 但我還是冒著被抓的風險來見你.
en: I could have left by the window, unnoticed, but I risked being discovered.

zh: 我可以說幾句話嗎, 夫人?
看見你這樣絕望, 我揪心的痛.
en: It tore my heart to see you in despair like that.

zh: 他們到底要對你怎麼樣?
en: What on earth have they been doing to you?

zh: 你擁有我們夢想中的一切.

en: I've had a very trying evening.

zh: 我非常孤獨, 突然你出現了.
en: I was so alone, and suddenly you were there.
Why do you look at me like that?

zh: 我以前不知道, 你竟然是這麼的美麗動人.
en: I had no idea you were so beautiful.

zh: 我想把你抱在懷裏, 不會讓你再受到傷害, 永遠也不會.
en: I'd like to take you in my arms and not let anything happen to you, ever.
You mustn't talk Russian to me.
Am I so strange to you?

zh: 可能現在不是很陌生了.
你知道嗎, 以前, 俄國大公還在世的時候 ...
en: You know, once, when the Grand Duke was alive...

zh: 我發現有人躲在我房間, 一個年輕的軍官.
en: I found a man hiding in my room, a young officer.

zh: 後來, 人們發現他死了.
en: Later on, they found him dead.

zh: - 一個能一生一世愛你的人.
en: - Someone who can love you, that's all.

zh: 一個能忘記一切, 但唯獨不能忘記你的人.
en: Someone who has forgotten everything else but you.

zh: 在我一生中, 從來沒有見過 像你這麼美麗的女人.
en: I've never seen anything in my life as beautiful as you are.
But I want to be alone.

zh: 你不想一個人孤孤單單.
en: You don't want to be alone.
You were in despair just now.

zh: 那麼, 就許待一分鐘.
香檳, 女孩, 還有她們的舞蹈 ... 漂亮的銀器, 冰, 魚子醬 ... .
en: The champagne, and those girls and their dancing... those beautiful silver things, and the ice, and the caviar....

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 你喝醉了.
我的房間. - 好的, 醫生.
克林格蘭先生, 你喝醉了.
馮蓋根男爵的房間 沒人接電話.
en: Baron von Geigern's room does not answer.

zh: 馮蓋根男爵的司機打來的?
請問哪位找格魯辛斯卡婭夫人?
格魯辛斯卡婭夫人不讓別人打擾.
今天白天普萊辛格 先生的電話接到162號房.
en: Mr. Preysing's calls to 162 for the day.

zh: 紡織業的人一定知道曼徹斯特.
en: A man in the textile industry must know Manchester.

zh: 有很多生意要和 曼徹斯特棉花公司打交道.
en: There's a lot of business to be done with the Manchester Cotton Company.

zh: 整個英國的市場都掌握在他們手中.
en: They have the whole English market right in their hands.

zh: 你們和曼徹斯特有聯繫嗎?
en: Have you any connections with Manchester?

zh: 我們和英格蘭有 許多很好的關係.
en: We have a lot of good connections in England.

zh: -- - 我是說, 和曼徹斯特人.
en: - I mean, with the Manchester people.

zh: 哦, 我們來這兒是討論公司合併的.
en: Please, we are here to discuss the merger.
Let us begin at the beginning.

zh: 自從今年六月十一日, 我們兩個公司之間...
en: Since June 11 this year, when the first negotiation...

zh: - 我們想知道的是曼徹斯特.
en: - All we want to know about is Manchester.

zh: 在我結束之前, 我們先看一下... 最後一項條款.
en: Before I get through, I'm laying before you here... the last general statement of the concern.

zh: 資金, 車間, 機器... .
en: The capital, the plant, the machinery....

zh: 比如, 我們提供拖布.
en: For instance, we'll take mop rags.

zh: 是的, 普萊辛格先生, 那是我們想要知道的.
en: Yes, Mr. Preysing, that's what we want to know.

zh: 在我表態前... 我得等茲諾威特茲律師.
en: I would rather wait for Justice Zinnowitz... before I commit myself, please.

zh: 現在, 繼續討論合併.
en: Now, to go ahead with the merger.

zh: 你們會意識到... 這次合併對你們薩克遜尼亞, 當然, 有很大的好處.
en: You realize... that this merger is a great advantage to the Saxonians, of course.

zh: 現在, 讓我們象成人一樣的談談.
- 當你和我們第一次接洽 --
這封九月十五日的信件 表明你和我們接洽.
en: This letter filed on September 15 indicates you approached us.

zh: 那封信是對你所提出的 試探性建議的回應.
en: That letter is a response to a tentative feeler sent out by you.

zh: 試探性建議, 我不敢相信!
在這信的一個月前, 你岳父...
en: A month before this, your old father-in-law...

zh: - 私下來見我, 初步擬定 --
en: - comes to me privately, and scratches...

zh: - 哦, 我們沒有主動提出!
en: - Why, we did not take the initiative!
- We did not take the initiative!

zh: 先生們, 看來會議已經開始了.
en: Gentlemen, I see the conference has already begun.

zh: - 很高興你來了, 茲諾威特茲律師.
en: - I'm glad you're here, Justice Zinnowitz.

zh: 茲諾威特茲律師, 你能不能幫著...

en: - and iron out the situation here?
- Right here, on the top. - If you will allow me.

zh: 哦, 先生們, 形勢似乎非常清楚.
en: Well, gentlemen, the situation seems to be perfectly clear.

zh: 可是曼徹斯特那邊怎樣?
你說了關於曼徹斯特的事嗎, 普萊辛格先生?
en: Have you said anything about Manchester, Mr. Preysing?

zh: 在這個時候關於 曼徹斯特的事, 我不能表態.
en: I cannot commit myself at this time about Manchester.

zh: 哦, 先生們, 自從今年六月十一日, ... 我們兩個公司之間 關於合併的第一次協商 --
en: Well, gentlemen, since June 11 of this year... when the first negotiations for a merger were entered...

zh: 現在, 我們又要從起點重新開始了.
en: Now we're going to begin at the beginning again.

zh: 你想沒想起來, 當你和我們接洽 --
en: As you remember it, when you approached us...

zh: - 對不起, 你們確實和我們接洽過!
en: - I'm sorry, you did approach us!

zh: 你能想像得到嗎? 在芭蕾學校的100個女孩兒裏... 每人都幻想著成為 世界上最有名的舞蹈演員.
en: Can you imagine 100 girls in a ballet school... each thinking she would become the most famous dancer in the world?
We were drilled like little soldiers.

zh: 沒有休息, 沒有停止.
我, 嬌小, 苗條, 但是我的意志像鑽石一樣堅硬.
en: I was little, slim, but hard as a diamond.

zh: 可是我為什麼要和你說這些?
en: But why am I telling you all this?

zh: 昨晚我還根本不認識你.
en: Last night I didn't know you at all.

zh: 我甚至還不知道你的名字.
en: I don't even know your name.

zh: 我叫菲利克斯·本威努托·弗瑞亨·馮蓋根.
en: I am Felix Benvenuto Frihern von Geigern.
What kind of person are you?

zh: 我是回頭的浪子, 就像白色羊群裏的黑羊.
en: I'm a prodigal son, the black sheep of a white flock.
I shall die on the gallows.
I haven't a bit of character.

zh: 當我還是小孩子的時候, 我被教騎馬, 還有要成為紳士.
en: You know, when I was a little boy I was taught to ride and be a gentleman.

zh: 然後在學校, 祈禱和撒謊.
en: Then at school, to pray and lie.

zh: 接下來在戰爭中, 殺人和躲藏.
en: And then in the war, to kill and hide.
And what do you do now?

zh: 現在我是個賭徒... 一個逍遙法外的人在... 享受著讓我喜歡的每一件事物.
en: Now I'm a gambler... running at large, like a happy pig... devouring everything of life that pleases me.

zh: 我還是個罪犯和飯店竊賊.
en: I'm also a criminal and a hotel thief.

zh: 你必須相信, 我愛你.
en: You must believe that I love you.

zh: 直到現在, 我才知道什麼是愛.
en: That I've never known love like this until now.

zh: 你來這兒就是為了這些?
en: Did you come here just for these?

zh: 那是我想要你珍珠的原因.
en: That's why I wanted your pearls.
I was desperately in need of a certain big sum of money.

zh: 但是最終昨天晚上, 我還是潛入你的房間.
en: But last night, at last, I managed to come into your room.
I couldn't go through with it.
I have to go to rehearsals.

zh: 我們的火車, 明天一早就出發.
en: Our train leaves early tomorrow morning.

zh: 我的心可以和你一起去, 但是我不能.
en: I'd give my soul to go, but I can't.

zh: - 菲利克斯, 是不是因為錢?

en: I have enough for both of us.

zh: 無論怎樣我會處理好的.
en: I'll manage somehow. I'll get it.

zh: 我跳舞, 你和我在一起.
en: I shall dance, and you'll be with me.

zh: 我會休假的, 六個星期, 八個星期.
en: I'll take a vacation, six weeks, eight weeks.
And then we'll go to South America.
- Be careful going to your room.
- I'll be on the train with the money.

zh: 慕艾爾黑穆取消了維也納的合約.
en: Meierheim is canceling the Vienna engagement.

zh: 格魯, 你真是容光煥發了.
皮門諾夫, 我有一個想法, 一個芭蕾舞.
en: Pimenov, I have an idea, a ballet.
But I'll speak with you later.

zh: 我想來一次完整的排練, 芭蕾舞, 管絃樂隊... .
en: I want a full rehearsal, ballet, full orchestra....

zh: 請幫我接 馮蓋根男爵?
en: Will you get me Baron von Geigern, please?

zh: 只是想告訴你 我很開心.
en: Just to tell you that I'm happy.
I'll have something sweet and cold, please.

zh: - 路易斯安那飲料酒(一種雞尾酒), 好嗎 ?
好, 聽起來挺不錯的.

en: What do you do in the Grand Hotel?

zh: 吃, 睡, 到處晃蕩, ... 調會兒情, 跳會兒舞.
en: Eat, sleep, loaf around... flirt a little, dance a little.

zh: 無數人都會依次住在相同的房間裏.
en: A hundred doors leading to one hall.

zh: 沒人知道你的下一個房客的任何事情.
en: No one knows anything about the person next to them.

zh: 當你離開的時候, 有人會佔據你的房間... 躺在你的床上.
en: And when you leave, someone occupies your room... lies in your bed.

zh: 我再說一遍, 這是第十次了... 你們準備好了合併.
en: Let me say again, for the tenth time... you people were quite ready for the merger.

zh: 你們以前表態完全同意所有的條款.
en: You declared yourself fully agreed on all the terms.

zh: 那為什麼你又突然 不想在這些文件上簽字了?
en: Why should the signing of these articles be suddenly held up?

zh: 我得承認我們當時渴望合併.
en: I'll admit that we were at one time anxious for this merger.

zh: 但是此後, 普萊辛格公司 陷入了困境.
en: But since then, the Preysing Company has fallen on evil days.

zh: 難道你沒有看到這寫的... 我公司出口到 巴爾幹地區的商品嗎?
en: Haven't I just shown you here... what my firm exports to the Balkans?
50,000 marks worth of mop rags each and every year.

zh: 我們感興趣的是完全不同的事.
en: We're interested in something entirely different.

zh: 但是普萊辛格先生一直以為 這是確定的 --
en: But Mr. Preysing has too great a regard for the certainty...

zh: 你們已經決定反對合併了?
en: You have decided against the merger?

zh: 普萊辛格, 希望你能度過難關.
en: Preysing, I hope you pull through.

zh: 在這樣一個緊要關頭, 這確實是個不好的消息.
en: It's a very bad time to be in such a crisis.
- No, I have to get my train.
So you're breaking off the negotiations.

zh: 但是難道你們不覺得 我是那麼傻... 因為我沒有告訴你們 曼徹斯特的事.
en: But don't you think for one moment that I'm such a fool... as not to have something to say about Manchester.

zh: 如果你明確地說曼徹斯特的事, 我們會 --
en: If you have something definite to say about Manchester, we might...
- I thought it was all over.

zh: 在這種情況下, 事情就不一樣了.
en: Under these circumstances, it's a different matter.

zh: 是的, 但是在這種情況下, 我們現在會拒絕簽字的.
en: Yes, but under these circumstances we might refuse to sign now.

zh: 普萊辛格, 你簽這兒.
我們應該開瓶香檳慶祝一下.
en: We should celebrate this with a bottle of wine.

zh: 我們下個星期 再來和你處理一下具體事宜.
en: We'll see you next week and settle all the details.
I'll be at your office tomorrow.

zh: 你讓我講的嗓子都啞了... 你卻一直不提和曼徹斯特 簽約的事.
en: You let me talk myself hoarse... and you had Manchester signed up all the time.
- The deal has been put through.
The deal has been put through.

zh: 是的, 如果走投無路了, 騙子...
en: Yes, if that's what the world wants, bluff...

zh: 我可以和別人一樣是個大騙子.
en: I can be just as big a bluff as anyone.

zh: 你必須馬上親自去英格蘭一趟, 把這個事搞好!
en: You must go to England yourself at once and really see this through!

zh: 是的, 我得去英格蘭.
en: Yes, I must go to England.

zh: 我不知道我剛才做了些什麼.
en: I didn't know what I was doing.
This thing goes to a man's head.

zh: - 你現在需要的放鬆一下.
en: - What you need is some relaxation.
I want to maybe go dancing.

zh: 我能理解, 經過這麼麻煩...
en: I can understand that, after this....

zh: 這可是三十年來我第一次... .
en: But that's the first time in 30 years that....
- What do you want with her?
I want to do some dictating.

zh: 我要告訴我岳父, 關於 --
en: I want to tell my father-in-law about...

zh: 她五點鐘在黃廳有個約會.
en: She had an engagement in the Yellow Room at 5:00.
Do you think that she's pretty?

zh: - 你跟我來, 茲諾威特茲.

en: I don't know much about women.
I've been married for 28 years, you know.

zh: 跟我來, 茲諾威特茲.
- 晚上好, 克林格蘭先生.
- 晚上好, 弗蘭牡小姐.
我一整天都和他在一起.
en: I've been with him all day.

zh: 我們開車兜風, 100英里的時速, 象坐飛機一樣.
en: We were in a motor car, 100 miles an hour, in an airplane.

zh: 對不起, 弗蘭牡小姐.

en: Would you have something to drink?

zh: 一杯路易斯安那飲料酒.
- 你喜歡音樂, 克林格蘭先生?
- 男爵, 你不喝點什麼嗎?
en: - Baron, won't you have a drink?

zh: - 一杯路易斯安那飲料酒.
- 克林格蘭先生, 你還好嗎?
en: - Mr. Kringelein, how are you now?

zh: 我覺得有點不適應, 男爵.
en: I feel a little strange, Baron.
Please, Baron, do have a drink.

zh: - 幫我看一下, 好嗎, 克林格蘭先生?
en: - Watch this, will you, Mr. Kringelein?
- I really ought to learn to dance.

zh: 是的, 你應該在時間允許的情況下 盡快學會.
en: Yes, you should learn as quickly as the time allows.

zh: 相信我, 克林格蘭先生, 身邊沒有女人的男人... 是一個死人.
en: Believe me, Mr. Kringelein, a man who is not with a woman... is a dead man.
- What have you been doing all day?

zh: - 你昨天和現在很不一樣.
(第一次)世界大戰的時候, 我在軍隊裏做外科醫生... 直到戰爭結束.
en: I served as a surgeon in the Great War... till the end.

zh: 直到1920年, 我的傷口裏一直有白喉菌.
en: I carried diphtheria bacilli in the wound till 1920.

zh: 嘿, 你想讓一個人高興嗎?
en: Listen, funny one, do you want to make a man happy?

zh: 我看見他心裏覺得挺不好受的, 你不是嗎?
en: I feel rather sorry for him, don't you?

zh: 哦, 你和昨天有些不一樣.
en: You know, you're not a bit like you were yesterday.
I fell in love last night.

zh: 但是現在我知道, 它是存在的.
en: But now I know that it does.

zh: - 一會兒就來, 普萊辛格先生.

en: - No, now. This is very urgent.

zh: 現在這位女士和我有急事.
en: This lady has urgent business with me at the moment.

zh: 晚上好, 普萊辛格先生.
- 抱歉, 我好像不認識你.
en: - I'm sorry, but I cannot place you.

zh: 助理簿記員, C號樓三層23號房.
en: Assistant bookkeeper, Room 23, Building C, third floor.

zh: - 我現在沒上班, 我得病了.
en: - I am away, sick. - That's very interesting.

zh: 能和你跳舞嗎, 克林格蘭先生?
en: Would you like to dance with me, Mr. Kringelein?

zh: 弗蘭牡小姐, 我還從來沒有在公開場合跳舞.
en: Miss Flaemm, I've never danced in public.
There's nothing to be afraid of.

zh: 弗蘭苓小姐, 我有話跟你說.
en: Miss Flaemmchen, I must speak to you.
This is about a dictating job.
We were just going to dance.

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 普萊辛格先生.
克林格蘭先生會是個好朋友, 他不準備接受你跳舞的邀請.
en: Mr. Kringelein would be a good friend and not accept your invitation to dance.

zh: 我沒有想過不接受跳舞的邀請.
en: I couldn't think of not accepting the invitation to dance.

zh: 這太特別了, 克林格蘭先生.
en: This is very extraordinary, Mr. Kringelein.

zh: 我想我們應該調查調查你的帳本了.
en: I think we should look over your books.

zh: 這世界只屬於你一個人嗎, 普萊辛格先生?
en: Does the world belong to you, Mr. Preysing?

zh: 難道我就沒有權利享受生活了嗎?
en: Haven't I got any right to live?
I will wait 10 minutes for you.

zh: 如果你還沒回來, 看來我們有必要去聘請別人了.
en: If you're not back, it will be necessary to engage someone else.

zh: 我們馬上去, 謝謝, 男爵.
en: We're going now, thank you, Baron.

zh: 我會記住這件事的, 克林格蘭先生.
en: I shall remember this, Mr. Kringelein.

zh: 放過那個可憐的傢伙吧.
死神已經越來越逼近他了.
en: Death's staring him in the face.
I did not ask your advice.
I think you'd better go away.

zh: 我倒要看看 我們誰在這裏待的更久.
en: We will see who will remain here the longer.

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 你得 看著我得臉, 不要低頭看地板.
en: Mr. Kringelein, you must look at my face, and not the floor.

zh: - 我以前從來沒有在公眾場合跳過舞.
en: - I never danced in public before.

zh: - 我很開心, 弗蘭牡小姐.
在我一生中, 第一次這麼開心.
en: For the first time in my life, I'm happy.

zh: 對不起, 我只是停一下.
en: Excuse me, I just stopped a second.

zh: 我們不跳了, 你不介意吧?
en: Do you mind if we stop?

zh: - 我得回到普萊辛格先生那兒了.
en: - I must go back to Mr. Preysing now.

zh: 你要知道, 一個人總得謀生的.
en: One has to earn a living, you know.

zh: 你不用的, 弗蘭牡小姐.
- 很高興你回來, 弗蘭牡小姐.
en: - I'm glad you're here, Miss Flaemm.

zh: - 路易斯安那飲料酒哪去了?

en: - Would you like a little cognac?

zh: 你可以走了, 克林格蘭先生.
普萊辛格先生, 在這兒, 我不用聽你的命令.
en: Mr. Preysing, I am not taking orders from you here.

zh: 你以為你有權力 可以隨便的侮辱人嗎?
en: You think you have free license to be insulting?

zh: - 你不希望看見我過的開心.
en: - You don't like to see me enjoying myself.

zh: 當一個人累的要死了, 這就是他所得到的賠償.
en: When a man's working himself to death, that's what he's paid for.

zh: 你並不在乎一個人的工資能否養活他.
en: You don't care if a man can live on his wages or not.

zh: 你有一份不錯的薪水, 你還有醫療補助.
en: You have a very regular scale of wages, and there's the sick fund for you.

zh: 什麼不錯的薪水, 什麼補助.
en: What a scale, and what a fund.

zh: 當我病了四個星期的時候... 你寫信告訴我, 如果我病還不好... 就要解雇我.
en: When I was sick for four weeks... you wrote me a letter telling me I'd be discharged... if I were sick any longer.
Did you write me that letter or not?

zh: 我根本不知道我寫過這封信.
en: I have no idea of the letters that I write.

zh: 我只是知道你像個貴族一樣 住在這兒, 大飯店.
en: I know that you are here in the Grand Hotel, living like a lord.
You are going to take that back!

zh: 當著這個小姐的面, 收回你說的話!
en: Right here in the presence of this young lady!
Who do you think you're talking to?

zh: 如果我骯髒的話, 你就髒死了...
en: If I'm dirt, you're a lot dirtier...

zh: 工業巨頭普萊辛格先生!

en: - You can't do that to him.

zh: 我不認識這個傢伙, 也不知道他要什麼.
en: I don't know the man or what he wants.

zh: 我以前從來沒有見過他.
我給你保管帳本, 我知道你的一切.
en: I've kept your books for you, and I know all about you.

zh: 要是你的僱員有你一半...
en: If one of your employees was half as stupid in a small way...
- as you are in a big way...

zh: 我是我自己的主人... 在我一生中, 這是我第一次.
en: I'm my own master... for the first time in my life.

zh: 我要死了, 沒人能把我怎麼樣了.
en: I'm going to die, and nobody can do anything to me anymore.
Nothing can happen to me anymore.

zh: 不用等到我被解雇, 我就死了!
en: Before I can be discharged, I'll be dead!

zh: 當你厭倦的時候, 時間會過的很慢.
整個晚上我都在醫院, 在走廊裏走來走去.
en: I was in the hospital the whole night, walking up and down the corridor.
They wouldn't let me see her.

zh: 現在我還必須待在這桌子旁.
en: And I have to stay chained to this desk.

zh: 你幫普萊辛格先生 找到那位年輕的女士了嗎?
en: Did you find that young lady for Mr. Preysing?
- Would you like a little cognac?

zh: 我記得你說過, 你去旅行過, 還有... .
en: I understood you to say that you traveled and....

zh: 我非常清楚你的意思, 普萊辛格先生.
en: I understand you perfectly, Mr. Preysing.

zh: 如果要你去的話, 你想要多少?
en: What would you want for such a trip?
I'd have to figure it up.

zh: 我需要衣服和鞋... 還有英格蘭的三月挺冷的. 我還得需要個外套.
en: I'd need clothes and shoes... and it's cold in England in March.

zh: - 你想讓我看起來漂亮吧?
en: - You'd want me to look nice?

zh: - 當然了, 弗蘭牡小姐.
給你在這個飯店... 開個房間, 好嗎?
en: Would you like me to get you a room here... at the hotel?
- Would you please pay some attention?
