zh: 我想今晚我們可以去賭場.
en: I thought this evening we could go to the casino.

zh: 就是我們經過的那個 燈光非常漂亮的地方.
en: That place we passed with the wonderful bright lights.

zh: 克林格蘭, 我很想去.
一個男爵, 身無分文.
我不想偷那個珍珠了, 你也不能偷.
en: I'm not getting those pearls, neither are you.
- I have an idea working in my head.

zh: 你可能會從你腦袋裏找到一發子彈.
en: You might find a bullet through that head.

zh: 你要是那樣做, 除了能得到 警察局的通緝, 此外你什麼也得不到.
en: If you do that you'll get nothing, except maybe the police after you.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人用車!
你要是等一下, 我會還你5,000 --
en: If you wait, I'll pay you back your 5,000...
Are you coming to the theater?
I want to feel that you're there.

zh: - 你在說什麼, 克林格蘭?
en: - What are you talking about, Kringelein?
Is the Baron really in financial straits?

zh: 跟你說實話吧, 現在我必須 搞到一筆錢.
en: To tell you the truth, I must get some money somehow right away.
- If the Baron will permit me.
I'd be awfully glad to oblige.
You've been very decent to me.

zh: 我要是去試一下運氣, 我想我也許會贏的.
en: If I could get into a game of some kind, I think I might win.
I've got over 6,800 marks right here.

zh: 我們要能湊夠幾個人來玩.
en: If we could scare up some men to play.

zh: - 我們可以上去到我的房間.
en: - We could go up to my room.

zh: 你再幫我看看, 好嗎?
en: Will you help me again, please?

zh: 我想你應該幫我, 克林格蘭.
en: I think you'd better help me, Kringelein.
- How much is left in the bank?
- Do you feel like going that far?

zh: 來, 今晚你要把這裏吃定了.
en: Come on, you're killing them tonight.

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 檯面上的錢都要嗎?
en: Mr. Kringelein, care to take the bank?

zh: 我要檯面的這些做什麼?
en: What will I take the bank for?

zh: - 男爵, 一次賭這麼多?
早晚都一樣的, 克林格蘭.
en: It's all the same thing, Kringelein.

zh: 男爵, 要是所有的錢... .
克林格蘭, 你個強盜, 你沒希望了.
en: Kringelein, you old robber, you're hopeless.
- but you have all the luck.

zh: 我運氣好, 這是我一生中的第一次!
en: I have luck, for the first time in my life!

zh: 我過會兒再捲土重來, 10年或20年以後吧.
en: I'll recover again presently, in 10 or 20 years.

zh: 男爵, 我贏錢, 喝酒, 喝酒, 贏錢!
en: Baron, I win and drink, and drink and win!

zh: 我知道我不應該這樣, 但是我非常感激你.
en: I know I oughtn't to presume, but I'm so grateful to you.

zh: 這是我一生中的第一次, 我賭博, 我跳舞.
en: For the first time in my life, I've gambled and I've danced.

zh: 你們會笑話我, ... 但是這是我一生中第一次, 我品味生活!
en: You gentlemen can laugh... but for the first time in my life, I've tasted life!

zh: - 生活非常美妙, 可也非常危險.
en: - Life is wonderful, but it's very dangerous.

zh: 如果你有勇氣享受生活, 它會是非常不可思議的.
en: If you have the courage to live it, it's marvelous.

zh: 但是我, 相信我... 如果一個人不瞭解死亡, 它就不會瞭解人生.
en: But I, believe me... if a man doesn't know death, he doesn't know life.

zh: - 人生苦短, 及時行樂.
en: - It's a short life, but a gay one.

zh: 為生活幹杯... 敬這高尚, 危險... 短暫和美妙的人生.
en: Drink to life... to the magnificent, dangerous... brief, wonderful life.

zh: - 還有敬這活下去的勇氣.
en: - And the courage to live it.

zh: 嘿, 我是昨晚才住在這兒的... 雖然短暫, 但我感覺已經 比我以前度過的時光還要長久.
en: You know, I've only lived since last night... but that little while seems longer than all the time that's gone before.
Take him over to his bed.
- It will be over in a minute.
No, I've got to find that.

zh: 你們不知道那筆錢 對像我這樣的人意味著什麼.
en: You don't know what that money means to a man like me.

zh: 你們從沒有像我一樣 住在像狗洞的地方... 精打細算, 省吃儉用.
en: You've never lived like a dog in a hole... and scrimped and saved.

zh: 你沒有看見他的皮夾, 對嗎, 男爵?
en: You did not see his pocketbook, did you, Baron?

zh: 我的生活就靠那筆錢了, 男爵.
en: My life hangs on that money, Baron.

zh: 沒有人會給你一切, 自己卻一無所得.
en: Nobody ever gives you anything for nothing.

zh: 我得去買一切, 付錢去買.
en: You have to buy everything, and pay cash for it.

zh: 我要用我的錢去買我 最後的快樂時光.
en: I wanted to pay for my last days with that money.

zh: 在這個世界上, 除了那皮夾, 我已經一無所有!
en: I haven't anything in the world but that pocketbook!

zh: 你的皮夾在這兒, 你竟然沒看到.
en: Here's your pocketbook, you silly old thing.

zh: 我很高興, 他的錢失而復得. 14,000馬克.
en: I'm very glad he got it back. 14,000 marks.

zh: 是個不小的數目, 對嗎?
en: It's a lot of money, isn't it?
What are you doing here at this time?

zh: 這就是生活, 弗蘭牡chen.

en: It was a triumph, wasn't it?

zh: 夫人會很快再來柏林嗎?
en: Madame will return to Berlin soon?

zh: 我現在要去和你說說音樂嗎, 用不用?
en: Shall I come and talk about the music now, or not?

zh: 皮門諾夫, 你去找下他.

en: I've been waiting in there for you.

zh: 我得收拾一下旅行用的東西.
en: I had to arrange about the trip.

zh: 嗯, 你和我預想的完全不一樣.
en: You know, you are entirely different from what I expected.

zh: 我想你更是風情萬種... 沒有那麼溫文爾雅.
en: I thought you were more of a coquette... not so ladylike.

zh: 你不喜歡只叫我的名嗎?
en: Wouldn't you like to call me by the first name?

zh: 一個人不能隨隨便便地就和別人親熱.
en: One can't get intimate just offhand.

zh: 我可以和你去英格蘭, 只是這樣, 但是...
en: I could go to England with you and all that, but....

zh: 我任何時候都可以這樣說, 我沒留下什麼需要擔心的事兒.
en: I always say that nothing should be left hanging over.

zh: 假想一下, 我明年遇到你, 我說:
en: Supposing I met you next year and I said:

zh: " 你好, 普萊辛格先生."
這樣你可以說, "這位年輕女士是 我在曼徹斯特時的秘書."
en: And you said, "That's the young lady who was my secretary in Manchester."

zh: 但是如果我看見你, 我喊道:
en: But supposing I saw you and yelled:

zh: 要是你和你夫人在一起.
en: And you were with your wife.

zh: 我們不要提我夫人, 弗蘭芩.
en: We will leave my wife out of this, Flaemmchen, please.
You are very slender, aren't you?
- Are you going to be nice to me?

zh: - 那是你期望的, 是不是?
en: - That's what you expect, isn't it?

zh: 你也有一點點喜歡我, 是不是?
en: You like me just a little bit, don't you?

zh: 你對我來說還是個陌生人, 但是這並不重要.
en: You're still a stranger to me, but that doesn't matter.

zh: 你在我的房間裏幹什麼?
en: What are you doing in this room here?

zh: - 這是你的房間, 普萊辛格?
- 是的, 這是我的房間.
我們要看看你是否犯搞錯了.
en: We shall see whether you made a mistake or not.

zh: - 哦, 這就是我們之間所發生的事, 男爵.
en: - So that's how we stand, Baron.
It's a matter of life and death.

zh: 今晚我必須得搞到些錢.
en: I had to get some money tonight, somehow.

zh: 是的, 你今晚要搞到錢... 但是你要進監獄了.
en: Yes, you did have to get some money tonight... but you're going to jail.
You're going to be locked up.

zh: 我要和弗蘭芩處理公事的時候, 你和她跳舞.
en: You danced with Flaemmchen when I wanted to transact business with her.

zh: 你, 克林格蘭先生的好朋友.
en: You, the nice friend of the nice Mr. Kringelein.

zh: - 你想把整個飯店的人都吵醒嗎?
en: - Do you want to wake up the entire hotel?

zh: - 我是要把整個飯店的人都叫起來!
en: - I will wake up the hotel!

zh: 我要讓他們看看你這樣的男爵.
en: I'll show them what a baron you are.

zh: 他們好像在上面玩那個電話.
en: They're having a nice little game up there with that telephone.

zh: 弗蘭牡小姐, 請別離開我.
en: Miss Flaemm, please don't leave me.
I must get out of here.

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 他搶我.
死也不是那麼困難的事.
en: It can't be so hard to die.

zh: 就是這個皮夾, 他從我這兒偷的.
en: That pocketbook he stole from me.

zh: 或許他是想拿你的皮夾... 但是你也不能因為這個殺人.
en: Maybe he did try to take your pocketbook... but you don't kill a man for that.

zh: 你不能就因為一個皮夾就殺人.
en: You don't kill a man about a pocketbook.

zh: 可憐的男爵, 他太想要錢了.
en: Poor Baron, he wanted money so badly.

zh: 她是在為這個傢伙工作.
當他偷我東西的時候, 她誘惑我進入她的房間.
en: She enticed me into her room while he robbed me here.
- I'll tell that to the court.

zh: 克林格蘭先生, 在警察來之前, 我得和你談談.
en: Mr. Kringelein, I must talk with you before the police come.

zh: 弗蘭牡小姐在你的房間?
en: Miss Flaemm is in your room?

zh: 沒人會知道她曾經和我在一起.
en: No one will know that I was with her.
They will not ask you any questions.

zh: 但是現在你所打算的, 是準備做偽證.
en: But what you are proposing is falsification of the evidence.

zh: 我的處境已經很糟糕了.
en: My existence is hanging by a thread.

zh: 和那個女人的醜聞會把我毀了的.
en: A scandal with that woman would mean ruin for me.
- But you've just killed a man!

zh: 在這個世界上, 那是最重要的.
en: It makes all the difference in the world.
- We're going to call the police.

zh: 求你了, 克林格蘭先生.
我給你錢, 給你什麼都可以.
en: I will give you money, anything.

zh: - 克林格蘭, 請幫幫我.
- 我的一生就在你手裏了.
en: - My life is in your hands.

zh: 當我的一生在你手裏的時候, 你是怎麼做的?
en: What about my life, when you had it in your hands?

zh: 我可以送你回到弗裏德斯多夫.
en: But I can send you back to Friedersdorf.

zh: 我可以在弗裏德斯多夫 給你一個好職位.
en: I can give you a very good position in Friedersdorf.

zh: 非常, 非常感謝, 工業巨頭普萊辛格先生...
en: Many, many thanks, Mr. Industrial Magnate Preysing...

zh: - 不過我再也不回弗裏德斯多夫了.
en: - but I am never going back to Friedersdorf.

zh: 不, 克林格蘭先生, 請不要報 --
en: No, Mr. Kringelein, please don't call...

zh: 166號房有人說, 那兒有兇殺案.
en: Someone in 166 says there's been a murder.
- Madame has changed her dress again.

zh: 在大飯店從來沒有這麼安靜.
en: It was never so quiet in the Grand Hotel.
Those flowers make me think of funerals.

zh: - 你想沒想到, 蘇珊蒂?
- 那只是心裏擔心, 夫人, 只是擔心.
蘇珊蒂, 我們很會就要休假了.
en: Suzette, we're going to take a holiday soon.

zh: 去特萊邁佐待六個星期.
我就要像個 真正的女人那樣生活了... 非常簡單, 非常寧靜, 非常開心.
en: I'm going to live like a real woman... perfectly simple, perfectly quiet, perfectly happy.

zh: 但是夫人你現在必須睡覺了.
請轉到馮蓋根男爵的房間.
en: Call Baron von Geigern's room, please.
I kept thinking that you might come to me.
Why don't you answer the phone, please?

zh: - 恐怕得這樣, 普萊辛格先生.
我們會處理好一切的, 普萊辛格先生.
en: We've taken care of all that, Mr. Preysing.

zh: 行李房晚班值班的已經走了.
我整個晚上都在門診部.
en: I was at the clinic the whole night.

zh: 但是我不能讓它影響我工作.
en: But I mustn't let it interfere with my duty.

zh: 工業巨頭普萊辛格 殺了馮蓋根男爵.
en: The big manufacturer Preysing killed Baron von Geigern.
- They say he was a thief.

zh: 我太累了. 我都快睜不開眼了.
en: I'm so tired I can't hardly see out of my eyes.

zh: 兩個晚上沒有睡覺了, 白天還要在這兒, 現在飯店裏又有兇殺案.
en: No sleep for two nights, here all day, and now this killing at the hotel.

zh: 每次當他過來, 你會感到很舒服.
en: You always felt better when he came along.

zh: - 他總是那麼友好, 那麼令人愉快.
en: - Always friendly, such an agreeable fellow.
- I'll tell you a funny thing about...
Where are you taking that dog?
Better take charge of this dog.
- They have taken him away? - Yes.

zh: 好的, 我會告訴女僕的, 但是樓下的我可管不到.
en: All right, I can tell it to the maids, but I can't answer for downstairs.

zh: - 你還好嗎, 弗蘭芩小姐?
en: - Are you all right, Miss Flaemmchen?
I was just thinking about the Baron.

zh: 躺在那兒, 眼睛睜的大大的.
en: Lying there, with his eyes so open.

zh: 你喜歡男爵, 是不是?
en: You loved the Baron, didn't you?

zh: 從來沒人像他對我那麼友好.
en: He was friendly to me as no man ever was.
What if he was a burglar?

zh: - 他們也不會因為這個殺他.
en: - They don't kill a man for that.

zh: 他一整天都在想著搞到一筆錢.
en: He tried to raise money all day.

zh: 他還能笑的出來, 可憐的傢伙.
只有像普萊辛格這樣的傢伙 才會殺了他.
en: And a man like Preysing has to kill him.

zh: 你知道, 我根本就不喜歡普萊辛格.
en: You know, I didn't like Preysing right off.

zh: 那你為什麼還願意為他做事?
en: Why did you have anything to do with him?

zh: - 你不明白這些, 是吧?
en: - You don't understand that, do you?

zh: 我能照顧你, 弗蘭芩小姐, 如果你允許的話.
en: I could take care of you, Miss Flaemmchen, if you'd let me.

zh: 我皮夾裏有10,200馬克... 我昨晚還贏了3,400馬克.
en: There's 10,200 marks in this pocketbook... and there's 3,400 that I won last night.
That would last a long time.
- I've always wanted to go to Paris.

zh: - 只要你想去, 任何地方都可以.
我先給你這些錢, 我昨晚贏的3,400馬克...
en: I'll give you this money I won last night. 3,400...

zh: - 而且不久你還會得到更多.
en: - and then later you can have some more.

zh: - 現今, 無論什麼病他們都可以治好的.
en: - They can cure anything these days.

zh: 你對我能像... 你對普萊辛格一樣好嗎?
en: Do you think you'd have as good a time with me... as you did with Preysing?

zh: - 和他相比, 你更喜歡我, 是嗎?
en: - You like me better than you did him?

zh: 你是個好人, 克林格蘭先生.
en: You're a good man, Mr. Kringelein.

zh: 你知道, 我從來沒有奢望過 我身邊會有這麼美麗的女人.
en: You know, I never thought anything so beautiful could come to me.

zh: 我們趕第一班去巴黎的火車.
en: We'll catch the first train to Paris.

zh: 我想訂兩張去巴黎的票.
en: I'd like two tickets to Paris.

zh: 最近一班去巴黎的火車是什麼時候?
en: What time does the next train leave?

zh: 男爵半個小時以前走的.
en: The Baron left about half an hour ago.

zh: 格魯, 走了, 走了, 我們要趕不上火車了.
en: Gru, come, come. We'll lose the train.

zh: 格魯辛斯卡婭夫人要用車.
走吧, 火車馬上要開了.
en: Come along, the train will be going.

zh: - 走了, 夫人, 走吧.

en: - What is the use of asking?

zh: - 你們見到馮蓋根男爵了嗎?
en: - Have you seen Baron von Geigern?

zh: 男爵不在這兒了, 夫人.
en: The Baron is not here, madam.
- We haven't any time to waste.

zh: 我們明天早上在 維也納還要排練.
en: We have a rehearsal in Vienna tomorrow.

zh: 陽光也會照耀在特萊邁佐.
- 我們要有個客人, 蘇珊蒂.

en: Take the car to the garage.
I'll be with you on lunch hour.

zh: - 我的帳單, 還有這位女士的.
en: - My bill, and the lady's, too.

zh: - 克林格蘭先生的火車票.
你怎麼知道那兒也會有一個?
en: How do you know there will be one?

zh: 世界各地都會有大飯店.
en: There's a Grand Hotel everywhere in the world.

zh: - 再見, 克林格蘭先生.
你在试图给我上有关耐心的一课吗？ 约瑟夫爵士
en: Trying to teach me a lesson in patience, Sir Joseph?

zh: 在考古学中，方法就是一切
我们总是按顺序来整理我们每天的发现
en: We always deal with our finds of the day in order.

zh: 我们不是为了勋章而来埃及到处挖的
en: We didn't come to dig in Egypt for medals.

zh: 比起所有那些耸人听闻的发现 这些零星破陶器碎片倒是能告诉我们更多东西
en: Much more is learned from bits of broken pottery than from all the sensational finds.

zh: 我们的工作是增加人类对过去的知识的了解 而不仅仅是为了满足我们的好奇心
en: Our job is to increase the sum of human knowledge of the past, not to satisfy our own curiosity.

zh: 噢，千真万确，约瑟夫爵士 但是，我们终归只是人类
en: Oh, that's all very true, Sir Joseph, but, after all, we're human.

zh: 我来这里都已经十年了。
我对这具木乃伊比你更感兴趣。
en: I'm more curious about the mummy than you.

zh: 当然对那个盒子还要更感兴趣
en: And even more about that box.

zh: 通常由尸体防腐者的刀留下的伤疤他身上没有
en: The usual scar made by the embalmer's knife is not there.

zh: 我也是这么想的, 穆勒.
当我给他拍照的时候我看了他一眼
en: I had a good look at him when I photographed him.

zh: 我从没见过像这样的木乃伊
en: Never saw a mummy like that.

zh: 我也一样, 我猜也从没别人见过
en: Neither, I imagine, has anyone else.

zh: 看起来他是以一种极不愉快的方式死去的
en: Looks as though he died in some sensationally unpleasant manner.

zh: 那些扭曲肌肉显示他在绷带中挣扎过
en: The contorted muscles show that he struggled in the bandages.

zh: "卡尔奈克太阳神殿的高级祭司"
en: "High Priest of the Temple of the Sun at Karnak".

zh: 可怜的老伙计，你到底做了什么 能让他们对你这样
en: Poor old fella. Now, what could you have done to make 'em treat you like that?
An execution for treason, I suppose.

zh: 看，护佑灵魂进入地府的灵言
en: Look. Sacred spells which protect the soul in its journey to the underworld have been chipped off the coffin.

zh: 那么伊姆霍特普不仅是在他的世界被判了死刑 连在冥界也一样
en: So Imhotep was sentenced to death not only in this world, but in the next.

zh: 也许他和神庙里的处女祭司搞得太高兴了
en: Maybe he got too gay with the vestal virgins in the temple.

zh: 有可能 卡尔奈克的神庙里的女祭司是法老的女儿
en: Possibly. The priestesses of the Temple of Karnak were daughters of the Pharaoh.

zh: 他们是伊希斯（古埃及司生育和繁殖的女神） 的秘密处女祭司
en: They were the secret virgins of Isis.

zh: 也许答案就在那个随葬的盒子里
en: Maybe the answer's in that box we found buried with him.

zh: 我明白在那个盒子被打开前 我从你那里是得不到什么工作的
en: I see I shall get no more work out of you until after it's open.

zh: - 让我们来打开这个盒子
这些木头朽烂得一碰就裂开了
en: The wood's so rotten it'll fall apart at a touch.

zh: 不管他它是什么，它真是沉得要命。
en: Whatever it is, it's terribly heavy.

zh: 阿梅诺菲斯法老的完整封印
en: The unbroken seals of the Pharaoh Amenophis.

zh: 将获... 死亡，永远的惩罚"

en: "In the name of Amon-Ra, the king of the gods."
Good heavens, what a terrible curse!

zh: - 好吧，让我们来看看里面有什么
我们尊敬你在神秘学上的建树，穆勒
en: We recognise your mastery of the occult sciences, Muller.

zh: 但你的信仰不能妨碍我的工作
en: But your beliefs can't interfere with my work.

zh: - 那么你今天为什么邀请我来?
en: - Then why did you send for me today?
- As a friend and an expert.

zh: 这个发现是仅有的，我想听听你的意见
en: This find was unique and I wanted your opinion.

zh: 当然，大地上千年的时光 可以去除任何有关古老的诅咒的迷信
en: Surely a few thousand years in the earth take the mumbo jumbo off any old curse.

zh: 噢，我不能当着这孩子的面说
en: Oh, I cannot speak before a boy.

zh: 出来，让我们站在埃及的星空下
en: Come out under the stars of Egypt.

zh: 继续你的编目吧 我们会迟些打开它
en: Go on with your cataloguing. We'll open it later.

zh: 不要认为你可以说服我让我不去研究 我在这里全部经历中的最奇妙的发现
en: Don't think you can persuade me not to examine the most wonderful find of my whole experience out here.

zh: 埃及众神还生活在这群山之中 在他们的神庙的废墟里
en: The gods of Egypt still live in these hills, in their ruined temples.

zh: 古代的咒语大多变弱了 但有些还有强大的威力
en: The ancient spells are weaker, but some of them are still potent.

zh: 把它放回去 你哪里发现就把它埋在哪吧
en: Put it back. Bury it where you found it.

zh: 你已经读了那诅咒 你敢蔑视它吗？
en: You have read the curse. You dare defy it?

zh: 为了科学的利益， 即便我相信那诅咒
en: In the interests of science, even if I believed in the curse,

zh: 我也必须继续大不列颠博物馆的工作
en: I'd go on with my work for the museum.

zh: 和我一起回去 我们一起研究这个伟大的发现吧
en: Come back with me and we'll examine this great find together.

zh: 我的信仰使我无法做出亵渎神灵之事
en: I cannot condone an act of sacrilege with my presence.
For heaven's sakes, what is it?
He went for a little walk!
You should have seen his face!

zh: 有些东西来打破这单调的生活了 一个从尼罗河来的游客
en: Here's something to break the monotony. A visitor coming from the Nile.

zh: - 我怎能从仅从一瞥得知这些？
en: - How could I see in that glare?

zh: 好吧, 温普尔, 我们回伦敦
en: Well, Whemple, back we go to London.

zh: 我们看起来就像傻瓜一样。
钱也浪费掉了 在这该死的沙漠里挖了一个又一个洞
en: Money wasted. Hole after hole dug in this blasted desert.

zh: 几个小珠子 一些破瓦罐
en: A few beads. A few broken pots.

zh: 在这场游戏中，一个男人需要 除了奋力工作以外的其他东西
en: A man needs more than hard work for this game.

zh: 他需要天赋 他需要运气。
en: He needs flair. He needs luck.

zh: 当年他来的时候， 这里的竞争还不那么激烈
en: When he came here, there wasn't so much competition.

zh: 只要他干起来，他就能找到东西 有一次，十年前，他找到的东西实在是太多了
en: When he did, he found things. And once, ten years ago, he found too much.

zh: 一个古怪的故事， 和他一起的那个哈佛大学毕业年轻小伙发疯了
en: Queer story, that young Oxford chap he had with him going mad.

zh: - 你知道我是怎么想的吗？
en: - You know what I think it was?

zh: 他无法忍受这砂石之中的寂寞，被折磨疯了
en: He went crazy. Bored beyond human endurance in this sand and these rocks.

zh: 当你父亲发现他时，他大笑不止 他穿着一件紧身衣就这么笑死了
en: He was laughing when your father found him. He died laughing, in a straitjacket.

zh: 你父亲从未解释过这件事
但当全英格兰最好的的发掘者洗手不干 那样一个深爱着埃及的人 说他永远不回来这里 就一定意味着什么
en: But when the best excavator England has turned out, a man who loved Egypt, said he'd never come back here, that meant something.

zh: 你中断了你本季的野营，皮尔逊教授？
en: You break your season's camp, Professor Pearson?

zh: 你的同事已经回伦敦了？
en: Your colleagues have returned to London?

zh: 是的，温普尔和我留下来处理后续工作
en: Yes. Whemple and I stayed behind to clear up.

zh: 你的探险还没有取得成功
en: Your expedition has not been a success.

zh: 绝不是 这些是本年度的发现
en: Scarcely. Here are the season's finds.

zh: 请允许我送给您 自图坦卡蒙（埃及第18代王朝法老）以后 最激动人心的发现
en: Permit me to present you with the most sensational find since that of Tutankhamen.
This is very sporting of you!

zh: 我们埃及人是不允许挖掘古代死者的陵寝的.
en: We Egyptians are not permitted to dig up our ancient dead.

zh: 只有... 外国的博物馆
安娜卡苏纳蒙公主的部分殉葬品
en: Part of the funerary equipment of the princess Anck-es-en-Amon.

zh: - 阿梅诺菲斯大帝的女儿
- 是的， 这是她的名字
我在距我们这里不到100码的地方发现的
en: I found that not 100 yards from where we are.

zh: - 你的意思是你认为她的陵寝在这？
en: - You mean you think her tomb is there?

zh: - 我会告诉你在哪里发掘
en: - I will show you where to dig.

zh: 我敢肯定你一定是个大好人，这位先生...
en: I'm sure it's very good of you, Mr...?

zh: 详细的证据 也许不是非常的充分
en: Circumstantial evidence. Not very strong, perhaps.

zh: 但是如果我们雇佣一帮来自科尔玛 的发掘者来做这项工作 我们就能在两天内知道 这里到底有没有什么东西
en: But if we put that gang of diggers from Kerma on the job, we can tell in two days if there's anything here.

zh: 不管怎么，我们已经找到了一些东西了
- 我们会给你身在伦敦的父亲发电报
en: - We will cable your father in London.

zh: 当我们开启这个伟大的发现的时候 他一定得在场才行
en: He must be here when we examine this great find.
The seal of the seven jackals.

zh: 自法老侍卫队祭司封印这之后 就无人进过这门
en: No one has entered this door since the priests of the royal acropolis sealed it.

zh: 海伦，世界上其他地方也有像这样的景观吗？
en: Is there a view like this in all the world, Helen?

zh: 我们真的是在可怕的现代开罗吗？
en: Are we really in this dreadful modern Cairo?

zh: 你的思绪和我们的舞会 和这些英俊的英国小伙离了很远了呢
en: Your thoughts are far from the dance and these nice English boys.

zh: 不尽然，我在享受这美好的时光呢
en: Not really. I'm having a lovely time.

zh: 当然是你让我在这和你一起
en: Your keeping me here with you, of course.

zh: 我就不必大老远跑到热得要命的苏丹 去找我父亲了
en: So I don't have to go up to Father in that beastly hot Sudan.

zh: 我才要对你表示感谢，我最可爱的病人
en: It's I who am grateful. My most interesting patient.

zh: 总是在这里度过他的冬天 专门研究埃及神秘学
en: Always spends his winters here. Authority on Egyptian occult.

zh: 他的父亲是苏丹的总督 当然是英国人，她的母亲是埃及人
en: Her father's governor of the Sudan. English, of course. Her mother, Egyptian.

zh: 她在这里和穆勒大夫和穆勒夫人住在一起 他们是远房亲戚
en: Some old family with a tree a mile long. She's staying here with Dr and Mrs Muller.

zh: 对不起先生，我们关门的铃声已经响过了
en: Pardon me, sir. Our closing bell has rung.
I did not notice the time.

zh: - 您是约瑟夫·温普尔爵士吗？
en: - I am addressing Sir Joseph Whemple?

zh: 怎么？ 多亏了你 我们才能在这举办这场展览
en: Why, we have you to thank that we have this exhibit here at all.

zh: 为表敬意，我们将整夜开放博物馆
en: The museum should be kept open all night in your honour.
Won't you come down to my office?

zh: 无意冒犯，我不喜欢别人碰我
en: Your pardon. I dislike to be touched.

zh: 当我们打开陵寝之时 你消失到哪去了？
en: Where did you disappear to when we opened the tomb?

zh: 但... 但是这次我也不能耽搁你的时间了
en: But... but now I must not detain you.

zh: 但我得好好请教请教您 请务必到寒舍一叙
en: But I must see you again. You must come to my house.

zh: 很遗憾，我实在是很忙 接受不了任何的邀请
en: I regret I am too occupied to accept invitations.

zh: 你该好好想想怎么谢他， 没有他就发现不了公主
en: You might have thanked him. He was responsible for finding the princess.

zh: 是的，可我希望他没有那么做
en: Yes. I rather wish he hadn't been.

zh: 那是个肮脏的诡计 开罗博物馆保存着我们的发现
en: It's a dirty trick, Cairo Museum keeping what we've found.

zh: 那是协议规定的 大不列颠博物馆为科学而存在，而非掠夺
en: That was the contract. The British Museum works for science, not for loot.
Where do you want to go, miss?

zh: - 晚上闭馆了，所有的人都回家了.
en: - It's closed for the night. They've gone.

zh: 古埃及的语言 在这片土地上已经有2000年没人听到过了
en: The language of ancient Egypt. Not heard on this earth for 2000 years.

zh: 还有从特洛伊围城前 便从未说起的一个男人的名字
en: And the name of a man unspoken since before the siege of Troy.

zh: 告诉他穆勒医生希望马上见到他
en: Tell him Dr Muller wishes to see him urgently.

zh: - 我们把你带来的， 父亲和我.
en: - We brought you here. Father and I.

zh: 但你是怎么猜到她会在这的？
en: But how did you guess she was here?

zh: 我发现她从酒店拦了一辆出租车到博物馆
en: I discovered that she took a taxi from the hotel to the museum.

zh: 守卫说 她坐你们的车离开了
en: The watchman said she had left in your car.

zh: 在你带她走之前，我必须 告诉你她刚刚说过的一些话
en: Before you take her away, I must talk to you about something she said just now.

zh: - 噢,你在这, 我亲爱的
en: - Oh, here you are, my dear.

zh: 我想你已经介绍过自己了？
海伦·格罗夫纳小姐， 我的老朋友 约瑟夫·温普尔爵士，还有弗兰克·温普尔.
en: Miss Helen Grosvenor, my old friend Sir Joseph Whemple, Frank Whemple.

zh: 在这种情况下这看起来太正式了
en: That seems so formal under these peculiar circumstances.

zh: 现在，如果你没事了 我们就回酒店吧
en: And now, if you're all right again, back we go to the hotel.

zh: 我想她会想休息几分钟的
en: I think she'll want to rest a few minutes.

zh: 弗兰克, 热情些来招待我们的客人
en: Frank, will you make yourself agreeable?

zh: 我晕倒的时候是在哪, 温普尔先生?
en: Where was I when I fainted, Mr Whemple?
Well, I wouldn't know that, would I?

zh: 是的, 我没指望你知道 我希望你知道的
en: No, I don't suppose you would. I wish I did.

zh: - 你有埃及人的血统, 是吗?
我也不知道怎么回事 只是知道你一些事
en: Well, I don't know. Just something about you.

zh: 如果那时我在那遇到了你 我会更爱埃及的
en: I'd have liked Egypt better if I'd met you there.

zh: 困在沙漠里两个月 而且天气非常的热！
en: Stuck in the desert for two months, and was it hot!

zh: 我敢说你读过有关公主的报道
en: Surely you read about the princess?

zh: 14级向下的阶梯 还有未被解开的封印 非常惊悚
en: The 14 steps down and the unbroken seals were thrilling.

zh: 但是当我们去处理她的衣物 她的珠宝还有梳妆用具时
en: But when we came to handle all her clothes, her jewels and her toilet things...

zh: 我们发现他们把所有他们生前的用具 都作了随葬品
en: They buried everything with them they used in life.

zh: - 当我们拆开那姑娘的裹尸布...
en: - When we came to unwrap the girl...

zh: 在我们处理完她的遗物后 我觉得我似乎认识她
en: Well, after we'd worked among her things, I felt as if I'd known her.

zh: 但当我们拆完裹尸布 当我看到她的脸时...
en: But when we got the wrappings off, and I saw her face...

zh: 我一定会觉得我很傻 但那时我有种爱上了她的感觉
en: You'll think me silly, but I sort of fell in love with her.

zh: 你非得打开那些坟墓 然后爱上那些墓中的女主人吗？
en: Do you have to open graves to find girls to fall in love with?

zh: 我说，现在我知道你是怎么一回事了
en: I say. Now I know what it is about you.
There was something about her head...

zh: 我从未提起过那个名字 可是我却听见格罗夫纳小姐 用古埃及语喃喃着伊姆霍特普的什么事情
en: I had never mentioned the name, yet I heard Miss Grosvenor mutter in ancient Egyptian something about Imhotep.

zh: 这位阿达斯在博物馆里干什么?
en: What was this Ardath doing in the museum?

zh: 在闭馆时间看那些木乃伊
en: Looking at the mummy. Just at closing time.

zh: 来，一位博物馆的守卫死在了公主的展厅里
en: Come. A museum guard found dead in the room with the princess.

zh: 我们在这位死去的守卫手里发现了这个 约瑟夫爵士
en: We find this in dead guard's hand, Sir Joseph.

zh: 有可能窃贼试图盗走它 然后守卫夺过去，于是窃贼杀了他
en: Probably thief tried to steal it. Guard take it away, thief kill him.
The cause of death, I not find nothing.

zh: 看起来像是一起预谋的盗窃案 但是这从这里盗走的东西是不可能被出售的
en: Looks like an attempted theft, but nothing stolen here could be sold.

zh: 我把这放个在这 你会觉得更舒服些
en: Let me put this here. You'll be more comfortable.

zh: 你真的想知道为什么我不想带你去医院吗？
en: You really want to know why I didn't take you to the hospital?

zh: - 因为，当我把你拥入怀中之时...
en: - Because, when I held you in my arms...

zh: - 你不表白不是会更好吗？
en: - Hadn't you better not commit yourself?

zh: 什么样的女孩在月光下倒在一位男士脚下 才不会征服什么人呢？
en: What girl could not make a conquest who collapsed at a man's feet in moonlight?

zh: 这看起来很荒唐，尤其我们只认识了对方 如此短的的时间，但我是认真的
en: It seems absurd when we've known each other such a short time, but I'm serious.

zh: 难道我这一晚上遇到的激动的事还不够多吗？ 还有一位陌生的男子 向我示爱带来的意外惊喜
en: Haven't I had enough excitement for one evening, without the additional thrill of a strange man making love to me?

zh: 但是我以前还从没有对这种事认真过
en: But I've never been serious about this sort of thing before.

zh: 现在，看着这，你可以让我下地狱 但你决不能嘲笑我
en: Now, look here. You can tell me to go to the devil, but you can't laugh at me.

zh: 她已经受了那诅咒 现在我儿子又将因她而被诅咒
en: The curse has struck her, and now, through her, it will strike my son.

zh: 弗兰克来下你父亲的书房好吗？
en: Frank, will you come to your father's study?

zh: 海伦我一会就带你回家
en: Helen, I shall take you home presently.
I'll be back in a minute.

zh: 当博物馆里的那具木乃伊 还是神庙中的处女祭司时 伊姆霍特普还活着
en: Imhotep was alive when that mummy in the museum was a vestal virgin in the temple.
What's that got to do with us now?

zh: 你的助手疯了，然后死了 如果你看见了他所看见的 你也可能是一样的下场 把那个卷轴的部分做一个抄本
en: Your assistant who went insane and died, as you might have if you'd seen what he saw, made a transcription of part of that scroll.

zh: 你似乎认为那之中包含了所有地狱之中 的恶魔一样，那么把它烧了摆脱它吧
en: You seem to think it has all the devils of hell in it. Burn it and be done with it.

zh: 伊姆霍特普的木乃伊发生了什么?
en: What became of the mummy of Imhotep?

zh: 看，格罗夫纳又是怎么一回事呢？ 是的.
en: Look, what's the matter with Miss Grosvenor? You still think that that mummy was stolen, Sir Joseph? Yes.
I called to see Sir Joseph.

zh: 我们是不是以前见过面, 格罗夫纳小姐?
en: Have we not met before, Miss Grosvenor?

zh: 我认为没人见过你之后能把你忘记 阿达斯·贝
en: I don't think one would forget meeting you, Ardath Bey.
But you are of our blood.

zh: 我一定没有弄错这件事
en: As to that, I am not mistaken.

zh: 没错，我的母亲是埃及人

en: You must burn the Scroll of Thoth!

zh: 我告诉你 这是博物馆的财产，不是我的。
en: I tell you, it's the museum's property, not mine.

zh: 和格罗夫纳小姐在一起的那个人是谁？
en: Who's out there with Miss Grosvenor?

zh: 阿达斯·贝, 这是穆勒医生
我接受你的邀请 但我却没有看到一个拿着书的学生
en: I accept your invitation. But I find no solitary student with his books.

zh: 恐怕我的来访很不凑巧
en: I fear my visit is inopportune.

zh: 当然不,我们刚刚在谈论...
en: On the contrary. We were just talking about...

zh: - 你们这些本地的埃及人
阿达斯·贝作了自我介绍
约瑟夫先生刚才还对你是 是如何知道安娜卡苏纳蒙公主陵寝的所在 感到非常疑惑
en: Sir Joseph was just wondering how you knew where the tomb of the princess Anck-es-en-Amon was hidden.

zh: 约瑟夫先生, 你看起来很困扰
是的,在你离开之后 博物馆里发生了一起惨剧
en: Yes. A tragedy at the museum after you left.

zh: 当时你在那里,格罗夫纳小姐?
en: When you were there, Miss Grosvenor?

zh: 是的,他们告诉我当时我在那 试图在闭馆之后进去
en: Yes. They told me I went there and tried to get in after it was closed.

zh: 弗兰克, 你能否送海伦回酒店?
en: Frank, will you please see Helen back to the hotel?

zh: - 当然, 如果格罗夫纳小姐愿意的话
en: - Certainly, if Miss Grosvenor will let me.

zh: 在发生这些事之后, 你需要好好的休息
en: After what happened, you need rest badly.

zh: 啊, 我从没感觉活得如此真实过!
en: Why, I've never felt so alive before!

zh: - 作为你的医生, 我必须命令你回去.
en: - As your doctor, I must order you to go.

zh: 那么, 阿达斯·贝, au revoir(再会 - -法语).

en: We must see each other again.

zh: 一起不同寻常的犯罪 一个守卫被一个在博物馆里留下件礼物的人杀死了
en: An unusual crime. A guard killed by a man who left a gift to the museum.

zh: 当它刚被发现的时候 已经做了部分它的抄本
en: Part of which was transcribed when it was first found.

zh: 我读不出来年代如此久远的文字
en: I cannot read the writing of a period so remote.

zh: 但是你却读出了那片陶器上的 "安娜卡苏纳蒙"
en: But you read "Anck-es-en-Amon" on that piece of pottery.

zh: 而这些是前一个王朝的象形文字
这抄本原件的卷轴十年前就被盗了 和高级祭司伊姆霍特普的木乃伊一起
en: The scroll from which this was copied was stolen ten years ago, together with the mummy of the high priest Imhotep.

zh: 我能看看那卷轴吗, 约瑟夫爵士?
en: May I see that scroll, Sir Joseph?

zh: 我们把它留在了... 博物馆里
en: We left it at the... museum.

zh: - 我还有另外的东西要给你看看
en: - I have something else to show you.

zh: 为什么你要拿这个给我看?
en: Why do you show all this to me?

zh: 你是否相信那个木乃伊不是被盗了 而是用卷轴上的咒语为其注入了生命.
en: Do you think it conceivable that the mummy was not stolen, but given a semblance of life by the spell of the scroll?

zh: 那个卷轴是我的财产 我从一个商人手里买的
en: That scroll is my property. I bought it from a dealer.

zh: 它就在这个房子里 我认定它就在那个房间里
en: It is here in this house. I presume, in that room.

zh: 卷轴在一个安全的地方
en: The scroll is in safe hands.

zh: 如果我们遭遇不测它就会被马上销毁
en: It will be destroyed the minute it is known that harm has come to us.

zh: 你们学过了我们古代的技艺 你们知道你们是伤不了我分毫的
en: You have studied our ancient arts, and you know that you cannot harm me.

zh: 你们也知道你们必须把卷轴还给我 要么就只有死路一条
en: You also know that you must return that scroll to me or die.

zh: 现在,告诉那个虚弱的傻瓜 不管卷轴在哪都给我取过来 然后交给他的努比亚仆人
en: Now tell that weak fool to get that scroll, wherever it is, and hand it to his Nubian servant.
So you have made him your slave.

zh: 如果我能用我的手碰到你, 我会把你的枯干的肉体弄成碎片
en: If I could get my hands on you, I'd break your dried flesh to pieces.

zh: 但是你的力量太强大了
en: But your power is too strong.

zh: 这就是袭击了她的邪恶力量
en: This is the evil force that has been attacking her.

zh: 这恐怖是藉由你来到这世上的
en: It was through you this horror came into existence.

zh: 你父亲销毁了卷轴, 即使知道那将送上他的性命.
en: Your father destroyed the scroll, knowing that it would cost him his life.

zh: 埃及人生命的象征 我本想送给你父亲的
en: The Egyptian symbol of life. I meant it for your father.

zh: 那古老的魔咒能给他带来什么好处?
en: What good could that old charm have done him?

zh: 我告诉你, 那些医生说那只是简单的心脏病发作
en: I tell you, the doctors say it's plainly heart failure.

zh: 别试图让我相信那个叫阿达斯的家伙是个 复活的木乃伊
en: Don't try and make me believe that this Ardath fellow is a mummy come to life.

zh: 那个想法, 和它的恐怖, 害死了我父亲
en: That idea, and the horror of it, killed my father.

zh: 博物馆的守卫也是自然死亡的
en: The museum guard died of natural causes, too.

zh: 弗兰克,我需要你的帮助
我看到我的病人昨晚上被你吸引了 而她也吸引了你
en: I saw your attraction to my patient last night, and hers to you.

zh: - 而且我非常乐意看到这样
但是，你认为我还会有机会吗?
en: But do you think I have a chance?

zh: 以为我认为她才是个大赢家...
en: Cos I think she's the most won...

zh: - 噢, 但是在这样一样不恐怖的时期...
en: - Oh, but this is terrible at a time like this...

zh: - 弗兰克, 我感到害怕.
- 你愿意和我一起去找她吗?
en: - Will you go with me to her now?

zh: 那么先给她打电话叫她别离开酒店
en: Then telephone her first, not to leave the hotel.

zh: 我保证我一定等到你们来
en: I promise to wait until you get here.

zh: 对你父亲的事,我感到十分遗憾
你刚刚在干什么, 医生?
你的父亲并没有烧毁月神卷轴
en: Your father did not burn the Scroll of Thoth.

zh: - 当我们和那怪物搏斗之时, 我们就必须寻求所有能和它对抗的力量的庇护
en: - When we fight this creature, we must ask protection from the forces of all that it defied.
- No, her life is not in danger.

zh: 如果她爱上了你 他就会想方设法杀了你的
en: Should love for you come to her, he will try to destroy you.

zh: 古埃及人相信那个护身符 具有驱邪的灵力 比如说那些害死你父亲的邪气
en: That amulet, the Egyptians believed, was a charm against evil sendings, such as struck down your father.

zh: 我的仆人会照看好它的
en: My servant will see to him.

zh: 你不觉得这些很熟悉吗?
en: Is it not familiar to you?

zh: - 我们的祖先用这些东西
你将不会记起我现在给你展现的 现在我将唤起你的爱,罪孽还有死亡的记忆
en: You will not remember what I show you now, and yet I shall awaken memories of love and crime and death.
I knelt by the bed of death.

zh: 吾知月神卷轴 可令汝重生于世
en: I knew the Scroll of Thoth could bring thee back to life.

zh: 吾触神之怒 将其盗来
en: I dared the god's anger, and stole it.

zh: 吾私闯汝陵寝 欲令汝重生
en: I stole back to thy tomb to bring thee back to life.
I murmured the spell that raises the dead.

zh: 何耐被那守灵人撞见 我正做那邪恶之事
en: They broke in upon me and found me doing an unholy thing.
Thy father condemned me to the nameless death.

zh: 将那卷轴与我同葬 让那渎神之举从此在埃及绝迹
en: The scroll he ordered buried with me, that no such sacrilege might disgrace Egypt again.

zh: 葬我之奴仆亦遭连坐 使此事无人知晓
en: The slaves were killed so that none should know.

zh: 连那行刑的士卒也难逃一死 无一友人蹒跚步入那荒漠之中 来慰我带罪魂灵
en: The soldiers who killed them were also slain, so no friend could creep to the desert with funeral offerings for my condemned spirit.

zh: 诸神的庙宇已毁灭了 但我对你的爱仍似火一般
en: My love has lasted longer than the temples of our gods.

zh: 无人如我这般为你 遭受如此之痛
en: No man ever suffered as I did for you.

zh: 余下的你可能还无从知晓
en: The rest you may not know.

zh: 直到我将你辗转了 无数的轮回 和岁月的灵魂 带回古代
en: until I send back your spirit, that has wandered through so many forms and so many ages.

zh: 但是,那那之前 贝斯特将再次带来死亡
en: But, before then, Bast must again send forth death.

zh: 那个让爱意悄悄爬进你心中 的男孩得到死亡
en: Death to that boy for whom love is creeping into your heart.

zh: 那阻隔我们相聚的爱意
en: Love that would keep you from myself.

zh: 给你带来病痛甚至死亡的爱
en: Love that might bring sickness and even death to you.

zh: 我想是有关古埃及的一个梦.
en: Dreams of ancient Egypt, I think.

zh: 梦里有一个人长得很像你.
en: There was someone like you in them.

zh: 我的小池子有时会给人困扰.
人们能在水中窥见古怪的幻象 但是那幻象就像梦境一般
en: One sees strange fantasies in the water. But they pass like dreams.

zh: 我们刚刚非常的担心 找遍了所有的地方
en: We've been so worried. We've hunted everywhere.

zh: 穆勒就在阿拉伯广场上
en: Muller's down in the Arab quarter now.

zh: 噢, 如果我必须得解释的话 那是因为这里太闷了
en: Well, if I must give an explanation, it was stuffy in here.

zh: 我不能一直安静得呆着 而且我也不喜欢那种一直被监视的感觉
en: I can't be shut up all the time. And I don't like the feeling I'm always being watched.
- I took the dog with me.
But I can see it now.

zh: - 站在可怜的沃夫兰姆的背上
是的,那有一座贝斯特的雕像
en: Yes, there was a statue of Bast.

zh: 而且, 这也和你没有任何关系
en: Besides, I don't see it's any affair of yours.

zh: 噢, 但是和我有关系
我们都知道你是和阿达斯·贝在一起
en: We know that you were with Ardath Bey.

zh: 我在试着帮助你 保护你.
en: I'm trying to help you and protect you.

zh: 别让我回去 我会试着离开的, 但请你别逼我
en: Don't let me go again. I'll try to get away, but you mustn't let me.
No matter what I do or what I say.

zh: 等着我的还有我体内的另一个我的生命
en: And life for something else inside me that isn't me.

zh: 它也是活着的,在为生命而争斗着
en: But it's alive too, and fighting for life.

zh: 噢, 一切都会好起来的
en: Oh, everything's going to be all right.

zh: 现在既然你向我求助 我便永远不会抛下你不管
en: Now that you've asked for help, I'll never leave you alone.

zh: 我会去把穆勒先生给你找来 我会在这陪着你直到医生来了为止
en: I'll get Mrs Muller down here with you, and I'll stay here till the doctor comes.

zh: 然后, 我们把你带到我家
en: Then, we'll take you to my house.

zh: 我不喜欢那个医生 请过去听听他在说我些什么
en: I don't like that doctor. Please go in there and find out what he's saying about me.

zh: 他会知道你出了什么问题然后治好你的
en: He'll know just what's the matter with you and cure you.

zh: 现在, 法斯恩小姐 请你帮我穿好衣服离开这
en: Now, Miss Farthing, help me to get dressed and get out of here.

zh: - 又有症状了吗, 格罗夫纳小姐?
en: - Come over you again, Miss Grosvenor?

zh: 你告诉过我, 这些症状出现的时候 我不要听你的
en: You told me, when these fits came on I wasn't to listen.

zh: 我有个很富有的朋友 他会付你钱的
en: I have a friend. He's rich. He'll give you money.

zh: 现在你只管躺下 你知道你不能起床的
en: Now you just lie down again. You know you mustn't get up.

zh: 如果你不需要钱的话 那你最想要什么?
en: If you don't want money, what do you want most?

zh: 你过你帮我去找他的话 他会给你任何东西的
en: He'll give you anything, if only you'll help me to go to him.

zh: 你想让我去喊穆勒医生吗?
en: Do you want me to call Dr Muller?

zh: 如果我不离开他的话我会死的!
en: I'll die if I don't get away from him!

zh: 海伦, 别再那么干了
en: Now, Helen, you must not do this again.

zh: 她虚弱的哪也不能去 除非去医院
en: She's too weak to be removed except to a hospital.

zh: 我坚持把她留在这 让我们直接看着
en: I insist on keeping her here under our direct observation.

zh: 但是, 医生, 你还没告诉我们该怎么做 她在一天接一天的虚弱下去
en: But, Doctor, you haven't told us what to do. She gets weaker every day.

zh: 知道我在巴黎买的那件睡衣吗 帮我穿上
en: You know that negligée I bought in Paris? Help me to put it on.

zh: 再把我的化妆品拿来 我想化上妆,我想看起来气色好点
en: And bring me my toilet things. I want some colour. I want to look well.

zh: 这是一个计划, 只有我们两个知道 我想让看起来自己像往常一样
en: This is a plot, just between us. I want to look the way I did.

zh: 只是要给弗兰克个惊喜而已
而且我想让你把他带过来 你明白了吗?
en: And I want you to bring him to me. You understand?

zh: 总而言之,我没能做出诊断来
en: In short, I have failed to make a diagnosis.

zh: 医学对这样的病例束手无策
en: Medical science is helpless in a case like this.

zh: 去找她吧, 别滴我发火 我没法拒绝她
en: Go to her, and don't be angry with me. I couldn't resist her.

zh: 海伦, 你不该这么做 他们不会让你这么做的
en: Helen, you shouldn't have done this. They shouldn't have let you.
But you're going to get well.

zh: 然后我知道我会让你爱上我的.
en: Then I know I can make you love me.

zh: 我知道我可以让你幸福.
en: I know I can make you happy.

zh: 我正想证明这点 如果我活着不能与你在一起 还不如死了的好
en: And I'm trying to prove it, because I'd rather die than live and lose you.

zh: 但是你会活下来的 我们谁也不会失去谁
en: But you're going to live. We're not going to lose each other.

zh: 仅仅是女性的小虚荣而已 我只是想让自己看起来最好
en: Just feminine vanity. I wanted to look my best again.

zh: 那么,你知道远比我意识到的要多
en: So you know more than I realised you knew.
- These impulses to go to him.

zh: 那力量强大的难以另人有力气来抗拒
en: The pull is too strong to withstand and live.
I am so glad you understand.

zh: 她他知道当她停止挣扎的一瞬 他会还给她去找他的力量的
en: She knows the moment she stops struggling, he will give her back her strength to come to him.

zh: 但是我不想失去我自己的意志 我不想变成一个我讨厌的人
en: But I don't want to lose my own mind and be someone else. Someone I hate.

zh: 亲爱的, 在你情况越来越糟的时候 我们试过去找他,但没找到
en: My dear, while you were growing worse, we tried to find him and failed.

zh: 下次召唤又来了的时候,到他那去
en: The next time the call comes, go to him.

zh: 穆勒, 我们现在怎么办?
en: Muller, what can we do now?

zh: 我们做不了更多的了 阿达斯击败了我
en: We can do no more. Ardath has beaten me.

zh: 下次他把她弄到他身边的时候 我们得跟着她
en: The next time he draws her to him, we must follow her.

zh: 我给了她写安眠药 她已经睡着了,我要去休息了
en: I've given her some bromide. She's asleep now. I'll go to bed.
I'll wait till Dr Muller comes.

zh: 这是我的床, 但此处既非神殿 亦非父王的王宫
en: This is my bed, but this is not the temple, nor my father's palace.

zh: 别看, 安娜卡苏纳蒙.
当你跪在我床前时,我很害怕 然后一片阴影浮在我眼前,一片黑暗
en: I was afraid. When you knelt beside my bed, a veil came over my eyes. Darkness.

zh: 你死前最后的记忆是关于我的 就在我3700年前跪在你床边之时
en: Your last memory is of me in the hour of your death as I knelt by your bed, 3700 years ago.

zh: 没有任何人像你这般为我受尽这等苦难
en: No man has ever suffered for woman as you suffered for me.

zh: - 现在诸神已宽恕了我们
en: - Now that the gods have forgiven us...

zh: 汝魂灵居于一凡人之躯 自你我相爱于古底比斯城 你已轮回了多次
en: Your soul is in a mortal body, renewed many times since we loved in Thebes of old.

zh: 然 自那大变起 此爱便不再属于你我
en: But that love is not for us again until the great change.

zh: 这是父王为我的死制的棺木
en: It is my coffin, made by my father against my death.

zh: 何方木乃伊敢占我安息之所？
en: What mummy has usurped my eternal resting place?

zh: 此乃汝前世躯壳 我曾欲使其复生
en: It is thy dead shell. I tried then to raise this body.

zh: 今我可施法使它复生，然独少一魂灵 我便可使吾愿得偿
en: I could raise it now, but it would be a mere thing that moved at my will, without a soul.

zh: 此身，吾所爱也 汝魂灵更为吾所怜
en: It was not only this body that I loved, it was thy soul.

zh: 吾将此毫无生气之物毁灭
然不需多时 汝当取而代之 而后如我一般复生
en: Thou shalt take its place but for a few moments, and then rise again, even as I have risen.

zh: 伊姆霍特普, 这是尸体防腐处理的地方.
en: Imhotep, this is the place of embalming.

zh: 我作为伊希斯的女祭司 是不能够看到和接触不洁之物的
en: It is not lawful for me, a priestess of Isis, to see or touch an unclean thing.

zh: 来亡灵接引之神安努毕斯祭坛之前
en: Come to the altar of Anubis, the guide of the dead.
The time has come for the final prayer.

zh: 我和安努毕斯有什么关系?
en: What have I to do with Anubis?

zh: 此古法须得施于汝之身上
en: The ancient rites must be performed over thy body.

zh: 而后，我将诵读 伊希斯将奥西里斯自墓中
en: Then I will read the great spell with which
Isis brought Osiris back from the grave.

zh: 我曾爱过你 但是你现在已经死了
en: I loved you once, but now you belong with the dead.

zh: 我是安娜卡苏纳蒙, 但我 我...
我想活下去 即便是在一个奇怪的新世界中
en: I want to live, even in a strange new world.

zh: 因汝之由 吾受了活葬之刑
en: For thy sake I was buried alive.

zh: 我垦请你受片刻苦痛 经过如此，我们方能再聚
en: I ask of thee only a moment of agony. Only so can we be united.

zh: 你不能把我的身躯泡在那里面
en: You shall not plunge my body into that.

zh: 把我从那木乃伊手里救出来!
我再也不怕你了 你要对我做什么都来吧
en: I no longer fear you. Do with me what you will.

zh: 她去找他了 他们一定在博物馆
en: She has gone to him. They must be in the museum.

zh: 现在我知道他可怕的计划了
en: Now I know his horrible plan.

zh: 他准备杀了她, 然后 把她变成像他一样的活死人
en: He is going to kill her, and make her a living mummy like himself.

zh: 诸神将取沉入地府安娜卡苏纳蒙之魂灵
en: The gods will receive into the underworld the spirit of Anck-es-en-Amon.

zh: 冥王奥西里斯将释还汝魂灵
你将如西方夕阳一般安息
en: You shall rest from life, like the setting sun in the west.

zh: 但你将获新生,如东方黎明般 如阿蒙 -拉的第一缕金光 驱走黑暗
en: But you shall dawn anew in the east, as the first rays of Amon-Ra dispel the shadow.

zh: 啊, 女神伊希斯 吾乃侍奉汝之贞女
en: O Isis, holy maiden. I was thy consecrated vestal.

zh: 吾誓言已破 请救我于危难！
en: I broke my vows. Save me now!

zh: 赐我古之召灵之法，赐我灵言
en: Teach me the ancient summons, the holy spells I've forgotten.
I call upon thee as of old!

zh: 他把她的灵魂带回了古埃及
en: He has dragged her back to ancient Egypt.

zh: 她对你的爱也许能超越时空
en: Her love for you may bridge the centuries.

zh: 不是血亲 导演 成濑巳喜男
en: NOT RELATED Directed by Mikio Naruse

zh: 原著 柳川春叶 编剧 野田高梧
en: Story: Shunyo Yanagawa Adaptation: Kogo Noda

zh: 副导演 片山雅可 永田俊彦 松井稔
奈良真养 筑波雪子
en: Shunsaku Atsumi ... Shinyo Nara Masako, his wife ... Yukiko Tsukuba

zh: 小岛寿子 葛城文子
en: Shigeko, their daughter ... Yoshiko Kojima Kishiyo, mother ... Fumiko Katsuragi

zh: 冈 让二 冈田嘉子
en: Masaya Kusakabe ... Joji Oka Tamae Kiyokawa ... Yoshiko Okada Keiji

zh: 结城一郎 阿部正三郎
en: Makino, her brother ... Ichiro Yuki Gen the Pelican ... Shozaburo Abe
Why do you insist I stole something?

zh: 我们客户的钱包，把它给我。
en: It is our customer's handbag. Give it back!

zh: 如果它在你身上， 我们会揍你一顿！
en: If we find it, you'll be knocked out!
You've chased me all this way.

zh: 我们今天在码头上有工作。
en: Today we have work at the harbor.

zh: 不要把时间浪费在琐碎的工作上。
好莱坞女王清冈球江今天归来
en: Hollywood queen Tamae Kiyokawa returns today.

zh: 有什么特殊的原因，你要回日本？
en: Do you have any special reason for your return?
I've come home to see my child.

zh: 环境迫使我离开她，六年前离开的。
en: Six years ago when I left Japan, I left my baby behind.
What is the name of the child?
Tamae's salary is 4,000 dollars a week.
And now she has a fortune of 500 or 600,000.
Her money is just one concern for me. I have others too.

zh: 你是说她在日本的时候， 是你... ...
en: If you did something with her when she was in Japan...
No, you're too young for it.

zh: 即使名字不同，我知道那一定是你。
en: I knew you were my sister, but you have a different name.

zh: 球江遗留在日本的孩子
en: The angel Tamae had left in Japan...
Mother, I'll bring your dishes now.
How is the trouble at the company?

zh: 乖, 重子自己去玩一会儿。
en: Be a good girl, Shigeko, go and play for a while.

zh: 我猜你已经知道一段时间了，出了一些情况 但现在应该做最坏的打算。
en: I think you could guess it already from before, but now you have to prepare.

zh: 我用尽一切办法， 但在这次金融危机中，这是不可能挽回了
en: I did everything possible, but in this recession, I couldn't recover.

zh: 我从一开始就知道这是个坏主意。 让你成为那家渔业公司的总裁。
en: From the start, I was against you becoming president of that fishing company.
It was obvious from the start.
It was your fault, you thought you could do it alone.

zh: 我很明白： 我受不了贫困。
en: Frankly, I don't want to be poor.

zh: 妈妈从未想过要... ... 她心烦意乱是很自然的事。
en: Mother has lived without knowing any hardships, it's natural she can't give it up.

zh: 我们去散步吧。 我今天有时间。
en: Let's go walk around, I have time today.

zh: 我能忍受任何事， 但我希望她能安逸长大。
en: I don't mind being poor, but I'd like her to grow up without any sacrifices.

zh: 她很幸运有像你这样的好妈妈。
en: She is happy, she has a good mother like you.

zh: 事情那样糟糕，请不要做任何违法的事。
en: Even though you're in trouble, please don't do anything illegal.

zh: 渥美先生什么时候结的婚？
en: When did Mr. Atsumi marry his wife?
It was soon after you left.

zh: 孩子认为她是亲生母亲。 似乎很依恋她。
en: Then the child thought she was her real mother, and became attached to her.

zh: 放弃她也许是明智之举。
en: It might be wise if you gave her up.

zh: 如果我能做到的话，我就不会回来了。
en: I didn't come back from the US to give her up.

zh: 等等，这不是渥美的公司吗？
看这个，他的公司倒闭了。
en: According to this, that company's going broke.

zh: 由于你自己的粗心大意，你受了伤害。
en: You got injured by being careless.

zh: 你救我候受了伤。 我怎样能睡得着？
en: My mother was hit for me, I couldn't sleep.

zh: 听到这些话我好很多了。
en: I will be cured with those words.
So please go to bed quietly.
We are not asking for your explanation.

zh: 我们只是想知道关于我们的未付工资。
en: We are asking about our unpaid salary.

zh: 我保证我不会让你失望的。

en: Please wait for a few days.

zh: 有投资者在给我们报价。 我的助理正过去和他谈
en: I've got an offer from someone, so my secretary Ochiai is there.

zh: 明天下午3点给你们最后答复。
en: Then we will wait for your answer til 3 pm tomorrow.

zh: 我遇到一个年轻的代理商。 他说如果你去他们的办公室，他们今天可以给你钱。
en: I met a young agent, who said he'll see you today and make an offer.

zh: 你不知道，我看到你很好，有多高兴。
en: I am very glad to see you looking well.
Is it you who offered me the money?

zh: 似乎命运使我们再次相聚。
en: I think it's because we have a chance.
Have you forgotten what you did?

zh: 她抛弃自己的丈夫和孩子，另一个男人私奔了
en: Who is the woman who abandoned her husband and child, and ran off?

zh: 我是专程来道歉的。 因为我不能忘记。
en: I came here because I could not forget.

zh: 我想帮助你，为自己赎罪。
en: I'd like to pay you for my past sin.

zh: 请你原谅。 让我再一次做重子的妈妈。
en: Please, please forgive my sin and let me be Shigeko's mother again.

zh: 重子已经有一个好妈妈了。
我决不允许像你这样的坏女人 说自己是重子的妈妈！
en: I refuse your offer to be her mother!

zh: 我给你找了一幢漂亮的房子。
en: I can find a good house.
I will not lose this way!

zh: 活了这么大岁数竟遇到这么羞辱的事儿
en: I've lived this long, and now I'm ashamed...

zh: 我宁愿死了也不愿看到这一天。
en: I'd rather die than bear it.

zh: 现在我要搬进一个小房子。
en: And now I have to move to a small house.
I'll be up in a few days.

zh: 发生了些事，我必须走出去。 一定要有足够的休息。
en: I have to go now, I have business to take care of, please rest well.
Please come to the police station.

zh: 我不在的时候，请照顾好家。
en: Please keep the house while I am away.

zh: 我不在的时候，你要听话。
en: Be sure to wait, be a good girl.
Why did they take the furniture?

zh: 重子，让我们高兴起来，好吗？

en: It's two hours since he left.

zh: 我不知道他是否遇到了麻烦。
你为什么把我带到这个大厦？
en: Why did you bring me to such a fine house?

zh: 不必担心，你很快就会明白的。
en: Don't worry. You will soon understand.

zh: 我这么晚才来很抱歉， 但请原谅我所做的一切...
en: I understand I failed in my social duties, but, please forgive my past and...

zh: 这一切感觉就像一场梦。

en: I have heard of your situation.
I guess you are worrying so much.
I think I can be of help.

zh: 这就是为什么我带你来这。
en: That's why I brought you here.

zh: 我可以再做重子的妈妈吗？
en: Is it possible to let me be Shigeko's mother again?

zh: 你什么时候从满洲里回来的？
en: When did you come back from Manchuria?

zh: 我马上就到你的旧房子来了 我有一段时间在这里找到你。
en: I visited your old house as soon as possible, but I had trouble finding you here.
It seems you've got thinner this time.
I am sorry I could not help you...

zh: 但是如果我在附近，我可能帮上忙。
en: I was not in the country.
By the way, what will you do?

zh: 那边有不错的画展，去看看。
en: There comes an interesting picture-show at that corner. You can go there.

zh: 你想上汽车来我家玩吗？
en: Why don't you come to my house riding in this car?

zh: 如果你和我一起去，你可以见到你真正的妈妈。
en: If you come with me, I can introduce you to your real mother.
There's a kidnapping woman at that corner.

zh: 我已经把她带到别的家里。
en: "I am taking Shigeko to a certain place.

zh: 不必担心，我以后再告诉你。
en: Don't worry." "I will hasten to inform you further.

zh: 我想我知道他们去哪了。
en: I know where they have gone.

zh: 我听说渥美的前妻 重子的生母已经回日本了
en: I hear Atsumi's former wife, that is, Shigeko's real mother, has come back to Japan.

zh: 他们可能在她那儿， 但不幸的是 我不知道在哪里。
en: I guess they went there, but I do not know where she is.

zh: 如果你是对的 我是不是要把重子还给那个女人？
en: If it is true, must I give her up?
You don't need to give her up.

zh: 现在你是重子的唯一妈妈

en: Leave it all to me and wait.

zh: 这是一位老校友的妻子。
en: This is the wife of my good friend since early school days.

zh: 我不要洋娃娃，我想回到我妈妈身边。
en: I don't want a doll. I want to go back to my mother.

zh: 这不是你的私人酒吧，安静！
en: This is not your own bar. Be quiet!
That's not your sake, you show-off.

zh: 好吧，我们都知道你有多厉害。
不好意思, 我能说一句话吗？
en: I'll have a word with you.

zh: 如果你不知道孩子在哪里，告诉我你妹妹在哪里。
en: If you don't know where the child is, tell me where your sister is.
I'd like to go back to my mother's.
Let's play with some interesting things.

zh: 让你的叔叔给你看狮子与黑豹的搏斗。
en: They will show you a battle between a lion and leopard.
Be a good girl, play with this mother here.

zh: 我更喜欢我的另一个妈妈。

en: Please go back to that mother's home.

zh: 不管你怎么看，你输掉了这场战斗。
en: I think you have no chance to win.

zh: 你们谈论日下提醒了她
en: You talked about Kusakabe in front of her, that reminded her.

zh: 外面有个女人叫渥美雅子。
en: There's a woman here named Masako Atsumi.

zh: 你好，我是雅子，重子的妈妈。
en: How do you do. I am Masako, Shigeko's mother.

zh: 我是来带走她和婆婆回家的。
en: I came here to bring her back.

zh: 你和重子没有血缘关系。 你以为你可以带她走？
en: Why do you, not related to her, think of taking charge of her?

zh: 即使我十年没见到她了，甚至永远， 她仍然是我的孩子。
en: Even if I hadn't seen her in ten years, or even forever, she is still my child.
Didn't you decide to cut the connection between mother and child?

zh: 你怎么能说她是你的孩子？ 你从没养育过她？
en: Can you insist she is your child when she was never at your breast?

zh: 乖，和你奶奶去另一个房间。
en: Be a good girl, please stay in that room with your grandmother.
I think you'd better go back tonight.

zh: 我今天来这里是为了道歉。
en: I came here today to apologize.

zh: 你前妻带走了你的妈妈和重子。
en: Mother and Shigeko were taken by your former wife.

zh: 我去找回重子， 在我赶出来之前，我好不容易才看见她。
en: I went to bring her back, but I was kicked out after only seeing her face.

zh: 日下先生几乎每天都去谈判 但他见不到孩子。
en: Day after day, Mr. Kusakabe is carrying on negotiations, but she won't even meet with him.

zh: 如果不让我的孩子回来，我会...
en: If she does not come back to me...
Why doesn't she take to me easily?

zh: 我们可能分开的太久了 但她，我永远无法忘记。
en: Even though we've long been separated, I never forgot her.

zh: 可是她不能原谅我，甚至不愿和我坐在一起。
en: But she dislikes me, she even refuses to sit by me.

zh: 妈妈和孩子的关系真的如此脆弱？
en: The bond between mother and child is so fragile?

zh: 你不要担心 她很快就会爱上你一切的好。
en: You don't need to worry so much she will come around sooner or later.

zh: 不论在任何地方我都要找到重子！

en: Grandma, I'd like to see my mother.
Your mother is here. Please be a good girl.
I'd like to see my mother's face.

zh: 和我预计的一样 我买了些食品。
en: I brought some food with me today.
I will wait here until she returns.
Well? Did the child get attached to you?

zh: 她不会这么快就爱上她的妈妈，你知道吗？ ...
en: I think she's not lacking filial devotion to her mother...

zh: 我认为是我所做的是正确的。
en: I believe I am going the right way.
I won't be under your care.
I admire you on that point.

zh: 但是说我老实话 这难道不是一个空洞的胜利吗？
en: But, I guess you feel disappointed at your victory.

zh: 如果把重子毫不犹豫地给你 我现在要说服雅子放弃孩子
en: If she liked you better than nothing, I would ask Masako to give her up instead.

zh: 但我认为不是生育 而是养育的孩子的人才是母亲
en: But I think it's not bearing a child but raising one that makes a woman a mother.

zh: 重子的病情，医生不允许你和她说话
en: The doctor has some words for your daughter.

zh: 我不会带走生病的孩子。
en: I won't insist on taking a sick child.
I would only like to see her face.

zh: 即使你看她，她也不会和你走的。
en: If she met you, she would want to go back!

zh: 请也考虑一下我的感受！
en: Mr. Kusakabe, please think of me also!

zh: 即使在你睡着的时候，我也想在你身旁。
en: I'd like to stay here only while you are asleep.
Be a good girl, don't say such things.
Please call her mother, even just once.

zh: 如果我叫了，你让我回到我真正的妈妈身边吗？
en: If I call her that, could you take me to my mother?

zh: 等你想叫的时候在叫我妈妈。
en: I will wait until you call me that from your heart.

zh: 奶奶，你为什么让我呆在这？
en: Grandma, why do you keep me in this house?
I'm starting to dislike you, Grandma.

zh: 我从没想过你这么爱你的另一个妈妈。
en: I can't imagine you like that mother so much.
That's because that mother is a very good mother.

zh: 我会让你知道谁是你的妈妈。
en: I will let you meet your mother secretly.
Please let me see Shigeko, just for a moment.

zh: 妈妈，即使我死了，也不会和你分开。
en: I wouldn't leave you even if I died.

zh: 雅子偷偷地来这儿, 但我让她进来了。
en: I'm the one who let them meet secretly.

zh: 重子太爱雅子了。 我真的为她感到难过。
en: I feel pitiful, Shigeko loves Masako so much.
If she goes, I will go, too!

zh: 不是生育孩子，而是养育孩子 才让女人成为母亲
en: "I think it's not bearing a child but raising one that makes a woman a mother."
Today I bring you some good news.

zh: 第一个，球江已决定把她所有的财产给重子。
en: First, Tamae has decided to give all her fortune to Shigeko.

zh: 她愿意给你完全监护权。
en: She's decided to let Shigeko stay with you.
At this point, I feel sorry for her.
And there's other news, that is more pleasant.
I can't believe Shigeko came too.

zh: 这亏了球江。 我的意思是 娟子开始明白什么是真正母亲的爱。
en: It's because Tamae... no, Kinuko came to know the real love of a mother.

zh: 反正，我们很快会看到娟子。
en: Anyway, we will visit Kinuko soon.

zh: 我会告诉你路上的细节。
en: I will tell you the details on the way.
The car is waiting for us.
But on that day, Tamae is...

zh: 我从来没想过，我们最终将去美国。
en: Brother, I didn't imagine even in a dream that we could go to America.

zh: 春天是个多事的季节， 尤其在巴黎
en: Spring is here... and spring is a dangerous time of the year, especially in Paris.

zh: 到处都是酷爱旅游者的身影 这里聚集了来自各地的游客
en: The wanderlust is in the air.
Travelers are coming here from everywhere - from Cincinnati and Singapore.
- Now, what do they come for?

zh: 对．芝加哥的包装工人 不会仅为一份冷盘到这里
en: That's right. Chicago packers don't come here for a plate of cold cuts.

zh: 巴西的大种植主 不会仅为了坚果到这儿
en: Big planters don't come from Brazil just for nuts.

zh: 挪威和瑞典不会来这儿仅为捕鱼
en: From Norway and Sweden, they don't come here to fish.

zh: 但是，不管他们来自阿姆斯特丹 伯明翰还是暹罗（泰国的旧称） 我们都会尽量让他们的需求 得到满足
en: But whether they come from Amsterdam or Birmingham or Siam... we let them do whatever they wish.

zh: 让他们尽情地玩 只要他们支付得起
en: We let them play in any way... as long as they're willing to pay.

zh: 当夜幕降临时 我们的咖啡馆都空荡荡的
en: And after dark, our cafés are empty.

zh: 但是，每晚在公园里 却都只有站立的地方了
en: But every park has standing room only every night.

zh: 不会吧 确实是这样的
最好的咖啡馆都在亏本
en: Our best cafés are losing money.

zh: 我们必须保持公园的清净
en: We must clean up the public parks.

zh: 我们的口号是： 公园清净．财富多多
公园清净，公园清净 财富多多．财富多多
en: Cleaner parks. Cleaner parks. More prosperity.
Come on. Come on. Where do you think you are?

zh: 你们不能在公共场所嘿咪
en: Hey! You can't make love in public.

zh: 一我可以在任何地方嘿咪 一不．你不可以
en: - I can make love anywhere. - No, you can't.

zh: 一长官．他可以的 一亲爱的！
en: - Oh, but, Officer, he can. - Darling!

zh: 你叫什么名字 拜梯尔
一那么你们是夫妻了，对吧？

en: And you expect me to believe that?

zh: 一嗯．请相信这一点 一请相信

en: Now let me tell you something.

zh: 你们是到这公园里的唯一的一对夫妻
en: You're the only married couple in this park.

zh: 但是我们没有其它地方可去了
en: Well, there's only one other place to go.

zh: 长官．看．你看到那月亮了吗？
en: Listen, Officer. Do you see that moon?

zh: 如果他会说法语的话 你知道他会告诉你什么吗
en: If he could talk French, do you know what he would say to you?

zh: 女士们．先生们．我郑重告诉你们
en: Ladies and gentlemen, I must talk to you.
This is a very delicate situation.
There is Colette, and here am I.

zh: 我知道你在想什么 我知道
en: And I know what you think. Oh! I know.
He was wrong. And so are you.

zh: 不管你相信否．我们是夫妻
en: Believe it or not, we are married.
And I can prove it to you.

zh: 看．这是我们婚礼的照片
en: Oh, look. This is a picture of our wedding.

zh: 换句话说，我是结婚的 我很喜欢这种状态
en: In other words, I am married, and I like it.

zh: 不好意思．让你们失望了
先生们．作为一个医生 我想问你们一个私人的问题
en: Now, gentlemen, as a doctor... let me ask you a personal question.

zh: 你们 多久以前来过公园？
en: How long since you have been in a park?

zh: 我指的是．我指的是．和你的妻子
en: I mean - I mean, with your wife.

zh: 女士们．这就是不对的地方了
园游活动也是婚姻生活的一部份
en: Build up your park life to ensure your home life.

zh: 为了她． 我待会过来陪你
en: That's for her. I'll be with you in a minute.

zh: 什么小东西可以像婚戒一样
en: ♪ What a little thing like a wedding ring can do ♪

zh: 它甚至赋予我 与你一起生活的权利
en: ♪ It can even give me the right to live with you ♪

zh: 我们不需要关心 是否全世界都知道
en: ♪ We don't have to care if the whole world knows ♪

zh: 你可以为我付账单．给我买衣服
en: ♪ You can pay my bills You can buy my clothes ♪

zh: 一切都很好．我吻着．说着
en: ♪ And it's quite all right if I kiss and tell ♪

zh: 它是合法的 它太美妙了
我们不用偷偷摸摸 躲在一个秘密的角落
en: ♪ We don't have to hide in a secret rendezvous ♪

zh: 我们可以在最好的 酒店里住两人套间
en: ♪ In the best hotel we could get a suite for two ♪

zh: 一这不是一种罪过 一它充满了情趣
en: - ♪ But it's not a sin ♪ - ♪And it's full of spice ♪

zh: 一它是合法的 一它太美妙了
en: - ♪ But it's lawful ♪ - ♪And it's awful nice ♪

zh: 非常奇妙，与你每夜都能约会
en: ♪ It's really great to have a date each night with you ♪

zh: 早晨的你也是如此地迷人
en: ♪ You're so charming in the morning too ♪
♪ That I miss you through the day ♪

zh: 一生中每晚都与你相约
en: ♪ You have a date for every night your whole life through ♪

zh: 最美妙之处在于， 当我邀约的时候
en: ♪ And the beauty of it all is that when I come to call ♪
♪ I am sure that I can stay ♪

zh: 我们可以因而热烈地 卿卿我我．甜言蜜语
en: ♪ It allows a thrill when we start to bill and coo ♪

zh: 我可以担担你这， 担担你那
en: ♪ I can squeeze you here I can squeeze you there ♪

zh: 而不会被你勒令： "给我小心点！"
en: ♪ And I'm never told to handle with care ♪

zh: 我可以长长地吻着你的手
en: ♪ I don't have to stop when I kiss your hand ♪

zh: 它是合法的 它太美妙了
我和你共享 生命中的爱与欢乐
en: ♪ While we love and laugh I go half and half with you ♪

zh: 我们同享生命中的喜悦
en: ♪ And we share delight that we're both entitled to ♪

zh: 我的就是你的．你的就是我的
en: ♪ What is mine is yours What is yours is mine ♪

zh: 一它是合法的 一它是神圣的
什么小东西可以像婚戒一样
en: ♪ What a little thing llke a weddlng rlng can do ♪♪
Oh, darllng, I forgot to tell you.

zh: 你猜明天谁过来吃午饭？
en: You know who's coming tomorrow for lunch?
I want you to tell me all about it.

zh: 亲爱的．你还不知道是谁呢
en: But, darling, you don't even know who it is.

zh: 是米基．我以前学校的 密友米基．
en: It's Mitzi. My old school chum Mitzi.

zh: 安德烈，你为什么 与米基过不去呢
en: Andre, what have you against Mitzi?

zh: 甚至还不认识她呢 是．不认识
en: - You don't even know her. - No.

zh: 我希望你见见她 好啊
en: - I want you to meet her. - Yes.

zh: 我猜你肯定会喜欢她的 嗯
en: - I know you'll like her. - Mm-hmm.

zh: 在她搬去洛桑之前 她是我最最好的朋友
en: She's the very best friend I had until she moved to Lausanne.
- Mm-hmm. - And now she's come back.

zh: 我和她结婚的时候 她只是个深褐色头发的女子
en: When I married her, she was a brunette.

zh: 但是现在她一个字 你都不能信
en: Now you can't believe a word she says.

zh: 教授，没什么不对劲的 你有任何证据吗？
en: That's all very well, Professor, but have you any proof?

zh: 作为可能会雇私人侦探的客户 我可以问你一个问题吗
en: As a prospective client to a detective, let me ask you a question.

zh: 作为一个可能会受雇于 客户的侦探．老实说．不
en: Well, as a detective to a prospective client, uh, no.

zh: 一抽根雪茄 一谢谢
现在我想问另一个问题
en: Now let me ask you another question.

zh: 从男人的眼光看 你觉得这算是美女吗
en: As one man to another, would you call this a beautiful woman?

zh: 她又说谎了 以牙还牙吧

en: Well, uh, I don't want to disturb you.

zh: 在瑞士，我们拥有 这种特殊的法律
en: In Switzerland we have a very peculiar law.

zh: 当丈夫把妻子杀了 他们就会把他送进监狱
en: When a husband shoots his wife, they put him in jail.

zh: 一这辆计程车有人坐了吗？
真的，我不太愿意这样做， 先生 没关系．小姐
en: - Really, I - I hate to do this, monsieur. - It's perfectly all right, madame.

zh: 也许我们两个一 也许我可以载你一程
en: But perhaps both of us - Perhaps I could drop you, if you -

zh: 我准备去博伊西 我也是
en: - I'm going towards the Bois. - So am I.
- Oh. That's fine. - Oh, that's splendid.

zh: 从侦探的角度看 你最好现在就提出离婚吧
en: Speaking "detectively," you're as good as divorced right now.

zh: 你觉得这个五年的计划 可行吗？
en: Do you think the Five-Year Plan will go over?

zh: 我不大喜欢计划， 小姐
en: Madame, I don't believe in making plans.

zh: 我让一切顺其自然地发生
en: I leave everything to the moment.

zh: 这是个很适宜居住的地方
en: It's a very good place to live in.

zh: 你真好人， 让我搭这趟顺风车
en: You know, I think it was awfully sweet of you to take me along.

zh: 哈哈，先生， 你还挺不谦虚的
不用这样说，小姐． 我已经结婚了．

en: Mm-hmm. And she has a husband.

zh: 告诉我，你觉得像我们这样在 车里孤男寡女的．什么问题吗
en: Tell me. Do you see anything wrong in us being alone together in this cab?

zh: 肯定没有啦 我也是这样觉得
两个陌生的异性， 同在一辆车上 肩并肩地坐着
en: Two strange people of opposite sex, riding in a cab... sitting side by side.
The lady looking out of the window.

zh: 她肯定不相信 你会相信吗
en: She won't believe it! Would you believe it?

zh: 从来都不信 我自己都不信
en: - Never! - I wouldn't believe it myself.

zh: 我可以告诉你， 我丈夫也不会相信．
en: No, and let me tell you something. My husband wouldn't believe it either.
Oh, m-madame, we're in a terrible situation.

zh: 我们应该觉得羞耻 所有的事实都不利于我们
en: Oh, we're as good as guilty. All the facts are against us.

zh: 把报纸扔掉．面对我们的现实
en: Throw your newspaper away and let us face the facts.

zh: 小姐，你或许会认为 我是一个懦夫
en: Madame, you may think I'm a coward.

zh: 米基，亲爱的．你怎么样啊？
en: Oh, Mitzi, my darling. How have you been?

zh: 自从洛桑那天后就没见过你了
en: I haven't seen you since that day in Lausanne.

zh: 我有好多话想跟你说． 真不知从何说起
en: I've so much to tell you I can hardly begin.

zh: 我们在洛桑的时候 不是都很快乐的吗
en: But weren't we happy and gay in Lausanne?

zh: 你看起来 聪明能干的样子， 和当初一样啊
en: You look just as smart and as stunning as then.

zh: 我看起来更加明智了 多亏了某些男人
en: Oh, I'm much wiser, though, thanks to several men.

zh: 那个作曲家怎样了 你跟他交住很久的那个
en: Oh, how's the composer you went with so much?

zh: 他离开了不过还和我 有密切的联系
en: He's gone, but he had such a wonderful touch.

zh: 那个画家呢 为你画过薄纱画的那位
en: And the painter who painted you all draped in gauze?

zh: 一天晚上，我才发现他 这个艺术家真正的面目
en: One night I found out what an artist he was.

zh: 你房间美极了， 太棒了
那张床 一太漂亮了，真希望是我的
en: And that bed - It's too gorgeous. I wish it were mine.

zh: 巴黎女士 一我最爱的香水牌子
en: My favorite perfume. Femme de Paris.

zh: 安德烈很大方， 他送我的
en: Yes. Andre's so generous. He gave it to me.

zh: 俄，我给你看看 我的新内衣
en: - Oh, I must show you my new lingerie.

zh: 如果只供丈夫看的话， 太可借了
en: Too stunning for only a husband to see.

zh: 它们看起来真的很漂亮
我只是告诉安德烈 我没什么衣服可穿了
en: I was just telling Andre how I've nothing to wear.

zh: 一是啊．这些都是他买的
哇．他们看起来多漂亮啊
en: Oh, they're as cute as can be.
But where is the rest of them?

zh: 我为他买他所有的东西 相信不？ 他带的领带也是
en: I buy all his things, and believe it or not, he wears even the ties.

zh: 他一定很爱你 教授呢．他怎么样？
en: - Well, he must love you a lot. - How's the professor?

zh: 俄，他还是那样啊 你看起来好像不高兴
en: - Oh, he's still on the scene. - You don't sound so happy.

zh: 除非你们配合得好 要不婚姻总会被高估
en: Unless you're well mated, this business of marriage is much overrated.

zh: 米基，你知道吗 我感到非常遗憾听到这样
en: Oh, Mitzi, you don't know how sorry I feel.

zh: 因为对于安德烈和我 怎么说呢？ 他太完美了
en: As for Andre and me - well, he's just too ideal.

zh: 我们彼此给予对方激情
en: He sets me atingle. I set him aflame.
♪ We will always be sweethearts the same ♪
♪ He kisses me and my lips are so willing ♪
♪ That each time it's more thrilling ♪

zh: 一这是米基 一这是安德烈
en: This is Mitzi. And this is Andre.

zh: 我最好的朋友和 我的丈夫
en: My very best friend and... my very, very husband.
Look at him. Look at him.

zh: 不 我告诉你．他可以的
en: - No! - I tell you he can!

zh: 不要 亲爱的． 扮嘛！

en: - No, no. - Oh, please do, Dede.

zh: 不要，才不 医生， 拜托．扮扮猫头鹰
en: - Oh, please, Doctor. Look like an owl.

zh: 小姐，你希望 一不要．是的．扮扮嘛
en: - Oh, now, madame. Will you - No.
- You will do it for me?

zh: 不，不，真的，我 米基， 希望你好好地享受这一餐
en: - No, no. Really, I - - Mitzi, I hope you have a good appetite.
My wife thinks I am a darling.

zh: 妻子的朋友觉得我可爱
en: And my wife's friend thinks I'm cute.
But I am determined not to weaken.

zh: 打爱丽舍宫0546 , 叫拜梯尔过来
en: Oh, call Élysées 0546. Tell Dr. Bertier to come.

zh: 一好的，小姐，马上就去 一说说我的情况
en: - Yes, madame. At once. - Describe my condition.

zh: 一告诉他，你很害怕 一小姐
en: - Tell him you fear the worst. - Oh, madame!

zh: 照我吩咐的做，爱丽舍宫0546 .
en: Come on. Do as I tell you. Élysées 0546.

zh: 请拜梯尔过来．请快点．快点
en: Tell Dr. Bertier to come. Now hurry up. Hurry up.
She wants the doctor right away.

zh: 安德烈， 没空跟你开玩笑
en: Andre, this is no time for joking.

zh: 她可以叫另外一个医生的
让她叫另外两个医生吧 我不想与米基有业务上的来往
en: Let her get two other doctors. I don't want to mix business with Mitzi.

zh: 他不想与你 有业务上的来往
en: He doesn't want to mix business with you.

zh: 一你怎么不能对我朋友好点？
en: - Why can't you be nice to my friends?

zh: 一这是工作上的事不能混为一谈
en: - But this is business. This is different.

zh: 一你讨厌她 一亲爱的，不要这么胡闹啦．
en: - You hate her. - Oh, darling, don't be ridiculous.

zh: 一我与她没有什么过节 一我知道你讨厌她
en: - I have nothing against her. - I know you hate her.

zh: 一为什么我要讨厌她啊 一你就是不喜欢她
en: - But why should I hate her? - Well, you certainly don't like her.

zh: 一那你为什么不想去呢？
en: - Then why don't you want to go?

zh: 一因为我不想在工作上与她联系
en: - Because I don't want to mix "musiness" with Bitzi.

- I want to say "How do you do?" to her.

Well, Colette, when are we going to have -

♪ To hold you in my arms ♪
♪ But I haven't time for saying ♪
♪ What I think of your charms ♪

滚，要不我打电话 给我丈夫了．

一非常欢迎你的到来 一嗯．嗯

You were in my apartment last night.

en: You went to the corner, jumped into a cab.
My wife was in that cab.

zh: 想想看，作为招待她的主人 显然
我想看到她安全地抵达家时
en: I wanted to see her get home safely.

en: Thank you for protecting my wife, Doctor.

-The car arrived in front of my house at 2:35.

en: You and my wife stayed in the car... for eight minutes... up to 2:43.

One question follows an answer. You know?

zh: 八分钟．八分钟就那样过去了

Then you, uh - you got out of the car.

zh: 你打开了门 短暂的交谈后．你走了进去

zh: 是的，你，你的妻子， 你的妻子说

zh: "你要不进来喝点 白兰地吧？"
en: "Wort you come up and have a little brandy?"

zh: 我说， "好吧， 喝，点也无妨？"
en: And I said, "Ah, a little brandy can't hurt."

zh: 一然后．我进去了 一是

And, uh - And you had the brandy?

你从2: 53分开始喝白兰地 直到4:
en: You drank this brandy from 2:53... to 4:44.

We just -We just had a chat... and a few laughs.

zh: 但是其他人都不会信 太糟了 ．对吗？
en: But no one else will. Too bad, isn't it?

zh: 等他安排好一切，现在我们的时机还没成熟
风水轮流转，有一天会轮到我
en: Just some guy who's a little bit more smart than Big Louie. That's all.

zh: 别忘了，北区那些猴子不是那么好对付。
en: Hey, that guy is soft. I could just see it in his face.

zh: 哦，是吗？ 听说他们还不满意吗？
en: He's got a setup, that's all, and we gotta wait.

zh: 为什么他们这么快背叛大路易？
en: Someday I'm gonna run the whole works.

zh: 听着，小朋友，在道上混，你有些事得永远遵守
en: Yeah? Remember, those monkeys on the North Side ain't so soft.
Why didn't they come and take Big Louie before we did? Listen, Little Boy.
Do it first, do it yourself and keep on doin' it.

zh: 你告诉她我让她回家吃饭。 明白吗？ 当然可以。

en: Ain't she comin' home for dinner?

zh: 你弄伤我的手了！ 我不想让任何人搂着你的身体。
en: - That's a nice way I catch ya, huh?
- You was kissin' him. - Sure. What of it?
- You're missin' lots of fun, Tony.
- Listen, I don't want anyone ... - ... kissin' my sister. Understand?

zh: 当然，从来没有任何乐趣。
en: - I don't want anybody putting' their hands on you!

zh: "从来没有任何乐趣。" 你认为这很好玩是吧？
en: - What do you think you're doing? - Well, I'm your brother.

zh: 和这样的家伙到处疯，这就是乐趣！
en: - You don't act it. You act more like ... I don't know.

zh: 听着，你想真正的乐趣，是吧？
en: - Sometimes I think... - I don't care what you think.
- Sure, and never have any fun.

zh: 哎呀，Tony， 你从哪儿弄来的？
你不用管我从哪里弄来的。
en: Listen, you want real fun, huh?

zh: 你只负责花了它，懂了吗？ 你真棒
记住，别把我的话当耳边风。
en: - Gee, Tony! Where'd you get it?

zh: 不要再出现这些，明白吗？
en: - Never mind where I got it.
And remember, you do what I say.

zh: 你又拿你哥哥的钱， 是吧？ 因为我需要，这就是原因。
这钱并不干净 Tony这些钱不是靠正档工作赚来的。
我该怎么办 丢回给他？ 有什么不对 他把它给我。
en: - What for you take that money, huh?
Tony no got it in no good way.

zh: Tony没有爱你 他只是喜欢你罢了
en: It gonna bring you lotsa trouble.
